干巴巴的讨论永远比不上实际行动。走吧，我已经物色好了今天的拍照地点。
Meaningless discussion can never be compared to real action. Come on, I've found a photo spot for today.
摄影需要故事方能吸引人的眼球，而站在你眼前的恰巧是一个有故事的男人——你要做的就是把我散发魅力的瞬间捕捉下来。
A photo needs a story to attract attention, and you're looking at a man full of stories. All you have to do is capture the moment when I exude charm.
来吧，来歌德宾馆的大堂找我。该让你看到华劳斯•凯特博瑞屈•莱姆士汀不一样的一面了。
Come and meet me in the lobby of the Goethe Hotel. It's time to show you a different side of me.
不错，不错…你抓住了精髓。歌德宾馆的红茶口感上乘，价格不菲。有心来此享用下午茶的客人必然都有着不俗的品位。
Good... This is a great photo. Goethe Hotel's black tea is excellent and expensive. Those who come here for afternoon tea must have good taste.
有机会的话，我想和自己未来的朋友一同享用下午茶的时光，在这舒适的大堂里相互推心置腹。
If there's ever a chance, I would love to enjoy afternoon tea and have a heart-to-heart talk with my future friend in the cozy lobby.
好了，该去帮我找朋友了。和以往一样，要找的人由我来指定。
All right, it's time to help me make friends. Just like before, I will decide who I want to make friends with.
你听过塔米拉这个名字吗？她是贝洛伯格当红的舞台剧明星。我一向希望能结交有天赋的艺人朋友，和他们聊天一定会大有收获。
Have you heard of Tamila? She is a popular stage actress in Belobog. I've always wanted to make friends with talented artists. Chatting with them will surely be rewarding.
你能否带着照片去帮我问问，看看她愿不愿意和我做朋友？
Could you show the photo to her and ask her if she's willing to be my friend?
Wallace wants to be friends with you.
我没听过这个名字，怎么这么突然？难道又是哪位疯狂的戏迷……
I've never heard of this name. This is all very sudden. Is he another crazy fan of mine...?
他是莱姆士汀家的公子。
…这么说，他来自贝洛伯格的上流社会？
So, he is from the upper class of Belobog?
圈外人大概不了解，所有戏迷里最难缠的就是有钱有闲的那一类。抱歉，我不能答应他的请求……
People outside the theater industry might not understand that fans are hard to deal with, especially the ones with lots of money and free time. I'm sorry, but I can't be friends with him...
也许你该先看看这张照片。
Maybe you should look at this photo first.
…照片？真是奇怪，一般的戏迷都更偏向于给我写信…好吧，让我看看。
Photo? That's weird. My fans usually write me letters. Well, I'll take a look.
…啊，原来是这位！我经常在剧院的前排瞥见他，大概也能推测出他身世显赫……
Oh, it's him! I remember seeing him sitting in the front row of the theater a lot. He seems to be born into a noble family.
不行…那我就更不能和他发展私交了。我身为公众人物，又正处在事业上升期，万一在这个时候传出和名门望族的绯闻……
If that's the case, I can't be friends with him. As a public figure whose career is on the rise, I can't be seen getting involved with someone with a famous name...
麻烦你，能礼貌地帮我回绝莱姆士汀先生吗？如果他想要的话，我可以帮他在照片上签名，权当一点心意。
Would you be so kind as to tell Mr. Limestein that I can't be his friend? If he wants, I can sign his picture as a token of my gratitude.
塔米拉不想和你做朋友…
Tamila doesn't want to be your friend...
…什么？她看过照片了吗？她有说什么吗？
What...? Has she seen the photo? Did she say anything?
将和塔米拉的谈话内容转述给了华劳斯……
You convey what Tamila said to Wallace...
原来如此…塔米拉小姐不想和我走得太近，是因为害怕自己的演艺生涯受挫——可以理解。
I see... Miss Tamila doesn't want to cozy up to me for fear of ruining her career. I can understand that.
可惜，本以为我能和她一起在歌德宾馆享用下午茶，畅聊演艺圈的趣闻轶事…看来这个愿望算是破灭了。
Too bad. I thought I could have afternoon tea with her at the Goethe Hotel and chat about the interesting things in the theater industry. I guess that will never happen.
不过莱姆士汀家的人是不会轻易气馁的。我迟早会交到「真心」的朋友，让拒我于门外的人后悔。
But we Limesteins are not quitters. Sooner or later, I will find a "true" friend, and those who rejected me will regret it.
感谢你的帮助，年轻人。这是你的报酬——下次我再需要帮忙的时候，希望你还在。
Thank you for your help. This is the payment I promised. I hope you can still help me the next time I need your help.
啊，我亲爱的孩子们。我听老朋友说起，你们找到了来自过去的歌德老宅，这些神奇造化，一定都是圣贤的安排。
Ah, my dear children. An old friend told me you found the Goethe Mansion from the past. These miracles must have been arranged by the Sage.
尽可能地找到了来自过去的典籍，它们是真的复制了过去吗？还是说，这只是破碎的残象而已。
Even if we find all books from the past, are they really copies of the past? Or is it just a shattered illusion?
啊，我亲爱的孩子们，你们做得好啊！
Ah, my dear children, you have all done well!
你听说了啊？你也知道，我常来这里思考，看着眼前的垃圾桶，就像看着我自己，年近三十却一事无成。

Did you? You know, I often come here to contemplate life. When I am looking at that trashcan, I feel like I am looking at myself. I'm close to <unbreak>30</unbreak> but I haven't achieved anything in life.
前几天，我像往常一样来到这里，却发现垃圾桶里躺着一张漂亮的明信片——没想到竟然是寄给我的，署名是「垃圾大王」。
A few days ago, I came here like I always do, and I found a beautiful postcard lying in the trashcan. Surprisingly, it was addressed to me, it was from "Garbage King."
这位「垃圾大王」我也有所耳闻，听说是一位神秘的拾荒者。没人知道他的真实身份，可能是我一直待在垃圾桶边，引起了他的注意吧？

I've heard things about this "Garbage King." They say he's a mysterious scavenger and nobody knows who he really is. Maybe I've been hanging around this trashcan for so long that I caught his attention.
我原以为是自己误入别人的地盘，受到了警告…结果没想到，明信片上写的居然都是鼓励的话语。他说他看过我写的小说，很喜欢那些故事，希望我不要放弃。这可真是……

At first, I thought I trespassed somebody's territory and this was a warning... Unexpectedly, the postcard is full of encouragement. He said he's read my novel and he really loves my stories. He told me not to give up. It was really...
也许他只是想安慰我，可字里行间，我看到的却是一位远比我更具才华的作家。
Maybe he's just trying to cheer me up. But from his words, I see a writer much more talented than myself.
你看——「一个人的诞生，就像垃圾落在垃圾桶中，发出悦耳动听的声音，令人心生喜悦」，多么精妙的比喻呀，我仿佛从中读出了古代战争年代的苦涩……

Look — "The birth of a person is like rubbish landing in the trashcan. There's a pleasant sound and it brings joy to people." What a wonderful metaphor. It's like I am reading about wars in the distant past...
还有这一句——「朋友，这一辈子太过漫长，你还有足够的时间去感受人生，直到贝洛伯格送别最后一个垃圾箱」，一个人要经历多少悲苦，才能写出如此浪漫的文字？

And this — "My friend, we have a long life ahead of us and you still have time to experience your life, until Belobog sends off the last trashcan." How much sorrow does one have to endure before one can write such romantic prose?
那些我苦思冥想才能写出的辞句，他却信手拈来，这种感觉就像是…我正在与一位遍历风雪的「国王」交谈，他如此伟岸，我才是那个渺小的流浪汉！
Words that take me ages to come up with seem so easy to him. I feel like... I am conversing with a "King" who conquered the wind and snow. Like he is a saint while I am just an insignificant vagrant!
我已经没心思想其他事了。如果你知道任何有关这位「垃圾之王」的事，请告诉我吧。
Now I can't focus on anything else. If you know anything about this "Garbage King," please let me know.
我想知道他是谁，从何而来，又经历过什么。至少，我想明白自己与对方的鸿沟落在哪里……
I want to know who he is, where he comes from and what he has been through. At least I want to understand the gap between us...
一个平平无奇的垃圾桶，就像一个平平无奇的垃圾桶。「垃圾大王」似乎不在这里。
An ordinary trashcan... Just like an ordinary trashcan. The "Garbage King" doesn't seem to be here.
一个空空如也的垃圾桶，似乎已被人光顾过。垃圾消失在垃圾桶里，就像水滴消失在水塘中。
An empty trashcan. Looks like it's been cleared out. Trash disappearing into a trashcan like droplets of water disappearing into a pond.
垃圾桶里躺着一张漂亮的明信片，上面写着：「朋友，你走在正确的路上，却走得太快；不妨暂且驻足，让时光得以歇息。署名：垃圾之王。」

A beautiful postcard is lying in the trashcan. It says, "My friend, you are walking the right path but you are walking too fast. Why don't you take a break and let time rest? Signed by: Garbage King."
This is the clue you are looking for.
又一张明信片…不可思议，难道我的一举一动都在他的注视下吗？
Another postcard... Unbelievable. Has he been watching me?
如此奇妙的人，竟然是个街头的拾荒者…还是说，他其实另有身份，只是甘愿体会这种生活呢？
What a weirdo. I still can't believe he's a scavenger... Does he actually have another identity and is he doing this to experience another kind of life?
我感觉到了，好像有一簇灵感射入了我的大脑，一些我之前从未有过的想法…总之，谢谢你。我会好好珍惜这两张明信片的。
I can feel it. Inspirations shoot into my head. These are the ideas I've never had... Anyway, thank you. I will cherish these two postcards.
在垃圾桶里翻找「垃圾大王」…
Sifting through the trash to look for the Garbage King.
我需要帮助？有这回事吗…你等等啊，让我仔细回忆一下……
Help? Do I... Give me a minute, let me see if I can remember...
…呃，你要帮我做什么？完了完了…昨天晚上到现在的记忆，我一点都没有了……
Um, help me with what? Oh no... I lost my memory from last night till now...
这下糟了，我也不知道啊！你还记得什么细节吗…比如从哪儿听说的，或是谁拜托的你……
That's too bad, me neither! Do you remember the details... Like where did you hear it or the person who told you?
Maybe... helping you find your memory?
原来如此，这好像就说得通了……
I see, now it makes sense...
这样吧，要不…你在这附近转转，看看有没有什么奇怪的地方？要是我真的遇到了什么事，一定会留下痕迹的，没错吧？
Well... why don't you walk around here and see if you can find anything strange? If something did happen to me, there should be traces left behind, right?
这段时间，我也再努力回想一下，从头捋一遍…你沿着这条路一直走吧，然后往右…不对，是往左…不，也可能是那条路……
I'll also try my best to recall what happened right from the start... Walk along this way and turn right... No, turn left... Hold on, maybe it should be the other way...
你打开回收箱，看见垃圾袋向里凹陷，空出一个人的形状——是谁把这里当作了床？
You open the recycle bin and see a caved-in section among the bags of rubbish, in the shape of a person... Has someone been sleeping here?
半桶红色的油漆，已经快干了。一页白纸静静地躺在桶里，上面写着：「你永远无法逃离我。」
Half a bucket of red paint, which is almost dry. A white piece of paper lies silently in the bucket. It says, "you will never get away from me."
一把矿镐落在这里，木柄上刻着「马克西姆」。
A mining pick with name "Maxime" on the wooden handle is left here.
墙上有一些斑驳的痕迹，你隐约觉得似曾相识，却不知道这是什么。墙边的角落，痕迹仿佛勾勒出一个数字——「3」。
There are some dirt marks on the wall. They look familiar, but you can't understand what they mean. The marks seem to trace out a number — 3.
一块告示板，被人用炭笔粗暴地涂黑，只留下一个形似橄榄枝的图案，像是有人在磐岩镇的黑夜中记录着什么。
A notice board brutally covered in black soot, only leaving behind a shape that looks like an olive branch. It was as if someone was recording something in the dark Boulder Town night.
This surely has something to do with you.
这是…矿镐？原来是这样，我刚刚也隐约想起来点什么，我好像是丢了什么重要的东西。
Is this... a mining pick? I see. I can vaguely remember something... I think I lost something quite important.
但这真的是我的矿镐吗？我不记得在上面刻过字啊…算了，想那么多干嘛，就当是它吧。
Is this really my mining pick? I don't remember carving my name on it... Anyway, does it matter?
不过，为什么会掉在那种地方呢…我得想一想，再好好想一想……
But why was it left there... Let me think... Let me think real hard...
呀，原来{M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}是为这个来的吗，阿丽娜好开心哦~
Wow, did you come here for this? I am so happy.
是发生了一些事呢。最近，有奇怪的说法在诊所里传开了，说是…「只要把心意写在纸上，让信鸽带向天空，就能将声音传递给阿丽娜」什么的……

Yeah, something did happen. Recently a strange rumor has been circulating in the clinic that "If you write your wish on a piece of paper and let a pigeon carry it to the sky, your wish will be conveyed to Alina..."
{M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}也觉得很奇怪，对不对？有什么话明明可以直接和阿丽娜说的呀，为什么要这么辛苦呢？
Don't you find this strange? They can just come to me directly. Why bother doing all that?
结果，街道上到处都是飞散的纸条。收到这么多信件，我当然很高兴啦，但也很担心会给大人们添麻烦。
As a result, there are now pieces of paper flying around the streets everywhere. Of course I am happy to get so many letters, but I'm also worried that this may become a problem for others.
阿丽娜不想看到大家挨罚。拜托了，{M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}，可以在娜塔莎姐姐发现之前，帮我找到那只「信鸽」吗？
I don't want people to be punished. Can you please find that pigeon before Natasha finds out?
你远远地打量着菲多拉。有那么一瞬间，脑海中闪过了「信鸽」是机械造物的可能。但你很快否定了这个想法。
Looking at Fidora in the distance, an idea crosses your mind, the "pigeon" could be a robot. But you quickly rule out this idea.
你的目光扫过地面，试图捕捉羽毛和爪印的痕迹——结果当然一无所获。你从未在贝洛伯格见过飞翔的鸟类。
You look all over the ground, trying to find traces of feathers or claw marks — but you come up empty-handed, as expected. You have never seen a bird in Belobog, after all.
也许「信鸽」是某位斗士的名字。毕竟都有人叫「冷面小青龙」了，还有什么不可能的呢？
Maybe "pigeon" is the name of a warrior, which isn't that strange. After all, there's even somebody called "Cold Dragon Young."
一个纸团孤零零地躺在地上，它为什么会在这儿？你弯腰将其拾起，内心却有个声音让你不要打开——你应该把它带回给阿丽娜。
A paper ball is lying on the ground. Why is it here? You bend down to pick it up. Your inner voice tells you not to open it — you should bring it back to Alina.
没有找到「信鸽」，但发现了奇怪的纸团？让我看看哦…咦，这是？
You didn't find the pigeon, but you found a strange paper ball? Let me see... is this...
原来是这样啊…我大概知道「信鸽」是什么了。{M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}，可以再帮我找找类似的纸团吗？我想，应该还有三个吧。
I see. I think I have an idea what the "pigeon" is now. {M#Sir}{F#Ma'am}, can you find more paper balls like this for me? I think there are three more.
至于这张纸上写了什么…算啦算啦，我还是替尤利安保守一下秘密吧~
As for what's written on it... Well, I think I better keep this a secret for Julian.
又一个纸团孤零零地躺在地上，你记忆中的磐岩镇并没有这么杂乱。
Another paper ball is lying on the ground. You didn't expect Boulder Town to be this messy.
一个纸团孤零零地藏在地髓之间，是纸团，总会被发现。
A paper ball is buried within the Geomarrow. Paper balls will always be found.
一个纸团孤零零地卡在路灯上，你轻轻一推，它掉了下来。
A ball of paper is stuck on the street lamp. You give it a soft push and it falls.
我看看哦。这是埃里克的，这是罗密欧的，还有这封，再加上之前尤利安的…大家的「信」都在这里啦。
Let me see. There's one from Eric, one from Romeo, now this one, plus the previous one from Julian... We've got everyone's "letters" here.
原来「让信鸽带向天空」就是「把信揉成团扔到天上去」的意思啊，真是的，至少折个纸飞机嘛。
So "let a pigeon carry it to the sky" just means "crumple up a paper ball and throw it into the air." Come on, can't they at least fold a paper airplane?
这样，大家就不会被娜塔莎姐姐骂啦。谢谢{M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}，你对阿丽娜最好了~
This way, no one will get in trouble with Natasha. Thank you, you are the best!
你问这些纸团怎么办？嘻嘻，交给阿丽娜吧，大家的心意…当然是要好好珍藏呀。
You mean how am I going to deal with all these paper balls? Hehe, just leave them to me... Of course I'm going to treasure their wishes.
{M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}找到其它纸团了吗？快给阿丽娜看看吧。
So, you've found all the other paper balls? Please show them to me.
啊，外来者，是你们啊。来的正好，我有个差事想拜托你们，事成之后必有重谢。
Ah, outsiders. You've come just in time. I have something to ask of you. You will be rewarded, of course.
实不相瞒，我想让你们到恶魔之胃里搜集一些古代遗物。
To tell you the truth, I want you to go to the Devil's Stomach and collect some ancient relics.
我记得你不再鉴定古代遗物了。
I thought you weren't in the appraisal business anymore.
谁说要鉴定了？我只是让你去找，没说别的——你可别到处胡说八道啊！
Who said anything about appraisals? I just want you to go for a search — don't go spewing nonsense!
大致的地点我已经标出来了。拿到之后直接回我这儿来，别告诉任何人！
I've marked their rough location. Bring them back to me once you've found them. Don't tell anyone!
按照巴列维的指示果然找到了古代遗物，他甚至没有来过这里，他是怎么知道的呢？
You found the ancient relics that Balaway was looking for. Without having been here, how did he know where to look?
好家伙，手脚够利索啊。东西给我，钱你拿走。
Oh my, you're just as reliable as you look. Give them to me. Take your reward and leave.
我懂我懂，你想问的是，我怎么知道恶魔之胃里藏着好东西，是吧？
I know what you want to ask. How did I know there's some good stuff in the Devil's Stomach, right?
那我就直说了，这都是客人透露给我的。我只是用了点小手段，撬开了他们的嘴巴…嘿嘿。
Well, I'll just tell you. One of my customers tipped me off. It took me some time, but with a few tricks, he opened up to me... Hehe.
哎哟，我跟你说这么多干嘛？行了行了，任务结了，报酬也领了——要是没有别的事，各位就请回吧！
Wait, why am I telling you so much? The mission is over and you have your reward. If there's nothing else, please leave!
喂，{NICKNAME}！快过来——安静点，别发出声音！
Hey, {NICKNAME}! Come over here — don't make any sound!
什么捉迷藏啊，这次咱们要干的事可比捉迷藏有趣多了！
Nah, this time we are going to do something much more fun than hide-and-seek!
你这孩子，怎么总鬼鬼祟祟的…
How come you are always sneaking around...
什么叫鬼鬼祟祟！我可是负责给鼹鼠党出谋划策的干部，隐秘行动就是我的工作！
What do you mean by sneaking around! I'm the cadre in charge of making plans for The Moles. Covert operations are what I do.
告诉你吧，今天我们要执行一项绝密任务！你作为鼹鼠党的「荣誉队员」，现在被我征用了！
Let me tell you, today we have a top-secret mission! As an honorary member of The Moles, you are now being commandeered by me!
It's all up to you, boss.
什、什么老大呀，别瞎说！要是被虎克老大听到就惨啦。
Wh—what boss? Don't talk nonsense! I will be in trouble if Boss Hook heard it.
别扯闲天啦，时间不等人，万一把任务搞砸了可就没法交差咯。
Enough chitchat. We're losing the daylight. We can't mess this up.
我们出发吧，目的地——「地火」的秘密集会所！
Let's go! To the secret gathering place of Wildfire!
怎、怎么办呢…这里有两箱应急药品，我到、到底该先送哪一边？
Wh—What should I do... There are two crates of emergency medicine here. Which box should I deliver first?
不、不管了！就先送这一箱吧，另、另外一箱等我回来再说……
N—Never mind! I'm gonna deliver this box first, and then, the other one after I come back...

Quick, honorary member! The guy from Wildfire left, let's go have a look!
秘密任务就是偷人家的东西？
So the secret mission is to steal from others?
什、什么啊，你别胡说八道！鼹鼠党才不会干那种事！
N—Nonsense! The Moles wouldn't do that!
Tell me what you're up to first...
哎呀，你非要在这种关头问问题嘛！
Ugh, do you have to ask questions right now?
我就告诉你吧，鼹鼠党要抢在「地火」发现之前，把那箱药物送到需要的人手上。
Here's the deal. The Moles is going to deliver the medicine to those in need before Wildfire finds out.
至于理由…哎，现在不是解释的时候！总之先快行动起来吧。
As for the reason... well, now is not the time to explain! We should hurry.
走，咱们去看看那箱东西！
Come on, let's take a look at that box!
看，箱子上面写了配送地址！{NICKNAME}，我们快去给有需要的人送药吧。
Look, the shipping address is written on the box! {NICKNAME}, let's send it to those in need now.
一定要赶在「地火」反应过来之前把东西送到，嘿嘿！
We have to deliver it before the Wildfire realizes, hee-hee!
你…你们是？这打扮看着不像「地火」的人呐……

奶奶，我们是「鼹鼠党」的派送员！以后需要帮忙的话，记得联系我们哦！
Lady, we are couriers from The Moles! If you need help in the future, remember to call us!
…「鼹鼠党」？那不是一帮小孩子吗……
..."The Moles"? Isn't that a bunch of kids...
哦…呵呵，我明白啦。谢谢你们，我等这件快递已经等了小半天了。
Oh... hehe, I get it. Thank you, I have been waiting for this package all day.
我先回去了，家里那位老头还指着这箱药呢。希望你们能继续加油干，「鼹鼠党」的年轻人……
I should go home now. My husband is waiting for this box of medicine. Keep up the good work, you kids from The Moles...
太棒了，荣誉队员！这次秘密行动执行得非常完美，值得褒奖！
Great job, honorary member! This secret mission was executed perfectly! You deserve some kudos!
我觉得「地火」也能处理这事…
I think Wildfire can handle this too...
I still don't quite get it...
唔，大人的脑子可真笨呀，你到现在还没明白嘛？
Well, grown-ups are so silly. You still don't get it?
偷偷告诉你，这都是「鼹鼠党振兴计划」的第一步哦——找到「地火」工作中的疏漏，然后靠我们敏捷的行动力把空缺补上！
It's a secret, but I'll tell you. This is the first step of The Moles Reinvigoration Plan — find the work that Wildfire has neglected and take it up right away!
只要我们坚持这么做，鼹鼠党很快就能在下层区积攒名声啦…说不定有一天还能取代「地火」，成为最受欢迎的超级组织！
If we keep doing this, The Moles will soon build up a reputation in the Underworld... Maybe one day it will replace Wildfire and become the most popular super organization!
总而言之，这次你干得相当不错，值得表扬！我会把你的事迹汇报给虎克大人的，放心吧。
You did a pretty good job this time and deserve some credit! I will tell Boss Hook about it. Don't worry.
下次我有事召唤你的话，你也要随叫随到哦——那就这样吧，鼹鼠党，解散！
Next time I call on you for something, don't forget to show up right away — so that's it, The Moles, dismiss!
喂，荣誉队员{NICKNAME}！这里这里，赶紧过来！
Hey, honorary member {NICKNAME}! Here, here, come here!
你那是什么态度啊？赶快打起精神来，这是命令！
What's that attitude? Sharpen up! And that is an order!
Hats off to you, Captain Julian!
啊？哦，那个…稍息！哎呀，你怎么突然表现得这么客气，我都不习惯啦！

你还没忘记「鼹鼠党振兴计划」吧？告诉你哦，根据我的线人报告，「地火」今天又要送很多份物资——这不正是鼹鼠党出动的好时机嘛！

You haven't forgotten The Moles Reinvigoration Plan, have you? Let me tell you, according to my informant's report, Wildfire needs to send lots of supplies today — isn't this a good time for The Moles to make a move?
当然是阿…不对不对，我才不能告诉你！作为鼹鼠党的首席情报官，保护线人可是我的义务！

可恶，大人的记性都这么差嘛？
Ugh, do all grown-ups have such bad memory?
那我就再给你解释一遍吧——「鼹鼠党振兴计划」就是要找到「地火」工作中的疏漏，然后靠我们敏捷的行动力把空缺补上！
Then I'll explain it to you again — The Moles Reinvigoration Plan is to find the work that Wildfire has neglected and take it up right away!
只要我们坚持这么做，鼹鼠党很快就能在下层区积攒名声，说不定有朝一日还能取代「地火」！嘿嘿……
If we keep doing this, The Moles will soon build a reputation in the Underworld, and maybe one day replace Wildfire! Hehe...
好了好了，别浪费时间了，我们快去「地火」的秘密集会所看看情况吧。
Alright, that's enough talk. Let's go to the secret gathering place of Wildfire and see what's going on.
唔…奥列格头儿之前说，今天的任务是给在矿区作业的矿队运送生活物资，但可没提过是要送两大箱东西啊……
Hmm... Boss Oleg said earlier that today's mission is to deliver daily necessities to the mining team, but he didn't mention it was two giant crates...
这么重，而且还是在不同的矿区…怎么办怎么办？斯薇塔，好好想想……
They are so heavy, and should be delivered to different mining areas... What should I do? Think, Swetta, think...
…哎呀，不管了，还是用老办法吧！一二三四五，矿区打地鼠；地鼠跑得快，伤筋又动骨……
...Ugh, whatever, I'll stick to my old trick! Eeny, meeny, miny, mole, catch a little mole by its toe. If he hollers, let him go, eeny, meeny, miny, mole...
好，就先送它了！哎，明天又要腰酸背疼了……
Well, I'll deliver this one first! Ugh, my back is gonna hurt tomorrow...
唔，原来大人也会用那么幼稚的方法做决定啊……
Hmm, so grown-ups would also make decisions this childishly...
快，{NICKNAME}！趁着斯薇塔姐姐刚走，我们赶紧过去看看剩下的那箱货物！
Quick, {NICKNAME}! Swetta just left, let's go check out the other box of goods!
这箱子上也写了配送地址，让我看看！
The shipping address is also written on the box. Let me take a look!
大矿区…伊蕾恩…哦，原来是伊蕾恩姐姐需要的物资！太好了，这下我就能拜托她帮忙宣传鼹鼠党的事迹啦。
The Great Mine... Elaine... Oh, these are the supplies Elaine needs! Great, now I can ask her to help spread word about The Moles' good deeds.
走吧，荣誉队员！我们去大矿区给伊蕾恩姐姐送物资！
Let's go, honorary member! Let's go to the Great Mine to deliver supplies to Elaine!
荣誉队员，看那边，伊蕾恩姐姐好像被一群坏家伙围住了！
Honorary member, look! Elaine seems to be surrounded by some bad people!
快点，{NICKNAME}！我们去教训那帮坏家伙一顿，把她给救出来！
Hurry, {NICKNAME}! Let's teach those bad guys a lesson and save her!
哼，那帮家伙，欺负女孩子的时候那么嚣张，其实根本不经打嘛。
Hmph, those shameless thugs only acted tough when they were bullying a girl.
我…我没事！谢谢你们，{NICKNAME}，还有尤利安……
I... I'm fine! Thank you, {NICKNAME}, and Julian...

You saved me again. I can't thank you enough.
下次出来作业记得带个同伴。

我…我知道了，下次一定！又被您救了一次，实在是不好意思……

这是…我之前订的生活物资？

嘿嘿，「地火」的家伙才不靠谱呢。告诉你吧伊蕾恩姐姐，以后这下层区就是鼹鼠党的天下啦——不管是打坏人还是送快递，都可以委托我们哦！

Hehe, the guys from Wildfire are not reliable. Let me tell you, Elaine — from now on, The Moles will take over the Underworld! You can entrust us with anything — beating up bad people or delivering packages, anything!
「鼹鼠党」？啊…我明白了！谢谢你，尤利安，鼹鼠党真是一群乐于助人的孩子。

这次的行动也完美收官咯，{NICKNAME}！真不愧是虎克大人亲自任命的荣誉队员，不但跑得很快，战斗起来也很拉风嘛！
Good job, {NICKNAME}! You're really worth your salt as an honorary member appointed by Boss Hook — you act fast, and fight well!
多亏了咱们的努力，「鼹鼠党振兴计划」又向前迈出了一大步！喏，这些奖励你拿好了，以后还要继续帮尤利安打下手哦。

嘿嘿，又被我撞到了！你每次出现的时机都刚刚好，简直太完美啦。

稍息，荣誉队员！听我慢慢和你说……

根据我的英明判断，这可是「鼹鼠党」趁机介入的好机会，{NICKNAME}！要是我们能把他们来不及处理的订单都提前送到……
According to my wise judgment, this is a good opportunity for The Moles, {NICKNAME}! If we can deliver all the orders that they can't handle in time...
…那「鼹鼠党振兴计划」的目标说不定就能提前达成咯，很棒吧？

让我看看，这里有两箱物资，分别要送到<color=#dbc291ff>机械聚落</color>和<color=#dbc291ff>歌德大饭店</color>……
Let me see, there are two boxes of supplies to be delivered to <color=#dbc291ff>Robot Settlement</color> and <color=#dbc291ff>Goethe Grand Hotel</color> separately...
唔，之前「地火」的大人遇到这种情况，总是要纠结很久——也就是说，要是我们能把这两份物资都快速送达，那鼹鼠党就完成了「地火」做不到的事情…对吧？

Well, the grown-ups from Wildfire always waste a lot of time deciding which one to deliver first — so if we can make these two deliveries quickly, it would mean The Moles can achieve what Wildfire can't... right?
太好了，{NICKNAME}，咱们一定得把这件事办成！把两箱物资都拿上，先送哪份就由你来定吧！

咦？怎么回事，你怎么一副很着急的样子？还有这位小朋友，为什么要跑来聚落……

我们是来送货的！{NICKNAME}，把菲多拉姐姐的物资拿给她吧。

啊——这是我之前下单的机械零件！没想到这么快就送到了，「地火」的效率可真高啊。

It's not Wildfire! It's The Moles!
姐姐你要记住哦，鼹鼠党才是下层区最厉害的组织！虎克老大会满足大家的所有要求！

哎呀，这不是我之前包给熔锤镇老铁匠的那批餐具吗？本来约定的交货时间是下个星期，没想到这么快就送到了…谢谢你们专门为此跑一趟。
Oh, it's the tableware order I placed! I thought it wouldn't be delivered until next week... Thank you for making a special trip for this.
嘿嘿，不用谢，歌蒂阿姨！记住，以后再有需要帮忙的地方，可以随时召唤鼹鼠党哦！

「鼹鼠党」…？啊，我明白了，是奥列格之前提到过的……

啊，没什么，别在意！既然餐具这么早就到了，饭店的环境翻新日程也该提前了，哈哈。

谢谢你们，{NICKNAME}还有尤利安。有关「鼹鼠党」的事迹，我肯定会多跟客人们提及的。

唔…这么一想，我们的人手会不会不够呢？得想个办法，把整个磐岩镇——不对，是要把整个下层的小孩子全都纳入鼹鼠党的旗下，嘿嘿！
Hmm... in that case, we probably need more people. We gotta figure out a way to recruit all the kids in Boulder Town — no, the whole of Underworld, hehe!
就这么决定了，下一步的行动计划，就起名叫「鼹鼠党极速扩张作战」吧！
So that's it, the next action plan — The Moles Rapid Expansion Operation!
干得不错，荣誉队员{NICKNAME}——以后你也要多多支持本情报官的工作哦！今天就到这里吧，鼹鼠党，解散！
Well done, honorary member {NICKNAME} — please keep supporting my job as an intelligence officer in the future! Let's call it a day. The Moles, dismiss!
刚才那个小鬼…是叫尤利安对吧？这几天来真是有劳你们俩了，哈哈哈。

你也知道，下层区没有铁卫管束，很多民间事务只能靠「地火」出面解决，其中就包括生活必要物资的分装、派送。
You know, there are no Silvermane Guards in the Underworld, and many civil affairs can only be handled by Wildfire, including the distribution and delivery of basic necessities.
你应该懂吧？派送这活需要消耗大量的人力，光凭我手下的那些人，就算日夜连轴转也没法保证整个下层区的物资供应。
You get it, right? Delivery requires a lot of hands. Even if my people work <unbreak>24</unbreak>/7, they couldn't guarantee the supply of the whole of Underworld.
正巧，「鼹鼠党」的那群孩子都是个顶个的热心。有他们掺和这么一下子，我们本来紧张的运力反而能缓解不少了。
Luckily, the kids of The Moles are very caring and helpful. Their involvement actually helps a lot.
So Julian was just being used!
哈哈哈，先把话说明白咯，这可不是我出的主意啊。要我猜的话…指定是娜塔莎跟虎克说了什么悄悄话吧？
Hahaha, let's make it clear first, this is not my idea. If I had to guess... it must be Natasha who told Hook some "secrets."
总而言之，看在我的面子上，这事你可要跟「鼹鼠党」的孩子们保密啊——就让他们继续保持这股子乐于助人的热情吧。
Anyway, for my sake, please keep this a secret from The Moles kids — just let them keep up their enthusiasm for helping others.
荣誉队员{NICKNAME}！快过来快过来，又有新任务啦！
Hey, honorary member {NICKNAME}! Quick, come here! We have a new mission!
「振兴计划」已经进行到最关键的攻坚阶段了！我们必须发扬虎克老大提倡的鼹鼠党精神，一鼓作气，埋头苦干，坚定不移！
The Moles' Reinvigoration Plan has reached a critical stage! We must carry forward the spirit of the Moles advocated by Boss Hook! Now's no time to waver! March onward!
...Seems you learned a lot of new mottos lately.
只是复述虎克老大的原话而已——这才不是重点！
That's beside the point! The point is to recite the original words spoken by Boss Hook!
不愧是荣誉队员，要的就是你这股劲！
Not bad for an honorary member! That's the spirit!
我的小弟之前得到消息，「地火」又积攒了一批需要递送的货物，但因为人手紧张还没能发货。
My source told me earlier that Wildfire just accumulated another batch of goods that needs to be delivered, but they haven't been able to ship them out because of staffing constraints.
这不正是我们的机会吗？快，跟我去「地火」的集会所看看情况！
Isn't this our chance? Come on, let's go to Wildfire's Gathering Place and see what's going on!
This is all a scheme by Wildfire...
啊？什么阴谋，你别在那胡思乱想啦！
What? Scheming? That's quite the imagination you've got there.
走了走了，得趁着「地火」反应过来之前赶紧行动！
Let's go! We have to act quickly before Wildfire has a chance to react!
走吧，得赶在「地火」反应过来之前行动！
Let's get on with it. We have to act quickly before Wildfire has a chance to react!
快看，荣誉队员！「地火」要送的快递果然都放在这里。
Honorary member, look! It's the supplies Wildfire is planning to ship out.
唔，居然堆积了这么多…这帮大人到底行不行啊！
Oh, there's so much stuff piled up here... Can we really rely on these people?
让我看看——有要送到娜塔莎姐姐的诊所，有送到大矿区的，还有要送到机械聚落的……
Let's see — some are headed to Natasha's clinic, some to the Great Mine, and some are going to the Robot Settlement...
哇…待派送的快递实在太多了！只靠咱们两个恐怕一整天都送不完……
Wow... there are so many deliveries to be made! I'm afraid that just the two of us won't be able to deliver them all even if we work for the whole day.
唔，我还答应了阿丽娜，今天晚上要带她去吃火激凌…荣誉队员{NICKNAME}，我们今天就选一份快递派送吧！要送哪份就交给你决定！

Well, I promised Alina that I'd take her out for Fire Chillin' Ice Cream tonight... So, honorary member {NICKNAME}, let's pick one package to deliver today! I'll leave it up to you to decide which one!
收件人是匹克…哦，就是那个一直睡懒觉的矿工叔叔吧？
The recipient is Peak... Oh, I guess is the miner who is always sleeping in.
收件地址是大矿区…哇，他今天居然去干活了？真是难得一见。
The delivery address is the Great Mine... So he went to work today for real? How peculiar.
走吧，我们去大矿区找他！
Let's go find him in the Great Mine.
唔…我好像听虎克老大说过这个名字，好像是个住在机械聚落的怪姐姐……
Umm... I think I've heard Boss Hook mentioning this name before. She's a quirky girl living in the Robot Settlement if I remember correctly...
听说她得了一种「凡是说话就必须押韵」的怪病…正好！趁着这次机会，我也要去见识一下！
I heard that she developed a strange condition where she constantly speaks in rhyme. I'd say this is a perfect chance for us to check it out.
收件人是…哇，字迹歪歪扭扭的，完全看不清楚！
The recipient is... ugh, the handwriting is terrible. I can't figure it out!
地址倒是能勉强看清…是娜塔莎姐姐的诊所！让我猜猜，这快递应该是要送给某个病人的吧？
The delivery address is still readable... Natasha's clinic! Let me guess. Could it be sent to a certain patient?
走吧，我们去诊所问问看——嘿嘿，这下说不定还能得到娜塔莎姐姐的表扬……
Let's go ask around in the clinic. Hehe, a helpful kid like me might even earn Natasha's praise...
Hey, Wake up! Peak, wake up!
哇，睡得也太沉了吧！换作是我，肯定没法在这么硬的地上睡着……
Oh, he's sound asleep! If I were him, I definitely can't sleep on such a hard floor...
You want me to kick him up?
…不必不必！看他睡得这么熟，肯定是采矿的工作太累了吧？
...No, no! He must have been tired from mining and needs a good rest.
…算了算了！看他睡得这么熟，肯定是采矿的工作太累了吧？
...Never mind! He must have been tired from mining and needs a good rest.
就把快递包裹放他旁边吧——哦对，记得在上面写上鼹鼠党的名字！
Let's leave his package next to him. Oh right, don't forget to put The Moles' name on it!
…好啦，这样就行了。希望他醒来以后能记得把包裹带上……
...Okay, this should do it. Hope he still remembers he has a package when he wakes up.
多谢你的帮助，荣誉队员{NICKNAME}！「鼹鼠党振兴计划」今天又向前迈出了一大步，这都多亏了你的努力…还有我的周密计划！
Thanks for your help, honorary member {NICKNAME}. The Moles' Reinvigoration Plan has taken another big step forward. This is the fruit of your contribution... as well as my careful planning!
用不了多久，有关咱们的英雄事迹就会传遍下层区了…怎么样，是不是很期待？
Before long, our legendary story will be told throughout the Underworld. Don't you feel excited!?
下次任务再见啦，荣誉队员——鼹鼠党，解散！
I'll see you at our next mission, honorary member. The Moles, dismiss!
说唱歌手…哇，好酷！尤利安也想成为酷酷的说唱歌手！
A rapper... That sounds so cool! I want to become a cool rapper, too!
...Hey, why aren't you saying anything either?
咳，算啦！不想说话也没什么。{NICKNAME}，快把伊妮丝姐姐的快递交给她吧。
Huh... Never mind! I won't blame you for keeping quiet, {NICKNAME}. Just hand over Eunice's package to her.
姐姐拿好，这是你的包裹！切记，是鼹鼠党把它交到你手上的哦——下层区最酷的鼹鼠党！
Your package, sis, there you go! Remember! The coolest The Moles delivered it over to you.
哟哟——耶，站稳，听好！这里是八十八度矿底的伊妮丝——今天要把发自内心的赞美，献给这个乐于助人的小鬼！
Yo, yo, listen up! Eunice from <unbreak>88</unbreak> Degrees Bedrock. Here's something for this kind and warm little kid. Respect from the deep of my heart!
喔、喔哦，要开始了吗？！我、我还没准备好呢——
Wow, yes, the rap is gonna start!? I—I'm not ready yet!
下层的野兽用激情点燃午夜，像骄傲的鼹鼠用辛勤对抗毁灭，
Light up the night with the fervor of the Undergrounds. Face up the destruction with toil like the pride moles.
不惧前路，不耍态度，只为每个孤单无助的灵魂都能被在乎，
Show no fear. Bring no veneer. Take care of the lost souls that are here.
无所谓，不去理会，信念的破碎又或是懒惰的罪，
Whatever the pain, however they complain. With shattered faith led astray from the lane, sinful indolence is the ultimate drain.
哪怕壮烈的「地火」不再如太阳般常燃——
Even if the valiant Wildfire would rise no more with the morning sun...
生而好强的鼹鼠也绝不妥协于黑暗！耶~
No born brave moles would ever yield to the darkness none!
…喔…喔哦！太酷了，说唱实在是太酷了！
Wow... oh! That's amazing! The rap is so cool!
{NICKNAME}，还好你选了这份快递！我以后也要多跟伊妮丝姐姐学习，然后当上鼹鼠党最酷的说唱歌手！
{NICKNAME}, I'm so glad that you picked this package to deliver! I'll learn from sister Eunice and become the best rapper of The Moles!
多谢你的帮助，荣誉队员{NICKNAME}！「鼹鼠党振兴计划」今天又向前迈出了一大步，这都多亏了你的努力…还有我的周密计划！
Thanks for your help, honorary member {NICKNAME}. The Moles' Reinvigoration Plan has taken another big step forward. This is the fruit of your contribution... as well as my careful planning!
用不了多久，有关咱们的英雄事迹就会传遍下层区了…怎么样，是不是很期待？
Before long, our legendary story will be told throughout the Underworld. Don't you feel excited!?
下次任务再见啦，荣誉队员——鼹鼠党，解散！
I'll see you at our next mission, honorary member. The Moles, dismiss!
Oh my, my head is so dizzy...
晕…有人在跟我说话吗？哎哟…我的药怎么还不来……
Oh... Is someone talking to me? Ah my medicine... when can it arrive...
药…啊，难道老奶奶的包裹里放的是治头晕的药吗？
Medicine... Oh, maybe her medicine is in this package?
荣誉队员，快把快递交给老奶奶吧！
Honorary member, hand over the package to grandma now!
老奶奶，拿好！快把药先吃了吧！
Grandma, take it! Have your medicine!
咕嘟…唔…好多了，这下好多了……
*glug* Umm... Good, I'm feeling better now...
谢谢你，孩子…还有你，年轻人。要是没有你们，这头晕的毛病怕不是要把我折磨个半死…唉……
Thank you, kid... And you, young one. My head would be torn apart by the dizziness without your help... *sigh*
这毛病跟了我好多年了，吃多少药都根治不了。娜塔莎医生这儿的特效药都要被我吃光了，她只能通过特殊渠道帮我找药……

This ailment has been with me for many years, and no matter how many medications I take, it never fully goes away. I've almost used up all of Doctor Natasha's stock to the point where she has to source more medicines for me through special channels.
老奶奶…你就好好在这儿休息吧！鼹鼠党记住你的难处了——以后我们也会经常给你送药的。
Grandma... have a good rest here! The Moles have heard about your problem, and we will continue delivering medicines to you from now on.
有娜塔莎姐姐在，你的头晕病一定能被治好的！一定要相信娜塔莎姐姐……
Natasha will definitely heal your dizziness! Have faith in her...
谢谢你，小朋友。啊，鼹鼠党可真是一群好孩子啊……
Thank you, kid. Oh, The Moles are a group of lovely children...
多谢你的帮助，荣誉队员{NICKNAME}！「鼹鼠党振兴计划」今天又向前迈出了一大步，这都多亏了你的努力…还有我的周密计划！
Thanks for your help, honorary member {NICKNAME}. The Moles' Reinvigoration Plan has taken another big step forward. This is the fruit of your contribution... as well as my careful planning!
用不了多久，有关咱们的英雄事迹就会传遍下层区了…怎么样，是不是很期待？
Before long, our legendary story will be told throughout the Underworld. Don't you feel excited!?
下次任务再见啦，荣誉队员——鼹鼠党，解散！
I'll see you at our next mission, honorary member. The Moles, dismiss!
老奶奶吃下了快递包裹里的头晕药……
Grandma had the medicines contained in the package...
与神情焦虑的老铁卫搭话…
Start a conversation with the anxious old guard...
矿石封装检查，完成…每周军备例行维护和清洁，完成……
Ore pack inspection, checked...Weekly armament routine maintenance and cleaning, checked...
唉，又是平平淡淡的一天……
…怎么说我也是铁卫的后勤官，居然要被你这种小年轻嘲笑，唉……
... As the logistics officer of the Guard, I can't believe I am actually laughed at by a young {F#lady}{M#man} like you, alas...
等会儿，站住——你是谁？难道是非法闯入者？
Wait a minute, stop — who are you? Are you an intruder?
向吉尔伯特展示禁区通行证。
Show Gilbert the restricted zone pass.
哦，原来你有凭证啊…可惜，还以为我终于能在信里写些特别的事了……
Oh, so you have a pass... What a pity, I thought I could finally write something special in the letter...
没、没什么，你就当没听见吧……
No, nothing, just pretend you didn't hear it...
如果没有凭证，你打算怎么办？
What were you going to do if I didn't have a pass?
没、没打算干什么，不骗你，真的。
No, I... I didn't intend on doing anything... and I'm not lying to you now.
等、等等！那个…我看你虽然年纪不大，倒是摆出了一副饱经世事的神态嘛？能不能帮我这老兵一个忙？
W—Wait! Hmm... You look young, but your face seems to suggest you are quite experienced. Can you do this old soldier a favor?
实话和你说吧，我的役期还有几个月到头，很快我就能离开这片禁区了。我想写信把这好消息告诉老婆和女儿，但实在下不去笔……

To tell you the truth, I am only a few months from the end of my service, then I'll be leaving this restricted zone soon. I want to write a letter to tell my wife and daughter the good news, but I really don't know what to write about...
我在部队里服役二十来年，期间一直都在后勤工作，一次前线都没上过。开头的几年我还觉得这工作安逸舒坦，但越往后越觉得自己真是窝囊透顶……

I have served in the army for over <unbreak>20</unbreak> years, and I have been working in logistics this whole time. I have never been on the front line once. In the first few years, I still thought this job was easy and comfortable, but the longer I stay, the more useless I feel...
那个，你要是不介意的话，能不能和我分享些刺激的冒险经历？我不想让女儿觉得她老爹是个没本事的老家伙，但自己的想象力也实在有限……
Well, if you don't mind, can you share some exciting adventures with me? I don't want my daughter to think that her dad is a useless old bum, but my imagination is really limited...
Alright, let me think about it...
真的可以吗？谢、谢谢你，年轻人！
Really? Thank, thank you, {F#young lady}{M#young man}!
我的纸和笔呢…啊，这儿呢，找到了——行了，等你准备好了我们就开始……
Where's my paper and pen... ah, here, found it — okay, we can start when you're ready...
你整理好思路了？开始吧，你来说，我来记……
Have you made up your mind? Let's get started, you speak, I will write it down...
我想想…就从旅行的经历开始吧？你到过哪些特别的地方，和我说说吧。
Let me think... let's start with a traveling experience? Tell me about any special places you've been to.
…雪原？那可是禁地啊，普通人擅自出城可是重罪一桩……
... Snow Plains? That place is forbidden, and it's a serious crime for ordinary people to leave the city without authorization...
…下层区？不可能不可能，上下层区都封锁十来年了，这么说没人会信的…
... The Underworld? No way, no way, the passage between the surface and the underground has been blocked for more than ten years. No one will believe it if I say so...
…什么玩意？完全没听过的地名啊，你不会是在胡编吧……
...Where's that? I have never heard of that place. Are you just making it up?
哎，要是照你说的写，就算是一家人恐怕也很难置信吧？我还是改得稍微务实一点儿吧。
*sigh* If I write it as you said, it would be hard even for my family to believe me, right? I'd rather be a little more convincing.
那个…接下来聊聊别的吧，你懂作战吗？我虽然服了二十多年役，但是一次前线都没上过，武器也用的不怎么顺手。

Then... Let's talk about something else, do you know how to fight? Although I have served for more than <unbreak>20</unbreak> years, I have never been on the front line once, and I am not very good at using weapons.
你要是有过什么难忘的作战经历，就给我讲讲吧……
If you have any unforgettable combat experiences, tell me about them...
我和杰帕德切磋过两次…
杰、杰帕德？！就是那个年纪轻轻就当上戍卫官的……
这…这写出来谁信啊？算了，我还是写点稍微靠谱的东西吧。
This... Who would believe this? Forget it, I'll just write something a little more realistic.
我和叫史瓦罗的机器人对战过…
I fought against a robot named Svarog...
机器人？唔…这好像也没什么特别的啊，我也经常要负责修理禁区里的故障机器人……
Robot? Hmm... it doesn't sound special, I'm often in charge of repairing malfunctioning robots in the Restricted Zone...
哎，我还是稍微添油加醋一下吧。
*sigh* I will just embellish the story a bit.
我和布洛妮娅打了个平手…
Bronya and I fought to a draw...
布洛妮娅？！是、是我想到的那个布洛妮娅吗？
Bronya? ! Is it the Bronya I am thinking of?
这…这写出来谁信啊？算了，我还是写点稍微靠谱的东西吧。
This... Who would believe this? Forget it, I'll just write something a little more realistic.
我算缓过劲来了——你是不是一直在逗我玩呢？你觉得这很好笑吗？
I get it now — have you been playing with me? Do you think this is funny?
哎，现在的年轻人，对老一辈真是一点都不尊重…不过话说回来，要是没有你提供的思路，我这封信怕是等到明年也下不去笔。
*sigh* Young people nowadays really have no respect for the elders at all... But then again, without the ideas you mentioned, I'm afraid I won't be able to write this letter until next year.
…这些你拿着吧，就当是耽误时间的赔礼了。
...Anyway, thanks for stopping by. Here, for your trouble.
莉拉…你可千万不要看不起老爹啊，哎。
Lila... Please don't be ashamed of Daddy! *sigh*
…我当然明白你的想法，吉尔伯特。但是这战功勋章可不是我想发给谁就发给谁的啊。
...I certainly get your point, Gilbert. But this medal of merit is not something I can give to anyone I want.
你在部队里待了多久了，二十年？三十年？这点道理难道还不明白吗……
How long have you been in the army, twenty years? Thirty years? Don't you understand this...
邓恩啊，你还是个新兵蛋子的时候我就特别照顾你，怎么当上队长以后就把架子端起来了呢？
Dunn, I took special care of you when you were a new recruit. Now that you've become a captain, how come you are putting on airs with me?
这么个小忙你都不肯帮我，是想看我被老婆和女儿嘲笑的样子吗……
Can't you do me this tiny little favor? Do you want to see me getting laughed at by my wife and daughter...?
我都跟你说了好多遍了，这是原则问题……
I've told you many times. It's a matter of principle...
…啊，正好，{NICKNAME}来了！这件事你来评评理吧。
...Ah, right on time, here comes {NICKNAME}! What do you make of his request?
Actually, I don't want to meddle...
…你别装了，我早就知道你是个乐于助人的家伙。
...Come on now, you never shy away from giving people a little help.
你认识吉尔伯特吧？对，就是这位，禁区资历最老的后勤官。
Do you know Gilbert? Yes, him, the oldest logistics officer in the restricted zone.
他的役期马上就要到了，要我说，只要安安稳稳度过这几个月，等着回城里去和妻女团圆就行了……
He's about to retire. The way I see it, he should spend the last few months doing what he's been doing and return to the city to reunite with his wife and daughter when he finally retires...
可他偏要在这时候跟我提无理的要求！这老头想借一枚战功勋章，就为了能在家里人面前涨涨面子。你说说，这合理吗？
But he wants to ask an unreasonable favor from me at a time like this! The geezer wants to borrow a medal of merit, just to look good in front of his family. You tell me, is that reasonable?
Can't you just lend him the medal?
当然不能！你把银鬃铁卫的规章当成什么了？
Of course not! What do you think the rules of the Silvermane Guards are for?
True... It doesn't sound very appropriate.
你看吧，老头！连{NICKNAME}也这么说。
See, old man! Even {NICKNAME} said so.
再说了，你不是有服役满二十周年的铁卫老兵勋章吗？这荣誉的分量难道还不够你去炫耀的吗……
Besides, don't you have the Veteran Guard Medal from your twentieth anniversary? Isn't that enough honor for you to show off...
年轻人，你怎么不懂呢…这种只需要熬资历就能得到的东西才算不上什么荣誉，只会更被人看不起……
Youngster, why don't you understand... You can get one of these just by staying long enough. It is not considered an honor. And it won't bring me any respect...
*sigh* You just don't get it, do you?
Yeah, let me think about it...
怎么没人给我发勋章呢？
Why is no one giving me any medal?
…你不记得把我打晕的那回事了？你的这种情况最多算是戴罪立功吧……
...Remember that time you knocked me out? Consider yourself lucky that you're not sent to court-martial yet, let alone getting a medal...
等等，你这倒是提醒了我……
有了，我想到一个好办法！
Yes, I have a good idea!
听说最近又有一头「灰熊」自动机兵失控了，现在还在禁区里游荡破坏。现在人手短缺，我的部下只能暂时控制住它周边的区域，不敢妄自行动。

I heard that another automaton "Grizzly" has lost control recently, and is still roaming and wreaking havoc in the restricted zone. Now that there is a shortage of personnel, my subordinates can only maintain control in the surrounding area temporarily and they dare not act rashly.
{NICKNAME}，你能带着老头儿去解决掉这个麻烦吗？只要干成了这件事，战功我可以记在吉尔伯特的名下。
{NICKNAME}, can you take the old man to deal with this problem? When this is done, I can give the credit to Gilbert.
还、还有这么凑巧的好事？年、年轻人，走，我们快去看看情况吧！
Wh—what a great opportunity! {F#Young lady}{M#Young man}, let's go and take a look!
呜…呜哇！原来是这么巨大的机器人吗？
你难道没见过这种型号吗…
You've never seen a model like this before...?
呃…整天待在后勤区域里，这些先进的机兵武器本来就没什么机会接触到啊。
Uh... I spend all of my time on the logistics side of things. I don't really get any chances to see an advanced mechanical war machine like this.
对我来说就是小菜一碟啦。
那个…要跟它来硬的吗？我……
So... You're going to fight that thing? I...
咳…我准备好了！你们先上吧，我、我会尽全力协助你们的！
Ahem... I'm ready! You guys go first. I—I'll support you from behind!
哈！胜、胜利了！这大家伙，看着吓人，实际上外强中干嘛！
Haha! V—Victory! This fella might look scary, but he's actually not so tough!
怎么能这么说？作、作战基础一零一，场外支援同样十分重要……
How could you say that? I—It's Combat Basics <unbreak>101</unbreak>! Support off the battlefield is of equal importance...
你是在挖苦我吗？我告诉你，作、作战基础一零一，场外支援也是非常重要的……
What's with the sarcasm? Listen here, i—it's Combat Basics <unbreak>101</unbreak>! Support off the battlefield is of equal importance...
快，我们快点回去找邓恩吧，别让他等不耐烦了。
Come on, let's hurry back and talk to Dunn. We shouldn't keep him waiting.
{NICKNAME}，吉尔伯特，你们回来了！我已经收到铁卫的汇报了，任务圆满完成。
{NICKNAME}, Gilbert, you're back! I received a report from the Guards that your mission was a success.
那…我的战功勋章是不是……
Then... that means my medal of service...
当然了，老头儿——我已经帮你把申报手续走完了，最快下周就能收到消息。
Of course, old man — I've already finished the paperwork for your medal's application. We should hear back from them next week or so.
我就知道，以前没白关照你这个新兵蛋子！那、那我就回后勤单元等你的好消息了。
I knew I didn't waste my time taking care of the new generation of soldiers! W—Well then, I'll return to the logistics unit and wait for the good news from you.
…也谢谢你，年轻人。要是没有你，我恐怕就要沦为笑柄了……
...And thank you as well, youngster. If not for you, I would've been doomed to be a laughingstock...
你和我想的一样。这么多年没见过面的家人，哪儿会在意什么战功勋章呢？
That's what I was thinking. After so many years of being apart, his family would not be concerned with these military accolades.
他的家人有那么势利眼吗？
我没见过他的妻子和孩子，不过…我觉得她们不会在意什么战功勋章。
I haven't met his wife or child, but... I think they won't care about whether or not he has a medal.
不过这泡沫也轮不到我们这些外人来戳破，对吧？毕竟那是他的家事。
But it's not our place to burst his bubble, is it? This is between him and his family.
答应我一件事，{NICKNAME}——如果吉尔伯特以后还来找你帮忙的话，尽量答应他的要求，行吗？那老头是个好人，我不想看到他在这最后几个月里受委屈。

Promise me something, {NICKNAME} — if Gilbert comes to you with another request in the future, do your best to help, okay? He's a good man. I don't want to see him suffer during his last few months of service.
哦，对了，这些你拿去吧。我知道打倒故障机器人都是你的功劳，总不能让你白跑一趟，是吧？
Oh right, take these. I know you did all the work in taking down that malfunctioning robot. I can't let you leave empty-handed, now can I?
{NICKNAME}，年轻人！终于等到你了，我还怕你以后都不会来禁区了……
{NICKNAME}! I've been waiting for you, youngster. I was afraid that you might never come to the restricted zone...
Nice seeing you again, old man.
I have other things to do...
一分钟，我就耽误你一分钟！当我求你了…
One minute, just one minute of your time! I'm begging you...
那个，你还记得我想寄给老婆女儿的信吗？我昨天总算把它给写完了。
Uh, do you remember that letter I wanted to send to my wife and daughter? I finished writing it yesterday.
你要是不介意的话，能不能替我把信送到女儿手里？禁区的寄送手续太繁杂了，要通过好几层审核…怕是没等到信寄出去，我这役期就已经满了。

If you don't mind, could you help take it to my daughter for me? It's an arduous process mailing things from inside the restricted zone. You need one approval after another... The letter would probably not even be sent before my service was up.
拜托了，年轻人！我认识的人里，能自由出入这禁区的就你这一个。要是连你都不肯帮忙，那我就真要绝望了！
Please, youngster! You're the only person I know who is able to freely move in and out of the restricted zone. If you don't help, then there is no hope for me to get this letter delivered!
我女儿名叫莉拉，她和她老妈就住在行政区。这事就有劳你了，年轻人……
My daughter's name is Lila. She and her mother live in the Administrative District. Thanks for doing this, youngster...
你是吉尔伯特的女儿吗？
Eh? You guys know my father?
这有一封你父亲给你的信。
This is a letter from your father.
这不是什么新的诈骗技巧吧？他工作的地方应该是军事重地才对，你们是怎么……
You better not be trying to scam me. He's working in a top secret military area. How did you manage to...
等等…这的确是他的笔迹，肯定不会错。
Hold on... This is his handwriting, alright. I'm sure of it.
哎，老爸他啊…还是和以前一样喜欢跟自己较真呢。
*sigh* My father... he hasn't changed. Always so hard on himself.
那个，抱歉，这个请求听着可能有点突然——如果你有时间的话，能不能去帮我买一束花？
Uh, I'm sorry to make such a sudden request, but... if you have time, could you buy me a bunch of flowers?
我想给爸爸写一封回信，和花束放在一起送给他。
I want to write him a letter and send it together with a bouquet.
*sigh* I can't really stop halfway, can I?
You will? Thank you so much!
这附近就有一家花店，能麻烦你们帮我带一束「七彩虹」回来吗？当然了，买花和跑腿的钱由我来出。
There's a florist nearby. Please get me a bunch of rainbows. Naturally, I'll pay you for the flowers and running this errand for me.
那就辛苦你了，一会儿见！
Thanks again, I'll see you later!
I want to buy a bunch of Rainbows please.
「七彩虹」，对吧？没问题，这就帮你挑几株。
Rainbows, right? No problem, I'll pick some out for you now.
请问，这些花是打算送给谁的？
May I ask who these flowers are for?
哦？送「七彩虹」给长辈，还真是…另类的选择。
Oh? Rainbows for a parent is... quite a unique choice.
你知道吗？「七彩虹」的花语是「平凡的美好」，在多年的朋友或者老夫老妻之间比较流行。
You know, in the language of flowers, rainbows mean "ordinary beauty." They're a popular choice among old friends and couples.
是想让长辈多多享受人生，不要被生活或是工作上的纷繁琐事困扰吗……
Are you trying to tell your parent to enjoy themselves? To not be troubled by the pettiness of work and life...?
这么一想，好像寓意也不错呢。
That would be a great message actually.
给你，一束「七彩虹」。欢迎下次光临！
Here you are, a bunch of rainbows. Hope to see you again soon!
Here we go, I have bought the Rainbow.
动作可真快！谢谢你们，这就行了。正好，我的回信也写好了。等你下次见到老爸的时候，麻烦连着花一起带给他吧。
You sure are quick! Thank you, that should be perfect. I just finished writing my reply letter as well. Please give it to my father the next time you go see him.
他啊，性格一直都是这么别扭，总是会找理由跟自己过不去。他在信上写的那些事迹肯定不是他的亲身经历，这点我还是能分辨出来的。
He's always been quite stubborn and too hard on himself. I can tell that the things he wrote about in the letter aren't really what he has done.
从我记事起，老爸就喜欢在我面前逞英雄、说些不着边际的大话…他大概是觉得，如果自己在部队里没有获得什么名头，家人的脸上也会没光吧？

Ever since I can remember, he always liked to act like a hero in front of me and exaggerate things... He probably thinks that if he doesn't achieve something big in the Silvermane Guards, he will be a shame to the family.
但我可从来没那么想过。他努力做好自己的工作，让我过上了比一般人都好的生活…光是这一点，我就已经非常感激了。
But I've never cared about that. He's always worked hard to give me a better life, better than most... That's already enough for me to be truly grateful for him.
哎呀，不好意思，一不注意就跟你说了一大堆家务事。反正…我只希望老爸能平平安安地回到家里就行了。
Argh, sorry for going on about our family matters. Anyway... I just hope that my father can return home safely.
{NICKNAME}，你回来了，真快啊！不愧是年轻人，手脚就是灵便。
{NICKNAME}, you're back so soon! Young people these days really are quick on their feet.
你们见着莉拉了吗？把我的信转交给她了没？她说什么了吗？
Did you go see Lila? And did you give her my letter? What did she say?
She wrote a letter for you in reply.
她、她给我回信了？快，拿给我看看……
Sh—She wrote back to me? Quick, let me read it...
我真是个死脑筋，居然一直在逃避自己的家人，还编出那些没谱的谎话……
I've been so stubborn... avoiding my own family, making up such ridiculous lies...
我现在明白了，哪怕我这二十多年都没干出什么丰功伟绩，家人也会一直陪在我身边。我之前焦虑的那些事…啧，想想都觉得好笑，哈哈哈。

I get it now... Even if I don't have any great achievements over these past twenty-plus years, my family will always be by my side. What I was worrying over... Tsk, it's funny to think about now, haha.
谢谢你们帮我这么多忙，陌生人！请一定收下这些…现在我该去好好收拾收拾东西，准备回家了。
Thank you for all your help, stranger! Please take these... Now I need to go get my things together and get ready to return home.
今天需要帮忙吗，老头子？
Do you need help, old man?
{NICKNAME}，年轻人，你来的真是时候！来来来，我正好有个大新闻要跟你分享……
{NICKNAME}, young one, you arrive just in time! Come here, I have big news to share with you...
呃…也不知道该算好消息还是坏消息？后勤部的一帮小年轻听说我要退伍了，全都跑来挽留…他们说，要是没有我这个老兵带着，他们肯定办不成事。

Though I'm not sure it can be considered as good news... Youngsters from the Logistics Department were trying to convince me to stay after they heard that I was retiring... They said that they couldn't handle things correctly without me leading the way.
他们可能只是礼貌一下…
Maybe they were just being polite...
…你当真这么觉得？可是他们已经把这事报告给上面了……
You really think so? But they've even asked their superior about this...
得让年轻人学会自己成长。
Young people need to learn and grow by themselves.
…我一开始的想法和你一样。不过我没想到，他们真的把这事报告给上面了……
...I thought the same at the beginning. But I wasn't expecting that they even asked their superior about this...
邓恩那小子之前跑来跟我谈话，问我愿不愿意再多待几个月，培养培养接班人。
Then Dunn came to me and asked if I wanted to stay for another couple of months to train my successors.
…哎呀，你也知道我脸皮薄，哪能拒绝这么真情实意的邀请！
...Ah, you know me, too shy to turn down such a sincere request!
我当时心情比较激动，就一口答应下来了。
I was a bit emotional at that point and agreed to his request.
但事后仔细一想，感觉真是对不起老婆孩子…这下她们又得再多等几个月了。
But when I gave it a second thought later, I felt bad for my wife and child... They have to wait for another handful of months.
{NICKNAME}，年轻人——你愿意再帮我一次吗？我写了封信向母女俩解释这件事，要是你能替我捎给莉拉那就再好不过了……
{NICKNAME}, young one, are you willing to help me once again? I wrote a letter to my wife and child to explain my situation. If you could deliver my letter to Lila...
多谢你！真希望后勤部的年轻人都能跟你一样靠谱。
Many thanks! Hope those youngsters in the Logistics Department can be as reliable as you are.
Are you sure you won't regret it?
嗨，有什么好后悔的…能在我熟悉的岗位上再多发光发热一阵，也好……
Nothing to be regretful for... It would only be worth it to shine in my field for a while longer...
哦，对了——你能顺便去花店买束花，和信一起转交给莉拉吗？她之前送了我一束花，我也想回赠一次……
While you are at it, can you go pick some flowers at the Florist for Lila? Last time, she gave me a bouquet. I want to give her something in return...
至于选什么品种的花…就由你定吧。我现在也不太清楚她的喜好……
As for the best type of flowers... I'll let you decide. I'm not so sure about her favorites now...
莉拉…原谅老爸。不过几个月的时间，一眨眼就会过去的……
Lila... Forgive dad. It'll just be several months. It won't be long...
我想买一束花当作礼物…
I'd like to buy some flowers as a present.
Then you came to the right place!
请问您打算给什么人送花呢？不妨告诉我，说不定我能帮您出出点子。
If you could tell me more about the person you're sending flowers to, I can give you some suggestions.
替一位父亲送给他久别的女儿。
The flowers are a gift to a daughter from her long-absent father.
原来如此，是要送给许久未见的亲人啊……
那我推荐您买上一束「球牡丹」——这种花一年只会盛开一次，每次开花的时间都不超过一个月。
Then I recommend the Ball Peonies — they only bloom once a year, and each bloom lasts for less than a month.
「球牡丹」的花语是「耐心」…相信只要耐心等待，家人之间终会团圆。
In the language of flowers, Ball Peony means "patience." It takes a bit of patience, but the family will eventually be reunited.
Then I'll take a bouquet of Ball Peonies.
当然！我这就帮您挑上几株……
都准备好了。请拿好您的「球牡丹」——欢迎下次再光临「长夏」花店。
Here are your Ball Peonies. Thanks for the purchase, and have a lovely day!
送给一位年轻美丽的女士。
The flowers will be given to a beautiful girl.
原来如此，是要送给一位年轻的女士啊……
那我推荐您买上一束「七彩虹」——这种小花色彩斑斓艳丽，是年轻人之间送礼的不二之选。
Then I recommend the Rainbows — these small flowers are a riot of color, perfect for gift giving between young people.
「七彩虹」的花语是「平凡的美好」。活在这个年代，还有什么比「平凡的美好」更值得珍惜的呢？
In the language of flowers, Rainbow means "simple beauty." In times like this, what else is more precious than "simple beauty?"
Then I'll take a bouquet of Rainbows.
当然！我这就帮您挑上几株……
都准备好了。请拿好您的「七彩虹」——欢迎下次再光临「长夏」花店。
Here are your Rainbows. Thanks for the purchase, and have a lovely day!
送给一位热爱动物的爱心人士。
The flowers will be given to a kind animal lover.
说起来，我已经很久没在贝洛伯格见过动物了…您要送花的对象如此喜欢动物，看来是位相当善良体贴的人呢。
Speaking of animals, I haven't seen any in Belobog in a long time... The person you are sending flowers to must be a very kind person.
那我推荐您买上一束「初雪八落」——这种花的花语就是「纯洁善良」。我猜，它和您送花的对象一定非常搭配。
Then I recommend the First Snows — they stand for "pure and kind-hearted" in the language of flowers. I think they'll suit the recipient of your present very well.
Then I'll take a bouquet of First Snows.
当然！我这就帮您挑上几株……
都准备好了。请拿好您的「初雪八落」——欢迎下次再光临「长夏」花店。
Here are your First Snows. Thanks for the purchase, and have a lovely day!
I'll take a bouquet of the most precious flowers here.
最名贵的花…您要送花的对象，她的身份肯定很尊贵吧？
The most precious... I assume you're sending flowers to a person of very high status?
那我推荐您买上一株「侯爵夫人」——这是贝洛伯格最尊贵、最美丽、也是最难培育的一种花。
Then my recommendation would be the Marquises. They are the most exalted, beautiful, and delicate flowers in Belobog.
凡是贝洛伯格的上流人士，一定都拒绝不了「侯爵夫人」的艳丽。只是…这种花的价格不菲，不知道您意下如何？
No one in high society would turn down a bouquet of Marquises. It's just that... Marquises are quite expensive. Are you sure you want to buy some?
I'll take a bouquet of Marquises.
当然！我这就帮您挑上一株……
都准备好了。请拿好您的「侯爵夫人」——欢迎下次再光临「长夏」花店。
Here are your Marquises. Thanks for the purchase, and have a lovely day!
Your dad wrote you a letter. Here.
老爸又来信了？他最近可真恋家。多谢你帮他捎信——可不能让你白跑一趟，我得准备些谢礼才行！
Another letter? He seems pretty homesick lately. Thanks for bringing it to me. Please, let me give you something for your trouble.
这是…球牡丹？是老爸拜托你给我买的吗？
These are... Ball Peonies? Did my dad ask you to buy these for me?
真是可爱的小花…没想到老爸还有这份心，妈妈看到了也会很开心的。
Aww... I didn't expect him to be this sensitive. Mom would be very happy too when she sees these pretty flowers.
这是…七彩虹？是老爸拜托你给我买的吗？
These are... Rainbows? Did my dad ask you to buy these for me?
这算是之的回礼吗？没想到老爸他这么细心…妈妈知道了肯定也会很开心的。
This must be a return present. I didn't expect Dad to be this thoughtful... Mom would be very happy too when she sees these pretty flowers.
这是…初雪八落？是老爸拜托你给我买的吗？
These are... First Snows? Did my dad ask you to buy these for me?
真是可爱的小花…没想到老爸还有这份心，妈妈看到了也会很开心的。
Aww... I didn't expect him to be this sensitive. Mom would be very happy too when she sees these pretty flowers.
哇！这是…侯爵夫人？！这么名贵的花，是老爸拜托你给我买的吗？
Whoa! These are... Marquises? Did my dad ask you to buy these for me?
这花…真美，不愧是贝洛伯格最名贵的花。可惜妈妈她好像对这种花过敏……
They're gorgeous... Now I understand why they say Marquises are the most precious flowers in Belobog. It's a pity that Mom's allergic to it...
啊，光顾着看花，都忘了还有老爸的信了。让我看看……
Uh, I almost forgot about the letter. Lemme see...
莉拉读完了吉尔伯特的信……
Lila finished the letter from Gilbert...
也就是说，老爸他还要过几个月才能回家……
So Dad won't be home for a few more months...
He's just too nice to say no.
I know... He's always like that.
嗐，我怎么会生他的气呢……
其实，我从这字里行间能感觉出来，老爸他对自己在做的事明显还残留着热情…只是他不太好意思承认罢了。
Actually, reading between the lines, I can see that Dad's still passionate about his job. He just didn't want to admit it.
其实他不用一直在信里跟我们道歉…只要他还能在自己的岗位上找到认同感，我和妈妈肯定支持他的选择。
He really doesn't need to apologize to Mom and me. We'd support his choice if the job makes him feel needed and fulfilled.
不过，他这把年纪，想做出什么彻头彻尾的改变恐怕很难吧？所以，我们还是在他身后默默支持就好了，不用在沟通的时候掺进多余的说教。
Though, at his age, it'd be very hard to change who he is. So, we'll just support him without unnecessary persuasion.
即使相隔两地，也要彼此理解、互相体谅——这才是家人之间的相处方式呀。
Be understanding and considerate to each other even when separated. This is the meaning of family.
谢谢你帮老爸捎信，{NICKNAME}。这是之前答应好给你的谢礼，请一定收下。
Thank you for bringing my dad's letter, {NICKNAME}. Please accept these for your trouble.
我们习惯了将「时间」比喻成流动的物体，将「空间」理解为不动的舞台…也许，一切是相反的…也许，流动的是「空间」，而「时间」则是可以被穿凿的磐石……

We're used to thinking of "time" as something that flows, and "space" as something static... But what if everything was the other way around? Perhaps it's "space" that moves, while "time" is the one that's set in stone...
别出声！哦，你没出声…那你也不要突然出现！给我思路都打断了！
Shhh! Oh, you didn't say anything... Then don't just show up like that and break my train of thought!
Are you acting in a play?
别出声！你管这叫话剧？这是科研！给我思路都打断了！
Shhhh! Do you think this is theater? This is research! Don't break my train of thought!
我方才分明看见宇宙盛大的图景在我眼前喷薄而出，即将把她伟大的智慧倾泻在我同样伟大的头脑中，却被你打断了！
I'd just caught sight of the magnificence of the universe gushing towards me, about to pour out her great wisdom into my equally great mind when you interrupted me!
Aren't you being a bit too dramatic?
哎，你真是让我深刻理解了什么叫「夏虫不可语冰」。
仔细一看，你不是那个喜欢多管闲事的人吗？那你来得正好，有些事情需要你帮忙。
Wait a minute, aren't you that meddler who loves to get involved in other people's business? Well, you're in luck, as I do need a helper right now.
危险吗？我还不想为科学献身…
Is it dangerous? I'm not yet ready to sacrifice for science.
呵呵，你有这个资格吗？别担心，不是什么大事。
Humph. Are you even qualified to make any sacrifice? Anyway, don't worry about it. It's no big deal at all.
Don't worry about it. It's no big deal at all.
况且，你刚刚打断了我的思路。往小了说，这是断送了又一个伟大理论的诞生，往大了说，你就是断送了时空科学的未来啊！难道你不该赎罪吗？

Besides, it was you who interrupted my train of thought, potentially ruining the birth of a groundbreaking scientific theory or even jeopardizing the very future of space science itself! Don't you think it's only fair that you make amends by helping me now?
给你这个，这是我关于「大宇宙时间隧道」这一科学发现的论文。这篇划时代的论文本该被大守护者读到，应用于科研建设，为万世开太平。

Check out this paper of mine on the theory about the big universe time tunnel. This groundbreaking research should have been studied by the Supreme Guardian and applied to the research and development of our world.
可那几个尸位素餐的官僚，一直在想方设法刁难我！
But those pencil-pushing bureaucrats are always trying to make trouble for me!
我只需要你帮我做一件很简单的事：把这篇论文交给大守护者，让她看到我的成果。
I just need your help with this very simple thing: Give this thesis to the Supreme Guardian. Let her see what I've achieved.
我不去，那帮官僚都认识我了。我现在跑过去还不够受羞辱的呢！哎，羞辱科学家，是官僚系统朽坏的直接征兆，可恶！可悲！

Ah well, we'll just have to wait and see.

You said yourself, you're the blunt one!
开个玩笑而已，别生气嘛。既然你帮我做了这么多事，那这次就算我雷金错了！是我不好，对不起！

收下这些吧，这是你应得的。我要去…「耐心等待」了。往好处想，也许在这期间我还能研究出什么新的科学理论呢！

Why is the question so hard...
你这是遇见波瓦大臣了吧？我跟你说，最坏的就是这个糟老头子。

别人出的题，难归难，好歹也就在数学题的范围内。这老头给你出脑筋急转弯！这种题目，对于我这样耿直的科学家来说，简直就是羞辱！

哦，我想起来了！之前我不是都把你打发走了吗？怎么又跑来胡搅蛮缠……

...Please, help me out one last time.
...That's what a real scientist would do.
唉…碰上死缠烂打的家伙可真让人头疼。行吧，就通融你一次——前提是你真能答对。

话说回来，我还是有点好奇——那个波瓦大臣出了什么题刁难你？快，给我讲讲……

把波瓦大臣出的题目复述给了雷金……
Describe to Regin the question posed by Minister Bova...
这家伙…出的题确实有点水平！虽然还是属于脑筋急转弯的范畴…不过这两道题，我一时还真想不出答案。
This guy! Now that's a thorny question! It's a real mind-bender... I can't think up answers for these two questions yet.
唉，就这样吧！看来这个世界还没有准备好接受「大宇宙时间隧道」这种超前的理论。
Ah, so be it! It seems like the world's not quite ready for a theory as mighty as my big universe time tunnel theory.
虽然结果是一场空，但是不管怎么说…嗯…还是得谢谢你。
Even though it came to nothing, it doesn't matter... I still have to give you my thanks.
已经有很多年，没人为了我的事四处奔走了。我这人说话比较冲，但我是真挺感谢你的。
It's been years since anyone cared about my thesis. I know I come across as blunt, but I really am grateful to you.
谁知道呢，说不定论文被拒收也是件好事…搞不准我还能研究出什么新的科学理论呢！

…收下这些吧！这是你帮我跑腿应得的。
...Please, take this! You deserve it, for helping me with everything.
...Let me see what you've been up to lately.
我？最近？哈，还能忙什么——当然是在进一步巩固、论证我的「大宇宙时间隧道」理论了！
Me? Up to? Ha, well what else — naturally I've been consolidating and fine-tuning my big universe time tunnel theory.
话说回来，你听说了吗？整个贝洛伯格科学界都在疯传——教育部那个最难搞的波瓦大臣好像准备退休了！
Speaking of which, have you heard? The entire Belobog scientific community is going crazy with gossip... Because apparently the crankiest, oldest codger of them all — Minister Bova — is retiring!
不然呢？你以为是这我随口瞎编的？
What else? Do you think I just made it up?
所以？你还没明白吗？这就等于在说——属于我，雷金的时代就要到来了！
So what? Don't you get it? This is the equivalent of saying: My time has come! The time of Regin is now!
等到波瓦老头退休，我马上就去敲教育部的门，让他们把「大宇宙时间隧道」编入贝洛伯格学院的科学教材！
Once Bova retires, I'll knock right on the door of the Ministry of Education and ask them to add my theory of big universe time tunnel into the science textbooks of Belobog!
…咳，刚才太激动了，希望没吓着你。话说回来，既然你都来了，那我想请你再帮个忙……
...Ahem, I got a little bit excited there. I hope I didn't freak you out. Getting back on track and seeing as you're all here, I'd like to ask another quick favor...
我想让你再去敲打一下教育部的那群喽啰，看看他们的智库里还藏着什么稀奇古怪的题目。怎么样，这事你能搞定吗？
I'd like you to go chase up those boffins at the Ministry of Education and see if they have any other weird content inside their archives. How about it, can you help me out?
哈，我就知道能指望你，靠谱！
Ha, I knew I could count on you as always!
别别别，你别走啊，我就只能指望你了！谁叫你跟那些庸俗的「非科学家」不一样呢！

我以未来首席大科学家的名声担保，绝对不让你白跑这一趟。快去吧，我一边琢磨新理论一边等你的好消息。
With my reputation on the line as the future Chief Scientist, I won't let your labors be in vain. Go, now — I'll wait for your good news while I keep on pondering new theories.
哎呀，是您——经过上次的会面，波瓦大臣对您赞赏有加，还评价您是贝洛伯格学术界冉冉升起的新星。
Oops, it's you. Minister Bova has been singing your praises since last time, calling you a rising star in the Belobog academic circle.
您今天特地前来，是有什么事务需要教育部协助吗？
For what purpose have you come today? What task requires the support of the Ministry of Education?
听说波瓦大臣要退休了？
I heard Minister Bova is thinking about retiring soon?
咦？您是从哪里得到的消息？我完全没听说……

咳，抱歉，请允许我回避您的这次提问。请问您还有别的事吗？
Ahem, sorry. Please allow me to sidestep this question of yours. Is there anything else I can do for you?
Yeah. I wanna take the quiz.
啊——我明白了，您是带着任务来的，对吗？您是想来验收一下教育部的题库储备，对吧？
Ah, I see. You've come on a mission, haven't you? You've come to test the variety of questions in our quiz pool, haven't you?
那我当然不能让您失望。正好，我这边准备了一些进阶的测验题目，您要不要试试？

事先提醒您，这些题目的难度可不低…答不上来也不丢人哦。不多说了，看题面吧。
I would like to remind you in advance that these questions are far from simple... and it's no shame to get them wrong. Onto the quiz, then.
如何，您知道答案了吗？霍华德、菲利普和乔伊斯当中，到底谁是骗子呢？
How about it then? Do you know what the answer is? Howard, Philip, and Joyce: Who is the liar?
您是不是漏读了题面的信息？这嘈杂的环境确实不适合深度思考。我相信以您的聪明才智，只要有足够的时间，一定能给出正确答案……

哎呀，答错也没关系，能活动活动脑筋总是好事，对吧？能帮上您的忙是教育部的荣幸。回见！

喔哦…不愧是波瓦大臣看中的新星，您果然绝顶聪明！

Where should I go for you?
先去花店问问吧~小女子听说，塔米拉小姐每周都要买几束鲜花，装点自己的房间…哎，真是风雅啊。

花店的店员一定知道，她最喜欢买什么花~就拜托你去问问咯~

She always buys the same flowers every time... Let me see... "Rainbows." Every time Tamila comes, she buys Rainbow flowers.
哎，塔米拉小姐这个人，和我有点话不投机…我们对小说的品味不太一致，之前聊了两句，算是不欢而散吧。

但她每周都会来买好几十束七彩虹，算是我们店的大客户了，所以…咳，客户永远都是对的！
But every week she'll be in here buying a few dozen bouquets of Rainbow flowers. She's a big repeat customer for our store, so... the customer's always right!
七彩虹…有意思~像塔米拉小姐这样闪耀的人，所钟情的花竟然是…「平凡的美好」。
Rainbows... interesting~ For someone as glorious as Tamila, her floral preference is so... "ordinarily beautiful."
小女子以为她所钟爱的一定是名贵的花卉，因此来衬托她高贵的本质…原来如此，原来她的灵魂有着这样的渴望……
I thought that she'd definitely buy some precious rare flowers instead, to match her noble self... But actually, there is this craving and desire in her soul...
谢谢你，小女子距离她的灵魂更近了。收下这些谢礼吧。
Thank you! I feel a little bit closer to her soul, now. Please, take this as a thank-you.
是你呀~最近其实还挺顺利的~自从你为小女子带来了塔米拉小姐的珍贵情报，小女子感觉…已经离她越来越近了……

小女子开始感到，她朦胧的背影在眼前逐渐清晰……

这样吧，请你再帮小女子一个忙…帮小女子去行政区的书摊问问，塔米拉小姐有没有什么特别喜欢的书籍……

Tamila? You mean the musical actress?

之前有一段时间，她总来问我，有没有和《歌德宾馆的夜与雾》类似的小说。

为了给她推荐书籍，我还特地去看了一下这本书…是一本爱情小说的残卷，并不完整。

她说自己特别喜欢这本书，原话我还记得……「在温暖的卧室中伴着花香反复阅读这本书，真是太幸福了。」
She said that she loves this book, and I still remember how she said it. "It's such a blessing to read this book over and over again in a cozy warm bedroom with my flowers."
不过很可惜，我又给她推荐了几本类似的书，她好像都不太满意。
Unfortunately, the few books I recommended to her, she doesn't seem to be satisfied with them.

没别的事的话，我要继续看书了。再见。

Thanks lots for helping me with this! Take this as a token of my appreciation~
托你的福，越来越顺利了~小女子越来越能理解塔米拉小姐的灵魂了。

并非是舞台上的角色和演出塑造了她独一无二的气场，而是舞台下，她对生活的热爱，将她的灵魂变成了一颗璀璨的宝石~
