没关系啦，你肯帮我，我已经很感谢了。
Don't say that. The fact that you're willing to help me is already helpful in itself.
喔喔，原来如此…小女子对塔米拉小姐的理解更深了~
Ooh, I see... I have a deeper understanding of Tamila now.
谢谢你~这是给你的谢礼~
Thank you. Here's a token of my appreciation!
「陛下、陛下~你应当遮蔽世间的明镜~连同平静的湖水~你需道出她的真名实姓~驱逐千面的妖妃~」
"Your Highness, Your Highness~! You must shield yourself from all mirrors of the world, even the serene lakes! You must ask for her true name and banish that duplicitous succubus!"
多亏了你~还挺顺利的~小女子已经能看到自己在舞台上光彩夺目的身影了…总有一天，小女子也能像她那样……
Thanks to you~ everything's going great. I can already see my dazzling figure on stage... One day, I'm going to be just like her...
说到这个，你能帮小女子一个小忙么？
Speaking of which — can you please help me out with just one little thing?
你为小女子带来的情报虽然都很重要，但毕竟还是二手信息…等传到小女子耳朵里，那都成了三手信息啦~
All this intel you've brought me is fantastic, but it's still second-hand info... and by the time it reaches me, it's already third-hand...
能不能请你亲眼看一看，塔米拉小姐在舞台下的样子呢？
Could you please go and see for yourself how Tamila looks when she's offstage?
小女子听说塔米拉小姐今天要去歌德宾馆，拜托你去歌德宾馆看看她是去做什么吧~谢谢你啦~
I heard that she's going to the Goethe Hotel today. Please, can you go to the hotel and observe what she's up to? Thank you so much~
这不是塔米拉小姐吗？稀客啊。您是要住店还是要喝杯下午茶呢？
Is that Tamila? A rare blessing. Would you like to stay in the hotel, or perhaps a pot of tea?
嗯…这里和想象中的氛围不太一样啊。
Hmm... the ambiance here is not what I expected.
不，没什么，只是觉得这里不像书中的气氛。
Oh, it's nothing. It's just different from how it's described in the book.
书中的气氛？抱歉，我没太明白……
The book? I'm sorry. I don't quite understand...
没什么，歌德先生，这同样很好。请给我来一杯下午茶吧。
It's really nothing, Mr. Goethe. This is fine as well. I'll have a cup of tea, please.
…噢噢，好的，我这就去安排。您要坐在哪里？
...Ah, all right then. I shall get right on it. Where would you like to sit?
就那里吧，靠窗的位置。那里阳光正好，一定很舒服。
I'll sit over there, by the window. I'm sure the sunlight there will make me warm and comfy.
喔喔，原来如此…小女子对塔米拉小姐的理解更深了~
Ooh, I see... I have a deeper understanding of Tamila now.
谢谢你~这是给你的谢礼~
Thank you. Here's a token of my appreciation!
「陛下、陛下~你应当遮蔽世间的明镜~连同平静的湖水~你需道出她的真名实姓~驱逐千面的妖妃~」
"Your Highness, Your Highness~! You must shield yourself from all mirrors of the world, even the serene lakes! You must ask for her true name and banish that duplicitous succubus!"
你好像有事想找人帮忙？
You seem to need help with something?
帮忙？哈哈，像你这样热心肠的年轻人在贝洛伯格可真少见。
Help? Hahaha, it's rare to see helpful kids like you in Belobog.
不过，你说得对——确实有件要紧事。只是，我不知道该不该托付给你……
You're right, though. There is something urgent I need help with. I just don't know whether I should ask for your help...
哈哈，既然你这么说，那我可不能再谢绝你的好意了。
Hahaha. I won't refuse your help then.
Is there any funny business in this?
哈哈，年轻人的悟性就是高啊。
Hahaha, you young people are pretty sharp.
嗯…此事让你了解也无妨，我就把它交给你吧。
Mmm... It doesn't hurt to let you know. I'll leave this to you.
长话短说——今天我原本与人约好在此地碰头，那人说要借宾馆房间一用。
Long story short — I am supposed to meet someone here today, as they wanted to borrow a hotel room.
结果，现在距约定的时间已过去许久，他人还迟迟未出现…而我得守着这柜台，不方便离开，也无法前去查看他的状况。
But it's been long past the time of our appointment, and he's still not here yet. I need to look after the front counter and can't leave, so I can't go see what is happening.
所以，我想拜托你代我前去看看他那里究竟发生了什么事。尽管放心，我会给你合适的报酬的。
Therefore, I want to ask you to go see what happened to him. Rest assured, I will give you a suitable reward.
罗希。他平时闲得没事就爱在宾馆大堂转悠…逢人便逮住讨论时事要闻。
Rossy. He likes to wander around in the hotel lobby whenever he has time... And discuss current affairs with anyone he sees.
不出意外的话，你可以在那里找到他。
You should be able to find him there.
Am I just going to SEE what is happening?
对，就只是看看。你只要告诉他「我是会社派来的」，他就明白你的来意了。
Yes, just there to see. Tell him that you're "from the Society" and he'll understand.
确认过后，还得麻烦你回来向我说明一下情况…剩下的由我来接手即可。
Please come back to let me know of the situation once you're done, and I'll handle the rest.
别忘了——要找的人是罗希，他平时闲得没事就爱在宾馆大堂转悠…你应该可以轻松找到他。
Don't forget — You are looking for Rossy, who likes to wander around in the hotel lobby whenever he has time... You should be able to find him easily.
如果他不明白你的来意，只需要告诉他「我是会社派来的」，他会懂的。
If he doesn't understand why you're there, just tell him that you're "from the Society" and he'll catch on.
那么就拜托你为我跑一趟了，实在不好意思。
Well then, please do this errand for me. Thank you so much.
Where are you trying to go, boy?
I—I'm going to do volunteer work!
气死我了——你这臭小子又想上哪儿去？
I'm so annoyed — Where are you trying to go, boy!?
I—I'm going to do volunteer work!
哎，真是的…我都多大了，又不是小屁孩！你至于管得这么严吗，我又不可能偷偷看那什么《奇谭》……
Seriously... I'm not a child anymore! You can't tell me what to do all the time. It's not like I'm gonna go read that Tales series...
哈，我就知道！你小子就是想找地方看禁书！
Ha, I knew it! You're just trying to find a spot to read that banned book!
哈，你来得正好！来来来，你来给我们父子俩评评理！
Ha, you're here at a good time! Come and tell me what you think about my son's actions!
哎呦喂，谢天谢地！可算是有个自己人了……
Oh, thank goodness! Finally, someone on my side...
不了吧，清官都难断家务事啊。
I'll pass. Every family has its own problems.
咳咳，也是。让你看我们父子俩闹这么一出实在是不好意思啊。你先走吧，我们自己解决……
*cough* You're right. I... I shouldn't let you see this debacle between my son and I. Go ahead and leave. We can deal with this ourselves.
哎哎哎？！等下，你别走！我看你从宾馆前台那边来…难不成你和老歌德聊过了？
Hey! Wait! Don't go! I saw you came from the hotel's reception desk... Did you talk to Old Goethe?
哎呦喂，谢天谢地！可算是有个自己人了……
Oh, thank goodness! Finally, someone on my side...
I didn't. Don't jump to conclusions.
嗐，甭管那么多了——今天你不是也得是！是不是「会社」喊我去做义工？老爹，你看，我说什么来着？
Oh, who cares — You are helping me whether you like it or not! Is the Society asking me to do volunteer work? Dad, see? I told you!
你们先吵，我就凑个热闹。
Keep arguing. I'm just here to watch.
哎，等会！我我我…我知道你是替「会社」来喊人的！
Hey, wait! I—I know you're here to find people for the Society!
我这就来、这就来——你赶紧带我走！赶紧！
I'm coming. I'm coming — Hurry and take me away. Quickly!
什么…「会社」？好小子，在外边加入什么乱七八糟的组织了？！
What society? Did you join some shady organization, boy?
不不不，我都说了是去做义工啊！我们这个「会社」是……
No no no, I told you I'm going to do volunteer work! This Society, it's...
对对对，就是志愿者团体！
是《雪国冒险奇谭》书友会！
It's the book club for Tale of the Winterlands!
罗希啊罗希，你小子就给我嘴硬，这下让我抓到现行了吧！
Rossy! You keep denying this, but I caught you in the act!
哎…这都哪跟哪啊！我们这是志愿者团体——专门做义工、做好事的！
Huh... Wait, no! We are a volunteer group — We volunteer and do good deeds!
What do you do? Spell it out!
哎…你别添乱！我们这是志愿者团体——专门做义工、做好事的！
Hey, don't make it worse! We are a volunteer group — We volunteer and do good deeds!
哎哟，我还能骗您不成啊？我虽然说话不中听，但您看我从小到大什么时候骗过您？
Oh, come on, do you think I'm lying? I may talk trash, but I've never lied to you.
啧…算了。这次就信你一回吧，下不为例！
Tsk... Never mind. I'll believe you this once!
嘿，这事就算是解决咯。感谢老爹！
Hehe, well this is as good as done. Thank you, dad!
呃…那个啥，你是叫{NICKNAME}是吧？谢谢你替我解围。你要是真认识老歌德的话，能帮我跟他转达下情况不？就说我晚点去找他。
Um... You are {NICKNAME}, right? Thank you for helping me out. If you know Old Goethe, can you tell him what happened? Tell him I'll see him later.
成，都听你的！你是我的大恩人……
Alright, I'll listen to you! You helped me so much...
Why haven't you gone to your volunteer work yet?
嗐，其实我刚才正等人来送书呢——我想看的那册《奇谭》家里正好没有，非得从别人手里借才行……
Heh, I was actually waiting for someone to give me the book — I don't have the specific book in the Tales series that I wanted to read, so I had to burrow it...
结果我老爹半道杀出，那人估计见状跑得没影了…你说说吧，这都办的什么事啊！害得我又得浪费时间等那人带着书回来……
Then my dad popped out of nowhere, and the book owner probably ran away... Seriously, what is this mess? Now I have to waste time waiting for the person to bring the book back...
哎，无论如何你救了我一命，多谢啦！等拿到书我就去找老歌德碰头——不过你要是先见到他的话，还得请你拜托帮忙传话了。
Anyways, thank you for saving me! I'll be heading to Old Goethe's once I get the book — But if you see him first, please let him know.
你将方才的遭遇一五一十地报告了老歌德……
You tell Old Goethe what happened...
哈哈哈…没想到还有这种事啊。不过，这也正是我们「会社」存在的意义。
Hahaha... I didn't think this would happen, but that is indeed why the Society exists.
所以这「会社」到底是什么？
So, what exactly is the Society?
嗯…既然你帮了我们的忙，那你也是我们的一份子了。我就简单给你介绍一下吧。
Well, since you helped us, you are now one of us. I'll give you a short introduction.
我们的「会社」全称「正当权益会社」——顾名思义，我们的目标便是维护每个人的「正当权益」。
Our Society is called The Rightful Rights Society — As the name implies, our goal is to protect everyone's rightful rights.
简单来说，就是让每个人都能暂时逃离家庭和责任的束缚，自由自在地发展自己的兴趣爱好、或者只是单纯地休息一下……
In short, we can get everyone to temporarily escape from the bindings of family and duty, to freely develop their hobbies and preferences, or simply to rest...
总之，我们是个造福社会的公益组织，而我老歌德正是行政区分社的负责人。我很欣赏你的热情和能力——有兴趣加入我们吗？

Anyways, we're a charitable organization that aims to make the world a better place, and I'm the manager for the Administrative District branch. I like your passion and capacity. Would you be interested in joining us?
It doesn't sound like a charitable organization.
哈哈，公益组织不就是义务为人做好事嘛。
Hahaha, aren't charitable organizations all about doing good deeds for free?
从这个角度出发，我们「正当权益会社」显然是个公益组织。
If you view it that way, then The Rightful Rights Society is certainly a charitable organization.
原来你还有这种隐藏身份。
So, this is your hidden identity.
没错。毕竟我们平时都需要隐秘行动，所以不能在外声张自己的身份——这也是我最初请你帮忙时有所犹豫的原因。
That's right. We usually act in secrecy and don't announce our identities, which is why I hesitated to ask for your help.
不过，现在你已经知道了「会社」和我的身份…这意味着我们已经准备好接纳你，现在只看你如何回应了。
However, since you know about my identity and the Society, we are now ready to accept you into our ranks. The choice is up to you.
What are the benefits of joining?
首先，如果你感到自己需要一些休闲时间却脱不开身，你就可以求助社友，拜托他们替你打掩护；其次，你也可以在有空时协助配合其他成员。

Firstly, if you ever feel you need some time to relax but can't get away from your duties, you can ask other Society members to help cover for you. Secondly, you can also cover for other members whenever you can.
当然，这并不意味着你可以随便差使社友…要想享受权利，你就必须有过帮助他人的记录才行。
This certainly doesn't mean you get to command other Society members as you wish. To enjoy the benefits of the Society, you need to have a record of having helped others.
一次帮助可抵两次求助——我们鼓励大家相互支援，一起享受休闲时光。
One instance of helping other Members equals two instances of asking for help. We encourage everyone to help each other and enjoy some off time.
不加入的话，你会放我走吗？
Are you going to let me go if I refuse to join?
呵呵，不想加入吗？那么我会给你开个无法拒绝的条件……
Ho-ho, you don't want to join? Then I will give you an offer you cannot refuse...
…开个玩笑。加入「会社」与否是你的自由——我们不会逼迫你的。
...I'm joking. You're free to join the Society or not. We won't force you.
哈哈，那可真是太好了！那么，你就是我们「会社」的一份子了。
Hahaha, good! You're now a member of the Society.
如果其他社友发布了委托，我就会通知到你。你可以自行判断是否提供协助。
I'll contact you when other members put up commissions, and you can decide whether to help them.
另外…这是今天罗希一事的报酬——请你笑纳。
And this is the reward for Rossy's business today — with warm regards.
我来帮你行使正当权益！
I'll help you exercise your rightful rights!
哇，没想到这么快就有人来啦！那我就和你说说我的需求吧。
Woah, I didn't expect someone to arrive so quickly! Let me tell you what I need.
你也知道我是《水晶日报》美食专栏的记者吧？最近我在创作上遇到了一些瓶颈，脑子简直是一团浆糊了。
You know I'm a column journalist for Crystal Daily, right? I've hit a bit of a bottleneck with my writing recently. My brain is all a fog.
但你也知道，我们这种工作单位就爱抓考勤…早上一次，中午一次，晚上走的时候还得来一次——连个逃离办公室换换脑子的机会都没有，我真是受够了！
But companies like ours love to check for attendance... They check once in the morning, once at noon, and once at night! I can't even step outside the office to relax my brain! I've had enough!
所以我就想请两天病假休息一下。但我们主编又说请病假必须提供医生证明…实在没办法，我只好通过「会社」发布委托了。
So, I want to take a break and get a couple of days of sick leave, but the chief editor says I need a doctor's letter... I'm all out of ideas, which is why I put up a Society commission.
我的需求就是这样啦。你可以接受吗？不行的话我就再等等别人好了……
Well, that's my task. Do you want to take it? If you don't, I'll just wait for someone else...
小事一桩，我正好有个朋友…
Piece of cake. I've got a friend.
难道…你那朋友正好是个医生？那可是帮大忙啦！
Is your friend a doctor? That's awesome!
我认识的医生在下层区…
This doctor friend of mine is in the Underworld...
咦？你有认识的医生吗？还是在下层区？！
Huh? You know a doctor? In the Underworld!?
不知道我那主编认不认下层区的医生证明——尤其是这种特殊时期……
I don't know if my chief editor would recognize an Underworlder doctor's practicing license — Especially during sensitive times like this...
但…还是请你帮忙问问看吧。兴许他发现不了呢！
But... please ask your friend for a favor anyways! Maybe the chief editor won't notice!
我就在这里等你的好消息——拜托你啦！
I'll be waiting right here for your good news — Please!
想请问你能否开具医生证明…
Can you write a sick leave letter...?
你将艾格尼斯的请求转告了娜塔莎……
呵呵…「正当权益会社」啊，真是个久违了的名字。
Hahaha... The Rightful Rights Society. I haven't heard that name for a long time.
出于职业道德，我一般是不会随便给人开具证明的…但「会社」的大家都有苦衷，这点我也明白。
I usually don't write such letters because of professional ethics... But I know everyone in the Society has their own reasons.
这张证明就给你吧——但我可不保证它真能帮那位艾格尼斯小姐蒙混过关哦。
Here's the letter. No guarantees this will pass any detailed scrutiny, though.
我帮你开好医生证明了。
I got you a doctor's letter.
真的吗？！谢谢你！快让我看看……
Really!? Thank you so much! Let me see...
这…因在矿井长时间劳作造成腰间盘突出…？这个真的有用吗……
L—Lumbar disc herniation due to prolonged manual labor in the mines...? Is this excuse going to work?
算了算了，不管了！能开到证明就是胜利——我就去赌一把吧！辛苦你为我跑一趟啦。
Never mind. I don't care anymore! Having a letter is good enough. I'm gonna go take my chances! Thank you for doing this for me.
如果你也需要帮助的话，就通过老歌德发布委托吧。我看到你委托的话，一定会第一时间前来帮忙的——
If you ever need any help, you can send out a commission with Old Goethe, too. If I see your commission, I'll rush over to help as soon as I can —
还有…这是我的一点心意，请收下吧！
And... this is a small reward. Please take it!
你在告示板的角落里发现了这样一张纸条——
You found a note in a corner of the notice board that says:
「正当权益会社——会员 艾格尼斯 发布了一则委托。有意向提供协助的社友请前往面洽！」
"Agnes, a member of the Rightful Rights Society, has issued an assignment. Please contact Agnes if you are interested in offering your help!"
我来帮你行使正当权益！
I'll help you exercise your rightful rights!
哦，是你。看来这世上还是好心人多…我放心了。
Oh, it's you. Seems like there are still plenty of good people in this world... That's good.
我的状况…是这样的。我本是《雪国冒险奇谭》续作代笔，可我实在没办法模仿出原作的韵味……
My situation... is this. I'm the ghostwriter of the sequel for Tale of the Winterlands, but I just can't manage to copy the feelings of the original...
也正因此，有位编辑正在追着我讨债…她最近似乎发现了我的住所，便连日登门拜访。可我哪里有稿子能拿得出手？
That's why an editor is hot on my trail... She recently found out where I live and keeps visiting me, but I don't have any manuscripts to show her!
那位编辑…名叫尼古莱。而我的需求就是请人把她支走——什么说法、什么方式都可以，最好能让她以为亚诺这人已经永远消失了……
That editor is named Nika, and my commission to you is to get her away from me — I don't care how you do it or what you say to her. It'd be best if she thinks Amo is gone and never coming back.
怎么样，你能做到吗？要是不行的话，我得再想想其他办法……
Can you do that? If you can't, then I'll think of something else...
Leave it to me. I'll talk to her.
我可太会说服人了，放心吧！
I'm very good at persuading people! Leave it to me!
听到你这么说，我心里竟然一沉……
Now that you've said that, I'm even more concerned...
对不起，可能是我太悲观了。请你别放在心上。
Sorry. Maybe I'm being too pessimistic. Don't take it to heart.
Please! You have my sincerest thanks!
哦？你认识那位大作家啊，他怎么了？
Oh? You know that famous author? What about him?
他说他写不出来，交不了稿。
He says he's having trouble writing and can't hand in the manuscript.
哈哈，原来是这样。我说最近怎么找不到他人……
Hahaha, I see. I was wondering why I couldn't find him lately...
He disappeared into the depth of the Snow Plains...
原来是这样。我说最近怎么找不到他人……
I see. I was wondering why I couldn't find him lately...
…哈哈，开玩笑，我才不会相信这种借口。你还不如说他翻垃圾桶翻出病了呢。
...Yeah, right. I'm not going to believe such an excuse. You might as well tell me he got sick from going through Belobog's trashcans.
没关系。你是来替他求情的，对吧？
It's okay. You're here to ask me to leave him alone, right?
他确实因为翻垃圾桶生病了…
He did get sick from going through the trashcans...
…倒也不必顺着我的话往下说。我知道，你是来替他求情的，对吧？
...You didn't have to run with what I said. I know you're here to ask me to leave him alone, right?
他真的去雪原了，我会骗你吗？
He really did go to the Snow Plains. I'm serious.
好了好了，别演了——你是来替他求情的，对吧？
Alright alright, you can stop now — You're here to ask me to leave him alone, right?
你让他放心吧，我最近找他的原因根本就不是催稿。其实是我们出版社主编看中了他的才能，想要聘请他当《水晶日报》的专栏作者呢。
Tell him not to worry. I'm not looking for him because of the manuscript. It's because my chief editor likes his work and wants to hire him as a column writer for the Crystal Daily.
不过他总是躲着我，这些话也没办法传达给他了。如果你见到他的话，可以麻烦你帮忙转达一下吗？
But since he is always hiding from me, I never got to tell him about this. Could you please let him know when you see him?
如果他有兴趣的话，不妨让他来与我社当面商议。主编似乎很中意他，条件什么的都好商量——如果能成，他也不用每天抱着垃圾桶唉声叹气了吧……

If he's interested, he can come directly to our office for a discussion. The chief editor really likes his work and our terms are negotiable — He won't have to sigh all day while hugging a trashcan anymore...
你将尼古莱的话转告了亚诺……
You told Amo what Nika had said...
这是个陷阱，我不会上当的。她肯定是想当面拷打我，把我关进小黑屋，逼我出稿……
This is a trap. I won't fall for it. She just wants to find and torture me, lock me up, and force me to write...
我绝不会离开我的垃圾桶！只有这里才是我的归宿……
I'm never leaving my trashcan! This is my only home...
啊…抱歉。我只顾着自怜自艾，都忘记向你道谢了。
Ah... I'm sorry. I was so engrossed in feeling sorry for myself that I forgot to thank you.
谢谢你为我跑腿，这是我仅有的部分积蓄，请你收下……
Thank you for running the errand for me. These are my only savings. Please take them...
你在告示板的角落里发现了这样一张纸条——
You found a note in a corner of the notice board that says:
「正当权益会社——会员 亚诺 发布了一则委托。有意向提供协助的社友请前往面洽！」
"Amo, a member of the Rightful Rights Society, has issued an assignment. Please contact Amo if you are interested in offering your help!"
我来帮你行使正当权益！
I'll help you exercise your rightful rights!
喔，没想到这么快就有社友来帮忙了！看来多多加入公益组织是个正确的决定。
Oh, I didn't think other Society members would be here so soon! Seems like it's a good decision to join charitable organizations.
我的需求是——希望你能为我拍张照！就这样。
I need you to — take a photo of me! That's all.
喔，真爽快！那就拜托你了，记得帮我拍得英俊、高大一点——这可是要给我女儿看的！
Oh, nice! Please, make me look tall and handsome — This photo is for my daughter.
哈哈，先拍照吧，拍完我就告诉你。
Hahaha, just take the photo. I'll tell you afterwards.
那就拜托你了，记得帮我拍得英俊、高大一点——这可是要给我女儿看的！
Please, make me look tall and handsome — This photo is for my daughter.
不愧是受害者互助会的老大…
You are certainly the leader of the Scam Victims Association...
吃一堑长一智嘛，留点心眼总是好的！
I'm just being smart. It's good to be on your guard around other people!
那么，照片就拜托你了。记得帮我拍得英俊、高大一点——这可是要给我女儿看的！
The camera is all yours! Please, make me look tall and handsome — This photo is for my daughter.
拍完了？多谢！那就来让我看看……
You're done? Thank you! Let me have a look...
哎呀，这拍得真不错！看起来就像我年轻了十岁，哈哈哈。
Oh, this is a good photo! I look ten years younger in this, hahaha.
好啊好啊，谢谢你帮忙！这是我的一点心意……
Yes, thank you for your help! This is a small token of thanks...
…呃，总感觉忘了点什么事。是什么来着？
...Um, I feel like I forgot something. What could it be?
哎，算了算了，回头想起来再说吧。总之请收下我的谢礼！
Never mind. I'll get to it when I remember. Anyways, please accept my thanks!
现在能说说为什么要拍照了吧？
Can you tell me now why you want a photo?
哈哈，这可说来话长了。我想想怎么组织语言……
Hahaha, that's a long story. Let me think about where to start...
事情是这样——你也知道我每天都专注于推广「深蓝骗局反诈技术」，对吧？
Okay — You know I spend my time every day promoting techniques against Dark-Blue Scams, right?
我经常在广场上一站就是一天，有时候很晚才回去。结果，我家女儿就不乐意了，非说我不愿意陪她玩；其他家人也怀疑我在外面做些不三不四的事……

Sometimes I stay out in the Plaza all day and only get home late at night. My daughter got upset and said I don't want to play with her, and my family also thinks I'm doing some shady business out here...
于是我就想到了拍照这个点子——这样就能证明我确实是在外面工作了！
So I thought about taking a photo to prove that I'm in fact working during the day!
Every family has its own troubles.
哈哈哈，其实都是小事！我们一家子关系其实还不错。
Hahaha, it's nothing! My family actually gets on very well.
Isn't the Society all about helping people avoid work?
这么理解可就太片面了！你想啊，「正当权益会社」是帮助人行使「正当权益」的，而我的工作则是确保别人的「正当权益」不受侵犯……
That's not the whole picture! Think about it — The Rightful Rights Society helps people to exercise their rightful rights, and my job is to ensure people's rights are not violated...
没错，这和「会社」的价值观是不冲突的——「正当权益会社」还是做了它该做的事，没毛病吧？
There is no conflict between my job and the mission of the Society. The Rightful Rights Society is still doing its thing.
噢哟，不小心扯远了。总之，谢谢你帮忙！这是我的一点心意……
Anyways, that went off on a tangent. Thank you! These are your rewards...
拍完了？多谢！那就来让我看看……
You're done? Thank you! Let me have a look...
哎，我人呢？看不见啊，在哪儿呢…这样的照片好像并不能证明我的清白啊。
Huh, where am I in this photo? I can't see myself in this... This picture is not gonna prove my claims.
不过算了，毕竟你特意跑一趟，我再胡乱提要求也不合适。谢谢你啊。
Never mind. You came all the way out here for this, and I can't ask too much from you. Thank you.
好啊好啊，谢谢你帮忙！这是我的一点心意……
Yes, thank you for your help! This is a small token of thanks...
…呃，总感觉忘了点什么事。是什么来着？
...Um, I feel like I forgot something. What could it be?
哎，算了算了，回头想起来再说吧。总之请收下我的谢礼！

Sometimes I stay out in the Plaza all day and only get home late at night. My daughter got upset and said I don't want to play with her, and my family also thinks I'm doing some shady business out here...

Anyways, that went off on a tangent. Thank you! These are your rewards...
你在告示板的角落里发现了这样一张纸条——
You found a note in a corner of the notice board that says:
「正当权益会社——会员 查威 发布了一则委托。有意向提供协助的社友请前往面洽！」
"Chavez, a member of the Rightful Rights Society, has issued an assignment. Please contact Chavez if you are interested in offering your help!"
我来帮你行使正当权益！
I'll help you exercise your rightful rights!
啊，原来你也是「正当权益会社」的社员……
Ah, so you're a member of The Rightful Rights Society too...
我的需求嘛…跟我去趟歌德宾馆就行。我请你喝下午茶，全部消费我来买单——怎么样，很划算吧？
As for my request... Just come with me to the Goethe Hotel and I'll treat you to afternoon tea — Does that sound like a good deal?
嘿，要的就是你这种反应。其他社员一听我要请喝茶，都以为我是想趁机推销呢，全都拔腿就跑……
Aha, that's a reaction I like. The other members all ran away when they heard I wanted to treat them to tea... They thought I'm trying to sell something to them.
你不会是想趁机推销吧？
Are you trying to sell me something?
停停停——不许聊工作！你们这帮人…怎么都一个反应呀！
Hold it — Don't talk about work! You... Why do you all react in the same way!?
Then why are you inviting me to tea?
哪来那么多为什么——我就是想喝个茶，逃避一下工作，不行吗？「会社」不就是做这个的？
There is no why — I just want to have some tea and get away from work. Isn't that enough of a reason? Isn't that what the Society does?
毕竟你平时就是做这个的…
I mean, this is what you do every day...
哎…这我也承认。但我就是想喝个茶，逃避一下工作，不行吗？「会社」不就是做这个的？
Okay, that's true, but I just want to have some tea and get away from work. Isn't that enough of a reason? Isn't that what the Society does?
行了行了，我的休闲时间是有限的——你先去歌德宾馆大堂等我一下，我收拾收拾就来！
Alright alright, I only have so much time to relax — Go wait for me in the Goethe Hotel lobby and I'll be there soon!
哟，你可算是到了。没想到我比你还快呢。
Ahh, you're finally here. Didn't realize I'd be even faster than you.
咳咳…我们先点餐吧。来这种地方歇脚总得点些东西，不然我都不好意思坐在这儿。
Ahem... Let's order first. You've gotta eat something when you're sitting in places like this, otherwise I'd feel embarrassed.
来，看看菜单——想吃什么想喝什么都随便点，我请客！
Here's the menu — Order whatever you want. It's my treat!
I want a Rye Bread Soda Iceberg.
哦？挺会挑嘛，这是歌德宾馆的爆款呢。黑面包汽水特有的麦香和酸奶的酸甜口感融合在一起…吃一次就会上瘾。

Oh? You've got good taste. That's the most popular beverage the Goethe Hotel has on offer. A fusion between the unique aroma of the rye bread soda and the sourness of yogurt... One bite is enough to get people hooked.
I want a Special Sausage Platter.
嗯…这倒是贝洛伯格的特色菜。不过大家都吃腻了，所以没什么人会专门点这种红肠拼盘吃。
Well... That's indeed a Belobog specialty, but everyone's tired of it. No one really orders that anymore.
我要「歌德经典手冲咖啡」！
I want a Goethe Classic Hand-Made Coffee.
你怎么回事，这菜单上不写着「暂停供应」嘛。咖啡豆在贝洛伯格可太珍贵了，我也就小时候见妈妈喝过一次…还是帮你点杯「哞哞热牛奶」吧。

What's up with you? The menu already says it's temporarily unavailable. Coffee beans are so precious in Belobog and I've only ever seen my mother drink coffee once in my life... I'll get you a Moo-Moo Hot Milk instead.
嗯…我的话要这个、这个、还有这个…就这些吧，我去和老歌德说一声。
Mmm... I want this, this, and this... Alright, I'll go let Old Goethe know.
拉雯妮在老歌德处买了单……
Lavonne settled the bill with Old Goethe...
老歌德说还得二十分钟，我们先等着吧。
He says it'll take about <unbreak>20</unbreak> minutes. Let's wait.
You sure know how to enjoy life.
哈哈，一般般啦。只是我工作之外的休闲时间不多，平时只能来这歌德宾馆坐坐，自然也就对各种菜式熟悉了。
Hahaha, not really. I don't have a lot of free time, so when I do have the time, I usually come here and sit. That's how I got familiar with the food on offer.
要开始推销了吗？我准备好了。
Are you going to sell me something now? I'm ready.
都说了别聊工作！你这人怎么回事啊。
I said, don't mention work! What's wrong with you?
不然呢？我正等你开腔呢。
Definitely. I was waiting for you to start.
感觉你和平时的状态差别很大。
You feel quite different from the usual.
嗯…工作是工作，生活是生活嘛。其实……
Mmm... Well, life is different from work.
我还是不知道该聊什么…
I don't know what to chat about.
…哎，也是。毕竟我们也不熟，我又擅自拉你跑来喝下午茶。这样吧，我就讲讲自己的事好了。
...Right, we're not very close friends, and I did drag you here just to have afternoon tea. I'll tell you something about myself then.
拉雯妮开始讲述自己的故事……
Lavonne starts to talk about herself...
我平时都是独居…独自一人来行政区打拼…当时我就瞅准了城郊那片雪地，觉得一定大有可为……
I live alone... I came to the Administrative District on my own to make a name for myself... I set my eyes on that snowy area in the suburbs and thought it would be very profitable...
你说我一个人打拼是图什么…还不是为了早点经济独立…要再让我回去我可受不了……
Why do you think I'm trying to make a name for myself... It's all to become financially independent soon... I can't take it if I have to go back...
我觉得自己真的很迷茫…每天拼死拼活推销…舍弃了家庭和生活…可我收获了什么…？
I feel really lost... I'm doing my best making sales day in, day out... I've given up on having a life or a family... What am I getting out of it?
呼…不吐不快啊。全都说出来舒服多了——多谢你听我说这些有的没的。
Ahhh... It feels so good to say all that... Thank you for listening to me.
I didn't know you were under so much pressure...
哈哈，说出来也就觉得没什么了，谢谢你。多亏了「正当权益会社」啊——能像现在这样忙里偷闲，真是非常宝贵的机会。
Haha, it feels much better after I've said it. Thank you. The Rightful Rights Society is great — It's a precious chance to have a break like this.
I didn't know you were so talkative...
哈哈，我这话匣子一打开就收不住了…不过做房地产中介嘛，这反而是个优点呢。
Haha, I have problems stopping myself once I start to talk... But that's a good thing when I work as a real estate agent.
哈哈，今天真是挺开心的，谢谢你。多亏了「正当权益会社」啊——能像现在这样忙里偷闲，真是非常宝贵的机会。
Haha, today has been fun. Thank you. The Rightful Rights Society is great — It's a precious chance to have a break like this.
为了补偿你听我啰啰嗦嗦半天…这是我的一点心意，请你收下吧——我要回去工作了，有空再聊！
Here's a little something to compensate you for listening to me. I'm heading back to work now. See you later!
你在告示板的角落里发现了这样一张纸条——
You found a note in a corner of the notice board that says:
「正当权益会社——会员 拉雯妮 发布了一则委托。有意向提供协助的社友请前往面洽！」
"Lavonne, a member of the Rightful Rights Society, has issued an assignment. Please contact Lavonne if you are interested in offering your help!"
哦？这条街上居然会有人，真稀奇啊。
Oh? It's rare to see someone walking down this street.
这街上居然会有人，真稀奇啊。
It's rare to see someone walking down this street.
嚯嚯，想必你也是这商业街的常客了。
Oho, then you must be a regular to this commercial street, too.
只是，我常在这里散心，却没见过你啊。
I take my strolls around here, but I've never seen you before.
It's dangerous to be in the Fragmentum!
「裂界」？虽然不知道你在说什么，但我会注意的。谢谢你啊，年轻人。
Fragmentum? I don't know what you're talking about, but I'll be careful. Thank you, kid.
哈哈，这不过是条小小的商业街罢了，哪有什么可害怕的东西呢？
Haha, it's just a small commercial street. What's there to be scared about?
哈哈，既然你如此执着，那我今天便提早些回去吧。
Haha, I'll head back early if you insist.
不过，你别看我这朽样，我当年也是和阿丽萨大人上过战场的人…没什么能吓倒我，放心吧。
I may look old and useless now, but I once fought on the battlefield with Madam Alisa... Nothing will faze me.
再加上我已经到了这个岁数…对各种事都不会感到惊奇了。
Besides, I'm old now. I don't get surprised anymore.
话说回来，我手里有个战前留下的小玩意，能与人隔空通讯，还能凭空留下周遭的画像。只可惜它已经坏了，如今也没人懂得修理的技术……

Hmm, I do have a gadget with me from before the war. It can help us talk to people across the skies and memorialize your surroundings in images. Pity it's broken now, and no one knows how to fix it anymore...
年轻人，我看你手里那物件与我的很是类似——能拜托你为我这老头子掌掌眼吗？
Kiddo, what you have in your hand looks similar to my gadget — Can I please ask you to give a good look at this thing?
多谢，年轻人。希望不会占用你太多时间。
Thank you, kid. I hope this won't take a lot of your time.
嚯嚯嚯…真神奇！想不到我这把老骨头还有看到它亮起来的一天…作为报答，老朽就让你看看我的宝贝吧。
Ohoho... Amazing! I didn't think my old bones would live to see this light up again... This old one will show you my treasure as a reward.
老人枯槁的手指在液晶屏上颤颤巍巍地四处移动，呼出了似乎是「相册」的应用程序。
The old man's wrinkled fingers shake as they glide over the display, calling up a program that seems to be an album.
在相册中出现的内容无一例外，全都是一对恩爱的年轻夫妻与惹人怜爱的幼童，只是照片的构图与人物姿势有些微妙的差距。
All the images in the album show a loving young couple and an adorable child. The only differences between the images are composition and people's pose.
看吧，年轻人。这是我的家人，这位是我的妻子…那时候，真是我人生中最幸福的时候啊。
Look, kid. This is my family, and this is my wife... That was the happiest period of my life.
可惜妻子她早早离去…我的儿子长大后也嫌我老来不中用，一个人打拼去了。
But my wife left me early... My son thought I was a bother in my old age and went off to work somewhere else.
What do you mean, your wife left you?
你…知道寒潮吧？她害了寒病，没能挺过去。
You know about the Eternal Freeze, right? She got sick from the cold and didn't make it through.
那您还有在和儿子联络吗？
Are you still in contact with your son?
最开始的那段时间根本联系不上他，但后来我从亲戚那里得到了他的电话，也便有了联络，嚯嚯。
At first, I couldn't find him at all. Then I got his contact number from a relative and got back in touch, haha.
我的儿子啊…他本想当个法官，哪知道时运不济——最后没了办法，终于挤进了「贝洛伯格供暖」，也算能养活自己了。
My son had wanted to become a judge, but these are bad times — He had to settle with a position in Belobog's heating system and make a living that way.
在那之后，便陆陆续续能够收到贝洛伯格银行的传信…似乎是那小子为我挣的生活费，嚯嚯嚯。
I periodically get letters from the Bank of Belobog... Those seem to be money sent to me by my son, hahaha.
他没想过回来与您生活吗？
Has he ever considered moving back here to live with you?
哎…说实在的，比起钱，我也想过能和儿子一起生活，这或许会更好。但这毕竟要影响他的工作，也就作罢了。
*sigh* Honestly, instead of receiving money, I did dream about living with him. That might be better for me, but it will affect his job, so I didn't push for it.
…就先聊到这里吧。我无端叨扰许久，真是万分抱歉。但也要谢谢你，为我修好了这个小玩意……
...Let's stop here. I'm sorry for taking so much of your time. I must thank you for fixing this gadget.
我想多问一句…你每天的这个时间，都会来到商业街上吗？
I want to ask... Are you going to be here every day at this time?
Take care of yourself as well.
你转身离开，又正欲回头再看一眼老人时，却发现那人早已杳无踪迹。
As you turn to leave, you try to get one last look at the old man, but he is already nowhere to be found.
你！就是你！这次你别想再跑掉了！
You! That's right, you! Don't you run away this time!
装傻是吧？谁不知道你成天在街上做些偷鸡摸狗的事啊？
You pretending to be dumb? Everyone knows you've been stealing things left and right!
What is this? Are you trying to start a fight?
你这小毛贼…口气不小啊！成天偷东西就算了，现在还想暴力拒捕？
You've got guts, little thief! Not only do you steal all day, you're also trying to resist arrest?
说什么呢？你只是小偷小摸罢了，不会受皮肉之苦的——除非你暴力拒捕！
What are you talking about? Theft isn't a serious crime. I won't go tough on you if you don't resist arrest.
I don't know what you're talking about.
我没偷过东西，你认错人了。
I didn't steal anything. You've got the wrong person.
行了，别狡辩了，赶紧放弃无谓的抵抗吧！我告诉你，要是你认错态度良好，法务大臣还有网开一面的可能！
Alright, enough yapping. Just give it up already! I'm telling you, if you admit to your crimes, the Minister of Justice may even let you go!
但如果你执意拒捕…那就别怪我不客气了！
But if you insist on resisting arrest... then I may have to go tough on you!
怎么会这样…！我、我得赶紧叫兄弟们过来支援……
How can it be...!? I—I need to call for support...
I told you, you've got the wrong person.
这怎么可能呢？街上就你一个人，小偷不是你是谁啊……
No way! You're the only one on the road. Who else would it be...
Where are you going to get other Guards in the Fragmentum?
What? Fragmentum? What are you talking about...
我…这怎么可能？什么叫被困在了过去？
I — How? What do you mean, trapped in the past?
简单来说…你变成幽灵了。
Put it simply... You are now a ghost.
这里其实是过去的贝洛伯格。
This is the Belobog of the past.
过去的贝洛伯格？意思是…你是从未来来的？不，不对……
This is the Belobog of the past? You mean, you're from the future? No, that's not right...
现在的你只是裂界的回声。
You're now merely an echo in the Fragmentum.
我…可这怎么可能？什么裂界？什么回声？
I — But how? What Fragmentum? What echo?
难道你的意思是…我已经死了？
Are you saying that I... I'm dead?
You can think of it that way, yes.
那我兄弟们呢？歌德老大呢？阿丽萨大人呢？阿丽萨大人总不可能死了吧？
What about my brothers-in-arms? Boss Goethe? Madam Alisa? There's no way Madam Alisa would be dead!
她可是…她可是带领我们击败了那些从天上来的怪物们啊！怪物们都没办法伤到她…她怎么会死呢？
She... She led us to victory against the monsters from the sky! Even the monsters couldn't hurt her... How could she die?
而且，如果大家都死了…我发誓要保护的人们都已经不在了…那我守着这条街又是为了什么？
And if everyone is dead... If the people I swore to protect are all gone... Then why am I still protecting this street?
自言自语间，这名铁卫渐渐化作齑粉，在空无一人的裂界中散去。
As the Guard mutters to himself, he gradually turns to dust and dissipates into the empty Fragmentum.
Mom, Dad... Where did you go...
*sob*... I'm waiting for my Mom and Dad...
It's very dangerous here. You should head home.
呜呜…可是…爸爸妈妈还没回来……
*sob*... But... Mom and Dad aren't back yet...
爸爸妈妈说，他们只会离开一下…马上就回来的……
Mom and Dad said they'll just be gone for a little bit... They'll be back in a flash...
他们说…让我在这里乖乖等着…可是他们一直都没回来……
They said... I should be a good kid and wait for them here... But they're still not back...
爸爸妈妈…你们是不是不要我了…？
Don't Mom and Dad... want me anymore...?
你的爸爸妈妈已经不在了。
Your Mom and Dad aren't around anymore.
Aren't around... What does that mean?
你已经…不属于这个世界了。
You... don't belong to this world anymore.
我听不懂…我才刚刚上小学…很多事情都不明白……
I don't get it... I just started grade school. I don't understand a lot of things...
难道爸爸妈妈…真的把我丢掉了吗…？
Did my Mom and Dad... throw me away?
在你面前的孩子嚎啕大哭了起来。当你正准备俯身、想要摸头安慰她时，却见自己的指尖穿透了她幼小的身躯。
The child before you starts to wail. As you bend down and try to pat her head in comfort, you see your fingers go through her small figure.
随后，这被困于裂界的小小回声很快便化作微光、四散无踪了。
Then, this tiny echo trapped in the Fragmentum scatters into particles of light and disappears.
你见过我的爸爸妈妈？他们说什么了…？
You saw my Mom and Dad? What did they say?
他们马上回来，你要乖乖等着。
They'll be back soon. Just wait right here.
我会…会在这里一直等着…哪里也不会去……
I'll... I'll stay here. I won't go anywhere...
在你面前的孩子嚎啕大哭了起来。当你正准备俯身、想要摸头安慰她时，却见自己的指尖穿透了她幼小的身躯。
The child before you starts to wail. As you bend down and try to pat her head in comfort, you see your fingers go through her small figure.
随后，这被困于裂界的小小回声很快便化作微光、四散无踪了。
Then, this tiny echo trapped in the Fragmentum scatters into particles of light and disappears.
他们正在商业街入口等你。
They're waiting for you at the entrance of the shopping street.
我…我会马上去找爸爸妈妈…！谢谢你…！
I—I'll go find Mom and Dad! Thank you!
在你面前的孩子抹了把泪，向你指示的方向奔去——仿佛她的父母确实仍在等候——仿佛这裂界描摹生成的旧日街道依旧真实存在。

The child before you wipes her tears away and runs toward the direction you pointed to as if her parents are indeed waiting for her, as if these foregone streets sculpted by the Fragmentum indeed still exist.
你望见这被困于裂界的小小回声遁入街巷深处，随后很快便化作微光、四散无踪了。
You watch as this tiny echo trapped in the Fragmentum dives between the alleyways, then fades into scattered particles of light.
老朽手里也有个类似的小玩意，是战前留下的——它能使人隔空通讯，还能凭空留下周遭的画像。只可惜它已经坏了，如今也没人懂得修理的技术……

I have a similar gadget with me from before the war. It can help us talk to people across the skies and memorialize your surroundings in images. Pity it's broken now, and no one knows how to fix it anymore...
年轻人，我看你手里那物件与我的很是类似——能拜托你为我这老头子掌掌眼吗？
Kiddo, what you have in your hand looks similar to my gadget — Can I please ask you to give a good look at this thing?
多谢，年轻人。希望不会占用你太多时间。
Thank you, kid. I hope this won't take a lot of your time.
嚯嚯嚯…真神奇！想不到我这把老骨头还有看到它亮起来的一天啊。
Ohoho... Amazing! I didn't think I'd live to see this light up again...
这机器里留着我最珍贵的宝贝，能修好可真是太好了……
My most precious treasure is kept inside this machine. Thank goodness it's fixed...
Hahaha... Take care of yourself as well.
你转身离开，又正欲回头再看一眼老人时，却发现那人早已杳无踪迹。
As you turn to leave, you try to get one last look at the old man, but he is already nowhere to be found.
哦？请留步，年轻人。你手上的是……
哟，{F#姐们儿}{M#哥们儿}也是来下馆子的啊？
Yo! You're here for a feed too?
可惜他们今天还没开门——怎么，要不咱一起等着？跟你说啊，我可是这儿的常客了！他们家的「爆辣蓬蓬菇」可是一绝嘞……
Pity they haven't opened yet. Wanna wait for them together? I'm telling ya, I'm a regular here. Their Spicy Puffy Mushroom is an absolute treasure...
啥？你可别唬我。这灯不还亮着吗？
Hah? Are you pulling my leg? Aren't the lights still on?
裂界的回响也能吃饭吗？
什么裂界？回响又是啥？{F#姐们儿}{M#哥们儿}说的我咋都听不懂呢？
What's a Fragmentum? What's an echo? I ain't getting whatcha trying to say.
行了行了，咱们先等着吧。我看他们马上就开门咯——再不开门我可要饿坏了……
Whatever, let's just wait. I reckon they're about to open up. I'll be starving if they don't...
（看来，不把饭端到他面前，他是不会罢休的……）
(Seems like he won't give up unless there's food before his face...)
怎么了，你想让我吃这个？这炒饭看着怪好吃的啊，你做的？
What, you want me to eat this? This fried rice looks pretty tasty. Did you make it?
行吧，反正我肚子也饿了——送到嘴边的肉哪有不吃的道理！
Alright, I'm hungry anyways — It ain't smart to pass up food shoved in front of my face!
这炒饭…你怎么调味的啊？咋一点味道都没有？吃进嘴里跟嚼矿渣似的……
This fried rice... What did you do with it? It has no flavor! It tastes like mine dust...
I told you that you can't eat.
Do you see the problem now?
难道是我舌头不灵了？咋回事，我不明白啊……
Did something happen to my tongue? What's going on? I don't get it...
你失去了物理意义上的身体。
You have lost the physical body forever.
你已经变成了一只幽灵…
这么说…是我已经死了呗？
那我为啥还能和你说话呢？难不成你也……
Then how come I can still talk to you? Are you also...
你只是裂界模拟诞生的产物。

哎，行吧。虽然我不太懂你说的那什么「裂界」到底是啥，但我好像已经理解了一切……
Yeah, alright. I don't really get what's this Fragmentum thing you talk about, but I think I understand...
这么看来…我岂不是吃不了好吃的了吗？那也太空虚了吧……
So... I can't eat tasty food anymore? That's really sad...

怎么了，你想让我吃这个？这炒饭看着有点不妙啊，你看这颜色…呃，你非要我吃了这个不成——
What, you want me to eat this? This fried rice looks a bit nasty... Just look at this color. Um, you really want me to eat it...?
等、等会！你别往我嘴里塞啊呜咳咳咳……

咳…你突然干啥啊！哎呦喂…真是噎死我了！
*cough* What are you doing all of a sudden! Ouch... That almost choked me!
不过你这炒饭…啥味道也没有啊？倒也没看起来那么难吃，但口感跟矿渣似的……

I told you that you can't eat.

那我为啥还能和你说话呢？难不成你也……
Then how come I can still talk to you? Are you also...

你好呀，{M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}！能…能请你为我拍张照吗？
Hello! C—Can you take a picture of me?
对呀，这附近也没别人啦。
Yep. There's no one else around.
其实今天是我的生日！娜塔莎姐姐想为我拍张照，然后再寄给爸爸妈妈，让他们看看我的变化！
It's actually my birthday today! Miss Natasha wants to take a photo of me and mail it to my Mom and Dad, so they can see how much I've grown!
不过，我怎么找也找不到娜塔莎姐姐…正好{M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}你路过，我就想能不能问问看，嘿嘿。
But I can't find Miss Natasha at all... Then you passed by and I thought maybe I can ask you, hehe.
那你摆个姿势吧，要拍了哦——

难道说——我变成裂界里的怪物了吗？

No, you are more like a ghost.

是我拍照技术不行，对不起…

嘿嘿，没事的！我再拜托别人帮我拍一张就好。
Hehe, it's okay! I'll just ask someone else to take one for me!
总之——谢谢你啦，{M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}！
留下一张灿烂的笑脸，这位乖巧懂事的孩子便散发黯淡的光芒，在裂界的街道中散去。
This nice and polite child puts on a bright smile as their figure radiates a dim light, then disappears from the streets constructed by the Fragmentum.
Did you take it? Let me see!
…咦？{M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}…是没拍到我吗？照片里怎么一个人都没有啊。

可能因为你只是裂界的残影…

在你眼前的这名男子看似有些不大自然。他的神情局促不安，目光游离，却又总是盯着你那鼓鼓囊囊的口袋不放。
The man before you seems rather awkward. His expression is unsettled and nervous. His eyes dart everywhere, yet always return to your bulging pockets.
你很快明白，该男子恐怕是一名小偷。你莫名有些气恼，却又感到一丝可怜——想必他绝不知道你那口袋里装的都是些什么东西。
You soon realize this man is probably a thief. You feel upset, but also a bit sorry for him — He probably has no idea what items you are carrying.
…喂！{M#你小子}{F#你这小姑娘}，看什么看！有啥好看的！
...Hey! {M#Boy}{F#Girl}, what are you looking at? Nothing to see here!
I'm looking at you being suspicious.
哈？可疑？你少看不起人了！不就是看我像个小偷……
Huh? Suspicious? You're just looking down on me! You just think I look like a thief...
I'm looking at you being handsome.
你…你还敢阴阳怪气我！不就是看我像个小偷……
Y—You dare mock me? You just think I look like a thief...
I just want to look at you. What about it?
你…你敢挑衅我？！本想顺点东西神不知鬼不觉地走人…看来这下非得来硬的不可了哈。
Y—You're taunting me!? I wanted to swipe something quick then sneak away... But now I have to get tough with you.
兄弟们，跟我一起上！千万别让他向铁卫报了案！
Come with me, friends! Don't let this one report us to the Guards!
咳、咳咳…就是想挣点钱养家糊口，没想到还挨一顿毒打…{M#大哥}{F#大姐}您真不是人哪！
*cough*... I just wanted to get some money to keep myself fed, but now I'm all beaten up... {M#Sir}{F#Ma'am}, you're really violent!
想挣钱就找份正经工作。
If you want money, go find a proper job.
合法…哎，哪儿有那么简单啊。
A proper job... Heh. Easier said than done.
这贝洛伯格刚打完仗不久，墙外又是大风大雪…挣钱可太难了啊。
Belobog just finished fighting the war, and the outside is all snow and blizzard... It's so tough to earn money.
我这也是迫不得已…！要只养活我一人也就罢了——谁叫我当时赌气离家出走，现在又对我那老爹实在过意不去…我得想办法补偿他哪，唉。
I have no other way! It would have been okay if I just needed to look after myself, but I ran away from home and now feel bad for my Dad... I need to repay him somehow.
哎…不过您也教训的是，我还是找份正经工作吧。从前我总想着这样来钱快，但说到底也是克里珀堡上走钢丝…不知道哪天就把自己赔进去了啊。

But what you say is right. I should find a proper job. I used to think stealing would make a quick buck, but it's like walking on a tightrope on top of Qlipoth Fort... I'll end up falling to my doom sooner or later.
是啊。当年我年轻气盛，总觉得自己一定能在法务大臣手下谋高就，可我老爹不这么觉得。结果…我俩就闹掰了，老死不相往来。
Yeah. I was young, and was convinced I could get a great job under the Minister of Justice, but my Dad disagreed. Then... Then we fought and didn't speak to each other again.
后来我才发现老爹他说得对啊——我根本就不是那块料。但活人总不能让饿死吧？我就四处打听求人想混口饭吃……
Then I realized Dad was right — I'm never gonna be good enough for those kinds of jobs. But I can't just starve, can I? So I begged and asked everyone to give me a job...
可这世道实在是太难了，根本找不到合适的工作…实在没办法，我这才做了扒手，每个月再以「贝洛伯格供暖」员工的名义给老爹寄去生活费。
But the world is way too hard. I couldn't find a suitable job at all... So, I had to become a thief. I mail my Dad some money every month under the pretense of working for Belobog's heating system.
一开始我也有心理负担，总想着当扒手实在是不光彩。可生活所迫，我竟也慢慢地习惯了…哎。
I did feel bad at first, and I felt it was dishonorable to be a thief. But I had bills to pay and I got used to this life... *sigh*.
您说得对啊，我不能再这样下去了——这要让老爹知道了，那我还有什么脸面对他……
You are right. I can't continue like this anymore — If my Dad ever finds out, I would never be able to face him again.
还是好好改造，重新做人吧。
Leave the past behind and start over.
一定、一定！我不能再这样下去了——这要让老爹知道了，那我还有什么脸面对他……
Definitely! I can't continue like this anymore — If my Dad ever finds out, I would never be able to face him again.
那你好好改造，重新做人。
Then leave the past behind and start over.
一定、一定！我不能再这样下去了——这要让老爹知道了，那我还有什么脸面对他……
Definitely! I can't continue like this anymore — If my Dad ever finds out, I would never be able to face him again.
You have the guts to try justifying your actions?
我、我啥也没说！不敢了，我下次真不敢了！我保证！我一定找份正经工作，绝不再做这种坑蒙拐骗的事了……
I—I didn't say anything! I won't... I won't do it again! I promise! I'll go get a proper job, I'll never steal or rob or lie ever again...
面前的男子颓丧地垂着头，又恼又恨地抽泣了起来。
The man before you lowers his head in defeat, and starts to sob in anger and frustration.
不多时，那嘶哑的啜泣声便同男子的身躯一同消散了。

啧啧…前线的数字不容乐观啊。要是能再发明些什么东西，降低伤亡率就好了……
The casualty figures are discouraging. If only we could invent something to reduce the casualty rate...
哈！大兵，你好！我正在寻找新发明的灵感呢。刚没注意到你，实在不好意思啊。
Hello, soldier! I'm looking for inspiration for a new invention. I'm sorry I didn't notice you earlier.
所以…你来找我有什么事吗？如果不是太紧急的事，还请麻烦你整理成书面形式交给我的副手，就说是提交给理查德•巴拉金的……
So... What's the matter? If it is not too urgent, please submit a written report to my deputy and say it's for Richard Balakin.
哦？这难道是你的设计图纸？介意让我观摩观摩吗，大兵？
Oh, are these your design blueprints? Mind if I have a look, soldier?
这东西…是叫「生命传输器」吗？真是了不起……
Is this thing called... Life Transmitter? What an amazing invention...
要是有了这个，战场上应急抢救的存活率说不定能翻倍。而且也可以在野战医院里推广……
With this, the survival rate for emergency treatments on the battlefield could be doubled. And it would also be used in field hospitals...
太好了、太好了！大兵，你可是为我们铁卫立了大功啊！
Nice! Soldier, you have done us a great service!
想要复现你的图纸应该不难…如果真能造出来，铁卫全军都会记住你的名字的！哈哈哈……
It shouldn't be difficult to build it from your blueprints. If we succeed, you will be a hero to the Guards! Hahaha...
面前的铁卫如获至宝，仰天大笑。你仿佛能从那严密的铁盔下看到他激动的神情。
The guard standing in front of you laughs heartily as if he has found a treasure. You can almost see his excited expression through his tightly secured iron helmet.
他踱着步，一面思考着技术图纸的实现方案，一面向残响回廊深处走去，直到他来时的踪迹彻底消失——就像他从未出现在这里一般。

As he thinks about how to materialize the plans in the blueprints, he paces towards the depths of the Corridor of Fading Echoes until the traces of his appearance completely dissipate — as if he had never been here.
哦？这难道是你的设计图纸？介意让我观摩观摩吗，大兵？
Oh, are these your design blueprints? Mind if I have a look, soldier?
这东西…是叫「简易护具」吗？不错，不错……
Is this thing called... Simple Protective Gear? Hmm, not bad...
…不过，很可惜——你的想法很好，但这套护具的防护效率似乎并不如我们现役的制服。如果把它强行挂在制服外面又有可能限制行动……
Your idea is good, but... this gear doesn't seem to be as protective as our current uniform. And if we wear it outside the uniform, it may restrict our movement.
嗯…无论如何，我会顺着你的思路继续往下想的。感谢你提供宝贵建议，大兵。
Hmm... Anyway, I'll keep thinking along these lines. Thank you for your valuable advice, soldier.
面前的铁卫手扶脑袋作思考状。你仿佛能从那严密的铁盔下看到他虬曲的眉头。
The guard in front of you puts his hand on his head in thought. You fancy you can see his deep frown even under his full-face helmet.
他踱着步，一面思考着技术图纸的实现方案，一面向残响回廊深处走去，直到他来时的踪迹彻底消失——就像他从未出现在这里一般。

Oh, are these your design blueprints? Mind if I have a look, soldier?
这东西…是叫「迷彩油漆」吗？哈哈，有点意思……
Is this thing called... Camo Paint? Haha, interesting...
你是说…只要把这玩意泼在兄弟们身上，那帮怪物就看不到我们了，对吗？是个有趣的想法，不过那帮怪物是否靠视力索敌还是个问题……

So, you're saying that if we are covered with this stuff, the monsters won't be able to see us, right? Interesting stuff, but we don't know for sure if the monsters are using their sight to locate enemies...
但我个人觉得这是个非常有意思的发明——我会顺着你的思路想想看，是否有复现的可能…感谢你提供宝贵建议，大兵！
But I personally think it's a very interesting invention, and I will follow your line of thinking and see if it can be made... Thank you for your valuable advice, soldier!
面前的铁卫手扶脑袋作思考状。你仿佛能从那严密的铁盔下看到他虬曲的眉头。

这东西…是叫「愈合喷剂」吗？真是不可思议的想法……
Is this thing called... Healing Spray? What an incredible idea...
要是有了这个，兄弟们就能在战场上快速处理伤口，而且也比我们以往的方式更加安全……
With this, our wounds can be quickly taken care of on the battlefield, and it's also safer than our previous methods...
只是…你的设计图纸中提及的材料似乎很难获取。但如果真能造出来，铁卫全军都会记住你的名字的！哈哈哈……
It's just... the materials mentioned in your blueprints seem to be hard to come by. But if you do manage to make it, then all of the Guards will remember your name! Ahahaha...
面前的铁卫如获至宝，仰天大笑。你仿佛能从那严密的铁盔下看到他激动的神情。

Oh, are these your design blueprints? Mind if I have a look, soldier?
这东西…是叫「科技护具」吗？真是叹为观止的创意……
Is this thing called... High-Tech Protective Gear? What an astounding idea...
据我目测，这套护具的防护效率应该远高于我们现有的制服…可能有两倍不止！
As far as I can tell, the protection offered by this gear is much higher than our current uniform... Maybe twice as much!
只是…你的设计图纸中提及的材料似乎很难获取。但如果真能造出来，铁卫全军都会记住你的名字的！哈哈哈……
It's just... the materials mentioned in your blueprints seem to be hard to come by. But if you do manage to make it, then all of the Guards will remember your name! Ahahaha...
面前的铁卫如获至宝，仰天大笑。你仿佛能从那严密的铁盔下看到他激动的神情。
The guard standing in front of you laughs heartily as if he has found a treasure. You can almost see his excited expression through his tightly secured iron helmet.
他踱着步，一面思考着技术图纸的实现方案，一面向残响回廊深处走去，直到他来时的踪迹彻底消失——就像他从未出现在这里一般。

As he thinks about how to materialize the plans in the blueprints, he paces towards the depths of the Corridor of Fading Echoes until the traces of his appearance completely dissipate — as if he had never been here.
啊啊…不好意思，请问你能帮我修理一下这个屏障发生器吗？
Ahh... Excuse me, could you help me fix this Barrier Generator?
它好像…启、启动不了了！我检查了一遍，似乎是线路出了点问题…但我不知道该怎么修好它……
I can't turn it on... There seems to be a problem with the wiring... But I don't know how to fix it...
我…我其实是昨天才上前线的，所以对这东西还不了解…所以，能请你帮忙看看吗？
I... only came to the front lines yesterday. I still don't know much about the Barrier Launcher... Can you please take a look at it?
听说有大批怪物正向这里靠近…如果不修好它的话，我们就全完了…！
I heard that a large number of monsters are approaching here... If we can't fix it, we're all going to die!
Ahh... It's fixed! Thank you so much!
这下屏障就启动了…至少能抵挡它们一段时间！我得赶紧去疏散平民了——你也保重…你是个好人，可千万别死了啊！
The Barrier is activated... It can at least fend off those monsters for a while! I have to evacuate the civilians... You look after yourself. We can't have good folks like you die!
愿贝洛伯格长存！愿大守护者长存…！
May Belobog stand forever! May the Supreme Guardian live forever!
这名局促的新兵颤抖地向你鞠躬致谢后便奔向了堡垒深处——你远远望见那瘦弱的身躯在冰冷的裂界中化作了残光。

The ill-at-ease recruit gives you a bow of thanks despite his shaking body, then rushes towards the depths of the fort. You watch from a distance as his skinny form dissolves into broken light in the freezing Fragmentum.
啊…有谁在那儿吗？是你吗，队长……
Ahh... Who is there? Is it you, captain?
我…我看不清东西了…是不是我的头盔…被什么玩意糊住了…？
I can't see anything... Is my helmet covered with something?
我…我的腿在哪儿…我感觉不到——呕……
Where... are my legs? I can't feel... *barfs*...
一名虚弱的铁卫倚在墙边，似乎大限已至。如果裂界也能复制现实中的气味，那么在刚才那阵凄惨的呕吐声后，你应当闻到了浓郁的铁锈味。
A guard leans against the wall, looking as if his time had come. If the Fragmentum can replicate scents, then you should have smelled the thick tang of iron after that wretched barf.
队长…我…知道了…我的时候到了……
Captain... I... I know my time has come...
能告诉我…我打得怎么样吗？
Can you tell me... How was I on the battlefield?
勇敢…我的爸爸…妈妈…会为我骄傲…吗……
Brave... My father and... mother... will they be proud of me?
只是…我…坚持不了了…回不去了……
I'll never know... I can't... go back now...
Don't be silly. You will be fine!
哈哈…这时候就…别开玩笑了……
声音…我听不见声音了…你们在哪儿……
Voice... I can't hear your voice... Where are you?
可怜的铁卫不再出声。你将她上身扶起，轻柔地落在地面上，又将那柄久经沙场的钢枪放入她的怀中，试图以符合战士身份的、体面的葬礼为她送行。
The poor guard stops making a sound. You gently place his body into a sitting position and put his battle-hardened spear into his arms, trying to give him a respectable funeral worthy of a warrior.
你以自己认知中最合乎礼仪的敬礼姿势向她致敬。仿佛是对你敬意的回应，她那裂界构成的脆弱身躯顷刻间纷飞四散，归于尘土。
You salute him in the most ceremonial way you know. As if in response to you, his body, made by the Fragmentum, shatters and returns to dust in an instant.
看你好像很发愁的样子。
It seems like something's bothering you.
丹鼎司洞天重开之后，虽然人来人往的程度不及灾前，但这里多少也算是鱼龙混杂。
After the Alchemy Commission delve was reopened, it has become less busy than before the disaster, but it is still a mixed bag.
你有没有听说过，有一类化外民组织叫作「放生帮」？叫他们为组织也有些奇怪，我听说有些人是抱团行动，有些人则纯粹是自发行为……
Have you heard of an Outworlder organization called "The Unshackled"? It might not be suitable to call them an organization, as while some of them act as a group, others operate alone...
I've never heard of The Unshackled...
说是「通过放生来积累功德」的一群人，这都不重要……
It is said to be a group of people who accumulate merits by releasing living creatures, but that's not the point...
I've heard a little about The Unshackled.
你听说过就好办了，这帮人既固执、又愚昧，简直不像接受过现代教育的人。
It's great you've heard of them. They are an ignorant and stubborn bunch devoid of any proper education.
他们什么都往波月古海里放生，那些放生「鳞渊冰泉」的人姑且还算在法律边缘徘徊，但是放生野生生物的就属于违返仙舟律法了。
They throw whatever they get their hands on into the Lunarescent Depths. Pouring Scalegorge Spring Water might not be against Xianzhou's laws, but releasing wild creatures undoubtedly is.
前段时间，我抓住了不少「放生帮」放生的现行，他们好像已经盯上我了。我去海岸巡逻期间，他们假装老实；一旦我该休息了……

Recently, I caught many of them red-handed during their acts of "liberation," and I think they have me on their radar. They have been on their best behavior when I'm patrolling the coast. Once I take a break, however...
They go back to their old ways again.
不对，他们就出来开始放生了。
No, they go back to their old act.
总之，我想有个人在我休息的时候帮我在海滩上走一下就好了。要是发现了放生帮就去威慑他们，要是发现了放生对象就处理一下…你说这样的人哪里找呢？

Anyway, I need someone to help me watch over the coast when I'm on break. If any of The Unshackled's members are sighted, my replacement needs to warn them and deal with whatever they release... Do you have any suitable candidates in mind?
Aren't I the person you're looking for?
...Sounds like a menial job to me.
放心，护珠人是不会亏待你的，就拜托你了。
Don't worry. I, as a Pearlkeeper, will reward you handsomely. I'll count on you then!
（这就是跃渊巡逻的区域，<color=#dbc291ff>要是发现了放生帮就去威慑他们，要是发现了放生对象就处理一下</color>…真是的，守护这片沙滩的人到底是谁呢？）
(This is Yueyuan's patrol area. <color=#dbc291ff>Drive away The Unshackled and take care of the things they release</color>... Honestly, who is protecting this beach?)
（这好像是…漂流瓶？波月古海也存在着洋流吗？漂流瓶又是从哪里来的？）
(Is this a... drift bottle? Is there an ocean current in the Lunarescent Depths? Where did this drift bottle come from?)
（总之先打开看看，再考虑怎么办吧。）
(Let's take a look for now and decide what to do from there.)
（看来海滩也没有其他情况了。总之，先把求救信交给跃渊处理吧。）
(It seems there is nothing else out of the ordinary happening on the beach. I should hand this letter over to Yueyuan.)
(You hand the drift bottle you picked up to Yueyuan)
说老实话，我看这漂流瓶里字迹工整，我怀疑这是有人整蛊…不过，为了安全起见，我会安排人手驾驶星槎前往波月古海搜救的。

Frankly speaking, from the neat handwriting in this letter, I suspect this is just another prank... But, to err on the safe side, I'll send someone to the Lunarescent Depths on a rescue mission via a starskiff.
不过，我也建议你不必抱太大希望。鳞渊境存在着特殊的洞天技术，别说是落难者，就连我们也无法前往古海深处，这漂流瓶造假的可能性极高。

Still, please don't expect too much from this operation. Due to the special technologies in Scalegorge Waterscape delve, not even we can reach the depths, let alone the castaway. This makes me highly suspect that this letter is a fake.
但不能因此放弃调查，对吧？
But we cannot give up on our investigation because of that, can we?
你说的没错，就算可能性再低，我们也会到海上调查一番的。
You're right. No matter how slim the chance is, we still have to go out on the water and conduct an investigation.
这会不会是放生帮干的呢？
Do you think this could be the work of The Unshackled?
…倒是不能排除这样的可能性，他们的话，确实会干出浪费公共资源的事情。
...We can't rule out that possibility yet. Doing things that waste public resources is very much something they might do.
总之，辛苦你了，这是你应得的报酬。
Either way, thank you for your hard work. Here are your well-deserved rewards.
I hear you needed me for a patrol?
对了，不知道<color=#dbc291ff>漂流瓶的事</color>你还记得多少？我们护珠人派出了一队搜救人员，到波月古海上搜了一圈什么都没有找到。
By the way, do you still remember that thing with the <color=#dbc291ff>drift bottle</color>? We dispatched a rescue team to the Lunarescent Depths but found nothing.
你放心，我对你自然是信任有加，但是这漂流瓶的来历实在太怪了，越来越像整蛊了。
Fret not, you have my trust, but this drift bottle here is just too odd. The more I look at it, the more it seems like a prank to me.
如果你发现了类似的情况，<color=#dbc291ff>你可以自己处理掉，或者你不放心的话，仍然可以交给我们。</color>
If you come across any similar circumstances, <color=#dbc291ff>you can take care of them yourself, or hand them over to us if you're feeling uneasy.</color>
总之，麻烦你去海滩上走一遭了。
Either way, please do another patrol across the beach for me.
（这就是跃渊巡逻的区域，<color=#dbc291ff>要是发现了放生帮就去威慑他们，要是发现了放生对象就处理一下</color>…真是的，守护这片沙滩的人到底是谁呢？）
(This is Yueyuan's patrol area. <color=#dbc291ff>Drive away The Unshackled and take care of the things they release</color>... Honestly, who is protecting this beach?)
这毫无疑问是一个漂流瓶。
This is undoubtedly a drift bottle.
（总之先打开看看，再考虑怎么办吧。）
(Let's take a look for now and decide what to do from there.)
（落难者好像已经度过了最初的危机，这个漂流瓶应该怎么办呢？）
(The castaway seems to have overcome their initial hardships. What should I do with this drift bottle?)
写点什么，然后扔回海里。
I'll write something in reply and throw it back.
还是把漂流瓶交给跃渊吧。
I should hand the drift bottle over to Yueyuan.
（既然决定将漂流瓶扔回去，还是装点什么进去吧……）
(Since I have decided to throw the drift bottle back, I should probably put something in...)
给予帮助以外的一切支持。
Offer all the support I can, except actual help.
「你在那边也要好好吃饭，好好睡觉，一个人也要照顾好自己。人生路只能自己走，孤独是常态，你要学会习惯……」
"I hope you're eating and sleeping well over there. Even though you are alone, you should take good care of yourself. You are in charge of your life, and you need to get used to being alone..."
你写了一封感人至深的书信，教会了一个人如何在困境中汲取力量。有时候，一句打动人心的话语，能远远胜过物质上的援助。
You write an inspiring letter about harnessing power from adversity. Sometimes, a heartfelt word can be far more impactful than material assistance.
「你千万要远离野兽出没的地方，否则会被马上吃掉。要是不会钻木取火的话，你可以试试打火机，一定要有耐心……」

"Please stay away from places where wild animals are active or you will be eaten by them. If you don't know how to start a fire, you can try using a lighter. It is important to remain patient at all times..."
你总结了一份荒野求生的知识和技巧，教会了一个人如何免受恶劣天气和野生动物的侵害。其中最重要的是，落难人也不可以破坏植被和野生动物栖息地！

You compile a list of knowledge and tips for surviving in the wilderness, teaching them to protect themselves from harsh weather and wild animals. Most importantly, you warn the castaway against destroying the habitat of the flora and fauna on the island!
护珠人上一次的搜查结果。
The result of the last search by the Pearlkeepers.
「护珠人派出了一队搜救人员，到波月古海上搜了一圈什么都没有找到，你到底在哪里……」
"The Pearlkeepers dispatched a search and rescue team to explore the entire Lunarescent Depths, but they found nothing. Where exactly is your location..."
你客观陈述了护珠人为了寻找失事者而付出的努力，并且强力建议落难者给出自己的具体位置，以提高获救概率。
You objectively stated the efforts that the Pearlkeepers have gone to in order to find the castaway and strongly suggested they provide their precise location to increase their chances of rescue.
你将漂流瓶扔了回去。按照常识来看，漂流瓶多半不会回到落难者手中吧……
You threw the drift bottle back. Logically speaking, there should be no way it makes it back to the castaway...
（看来海滩也没有其他情况了，巡逻就到此结束吧。）
(It seems there is nothing else out of the ordinary happening along the beach. I'll end my patrol here.)
(You hand the drift bottle you picked up to Yueyuan)
又是一个漂流瓶？如果说这是一场闹剧的话，未免有些认真。但要我认真对待的话，这封信显得又很荒谬。
Another drift bottle? This seems a little too committed for a prank. Although, this letter also seems a little absurd to take seriously.
但不能因此放弃调查，对吧？
But we cannot give up on our investigation because of that, can we?
没错，我们还会再去海上搜索的。
You're right, we will continue our search at sea.
这会不会是放生帮干的呢？
Do you think this could be the work of The Unshackled?
虽然听上去挺没有道理的，但这像是他们能做出的事。
It may sound unlikely, but this does seem like something they could do.
总之，辛苦你了，这是你应得的报酬。
Either way, thank you for your hard work. Here are your well-deserved rewards.
I hear you needed me for a patrol?
对了，最近我们又去波月古海上搜索了一番，还没有找到任何落难者有关的情报。
That's right, we recently went to search the Lunarescent Depths again, but found no information regarding the castaway.
如果说波月古海上真的存在落难者，那落难者肯定是在躲着搜查队…所以，根据我的经验来看，应该这是有人在整蛊。
If there really is a castaway in the Lunarescent Depths, then they must be actively hiding from the search teams... My experience tells me that this is someone playing a trick.
哎，如果你又发现了类似的情况，<color=#dbc291ff>你可以自己处理掉，或者你不放心的话，仍然可以交给我们。</color>
Ahh. Well, if you come across anything similar, <color=#dbc291ff>you can deal with it yourself, or hand it over to us, should you feel uneasy.</color>
总之，麻烦你去海滩上走一遭了。
Either way, please do another patrol across the beach for me.
（这就是跃渊巡逻的区域，<color=#dbc291ff>要是发现了放生帮就去威慑他们，要是发现了放生对象就处理一下</color>…真是的，守护这片沙滩的人到底是谁呢？）
(This is Yueyuan's patrol area. <color=#dbc291ff>Drive away The Unshackled and take care of the things they release</color>... Honestly, who is protecting this beach?)
这毫无疑问是一个漂流瓶，还是漂洋过海的那种。
This is undoubtedly a drift bottle, one that has crossed the ocean, too.
（总之先打开看看，再考虑怎么办吧。）
(Let's take a look for now and decide what to do from there.)
（落难者好像已经过上了财务自由的生活，这个漂流瓶应该怎么办呢？）
(The castaway seems to have made a financially independent life for themselves. What should I do with this drift bottle?)
Forget it, just throw it back.
你将漂流瓶扔了回去，谁爱帮忙谁帮。
You throw the drift bottle back, someone else can deal with that.
（看来海滩也没有其他情况了，巡逻就到此结束吧。）
(It seems there is nothing else out of the ordinary happening along the beach. I'll end my patrol here.)
I should hand the letter over to Fulie.
（万一能打听到落难者的消息呢？）
(Maybe I can get some information on the castaway?)
还是把漂流瓶交给跃渊吧。
I should hand the drift bottle over to Yueyuan.
(I wonder what Yueyuan will think of this?)
(Hand the letter you picked up to Fulie)
这谁呀，随口胡诌是我「儿时玩伴」，这说法就好像我长大了一样！罗浮法律同意了吗？
Who is this!? Casually talking about being my "childhood playmate" as if I'm old now! Did Luofu law approve of this?
你有没有认识的人落难了？
Is there anyone you know that has gone missing?
没有！绝对没有！这封信也莫名其妙的，不过这个故事我是听人讲起过的。
No! Absolutely not! This letter makes no sense, but I've heard stories like this before.
「一名海上落难者靠着野外求生的技巧，最后在荒岛上生存下来…」我记得只有我一人对这故事感兴趣，我还说这要真的就有意思了。

"A person lost at sea uses their wilderness survival skills to survive on a deserted island..." I remember I was the only person who cared about this story. I thought it would be interesting if it really happened.
…不过你说这玩意儿是从海里打捞上来的，有点意思。我还是收下来跟邻居家小孩儿炫耀吧，谢谢你啦。
But you said you salvaged this from the sea? That is interesting. Perhaps I should take this to show off to the neighbor's kid. Thanks!
（这是捏造的故事？越来越神秘了……）
(So it's a made-up story? This keeps getting more and more mysterious...)
(You hand the drift bottle you picked up to Yueyuan)
已经过上财务自由的生活了是吧？那我们护珠人也不要管这个人好了！
They've already made a financially independent life for themselves? Then there's no need for us Pearlkeepers to pay this person any more attention!
这确实是气话…既然落难者还有生还的可能，我们还是会继续搜救的。
You're right. I didn't mean that... As the castaway may still be alive, we will continue our search.
这会不会是放生帮干的呢？
Do you think this could be the work of The Unshackled?
越来越有可能了，这故事诡异得离谱……
It's looking more and more likely. This whole story is very strange...
这也太被动了，既然信上提到了叫作「阿浮」的人，我会抽空问一下的。
We can't just do nothing! The letter mentions someone named "Fulie," I'll make time to go and ask them about it.
总之，辛苦你了，这是你应得的报酬。
Either way, thank you for your hard work. Here are your well-deserved rewards.
I hear you needed me for a patrol?
对了，我已经跟地衡司反映了漂流瓶的情况。
Ah yes, I have already reported the drift bottle situation to the Realm-Keeping Commission.
根据地衡司的反馈，他们目前没有收到走失人口的报案，这「落难者」大概率是「虚构情节」，在获得确凿证据之前，护珠人不会再出动海上救援了。

According to their feedback, they have not received any reports of missing persons, and this "castaway" is likely a fabrication. The Pearlkeepers will not be dispatched for ocean rescue again before obtaining conclusive evidence of their existence.
如果你又发现了类似的情况，<color=#dbc291ff>你就自己处理掉吧。</color>除非，这漂流瓶里存在着确凿的证据。
If you come across anything similar, <color=#dbc291ff>just deal with it yourself.</color> That is unless you find conclusive evidence inside the drift bottle.
另外，护珠人已经认可了你的能力。<color=#dbc291ff>以后有巡逻任务的时候，你不必专程先来找我，直接去海滩就好，报酬不会少你的。</color>

Also, the Pearlkeepers have recognized your abilities. <color=#dbc291ff>From now on, you will no longer need to report to me before a patrol. You can go directly to the beach, and you will still be compensated for your efforts.</color>
总之，麻烦你去海滩上走一遭了。
Either way, please do another patrol across the beach for me.
（这就是跃渊巡逻的区域，<color=#dbc291ff>要是发现了放生帮就去威慑他们，要是发现了放生对象就处理一下</color>…真是的，守护这片沙滩的人到底是谁呢？）
(This is Yueyuan's patrol area. <color=#dbc291ff>Drive away The Unshackled and take care of the things they release</color>... Honestly, who is protecting this beach?)
这毫无疑问是一个漂流瓶，还是漂洋过海的那种。
This is undoubtedly a drift bottle, one that has crossed the ocean, too.
（总之先打开看看，再考虑怎么办吧。）
(Let's take a look for now and decide what to do from there.)
（落难者又增加了，还想要回信，这个时候应该怎么办呢？）
(The ranks of castaways have grown, and they want a reply? What am I supposed to do now?)
Forget it. Just throw it back.
（这破漂流瓶一直是自说自话，谁知道是真是假呢？）
(These wacky drift bottles are just talking to themselves. Who knows if what they're saying is true?)
（很好，我来给你们讲讲，应不应该回到文明社会！）
(Alright, let me explain whether you should rejoin civilized society!)
你正打算将漂流瓶扔回海里的时候，突然有个声音叫住了你。
Just as you are about to cast the drift bottle back into the ocean, a voice calls out to you.
你是谁，你知道这个漂流瓶？
Who are you? Do you know about these drift bottles?
我、我我…我只是一个陌生人。我、我不知道什么漂流瓶。
I, I... I'm just a stranger. I... I don't know about any drift bottles.
我只是在制止你往海里面扔垃圾，你千万住手！
I am just here to stop you throwing garbage into the ocean. I beg you to stop!
你别管我，我偏要扔进海里！
Stay out of this. I WILL throw it into the ocean!
…千万别，这不是真的从海上漂过来的，你要扔出去，万一回不来了……
...Please, don't. This didn't actually float across the ocean. What if you throw it out there and it doesn't come back...
不对不对不对！这漂流瓶就是从海上漂过来的！但是你别扔！
Wait! I mean! No! This definitely did float across the ocean! But you still can't throw it!
你仔细看过漂流瓶里的信了，你是不是应该回应漂流瓶里的请求呢？
You've read the drift bottle messages. Do you think you should really be responding to their requests?
漂流瓶里的故事是假的。
The story in the drift bottle is not true.
这漂流瓶里的信看上去这么假吗？
Does the letter in the bottle really seem that fake?
我应该回应漂流瓶的请求。
I should respond to the request in the drift bottle.
你还是把漂流瓶还给我吧，我的叙事设计可不能就这样被你破坏了！
Please just gimme back the bottle. My narrative design cannot be disrupted like this!
海边的陌生人将漂流瓶抱去，就像是祖传下来的宝贝。你眉头一紧，想起自己来到海滩的理由——「放生帮」。
The stranger from the shore leaves, cradling the drift bottle like a treasured heirloom. You furrow your brow and remember the reason you came to the beach — The Unshackled.
你反正都要扔掉，我拿着怎么了？别盯着我了，马上就走。
You were going to throw it away anyway, what's wrong with me taking it? Don't stare at me like that, I'm leaving right away.
既然你已经发现，我就告诉你吧——我放生原创故事！
Since I've been discovered, I shall tell you — I unshackle original stories!
海边的陌生人笔直地离开了海岸。那天，你仍不知道「放生原创故事」到底是什么意思。
The stranger from the shore turns and leaves the beach. On that day, you still have no idea just what "unshackling original stories" meant.
（看来海滩也没有其他情况了，巡逻就到此结束吧。）
(It seems there is nothing else out of the ordinary happening along the beach. I'll end my patrol here.)
你阅读完底稿之后，从字里行间感受到了信件那按耐不住的表达欲——无论是抱怨年轻人在长生社会找不到工作，还是星际和平公司带来的外部压力……

Upon reading the draft, you sense its uncontrollable urge to express itself: Be it lamenting the fact that young people cannot find jobs within a long-living society, or the external pressure brought about by the Interastral Peace Corporation...
看完之后，别说「星期六」，就连你也不想回到文明社会了，这封信还需要你来添笔？
After you finish reading it, even you don't wish to return to civilized society, let alone Saturday. Is there anything you can add to this?
你明白了，这位落难者需要的从来不是「陌生人的建议」，而是一种「认同感」。
You come to understand that what this castaway seeks is never advice from a stranger, but validation and approval.
落难人希望你能作为受苦之人劝劝「星期六」不要回到文明社会。来，写点什么吧。
The castaway hopes that you, as someone who suffers inside civilized society, can convince Saturday not to return to it. It's time to write something.
「但是逃避不能解决问题，一时的解脱只会造成长期的痛苦。很多时候，凭一人之力无法改变环境，但是你可以改变自己……」

"But running away cannot solve anything, as a brief escape will only cause long-term suffering. More often than not, you cannot change the world on your own, but you can change your own perception of it..."
你认为「星期六」不应该逃避责任，应该勇敢地返回现代文明社会之中…至少这里有玉兆、有网络，有着文明社会的宝藏，总比荒岛要好得多。

You believe that Saturday should not run from their responsibilities, that they should bravely return to civilized society... At least there are jade abaci, the internet, and treasures of modern civilization that far exceed those of life on a deserted island.
「但是前面的惨状不过是轻描淡写。社会人都早早学会了伪装，没有时间留给悲伤，只有表里不一的煎熬——不等你崩溃掉，就立刻会被他人代替……」

"However, the preceding tragedy is, if anything, an understatement. People in human society have learned to mask their true emotions and have no time to process their sorrows. All there is, is a chain of suffering from the inability to show their true selves... and you'll get replaced by someone else before you've even broken down..."
你的添笔加重了文明社会的危机程度，这封信里根本没有仁义道德——想必「星期六」收到信之后，会横竖睡不着，从字缝里看出「吃人」二字。

Your additions further exaggerate the critical state of the modern society. This letter contains no shred of kindness or morality. Presumably, Saturday will be unable to sleep after reading this, for the words "naked exploitation" is positively leaping out of the page.
「护珠人找了你们很多次，你们到底在哪里！请尽量提供有效信息，不要浪费公共资源！」
"The Pearlkeepers have searched for you many times. Where exactly are you people!? Please provide useful information and stop wasting public resources!"
你根本不在意荒岛上的小小纠结，你关心着如何开展救援。只要这荒岛遇难是真人真事，你所做的就是最正确的判断。

You don't care one bit about the petty squabbles on the deserted island — you are concerned about how to perform the rescue. If there truly are people in real danger stranded on an island, then this is the correct call to make.
你将漂流瓶扔了回波月古海，希望这些小小建议能够到达所需之人手中。
You cast the drift bottle back into the Lunarescent Depths, hoping that these suggestions will reach the hands of those that need them.
自然科学的理性不断提醒着你，这封信能回到「护珠人也找不到的荒岛」可能性为零。
The logic that lies behind science keeps reminding you that the chances of this letter reaching "an island that even the Pearlkeepers could not find" is zero.
但是你做完了你该做的事，这便是意义所在。
However, you have done what you must. That is what matters.
（看来海滩也没有其他情况了，巡逻就到此结束吧。）
(It seems there is nothing else out of the ordinary happening along the beach. I'll end my patrol here.)
（跃渊说护珠人已经认可了我的能力，我可以独立处理巡逻中产生的情况。）
(Yueyuan said that the Pearlkeepers have already recognized my talents and that I can deal with anything I encounter on patrol alone.)
（<color=#dbc291ff>要是发现了放生帮就去威慑他们，要是发现了放生对象就处理一下</color>…今天还会有漂流瓶吗？）
(<color=#dbc291ff>Drive away The Unshackled and take care of the things they release</color>... I wonder if there will be any drift bottles today?)
这个奇怪的人很有可能是放生帮的一员，作为海滩守护者，你理应好好盘问他一番。
This weirdo could be a member of The Unshackled... as the Guardian of the Shoreline, you should question him.
我、我我我什么也没有做！
做贼心虚的人都这么说！
That's exactly what a guilty person would say!
我没有做贼心虚，我只是被你吓到了！没错！
I'm not guilty, you just startled me! Yeah, that's right!
你背后的酒坛是做什么的？
What are you doing with those wine jars behind you?
是我问你问题，还是你问我？
Are you asking the questions here, or am I?
好问题，让我求助场外地衡司。
Good question. Why don't I call a friend in the Realm-Keeping Commission and ask what they think.
别别别，我承认，那就是酒坛。
No no no stop! You're right, they're wine jars.
这里可不是一般人该来的地方。
This is no place for regular citizens.
我是为了一件重要的事，非来不可。
I had to come here. I must do something very important.
不瞒您说，我这身后的酒坛里面装满了五谷精华。仙舟人讲「民以食为天」，这五谷精华赐予了我们体肤、滋润了我们的灵魂和性情。

I'll be honest, the jars behind me are filled with the essence of grains. The people of Xianzhou believe that food is the paramount necessity of the people, and this essence nourishes our bodies, moisturizes our souls, and shapes our temperament.
如此天地精华，却被囚禁在这口小腹大的坛子里！我决不允许！只要我能将这五谷精华还于天地，那必然是大大大大功德一件啊！
This miraculous essence has been sealed away inside these tiny vessels! I cannot allow it! If I can just return this essence of grains to the world, it would be a great great GREAT merit!
这么积功攒德之事，{F#女士}{M#先生}不妨与我一同啊！
{F#Miss}{M#Sir}, will you not join me on this virtuous mission?
好家伙，可让我抓到放生帮了！
At long last! I've finally caught an Unshackled in the act!
What!? Why do you want to catch me!?
{NICKNAME}辛苦你了，我可得好好教训这放生帮不可。
Good work, {NICKNAME}. I will teach this Unshackled a good lesson.
People like you won't stop me!
…你总是在海滩上捡到奇怪的漂流瓶，差点就让我忘了，我们本来是抓放生帮的。
...With all those strange drift bottles you kept picking up at the beach, I almost forgot that we were here to catch the Unshackled.
辛苦你了，这是你应得的报酬。
Good work, here are your well-deserved remuneration.
你和陌生人将粮食精华倒进了波月古海，正好奇着崇高的道德为什么还未投下赞许？
You and the stranger pour the grain essence into the Lunarescent Depths, and you wonder why the High Morals have not praised you yet.
你想起了在某些世界里，人们将茶叶放生于海中，间接引发了独立战争…任何放生行为都不可以小觑，今日也是一样。

At that moment, you remember that in a certain world, there were people who released tea leaves into the ocean, which indirectly brought about a war of independence... Any release should not be taken lightly, and today is no exception.
谢谢你，志同道合的朋友。酒坛我会带走，功德会留在心头。
Thank you, my like-minded friend. I shall take the wine jars with me. Your great merit shall stay in my heart.
我这人记性不好，下次见面的时候，记得和我打招呼，我们一起积攒功德！
My memory isn't the best, so next time you see me, make sure to say hi and we can continue to collect merit, together!
陌生人迈着欢快的步伐离开了海滩，你做了好人好事，崇高的道德为什么还未投下赞许？
The stranger happily leaves the beach with a skip in his step. You have done a great deed, so why haven't the High Morals praised you yet?
（看来海滩也没有其他情况了，巡逻就到此结束吧。）
(It seems there is nothing else out of the ordinary happening along the beach. I'll end my patrol here.)
我要和你一起放生五谷精华！
I want to release the essence of grains with you!
好好好！你放一坛，我放一坛，我们功德无边！
Okay, okay! You do one jar, I'll do the other. We'll accumulate boundless merits together!
（跃渊说护珠人已经认可了我的能力，我可以独立处理巡逻中产生的情况。）
(Yueyuan said that the Pearlkeepers have already recognized my talents and that I can deal with anything I encounter on patrol alone.)
（<color=#dbc291ff>要是发现了放生帮就去威慑他们，要是发现了放生对象就处理一下</color>…今天还会有漂流瓶吗？）
(<color=#dbc291ff>Drive away The Unshackled and take care of the things they release</color>... I wonder if there will be any drift bottles today?)
海滩上放着一本书，你敏锐地察觉到了这并不对劲。难道这又是放生帮干的好事？「放生知识」——放眼整个放生界，这也是一个全新的课题。

You find a book on the beach and keenly perceive that something is not right about it. Could this be the work of the Unshackled, too? Unshackling knowledge — Even among the vast realm of unshackling, this is a whole new venture.
你拿起书本，你的手稍微颤动了一下——因为它远比你想象中更重。你知道精装本通常会有硬纸板、织物，甚至是小牛皮革等材料，但是它还是*太重了*。

You pick up the book, and your hand trembles slightly — it is far heavier than you imagined. Though you understand hardcover book bindings can come in cardboard, fabric, or even leather, this is still TOO heavy for any of them.
说真的，很少有书会在「重量感」这个维度上给人留下如此深刻的印象。既然如此，勉为其难看看它的书名吧。它的书名叫作《前世》。
Honestly, it is rare that a book leaves such striking impression in its weight. That being the case, you feel you should inspect the title. It is called Previous Reincarnation.
波月古海，持明族，前世…真是意味深长，可是它真的应该这么重吗，要不打开看看吧？
The Lunarescent Depths, the Vidyadhara, previous reincarnation... Though it is a profound subject, should it really be this heavy? Why not take a look inside?
到底什么是重量级知识啊？
What kind of knowledge could be this heavy?
你翻开了这本书。书本内部被掏出方格空间，一把漂亮的手枪静静躺在其中。
As you open the book, you realize that the contents have been hollowed out into a square storage space, where a beautiful pistol lies silently.
我没有什么兴趣，直接带走。
Not interested. I'll bring it along with me.
是谁在海滩上乱扔垃圾，不讲文明，不树新风。只有你记得保护海滩，人人有责。
Who would leave trash lying around on the beach like this in such an uncivilized manner? It's almost as if only you remember to take care of the environment and protect the beaches around here.
突然，你的眼前一片漆黑，有人用*宽大的手掌*遮住了你的眼睛。你感觉到脖子旁冰冰凉凉的，毫无疑问那是足以吹毛断发的锐器。

Suddenly, all you see before you is darkness, as if someone covered your eyes with a *giant hand*. You sense an icy sting on the side of your neck, undoubtedly from a blade sharp enough to split hair.
不要乱动，冷静地听我问完。你，为什么要拿走我的手枪？
Don't move. Keep quiet and listen to my question. Why are you taking my pistol?
手、手枪？这不是一本书吗？
P—Pistol!? I thought this was a book?
书里放着一把手枪，你不必假装不知道。
There is a pistol inside the book. There's no need to pretend you don't know about it.
我不知道，我没想带走你的枪。
I didn't know. I didn't intend to take your gun.
通常来说，我应该相信你吗？我可不敢。
You think I should take your word for that? I'm not that naive.
听好了，我的工作内容不太能见光。而如今我打算金盆洗手，将我的「前世」就此放生，好好过我的下半辈子。
Listen, my job can't really see the light of day. Today, I want to wash my hands of that and release my "previous reincarnation" here, so I can move on to enjoy what I have left.
但是你出现得太不是时候了。无论你是有意还是无意，把手枪交给我，然后闭上眼默数，从1数到<unbreak>100</unbreak>，我保你性命无忧。
However, you've appeared at a terrible time. Whatever your intentions, hand me that pistol. Then close your eyes, and count from one to a hundred, and I shall spare your life.
我不会询问你，你现在就可以闭眼数数了。
I won't ask twice. Close your eyes and start counting now.

The color of the new Flaming Potent Tea reminds you of the magnificent yet eerie starry sky outside the Astral Express. It is so quiet and magnificent that it inspires a sense of awe, even fear. But then again, if the starry sky were no longer quiet, it would be even more frightening...
杜老板面带笑意的目光将你从恐惧的深渊中拉了回来，但你分不清这究竟是往回拉，还是往前推。终于，你鼓起勇气，凝望着「烈焰浓茶」，直面着自己内心的恐惧，捏着鼻子将它一饮而尽！

Boss Du's smiling gaze snaps you back from the fearsome abyss, although you are not sure if he's pulling you away from it or pushing you towards it.
