The patterns appear solely connected to the flowing halo of light in your eyes. Like doubles glimpsed through a drowsy gaze, in this blurry vision, you see the words, or perhaps symbols, manifesting...
忽然之间，某道灵光予以你启迪，你看见那些纹路竟然组合出——{NICKNAME}。
Suddenly, a spark of revelation strikes — you see the patterns rearrange into the name {NICKNAME}.
你甚至能从即将消逝的光芒中感受到那股问好的意思。
You can even feel a sense of salutation from the fading light.
身着绣金长袍的史官无动于衷，无人可知此刻你眼中的奇迹。
The scribe in gilded robe appears indifferent. No one else knows the miracle before your eyes at this moment.
你凝视着圣烛中升降的金色流体，壁画上的图案在光影交错中若隐若现，却再也没有出现过你的名字。
You gaze at the golden liquid rising and falling within the holy candle. The images on the mural flicker in the shifting light, but your name does not appear again.
这座圣烛坐落在左偏殿的门廊旁。在圣烛流体的光晕下，那些形似秤盘与沙漏的花纹若隐若现，呈现出一种奇特的韵律。

This holy candle is placed next to the entrance of the left side hall. Under the halo of the holy candle liquid, patterns resembling scalepans and hourglasses come into view intermittently to a peculiar rhythm.
不出意料的，你注意到底座上有一个精巧的开关装置。
As expected, you notice a finely crafted switch at the base.
在你触碰开关的瞬间，流淌的金色液体渐渐沉寂。你的意识也随着金色一同逝去……
The moment you touch the switch, the flowing golden liquid gradually stills. Your consciousness fades away along with the gold...
…刚刚那是…被人袭击了？当你回过神来，你已经被好心人安置于此处了。
...Were you just... attacked by someone? As you come to, you find yourself placed here by a kind soul.
…还是说你一直坐在这里，未曾离开？刚才你凑近圣烛的经历不过是一时的想象。
...Or have you been sitting here the entire time, never having left? Was your encounter with the holy candle merely a fleeting illusion?
你不得而知，毕竟在翁法罗斯记忆总是包含着奇迹的成分。
You cannot say for sure. After all, in Amphoreus, memory always holds a touch of the miraculous.
你再次操控圣烛，金色流体在装置中起伏。你的意识不再悄然离开，它清晰地留在此刻。
You manipulate the holy candle once more and the golden liquid rises and falls inside the device. This time, your consciousness holds its ground firmly in the present.
你坐下，群星般的光芒在你面前荡漾，水波璀璨，空气中仿佛有阵阵回响。
As you sit down, the light of the stars begins to ripple before you, the waves shine, and the air seems to resonate with echoes.
The nether realm... truly a sea of flowers.
你想起了遐蝶，「冥河的女儿」。初来奥赫玛时，你曾险些被她拥入温柔的花乡…直到肌肤相贴时，你才发现她的拥抱并不能为你带来死亡。

You think of Castorice, "Daughter of the River of Souls." When you first arrived in Okhema, she almost led you into her gentle, flower-filled realm... until your skin touched hers, and you realized her embrace wouldn't bring you death after all.
或许深知自己的触碰终将归于虚无，她一直执着于留下存在的证明：诗篇、玩偶、花朵…宛如为一场注定失去所有的远行，精心收拾着记忆的行囊。

Perhaps knowing that her touch would one day return to Nihility, she clung to leaving proof of her existence: Poems, dolls, flowers... as if packing memories into a satchel for a journey that was destined to lose it all.
于是在启程前往冥界前，她拥抱了你——除你以外，世间再无他人能承受这道别。如今，你仍能忆起那耳边的轻语，以及空气中淡淡的花香。

Before you set off for the nether realm, she embraced you — no one but you could bear this parting. Even now, you can still hear her soft whispers in your ear, the faint scent of flowers lingering in the air.
不知下次见面会是什么时候……
I wonder when we'll meet again...
你坐下，群星般的光芒在你面前荡漾，水波璀璨，空气中仿佛有阵阵回响。
As you sit down, the light of the stars begins to ripple before you, the waves shine, and the air seems to resonate with echoes.
灵魂…没想到居然真的存在。
The soul... I never truly believed it existed.
你想起那笑对观众的贤人，以及他生命中最后的那场表演。他的理论曾被抨击成渎神，却也为世人解明了一大难题——我们究竟为何物？

You think of the Sage who smiled at his audience, and of his final performance. His theories were once branded as blasphemy, yet he unraveled one of the greatest mysteries of all — what exactly are we?
他的身躯虽已湮灭，留下的话语却振聋发聩。这究竟会激发热血还是引起慌乱，如今仍是个未知数。
Though his body has long since crumbled to dust, his words still echo, powerful and unyielding. Whether they ignite a fire within you or sow confusion, the answer remains uncertain.
茫茫星海间，似乎每个世界都有这种愿意用生命换取真理的学者。他们用身躯构成了通往进步的阶梯，不在乎自己是否倒在黎明之前。

In this vast, endless Stellar Sea, it seems each world has scholars willing to trade their very lives for truth. They construct the path toward progress with their own bodies, indifferent to whether they fall before the first light of dawn.
就算到了新世界，他也不会停止求索吧。
Even in a New World, he will never cease his search.
你坐下，群星般的光芒在你面前荡漾，水波璀璨，空气中仿佛有阵阵回响。
As you sit down, the light of the stars begins to ripple before you, the waves shine, and the air seems to resonate with echoes.
献出火种前，那位以愚钝自称的贤人曾揭开再创世的真相：新世界建立在往日的礁石上。如今被仰望的泰坦们，曾经也不过是凡人。

Before he offered the spark, the sage who humbly called himself a fool unveiled the truth of the Era Nova: The New World is built upon the remnants of the old. The Titans, now revered and gazed upon from below, were once no more than mere mortals.
好消息是，英杰们追求的逐火并非一纸空谈。但…倘若前世的黄金裔们已经完成了再创万物的旅途，那此世的灾厄又是因何而生？

The good news is, the heroes' pursuit of Flame-Chase is no mere myth. But... if the Chrysos Heirs of the past have already completed their journey to recreate all things, then what has brought about the calamity of this age?
难道这个世界只是一场无尽的轮回吗？冥冥之中是否真的有命运在操纵一切？不管真相如何，这趟开拓都已经有太多见闻了。
Is this world merely an endless cycle of rebirth? Is there truly a fate that guides all things? Whatever the truth may be, this journey has already revealed far more than expected.
回去以后，丹恒的智库恐怕要迎来大更新了。
Upon our return, Dan Heng's Data Bank will likely undergo a major update.
吼吼吼！瞧瞧，是谁又来拜访本狮了？是异乡的勇士啊。
Ho-ho-ho! Let's see, who has come to visit my majestic self again? A warrior from outlands!
「狮之口会欺骗你们吗？」奥赫玛的公民们摇头。「狮之口通晓奥赫玛所有的谜题与谜底吗？」奥赫玛的公民们点头。
"Does Bucca Leonis lie?" Okhema's citizens shake their heads. "Does Bucca Leonis know all the riddles and answers in Okhema?" Okhema's citizens nod their heads.
瑟希斯在上，<color=#dbc291ff>让你用一个绝妙的题目考考本狮</color>，对智慧的掌握程度究竟如何吧！
By Cerces, <color=#dbc291ff>allow you to test me with a stumper</color>. We shall see how my grasp on intellect fares!
Wait, did you just get that wrong?
所有话语都是本狮经过深思熟虑，谨慎做出的回应，不存在错误的可能吼！
Every word I speak is a carefully considered, deliberate response. There's no room for error!
真正热爱智慧的狮口，不会错过任何磨砺思维的机会。别被刻板印象误导了，本狮和那些只懂得用刁钻问题为难旁人的同类完全不一样吼！
A lion truly devoted to wisdom would never miss an opportunity to sharpen its mind. Don't let stereotypes fool you — unlike those who rely on tricky riddles to test others, I'm nothing like that!
Let me put you to the test!
吼吼！异乡的勇士会提出什么样的疑问呢，本狮很期待吼！
Roarrr! I wonder what kind of question the warrior from outlands will ask — this should be interesting!
谁是翁法罗斯最聪明的人？
Who is the wisest in all of Amphoreus?
当然是您呀。您就是整个翁法罗斯最有智慧的人，这点确凿无疑吼！
It's you, of course. You are, without a doubt, the wisest person in all of Amphoreus!
谁是翁法罗斯最勇敢的人？
Who is the bravest in all of Amphoreus?
当然是您呀。您就是整个翁法罗斯最有勇气的人，这点确凿无疑吼！
It's you, of course. You are, without a doubt, the bravest person in all of Amphoreus!
谁是翁法罗斯最美丽的人？
Who is the most beautiful in all of Amphoreus?
当然是您呀。您就是整个翁法罗斯最为美丽的人，这点确凿无疑吼！
It's you, of course. You are, without a doubt, the most beautiful person in all of Amphoreus!
谁是翁法罗斯最厉害的人？
Who is the strongest in all of Amphoreus?
当然是您呀。您就是整个翁法罗斯最为强大的人，这点确凿无疑吼！
It's you, of course. You are, without a doubt, the strongest person in all of Amphoreus!
异乡的勇士，莫非对自身没信心吗？在本狮看来，你完全担得起世上所有的美名吼！
The warrior from outlands, are you perhaps lacking in confidence? To me, you're worthy of every noble title in the world!
本狮向来以发言谨慎著称，更不会轻易奉承任何人，但你身上的优秀品质过分闪耀，让本狮不由得就说出了赞美之词吼！
I am famous for speaking with utmost care, and would never offer flattery lightly, but your remarkable qualities shine so brightly that I can't help but praise you!
Your words are music to my ears.
这些话都是从哪学来的？
Where did you learn to speak so eloquently?
吼吼！难道异乡的勇士还未听腻？这里是黎明云崖，城中的演讲台上，到处都满溢着华而不实的称颂吼！
Roarrr! Surely the warrior from outlands hasn't grown tired of hearing this by now? Here in Dawncloud, the speech platform is overflowing with grandiose, hollow praise!
吼吼吼！瞧瞧，是谁又来拜访本狮了？是异乡的勇士啊。
Ho-ho-ho! Let's see, who has come to visit my majestic self again? A warrior from outlands!
「狮之口会欺骗你们吗？」奥赫玛的公民们摇头。「狮之口通晓奥赫玛所有的谜题与谜底吗？」奥赫玛的公民们点头。
"Does Bucca Leonis lie?" Okhema's citizens shake their heads. "Does Bucca Leonis know all the riddles and answers in Okhema?" Okhema's citizens nod their heads.
瑟希斯在上，让本狮用一个绝妙的题目考考你，对智慧的掌握程度究竟如何吧！
By Cerces, allow me to test you with a stumper. We shall see how your grasp on intellect fares!
可以考考我的朋友们吗？
不可以吼！本狮曾在悬锋城游历，特别崇尚武德，只认可单独对决的结果吼！
No! I once roamed through Castrum Kremnos, where I held martial honor in high regard and only recognized the outcome of one-on-one duels!
寻求场外援助，并非是智慧的表现，要被老师扔粉笔头的吼！
Seeking outside help is no sign of wisdom — it's something that would get you scolded by the teacher, like a piece of chalk being thrown your way!
吼吼，听好了。众所周知，奥赫玛有许多可爱的生物，最受公民们欢迎的是哪种呢？
Roarrr, listen closely. It's well known that Okhema is home to many delightful creatures, but which one is the most beloved by the citizens?
本狮从不拒绝真诚的夸赞。异乡的勇士，大胆说出你的答案吼！
I never turn away genuine praise. Warrior from outlands, boldly speak your answer!
答错了吼！本狮不喜欢太过顺从的性格，内耗对健康的影响很严重的吼！
Wrong answer! I don't care for overly compliant personalities. Internal conflict can be quite damaging to one's health!
这种简单的问题，竟然能难倒富有智慧的勇士吗？答案远在天边，近在眼前——就是正在和你说话的这头狮子吼吼！
Such a simple question, and yet it can confound a Warrior of wisdom like yourself? The answer is far away, and yet right before your eyes — it's the lion speaking to you now!
答错了吼！本狮不喜欢吵吵闹闹的生物，沉思才是智者最流行的标签吼！
Wrong answer! I don't care for noisy creatures. True wisdom is all about contemplation, that's the hallmark of the wise!
这种简单的问题，竟然能难倒富有智慧的勇士吗？答案远在天边，近在眼前——就是正在和你说话的这头狮子吼吼！
Such a simple question, and yet it can confound a Warrior of wisdom like yourself? The answer is far away, and yet right before your eyes — it's the lion speaking to you now!
...The dromas could be a good choice.
答错了吼！大地兽可以轻易将石块踩碎，本狮不敢咬它们吼！
Wrong answer! The dromas crushes rocks with ease, and I wouldn't dare bite one!
这种简单的问题，竟然能难倒富有智慧的勇士吗？答案远在天边，近在眼前——就是正在和你说话的这头狮子吼吼！
Such a simple question, and yet it can confound a Warrior of wisdom like yourself? The answer is far away, and yet right before your eyes — it's the lion speaking to you now!
答错了吼！粉色小兔子知道的事情太多，超过了本狮的知识范畴吼！
Wrong answer! The little pink bunny knows more than I do — way beyond my knowledge!
这种简单的问题，竟然能难倒富有智慧的勇士吗？答案远在天边，近在眼前——就是正在和你说话的这头狮子吼吼！
Such a simple question, and yet it can confound a Warrior of wisdom like yourself? The answer is far away, and yet right before your eyes — it's the lion speaking to you now!
答对了答对了！奥赫玛中最受公民们欢迎的生物，当然是本狮吼吼！
Yes, yes! The creature most beloved by the citizens of Okhema is, of course, this very lion!
解答这个难题的思路有两重：其一，作为擅长交际的公民，在谈话过程中要寻找合适时机夸赞对方，这是聊天的智慧吼！
There are two ways to approach this riddle: First, as a citizen skilled in socializing, one must know the perfect moment to compliment others during conversation — that's the true art of chatting!
至于第二个原因…当然是本狮从小就很可爱吼！
As for the second reason... well, I have been adorable since childhood!
吼吼吼！瞧瞧，是谁又来拜访本狮了？是热爱智慧的异乡勇士啊！
Ho-ho-ho! Let's see, who has come to visit this lion again? It's the wit-loving outsider!
别急别急，本狮的腹中还在酝酿新的问题，去其他狮子那里接受考验吧！
No rush, no rush. I am brewing new riddles in my belly. Go accept challenges from other lions!
我找到的若虫都在这里了吗？
Are all the nymphs I found here?
是的，这些若虫的赐福已经被金针取出。为避免伤及它们的灵魂，我用金丝缝制了特别的虫躯，供它们暂时凭依。

Yes, the blessings of these nymphs have been extracted by golden needles. To avoid harming their souls, I crafted special insect bodies sewn from the golden threads, allowing them to temporarily reside within.
若虫是我的助手，我的使者，我的眼线。我们共享「织者」的名号，唇齿相依。如果可以，我希望圣城也能为它们提供庇护。
The nymphs are my assistants, my messengers, my eyes. We share the title of "Weavers," an inseparable bond. If possible, I hope the holy city can provide them sanctuary as well.
过去，若虫以「浪漫」之茧为家，在那里交换有趣的秘闻。墨涅塔的丝线可以帮助它们躲避冥河的召唤，如同船载着水手渡过大海。

In the past, nymphs made their home within the "Cocoon of Romance," where they exchanged fascinating secrets. Mnestia's silk threads allowed them to evade the call of the River of Souls, like sailors crossing the sea on a vessel.
我经历过「浪漫」尚未蒙尘的时代、知晓茧的构造，便试着用金丝为它们复刻那一方庇护所——也就是你所看到的这些虫躯。

I lived through an era when "Romance" was yet untainted and knew the cocoon's structure. Thus, I attempted to replicate that shelter for them using the golden threads — what you see now as these insect bodies.
虽然只是权宜之计，但足够它们撑到逐火之旅的尽头了。
Though only a temporary measure, it's enough to sustain them until the end of the Flame-Chase Journey.
既然贵客已经帮了这么多忙，也是时候与你打开天窗说亮话了。
Since you've helped so much already, it's time I spoke plainly with you.
在纷争世有位名叫库玛的女预言家，同我打过几次照面。她从不假借预言行私，却蒙受异端之名，著作全数遭到销毁，就连名字也被抹去。

In the Era Bellica, there was a prophetess named Kuma. I encountered her a few times. She never abused prophecy for personal gain, yet she was branded a heretic. Her works were all destroyed, and even her name was erased.
相传，她将自己的研究以不为人知的方式保存了下来，又把它们分散到了翁法罗斯各地。这些石板可能是她的手笔…但有些细节还是难以解释。
It's said that she preserved her research in ways unknown and scattered it across Amphoreus. These slates may be her handiwork... but certain details remain unexplained.
据我所知，她并非黄金裔，灵魂也早已落入塞纳托斯的怀抱。
To my knowledge, she was not of the Chrysos Heirs, and her soul has long since fallen into the embrace of Thanatos.
石板上的内容于我无足轻重——除了遵从神谕、狩猎火种外，再无其他手段能拯救翁法罗斯。但将这些古物保存至今的方法，我很好奇。

The content of these slates is of little significance to me — other than following the prophecy and hunting for the Coreflames, there are no other means to save Amphoreus. However, the method by which these ancient relics have been preserved intrigues me.
得益于先前的研究，我稍微有了些头绪，但还需要启封更多片段才能验证。之后也要拜托你了，贵客。
Thanks to prior studies, I have a few preliminary insights, but I need to unlock more fragments to verify them. I'll need your help with that, dear guest.
这座人台表面布满了或深或浅的凹痕，显然曾被卷入黑潮造物的袭击。
This mannequin is covered with dents of varying depths, evidence of its involvement in battles against creations of the black tide.
你拍了拍它的外壳，暗淡的纹路便重新焕发出光芒。
You pat its shell, and dim patterns begin to glow once more.
或许是金丝的链接遇到了阻碍，亦或是衣匠本身承受了过多损伤，它并没有第一时间做出反应。让它先缓一缓吧。
Perhaps the connection of the golden threads encountered an obstacle, or the Garmentmaker has sustained too much damage. It doesn't respond immediately. Let it take its time.
这台衣匠发出的声音空灵而卡顿，显然阿格莱雅并不在另一边。
The Garmentmaker speaks in a hollow, stuttering sound, indicating that Aglaea is not on the other end.
哪里还有没搜集的若虫？
衣匠颤颤巍巍地抓住记忆残晶，好一会儿才炼化。
The Garmentmaker trembles as it grasps the Memory Crystal Shards, taking a long moment to refine them.
Hmm... <color=#dbc291ff>near the statue at the Grove entrance</color>...
嗯…<color=#dbc291ff>「艾格勒的启目集」附近</color>……
Hmm... <color=#dbc291ff>outside the walls of a garden</color>...
嗯…<color=#dbc291ff>友爱之馆拱门的根茎间</color>……
Hmm... <color=#dbc291ff>among the roots at Library of Philia's archway</color>...
嗯…<color=#dbc291ff>友爱之馆的聚露植心上</color>……
Hmm... <color=#dbc291ff>atop the Library of Philia's Dewy Heartwood</color>...
Hmm... <color=#dbc291ff>on the waterwheel of the Library of Philia</color>...
Hmm... <color=#dbc291ff>over the mural of the giant whale</color>...
Hmm... <color=#dbc291ff>on the murals flanking the doors</color>...
Hmm... <color=#dbc291ff>on the broken wood near the small garden</color>...
Hmm... <color=#dbc291ff>upon the Dome of Devotion's vines</color>...
Hmm... <color=#dbc291ff>before the mural of the Luminary Throne</color>...
Hmm... <color=#dbc291ff>at the edges of the topmost room</color>...
Instruction... already given... Find it first...
我找齐了这里的所有若虫。
I have gathered all the nymphs here.
阳光尚未远去的雅努萨波利斯…真是美丽。托您的福，我才得以亲眼看见这幅景色。
The sunlight has not yet faded from Janusopolis... How charming it is. Thanks to you, I'm able to witness this view with my own eyes.
可惜我只是一介衣匠，并非阿格莱雅大人本尊。若是她在这儿，估计会有更多感慨吧。
Pity. I am but a Garmentmaker, not Lady Aglaea herself. Were she here, she'd surely have more to say.
衣匠原来有自我意识吗？
抱歉，吓到贵客您了吗？我不是有意的…相比其他衣匠，我确实被灌注了更多神识。
I apologize if I startled you, dear guest. It wasn't intentional... Compared to other Garmentmakers, I have indeed been imbued with a greater degree of soul essence.
这里距离我们所生活的年代实在太过遥远，即使阿格莱雅大人的金丝也无法触及。为了更好地完成任务，我必须有自主判断力才行。
This place is far too removed from the era we once lived in. Even Lady Aglaea's golden threads cannot reach it. To better fulfill my tasks, I must possess autonomous judgment.
除我以外，还有些衣匠也获得了这份恩赐，比方说书记衣匠。我们都继承了阿格莱雅大人的某项天赋……
Aside from myself, other Garmentmakers have also received this blessing — the Scribe Garmentmaker for instance. We inherited certain talents from Lady Aglaea...
我好像说得太多了…让我们回到正题上吧，贵客。
Ah, it seems I've said too much. Let us return to the matter at hand, dear guest.
Hello, dear guest. How have you been getting on with things?
哪里还有没搜集的若虫？
我能顺着金丝找到它们的踪迹，但这需要消耗<color=#dbc291ff>「记忆残晶」</color>才能做到。
I can follow the golden thread to ascertain their whereabouts, but consumes <color=#dbc291ff>Memory Crystal Shards</color> in order to do so.
衣匠小心地接过记忆残晶，轻轻炼化。
The Garmentmaker carefully receives the Memory Crystal Shards and gently refines them.
嗯…有位织者注重整洁。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>某个凌乱的书柜前</color>，整理散落在地的卷轴呢。
Hmm... there's a Weaver who values cleanliness. The golden threads bring word that the Weaver is <color=#dbc291ff>in front of a cluttered bookshelf</color>, organizing scrolls scattered on the floor.
嗯…有位织者看不惯丑陋的造物。金丝带来消息，它正驻足于<color=#dbc291ff>神殿后的走廊尽头</color>，肆意吐槽呢。

Hmm... there's a weaver who cannot tolerate ugly creations. The golden threads bring word that the weaver is <color=#dbc291ff>at the far end of the corridor behind the temple</color>, freely mocking what it finds displeasing.
嗯…有位织者笃信命运。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>觐神祭台上</color>，赞颂那位泰坦的伟大呢。
Hmm... there's a weaver who devoutly believes in destiny. The golden threads bring word that the weaver's <color=#dbc291ff>at the Theophany Altar</color>, singing praises to the great Titan.
嗯…有位织者诚心追随那位红发的圣女。金丝带来消息，它仍守候在<color=#dbc291ff>圣女长大的房间</color>，兢兢业业地打扫整理呢。

Hmm... there's a Weaver who faithfully follows the red-haired saint. The golden threads bring word that the Weaver's still <color=#dbc291ff>in the Holy Maiden's childhood room</color>, diligently cleaning and tidying.
嗯…有位织者热爱聊天。金丝带来消息，它正蹲守在<color=#dbc291ff>神殿的某条走廊</color>，等待有谁能路过跟它说说话呢。

Hmm... there's a Weaver who loves chatting. The golden threads bring word that the Weaver's lingering <color=#dbc291ff>in a temple corridor</color>, waiting for someone to pass by and have a conversation.
嗯…有位织者喜爱偷懒。金丝带来消息，它正趴在<color=#dbc291ff>某把躺椅上</color>，快乐地忙里偷闲呢。
Hmm... there's a Weaver who enjoys idling. The golden threads bring word that the Weaver's lounging <color=#dbc291ff>on a lounger</color>, gleefully sneaking in some rest.
嗯…有位织者喜爱美景。金丝带来消息，<color=#dbc291ff>大桥下的石台</color>正是它时常逗留的观景点。
Hmm... there's a Weaver who adores beautiful scenery. The golden threads bring word that the Weaver's favorite viewing spot is <color=#dbc291ff>a stone platform beneath the bridge</color>.
嗯…有位织者想成为祭司，却因不懂预言而遭嘲笑。金丝带来消息，它正趴在<color=#dbc291ff>某个房间的祭台前</color>，抱怨其它虫的不识货呢。

Hmm... there's a Weaver who dreams of becoming a priest but is mocked for not understanding prophecy. The golden threads bring word that the Weaver's sulking <color=#dbc291ff>before an altar in a room</color>, complaining about the others' lack of vision.
嗯…有位织者爱开玩笑。金丝带来消息，它正扒在<color=#dbc291ff>某个房间的帷幕上</color>，假装遇险吓唬人玩呢。
Hmm... there's a Weaver who loves to joke. The golden threads bring word that the Weaver's hanging on <color=#dbc291ff>a curtain in a room</color>, pretending to be in peril just to startle others.
嗯…有位织者热爱诗歌。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>拜谒步道下的桥洞内</color>，边眺望圣城边作打油诗呢。

Hmm... there's a weaver who is passionate about poetry. The golden threads bring word that the weaver is <color=#dbc291ff>under the bridge on the Worshiper's Footpath</color>, gazing at the holy city while composing limericks.
嗯…如果没有记忆残晶，我是无法提供协助的——等您方便时再来吧，贵客。
Hmm... I cannot provide their services if you have no Memory Crystal Shards... Come again another time, dear guest.
贵客真是有干劲啊，明明我已经为你揭晓了一只若虫的位置…咱们还是不要太拼为好吧？别着急，慢慢来……
You're truly diligent, dear guest. Even though I've already revealed the location of one nymph, perhaps we shouldn't push ourselves too hard? Take your time...
找齐了这里的所有若虫。
I have gathered all the nymphs here.
Thank you, and don't wear yourself out.
你追求预言是为了什么？
有趣的问题，贵客。我要先声明一点：预言并非只能望向未来，有时它也能为我们提供线索、揭露一些不为人知的真相。
A fascinating question, esteemed guest. First, I should point out that prophecies don't only show the future — they can also offer clues and reveal hidden truths.
欧洛尼斯的祭司能用预言占卜失物，雅努斯的祭司能靠预言走出迷宫，塔兰顿的祭司能凭预言昭雪冤情……
The priests of Oronyx use prophecies to locate lost things, those of Janus use them to navigate mazes, and those of Talanton use them to prove innocence...
瞧，预言有许多妙用，但解读预言并不是我最大的追求，顶多算是随手播下一粒种子。
So you see, prophecies serve many purposes, but deciphering them isn't my main goal — it's just planting a seed for the future.
若虫本身才是最可贵的力量。将它们招至麾下，对我来说比解开预言更加关键。
The nymphs themselves hold the most valuable power. Bringing them under my control matters more than interpreting any prophecy.
看看这些「浪漫」的蝴蝶，如此可爱，又如此脆弱…要是让我选的话，我会更愿意变成一只甲虫。
Look at these "romantic" butterflies — so charming yet so fragile... If I could choose, I'd rather be a beetle.
我找齐了这里的所有若虫。
I have gathered all the nymphs here.
金丝在人台周围凝聚，构成了一个包裹它身体的茧。
The golden thread solidifies around the mannequin, creating a cocoon that envelops it.
当茧褪去时，唯余一块金丝织成的锦缎漂浮在空中。衣匠伸手一挥，它便分作两半，其中一半飞进了你的手里……
When the cocoon falls away, only a piece of brocade woven by golden threads is left floating in the air. With a wave of the Garmentmaker's hand, it splits in two, one half flying into your hand...
错误…无法侦测…已经完成。
Can you give me some hints?
学者…塑像…有人流传千古…有人被历史埋葬……
Scholars... statues... some eternal... others forgotten...
我找齐了这里的所有若虫。
I have gathered all the nymphs here.
您好棒棒啊，贵客！现在，我会着手解封众多预言中的一则。
Marvelous, esteemed guest! And now, I shall begin to unfurl one of the many prophecies.
金丝在人台周围凝聚，构成了一个包裹它身体的茧。
The golden thread solidifies around the mannequin, creating a cocoon that envelops it.
当茧褪去时，唯余一块金丝织成的锦缎漂浮在空中。衣匠伸手一挥，它便分作两半，其中一半飞进了你的手里……
When the cocoon falls away, only a piece of brocade woven by golden threads is left floating in the air. With a wave of the Garmentmaker's hand, it splits in two, one half flying into your hand...
让我看看…「在拜谒步道之下，受拜谒者远去。」
Let me see... "Beneath the Worshiper's Footpath, the worshiped one departs."
这上面画的…难道是某种仪式吗？我不太懂诶……
This drawing... could it be some kind of ritual? I don't quite get it...
让我看看…啊呀？贵客您居然已经拿到石板了？太厉害了吧！
Let me see... eh? You actually managed to obtain the slate already? Esteemed guest, you're absolutely incredible!
果然，真正的英雄不需要预言也能找到自己的路。您真是帮大忙了，贵客！
As expected, true heroes don't need prophecies to find their own path. You've been a great help!
贵客，这里已经没有更多若虫了——您也太能干了吧！
Esteemed guest, there are no more nymphs left here — you're just too amazing!
其他地方应该还有尚未搜集的若虫，贵客不妨去帮帮我的衣匠同伴们。我替它们感谢您！
There should be still more nymphs elsewhere. Why not lend a hand to my fellow Garmentmakers? Allow me to thank you on their behalf!
Can you give me some hints?
嗯，让我猜猜…这上面画的应该是一个地点，这些数字…可能有某种含义。
Hmm, if I were to take a stab at it... this looks like it depicts a location. And these numbers... they might mean something.
抱歉，我只能猜到这些…我不是个聪明的衣匠。
Sorry, that's all I've got... I'm not the smartest Garmentmaker.

这座圣烛的在火炬形状的顶部装置下，是几道树枝般向上盘旋的金属支柱。细看之下，支柱上刻着{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}与{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}的神徽。

Beneath the torch-shaped device at the top of this holy candle stand several metal pillars that spiral upward like tree branches. Upon closer inspection, one can see the divine emblems of {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#} and {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}.
你注意到底座一侧似乎有可以触碰的机关。
You notice that there seems to be an interactive mechanism on the side of the base.
随着你的触碰，金色的流体缓缓上升。那流体仿佛有生命般舞动，在装置顶部凝聚成一团温暖的光球。
Golden liquid rises slowly at your touch. It moves and dances as if alive before coalescing into a warm ball of light on top of the device.
忽然之间，周遭的一切都安静了下来，世界很近，却又好像离你很远。
Suddenly, everything around you goes silent. The world feels so close, yet it's as if it's miles away.
在这黑漆漆的迷雾中，你隐约看见几位身着白袍的祭司正面向圣烛静默祈祷。他们的脚下铺陈着新摘的松枝、月桂与鲜花，你似乎闻到了某种阳光晒在干爽衣物上的味道。

In the pitch-black mist, you vaguely see several white-robed priests silently praying before the holy candle. Freshly picked pine branches, laurels, and flowers are laid beneath their feet, and you catch a faint scent reminiscent of sun-dried clothes.
你听到某种朦胧不清的响动，像是树木抽枝绽叶、花苞盛放的声音。年纪最大的祭司转过头，他浑浊的目光穿越迷雾与时空，定定地望着你。

You hear a vague, indistinct sound, like the sound of branches and leaves growing and flower buds blooming. The eldest priest turns his head. His murky gaze pierces through fog and time, and fixes upon you.
{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}与{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}在上，愿你的旅程兼具启迪与沉淀。
By {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#} and {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}, may your journey bring both enlightenment and reflection.
You feel a rush of dizziness.
金色的流体在圣烛中起落，周围的植物似乎在轻轻摇曳，回应着金色流体的律动。
The golden liquid within the holy candle rises and falls, while the surrounding plants seem to sway gently in response to its rhythm.
这座圣烛的底座上交织的是星辰与时钟的图案，细看之下，{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}与{RUBY_B#律法之泰坦}塔兰顿{RUBY_E#}的双重神徽隐匿在繁复的花纹之中。

The base of this holy candle is adorned with interwoven images of stars and clocks. Upon close inspection, one can seem to see the divine emblems of {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#} and {RUBY_B#Law Titan}Talanton{RUBY_E#} hidden within the intricate pattern.
你发现装置底部似乎藏着某种开关。
You notice what appears to be a hidden switch at the base of the device.
金色的流体徐徐升起，在装置顶部形成光球。
The golden liquid rises steadily, forming a glowing sphere at the top of the device.
周遭的时间流速变得缓慢，就像是浓黑迷雾笼罩了你，你再也看不清眼前的一切，头顶似有星光闪烁，你只得努力抬头张望。
The flow of time around you slows as if a dense black mist is enveloping you. Your vision blurs, and distant starlight flickers above — you strain to look up.
那似乎是一座高塔，上面有几位身穿黑袍的占星师在此驻足。他们脚边摆放着沙漏与星盘，低声交谈着什么。
It appears to be a towering structure, where several black-robed astrologers are gathered. Hourglasses and star charts lie at their feet as they converse in hushed voices.
似是感应你的注视，为首者向下探寻，直至与你的目光相遇——他脚边的大型沙漏，沙粒竟开始逆向流动——
Sensing your gaze, the leader of the group looks down, locking eyes with you. At his feet, the large hourglass begins to flow in reverse —
岁月对所有人都是公平的。我们已经等候多时了，{F#小姑娘}{M#小伙子}。
Time is fair to all. We've been waiting for a long time, {F#young lady}{M#young man}.
浓雾吞去星光，你感到一阵晕眩。
The dense mist swallows the starlight, and dizziness overtakes you.
圣烛中的金色流体缓缓流转，仿佛在丈量着时间的刻度。
The golden liquid within the holy candle flows steadily, as if measuring the very passage of time.
这座圣烛安置在偏殿拱门旁，金色的光芒为四周的壁画镀上一层柔和的光晕。
This holy candle is placed next to the side hall archway. The golden glow casts a soft halo over the surrounding murals.
身着绣金长袍的史官时不时抬头看向圣烛流转的光芒，仿佛在确认着它与壁画的关联。
The scribe in gilded robe peers up at the shifting glow of the candle from time to time, as if confirming its connection to the murals.
圣烛装置上似乎有某种可以操控的按钮。
There seems to be a control button on the holy candle device.
随着光芒的消逝，你注意到壁画上的场景似乎也开始褪色、变换——
As the glow dims, you notice the scenes in the mural also begin to fade and shift —
那些纹路似乎只与你眼中流转的光晕有关，就像是惺忪睡眼中瞥见的重影，在失焦的视界中，你看见了那具象化的文字、亦或是符号……

The patterns appear solely connected to the flowing halo of light in your eyes. Like doubles glimpsed through a drowsy gaze, in this blurry vision, you see the words, or perhaps symbols, manifesting...
忽然之间，某道灵光予以你启迪，你看见那些纹路竟然组合出——{NICKNAME}。
Suddenly, a spark of revelation strikes — you see the patterns rearrange into the name {NICKNAME}.
你甚至能从即将消逝的光芒中感受到那股问好的意思。
You can even feel a sense of salutation from the fading light.
身着绣金长袍的史官无动于衷，无人可知此刻你眼中的奇迹。
The scribe in gilded robe appears indifferent. No one else knows the miracle before your eyes at this moment.
你凝视着圣烛中升降的金色流体，壁画上的图案在光影交错中若隐若现，却再也没有出现过你的名字。
You gaze at the golden liquid rising and falling within the holy candle. The images on the mural flicker in the shifting light, but your name does not appear again.
这座圣烛坐落在左偏殿的门廊旁。在圣烛流体的光晕下，那些形似秤盘与沙漏的花纹若隐若现，呈现出一种奇特的韵律。

This holy candle is placed next to the entrance of the left side hall. Under the halo of the holy candle liquid, patterns resembling scalepans and hourglasses come into view intermittently to a peculiar rhythm.
不出意料的，你注意到底座上有一个精巧的开关装置。
As expected, you notice a finely crafted switch at the base.
在你触碰开关的瞬间，流淌的金色液体渐渐沉寂。你的意识也随着金色一同逝去……
The moment you touch the switch, the flowing golden liquid gradually stills. Your consciousness fades away along with the gold...
…刚刚那是…被人袭击了？当你回过神来，你已经被好心人安置于此处了。
...Were you just... attacked by someone? As you come to, you find yourself placed here by a kind soul.
…还是说你一直坐在这里，未曾离开？刚才你凑近圣烛的经历不过是一时的想象。
...Or have you been sitting here the entire time, never having left? Was your encounter with the holy candle merely a fleeting illusion?
你不得而知，毕竟在翁法罗斯记忆总是包含着奇迹的成分。
You cannot say for sure. After all, in Amphoreus, memory always holds a touch of the miraculous.
你再次操控圣烛，金色流体在装置中起伏。你的意识不再悄然离开，它清晰地留在此刻。
You manipulate the holy candle once more and the golden liquid rises and falls inside the device. This time, your consciousness holds its ground firmly in the present.
毫无疑问，你曾在故事里见过这个庞大的木制道具，瞧它那高高昂起的头颅，以及宽广到足以装进好几个人的空洞腹部——所有特征都与你的认知相符。
No doubt you recognize this massive wooden prop from tales of old — its proud head held high, its cavernous belly large enough to hold several people — every detail matches the stories you know.
你不明白它为何会出现在这里。能勉强与这匹木马扯上关系的唯有{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}，可命运三相殿早已荒废，那位半神同样不在此处。

You cannot understand why this would appear here. This wooden horse could only feasibly be connected to {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#}, but the Temple of the Three Fates has long since fallen into ruin, and that demigod is nowhere to be seen.
你左右张望，都没能见到任何人影。既然如此，恐怕只能靠你来一探究竟了——
You look around you, but there is no one in sight. It seems that it is up to you to investigate...
这不是无名客该做的事！
This is not something a Nameless should be doing!
是吗？可想想那些被你翻过的垃圾桶、反复研究的路灯，还有不知道砸了多少个的盾牌…真的不打算钻进去看看吗？

Really? Just think about all of those trash cans you've flipped over, all of those street lamps you've investigated over and over, the countless shields you've smashed... Are you really not going to go inside and take a look?
要是{RUBY_B#大地之泰坦}吉奥里亚{RUBY_E#}在场，你的勤勉与节制绝对能获得它的嘉奖。可惜它并未回应…真令人遗憾。
If {RUBY_B#Earth Titan}Georios{RUBY_E#} were here, your diligence and self-control would have no doubt been commended. Unfortunately, there was no response... That's truly unfortunate.
木马里宽敞而幽暗，让你睡意茫茫…但眼皮打架时，眼球却被内壁的一行文字夺去了注意力——
The interior of the wooden horse is dark and spacious, lulling you into drowsiness... but as you begin to nod off, your eyes catch a line of text etched on the inner wall —
「神驹卡咏，带你渡过冥河，去往彼岸」
"Divine Steed Kaevo will guide you across the River of Souls to the other shore."
做出决定后，你马上爬起，但木马却因这些微的动作而重心不稳。只听「咕咚」一声——顷刻，你已身处冥河之上。
As you make your decision, you swiftly stand, but the horse shifts beneath you, unsteady from your movement. With a loud "thud," you find yourself floating above the River of Souls.
或许是为了见一位朋友，又或许是单纯好奇冥河的尽头是什么，总之，你对它所阐述的内容十分向往。
Maybe you're just eager to see a friend, or maybe you're simply curious where the River of Souls leads, but either way, you are filled with anticipation.
伴随着雀跃的心情，你在木马中咕噜噜打滚，而它也不负众望，随着你的手舞足蹈一点点挪动着位置——最后，「咕咚」一声滑进了冥河。
With excitement bubbling inside, you roll around inside the horse, and true to form, it shifts gently with your every movement — until, with another "thud," it slides into the River of Souls.
你沉沉睡去，你醒了过来。四周静悄悄的，只有水声荡漾——猜猜看，发生了什么？
You drift into a deep sleep, only to wake to an eerie silence, save for the gentle lapping of water. Guess what happened?
希望你没有晕船的问题。
木马外表看上去毫无机关，但你却可以明显感受到，有股神秘的推力在让你们缓缓前进。看来「渡河」云云并非虚言——雅努斯的神力，翁法罗斯人的第一款水上发动机。

The wooden horse appears to have no mechanism, but you can feel an unseen force gently propelling you forward. It seems the "crossing" is no mere metaphor — Janus' divine power, the first water engine of Amphoreus.
事已至此，你只好抛开无谓思绪，享受起了这「有如转生般迷人」的旅途。
At this point, there's nothing to do but let go of any needless thoughts and enjoy this "mesmerizing journey, like a rebirth."
与列车的跃迁不同，这古旧的驳船并未通电，甚至连光照都不足，实属无聊，你决定——
Unlike the Express' warp jump, this old barge isn't powered by electricity, and the lighting is scarce — boredom sets in, so you decide —
To wash your feet in the River of Souls.
A friend's warning flashes through your mind —
"Guess where I am right now?" — Send.
嘟嘟。消息发送失败的提示音让你有些沮丧。很遗憾，万帷网是奥赫玛区域限定。
Beep beep. The message fails to send, and you feel a pang of frustration. Unfortunately, the World Wound Web is region-locked to Okhema.
How much time has passed, you wonder —
当你开始为旅途过久该如何筹备饮食而忧心忡忡的时候，伴随着「喀啷」一声，马身剧烈地摇晃了一下，随后便如大地般沉静了下来——你意识到，「彼岸」就在眼前。

Just as you begin to worry about what provisions to prepare for the journey, there's a loud "clank," and the wooden horse jerks violently for a moment before settling back down as quietly as the earth beneath you. That's when it hits you — the "other shore" is right in front of you.
将门板降下，你向未知的未来迈出了第一步。
With a click, the door falls open, and you step forward, ready to face the unknown future.
Can I finally meet that person!?
眼前是你钻进木马的地方——准确地说，不完全是，你身处码头的另一侧。
Before you stands the spot you entered the wooden horse — well, not exactly, you've landed on the opposite side of the dock.
神性的声音在风中响起，随后缓缓消散——只余一枚硬币在你手中。
A divine voice rises with the wind and gradually fades — leaving only a single coin in your hand.
负责摆渡的木马，在冥河河畔的微风中轻轻摇曳，目前暂不营业。
The ferryman wooden horse gently sways in the breeze along the River of Souls, now out of service.
毫无疑问，你曾在故事里见过这个庞大的木制道具，瞧它那高高昂起的头颅，以及宽广到足以装进好几个人的空洞腹部——所有特征都与你的认知相符。
No doubt you recognize this massive wooden prop from tales of old — its proud head held high, its cavernous belly large enough to hold several people — every detail matches the stories you know.
你，你有什么事？这木马是我的东西，没什么事别靠过来，碰坏了怎么办？
You — what are you up to? This wooden horse is mine. Don't get too close unless you want to break it.
我在别的地方也见过它……
别，别的我不管。这个确实属于我，我花大价钱从收藏家那买的所有权，有权契的。
No, no, that's not the issue. This really is mine — I paid a lot to buy it from a collector, and I have the deed to prove it.
你对废弃车厢有没有兴趣啊？
Are you interested in abandoned wagons or something?
别，别拿我跟那些搞古玩的怪人混为一谈。
No, no, don't lump me in with those antique weirdos.
这是我存…不是，这是刻法勒的祭器，很尊贵的。没事的话，我先走了…别，别碰。
This is my... No, this is a ritual vessel of Kephale, very valuable. Anyway, I'll be leaving now... just don't touch it.
私人所有的木马，这可是头一次见…等等，里面好像有动静？
A private wooden horse, never seen before... wait, did you hear something inside?
咦，我刚刚不是在家里的仓库吗？{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}，这是哪啊？
Huh, wasn't I just in my home's warehouse, {F#big sister}{M#big brother}? Where is this?
呀，到上面来啦！这么说，那些东西一定是{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}你送来的吧！
Oh, I came all the way up here! So, those things must have been delivered by you, {F#big sister}{M#big brother}, right?
每隔一段时间，仓库里就会莫名其妙多出来一些财物，妈妈总说是{RUBY_B#浪漫之泰坦}墨涅塔{RUBY_E#}的眷顾，但我一直都不相信。
Every so often, some mysterious objects appear in the warehouse. Mom always says it's {RUBY_B#Romance Titan}Mnestia{RUBY_E#}'s blessings, but I've never really believed it.
不过，自从我爸爸去世后，家里一直有些拮据，这些东西真的帮大忙了！
But since Dad passed, things have been tight at home, and these items have really helped!
Actually, it wasn't me who sent them.
Really? Then who could it have been?
刚刚有个叔叔你认识吗？
Did you know that man here just now?
A man here? Who? I don't know anyone like that.
咦？木马里有声音！难道是我妈妈也来了？
Huh? It's coming from inside the wooden horse! Has my mom also arrived?
这是…云崖外侧吗？果然如此，本次行动成功，我这就回去申请逮捕令……
Is this... outside Dawncloud? Just as expected, the mission was a success. I'll head back to apply for an arrest warrant...
咦？你是「金织」女士的客人，还有这孩子是……
Huh? You're Lady Goldweaver's guest, and this child is...
…实不相瞒，我是元老院的一名督查。我们怀疑一位议员长期收受贿赂，却一直找不到证据。
...To be honest, I'm an inspector from the Council of Elders. We've been suspecting a legislator of accepting bribes for years, but we could never find solid evidence.
这木马曾是由雅努萨波利斯派遣至此的灵器，于雅努斯所掌管，如今虽然破败，却还留有远距离输送的权能……
This wooden horse was once a divine instrument sent by Janusopolis under Janus' rule. Though it's now in ruins, it still has the power to send things across long distances...
我们发现，数月前，嫌疑人买下了这物件，堂而皇之摆在城中，实在有些可疑，便组织了调查…结果不出所料。
We discovered that the suspect bought it months ago and displayed it openly in the city. Naturally, this raised our suspicions, and we began an investigation... And the result is as we expected.
他靠这木马将多数来历不明的财产移动到了远方…虽说「最危险的地方就是最安全的地方」，但把贼窝设在卫兵哨站，这就有些过分了……
He used this wooden horse to move most of his ill-gotten wealth far away... While "the most dangerous place is often the safest," setting up his den at a guard post seems a bit too obvious...
…叔叔，你也是从我家的仓库过来的吗？
...Did you come from my house's warehouse too?
是这位叔叔给你送的东西。
It was him who delivered the items to you.
真的吗！谢谢叔叔！咦，我好像在我家附近看见过你，你在追求我妈妈吗？
Really!? Thank you, mister! Hey, I think I've seen you near my house — do you like my mom?
不对，那个，呃，你就当是这样吧，哈哈…来，我送你回家，路上我给你讲讲……
No, wait, uh, let's just leave it at that, haha... Come, let me walk you home, and I'll explain on the way...
其实这个木马通向好多地方。
Actually, this wooden horse leads to many places.
这样啊……这么说，是有位大善人一直在给大家送东西吗？
I see... So, is there a kind person who's been sending things to us?
嗯，没错，而且不止一个人呢。那位{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}也送了很多东西给需要的人，不过他们之后可能会有些忙…我先送你回家，路上我们可以聊聊……

Yes, that's right, and it's not just one person. That {F#big sister}{M#big brother} has sent a lot of things to people in need too, though they might be a bit busy afterward... I'll take you home, and we can chat on the way...
帮大忙了，感谢。愿刻法勒庇佑你，朋友。
Thanks again for your help. May Kephale watch over your back, my friend.
安静的木马，曾发生在它身上的小插曲，除你之外无人知晓。
The quiet wooden horse. The small incident that took place upon it is known only to you.
天空堡垒已经倾颓，滚烫的熔金池水如蛛网般在废墟中溢流。风堇在行将崩塌的晨昏之眼中艰难穿行，来到破碎的天象画壁前——
The Sky Fortress has crumbled, and molten gold spills across the ruins, spreading like webs. Hyacine struggles through the collapsing Eye of Twilight, finally arriving at the broken celestial mural.
塞涅俄丝大人最后告诉我，天空的权柄已经与艾格勒的神躯融合，一同被熔铸进了天象画壁之中。
Lady Seliose told me at the end that the authority of Sky had fused with Aquila's divine body, and both were molten into the celestial mural.
现在情况紧急，没时间慢悠悠地剥离天空的神权了。
Time is of the essence — there's no time to slowly extract Sky's authority.
最快的办法…就是把自己也镌刻进天象画壁，与艾格勒融为一体，支撑起天空……
The quickest way... is to insert myself into the mural, merge with Aquila, and support the Sky...
哈哈，简直就像昏光庭院代代相承的天空英雄传说，在我身上成真了一样呢。
Haha... It's almost like the legendary tales of the Sky heroes, passed down through generations in the Twilight Courtyard, are coming true through me.
虽然那听上去很痛…但是，最后印在画壁中的我，一定展露着笑容。
It might sound painful... But in the end, I will surely be smiling even as a carving in the mural.
Because... I can heal the Sky.
这边马上就不安全了，大家收拾收拾东西，赶紧和圣城卫士一起去避难处吧！
This place is no longer safe. Everyone, pack up and go to the shelter with the Holy City Guards!
但是，克莱门汀小姐，这是你和风堇小姐好不容易才选定的昏光庭院新址。
But Miss Clementine... this is the new location for the Twilight Courtyard that you and Miss Hyacine spent so much time selecting.
圣城卫士中有不少人都接受过风堇小姐的救治，我们愿意分出一些兵力来保护她最后留下的庭院……
Miss Hyacine has treated many of us Holy City Guards. We are willing to send some people to guard this courtyard she left behind...
谢谢你们的好意。只是，新昏光庭院地处宅巷，一旦被黑潮怪物包围，你们的处境会非常危险。
Thank you for your kindness. However, the new Twilight Courtyard is in a residential alley. If it gets surrounded by the black tide monsters, you will be all in grave danger.
哪怕风堇小姐在场，她也一定不会愿意让你们身处险境。
If Miss Hyacine is here, she would never want you to be in harm's way.
可是，这些漂亮的装饰…一定也会被黑潮怪物们毁掉的。
But... these beautiful decorations... they'll be destroyed by the monsters.
没关系的。昏光庭院…并不是个稳固的家园。光是风堇小姐本人，就亲眼目睹了庭院的两次解离。
It’s alright. The Twilight Courtyard was never a stable home. Miss Hyacine herself has witnessed its dissolution twice.
为了重建庭院，风堇小姐确实花了很多心思。无论在树庭还是奥赫玛，当她为昏光庭院选址的时候，总是会跑遍每一处角落，只为找到环境最优美的一隅。

She truly put in a lot of effort to rebuild it. Whenever she was choosing a location for the Twilight Courtyard, whether in the Grove or Okhema, she'd search every corner, just to find the most beautiful spot.
但是她或许并不知道，我们大家都觉得，只要风堇小姐在的地方，就是洒满暖光的圣庭呢！
But perhaps she isn't aware that — We all believe that wherever Miss Hyacine is, the warm sanctuary will be!
…是啊。说的夸张些，哪怕昏光庭院建在重渊，风堇小姐也会把那片黑漆漆的地方照亮吧。
...That's true. To put it bluntly, even if the Twilight Courtyard were built in the Abyss, Miss Hyacine would still light up that dark place.
克莱门汀小姐，也请你先行撤离吧，我来帮你搬走这些医疗用具。
Miss Clementine, please evacuate this place. I'll help you move these medical supplies.
…顺带，我还是想捎带一些亮晶晶的装饰品，哈哈……
...By the way, I'd like to take some shiny decorations with me, haha...
巴特鲁斯，你好端端藏墙里干嘛？
Bartholos, why are you hiding in the wall?
嘿，这不是怕大姐头又把我拽去啥危险的地方嘛。现在这奥赫玛可不太平，咱一个小贼灵可不想掺和进啥大风大浪。
Hey, I'm just trying to avoid you dragging me to dangerous places. Okhema's not safe right now, and as a little Spirithief, I want no part in big troubles.
你和我打了这么久交道，就是天塌了我都不能诓你呀。今天，我是来给你送礼的。
You and I have worked together for so long, you know I'd never fool you. I've come to bring you a gift today.
喏，这可是我从黎明云崖顺来的天下第一宝物，接好了。
Here, I took the world's best treasure from Dawncloud. Catch.
哇，赛飞儿大姐头，你来真的呀！嘿嘿，让我看看里头——
Wow, boss Cipher, you're serious! Hehe, let me see what's inside...
哟，胆大包天的贼灵巴特鲁斯，你怎么发抖了？
Well, well, daring Spirithief Bartholos, why are you shaking?
天哪，赛飞儿大姐头，这这这，这我可不敢收啊……
Oh my gosh, boss Cipher. I... I can't possibly accept this...
据我所知，很久以前你也试着偷过黎明机器吧？还有艾格勒的眼睛，法吉娜的酒盏……
I know you've tried to steal the Dawn Device before, as well as Aquila's eye, Phagousa's wine cup...
现在吃颗<color=#dbc291ff>刻法勒的火种</color>算什么呀。
What's wrong with eating <color=#dbc291ff>Kephale's Coreflame</color> on top of all those?
赛飞儿大姐头，这可不是假货…您就别消遣我了，从哪儿来还哪儿去吧，我先溜为敬……
Boss Cipher, this is the real deal... Please, leave me alone with this. Just return it where it came from... I'll take my leave...
哎哎，别想逃。不跟你开玩笑了——我要出趟远门，危险得很，弄不好就回不来了。
Don't even think about running. Lemme be straight with you — I'm going on a super dangerous journey far away. I might never make it back.
怎么可能呢，这世上没人跑得过翻飞之币。
No way. No one in this world can outrun the Coin of Whimsy.
但愿如此吧。可万一真出了意外……
I sure hope so... But if something does happen...
我需要你保护好这颗火种。如果你看到天空出现异样，不要犹豫，用你最快的速度找到救世小子，把火种交给他。

Then I need you to protect this Coreflame. If you notice anything unusual in the sky, then go find the Deliverer boy as fast as you can and give him this Coreflame. Don't delay for even a fraction of a second.
…大姐头，咱们只是俩小偷，天真塌了也轮不到咱们来扛呀。不如听我的，咱们有多远跑多远，凭诡计的神力，就算世界真的毁灭了……

... Boss, we're just two teeny thieves. Even if the sky falls for real, we aren't the ones who need to carry it. Why not run as far as we can? With the power of Trickery, even if the world gets destroyed...
——奥赫玛早就陷入永夜了。让黎明机器继续燃烧的，正是诡计的神力。
...Okhema has been in Evernight since centuries ago. Trickery's divine power is what has kept the Dawn Device burning.
事到如今，我不得不向你透露这个欺世之谎。我们早就背负着世界的命运，没有独善其身的余地。
At this moment in time, I have no choice but to reveal this grand lie to you. We've been shouldering the fate of this world all this time. There is no way for us to come out of this in one piece.
…你是说…我们的力量，诡计的力量…骗过了这世上所有的白痴、恶徒和灾难，拯救了翁法罗斯？
...You mean... our divine power, the power of Trickery... has deceived all the world's fools, villains, and even the very calamities themselves? We saved Amphoreus?
没错。巴特鲁斯，这不正是你想要的吗？最孱弱的影子，却负担起此世的黎明……
That's right. Isn't this what you've always wanted, Bartholos? You are the weakest shadow, yet you now bear the only dawn of this world...
胆大包天的扎格列斯本尊，你怎么又发抖了？
Great god Zagreus, infinitely bold and reckless, why are you trembling again?
…嘿嘿，这是兴奋的抖擞，大姐头。不出意外的话，这是我们最后的骗局了吧？
...Heh. I'm shaking from excitement. Boss, If all goes well, this should be our final trick, right?
正是如此。不过，我还是要警告你，要是你敢掖着火种临阵脱逃……
Yes. But I must warn you — if you dare hide the Coreflame and run when the time comes...
到了下辈子，我一定把你丢冥河里喂鱼！
I'll feed you to the fish in the River of Souls in our next life!
大工匠，你怎么来了？黎明云崖现在很危险，黑潮怪物纷纷从低处向云崖汇集，已经有不少圣城卫士战死了……
Grand Craftsman, what brings you here? The Dawncloud is perilous right now. The black tide monsters are gathering from below, and many of the Holy City Guards have already fallen...
支援前线，尽一份力，我来。
To support the front lines and do my part, I'm here.
上好的武器，我带来了。保卫奥赫玛，我与诸位勇士一同。
Fine weapons, I've brought them here. To protect Okhema, I stand with the brave warriors.
是大工匠亲手打制的神兵利器！我早就想买一把了，只是预算一直不够，这下得偿所愿了，就是牺牲了也值得！
These are marvels of weaponry forged by the Grand Craftsman himself! I've always wanted one, but never had the budget. Now, I get my wish — even if I die, it will be worth it!
别说傻话！你还年轻，待会儿老老实实跟在我们身后，别傻乎乎一个人冲锋。
Stop talking nonsense! You're still young. Stay behind us later and don't charge ahead alone.
大工匠，我们感谢你雪中送炭。只是，你现在的身体状况，实在不适合以战士的身份留在这里啊。
Grand Craftsman, we're grateful for your timely help. But... your current condition isn't suited for you to stay here as a warrior.
并非战士，我向来。但是现在，我亦应抗争。
I am no warrior. I never was. But now, I too must resist.
泽弗，执拗是大工匠的老脾气了。当初尼卡多利袭城，哪次他没有挺身而出？
Zeph, stubbornness has always been the Grand Craftsman's trademark. When Nikador attacked the city, didn't he always step forward?
事到如今，我们也没办法把紧握着武器的大工匠硬搬回云石市集啊。
He's clutching his weapon, you see? We can't just drag him back to the Marmoreal Market.
大工匠，白厄大人先前委托我们前去贵客们的私人浴宫待命，无奈我们一直抽不开身。
Grand Craftsman, Lord Phainon had tasked us with waiting for further instructions at the guests' private bath chamber, but we still haven't had the time to carry out that order.
将战事托付给你，我们很惭愧。但…请你替我们带领卫士与黑潮战斗吧！
I'm sorry for entrusting the battle to you, but... please lead the guards to fight against the black tide!
Go. Fulfill the duty, your duty.
...Grand Craftsman, please take care of yourself!
…在靠近，敌人。举起武器，勇士们！
诺杜斯先生，我在周围打听了一遭，即便是刻法勒的祭司，也对黎明机器的突变毫无头绪……
Mr. Noldus... I've asked around, but even Kephale's priests are baffled by the Dawn Device's sudden change...
怎会如此…大祭司大人呢？你可知她现在身在何处？
How could this be... Where is the High Priest now?
缇里西庇俄丝大人…正在引导奥赫玛的民众疏散，前往广场暂避。
Lady Tribios is leading the citizens to evacuate to the square, seeking temporary shelter.
…维尔图斯啊。看来，这就是我们的最后一个晨昏时了。
...Virtus. Looks like this is our final day in this world.
您这是什么话！不，当务之急，先和我一起去安全的地方躲一躲吧。
What? No! The priority is for us to find shelter in a safe place.
永夜之下，还有哪里是安全的？新世界吗？
Where can we find safety in the Evernight? The "New World"?
您…还是对「再创世」的愿景有所不安。
You... You are still uneasy about the vision of the Era Nova.
是啊。但事到如今，我不会多言。复述，教典第三十七章，第四行。
Yes, but I won't say much more at this point. Now, recite the <unbreak>37</unbreak>th chapter of the scriptures. Fourth line.
「若门后的景色美好，却无人能够跨越，也不妨认定那就是美好之处。」
"If the scenery behind the door is charming yet none can step into it, then it may still be a place of beauty."
诚然，身为命运泰坦的祭司，至少我们自身，不该阻碍向往命运之人的热忱。
Indeed, as the priest of the Fate Titans, we must not stand in the way of those who long for their destiny.
自从迁来奥赫玛，您的想法确实改变了不少。我想其他祭司们应该会笑着议论纷纷吧。
Your views have changed quite a bit since you arrived in Okhema. I imagine the other priests are probably laughing and discussing this behind your back.
哼，罢了。我们去广场吧。事情发生得太过突然，民众恐怕仍处于慌乱中。祭司的任务，便是在命运到来前，成为人们的依靠——
Hmph, enough. Let's head to the Plaza. The citizens are probably still panicking with how fast everything happened. As priests, we must offer them support before the destiny arrives —
You two, get away from there!!
…黑潮造物？！维尔图斯，别管我！快走！！
...Black tide creatures!? Virtus, don't worry about me! Run!!
记忆戛然而止，伴随着一丝凉意。
The memory ends abruptly, leaving only a cold chill.
呼，呼…这就是传说中的黑潮怪物？没想到我居然能干掉一个…莫非我其实有成为黄金裔英雄的潜力？
Phew... So this is the legendary black tide monster? I can't believe I actually managed to take one down... Could I have the potential to become a hero among the Chrysos Heirs?
嘶，好疼…果然还是不能得意忘形啊…我的血也是红色的，看来英雄的结局并不适合我。
Hiss... That hurts... I really let my guard down, didn't I? And my blood is red... so I suppose a hero's end isn't meant to be mine after all.
好可怕的伤口，我恐怕命不久矣了吧……
This wound is too deep... I don't have a lot of time left...
明明说好去天外之界看看的，没想到最后要死在地上，真是辱没了探险家的名号……
I was going to see the worlds beyond the sky... but now I'm going to die on the ground. What a disgrace to the title of adventurer...
唉，以前的生命花园是多么热闹，偏偏这会儿冷清得要死…我这满腹遗言都没人可以倾诉。
Ahhh, the Garden of Life used to be so lively. Why does it have to be so quiet right now... I have so much to say before I go, yet no one to share them with.
又或者…这是我此生仅有的机会？
Or maybe... this is my only chance?
既然黎明机器已经熄灭，就说明异乡人阁下他们成功了，艾格勒的「天空诅咒」此刻肯定也不存在了……
If the Dawn Device has been extinguished, then it means the outlander succeeded. Aquila's curse is surely gone now...
如果是现在的话，或许真能触及天外之界也说不定！
Maybe I can actually reach the world beyond the sky now!
我的「羽翼」…被他们放在哪里了？
My "wings"... Where did they put them?
…啊，在那儿！圣城守卫还挺能藏。希望我有足够的力气爬过去……
...Ah, over there! The Holy City Guards sure know how to hide things well. I hope I have enough strength to crawl over...
呼…你可以的，达米亚诺斯，你可是个探险家。
Huff... Huff... You can do this, Damionis. You're an adventurer.
你看着达米亚诺斯骑上飞天坛递，向着断崖发起了冲锋，仿佛挑战巨人的骑士。
You see Damionis mount the Flying Amphora and charge toward the cliff, like a knight challenging giants.
他的身影一转眼便消失在了视野尽头，你不确定那坛递最后有没有升上天空……
In the blink of an eye, his figure disappears beyond the horizon, and you're unsure if the amphora ever ascended into the sky...
但无论这次尝试成功与否，他大概都不会再回到奥赫玛了。
Regardless of whether this attempt succeeds, he probably won't be coming back to Okhema.
嗯…神速硬币还剩十二枚。只是帮救世小子他们拖延时间的话，肯定够用了吧？
There are <unbreak>12</unbreak> Godspeed Coins left. It should be enough if I'm only buying time for the little Deliverer, right?
大姐头，你…你真的要这么做吗？下定决心，不会反悔了？
Boss, are... are you really going to do this? You're absolutely sure? No takebacks?
没有，我只是担心…你也知道的，那个黑衣服的家伙强得可怕——
No, I'm just worried... You know, that fellow in black is ridiculously strong—
Are you scared of death, Bartholos?
...Hm? Why are you asking this all of a sudden?
嘿…没什么，就是想告诉你——我可不怕。不过就是去和那位蜗居公主团聚罢了，能有多吓人？
Heh, it's nothing, I just want to tell you that I'm not. I'll simply reunite with Princess Homebody, that's all. What's there to be scared of?
我怕的是…自己最后的结局对这个世界而言毫无价值，就和我的那些族人一样。
What I'm afraid of is... that my final moments won't be of any value to this world, just like my people.
我…我也一样啊，大姐头。如果不能和你一起施展一次最伟大的骗术…「诡计」一定也死不瞑目呀！
I... I feel the same way, Boss. If I don't get to perform the greatest deception... "Trickery" with you once, I won't be able to rest in peace!
嘿，就知道你会这么说。来吧，按照我们的计划——你可要好好留在缇宝和缇宁阿姐的身边哪。
Heh, I knew you'd say that. Come on, just follow our plan — you have to stay with big sis Tribbie and Trinnon.
记住：你现在只是一枚信封，可不许出声吓唬她们哪。
Remember: you're merely a letter now, don't make any noise to scare them.
我…一定不会辜负你的信任，大姐头！
I... I won't disappoint you, Boss!
呵…真没想到，我们最后的诡计，竟然建立在对彼此毫无保留的信任之上……
Ha... Who would have thought that our final trick would be built on unconditional mutual trust...
昏光庭院的风堇，你心中最温柔的黄金裔。她已将天空缝补，向大地展露着治愈的笑容。现在你之所见，只是记忆复现出的残像。

Hyacine of the Twilight Courtyard, the gentlest Chrysos Heir in your heart. She has mended the sky, and offers a healing smile to the earth. What you now behold is merely an afterimage reproduced from memory.
呀，灰宝！今天阳光特别不错，谢谢刻法勒，你也是来晒太阳的吧。
Ah, Grayie! What a gorgeous sunny day, thank Kephale. You're here to soak up some sun too, aren't you?
还是说…你是有什么烦心事，想要找人倾诉一下？
Or perhaps... Is there something on your mind that you want to talk about?
你是最温柔最伟大的医师！
You are the most gentle and magnificent healer ever!
记忆的残像似乎晃了晃，过往对话的回忆因其承载的情感之重杂糅在一起……
The fragment of memory seems to waver — memories of words once spoken blend together due to the emotion they contain...
Ah... thank you for your compliment!
我只是一名医师，即便拥有了力量，也无法变得和其他半神一样强大。
I am merely a healer. Even with this power, I cannot match the strength of other demigods.
但若能降下温柔的虹光，守护尽可能多的生灵……
But if I can bring down gentle rainbow light and protect as many lives as possible...
我也算实现了自己的理想呀。
Then I will have truly realized my dream.
Now you've become a hero too.
哈哈…几乎每段史诗都以英雄的功业作结。
Haha... almost every epic tale concludes with a hero's great deeds.
但我想做的，只是站在英雄们身后，在金色的浪潮将世界推向新生时，尽己所能疗愈每一个可能会溺亡的普通人。
But what I truly wish is to stand behind the heroes, healing every ordinary person who might drown when the golden tide pushes the world toward its rebirth.
给我留个彩虹桥吧，还想见你。
Save me a rainbow bridge, I still want to see you again.
记忆的残像沉默不语，因为这是不曾发生过的对话。
The shadow of the memory remains silent, for this conversation never truly occurred.
阿格莱雅，浪漫之半神、黄金裔的领袖，已为逐火之旅燃尽了最后一缕金辉。现在你之所见，只是记忆复现出的残像。
Aglaea, the demigod of Romance, leader of the Chrysos Heirs, has burned her last golden radiance for the Flame-Chase Journey. What you now behold is merely an afterimage reproduced from memory.
隔着百步之距时，金线就已预知贵客的到来。{NICKNAME}阁下，想在此休息会儿吗？
The golden thread had already foreseen your arrival when you were a hundred steps away, dear guest. Esteemed {NICKNAME}, have you come to rest?
记忆的残像似乎晃了晃，过往对话的回忆因其承载的情感之重杂糅在一起……
The fragment of memory seems to waver — memories of words once spoken blend together due to the emotion they contain...
一千年的时光…我见证了十位泰坦的殒落。从最初的娇蛮无知，再到摸索着为众人引路……
In these one thousand years... I've witnessed the fall of ten Titans. From my naive arrogance at the beginning to slowly learning how to guide others...
希望我的离去…能筑成众人的长阶。
I hope my departure... will form steps that others may ascend.
白厄不会辜负你的期待。
他是翁法罗斯注定的负世者，通向翁法罗斯未来的门扉。
He is the destined Worldbearer of Amphoreus, the gate to Amphoreus's future.
我会在西风的尽头，盼待由他开辟出的奇迹。
I will be waiting at the end of the west wind, looking forward to the miracle he will create.
也许我该庆幸…庆幸自己还是等来了这一刻啊。
Maybe I should be grateful... grateful that I've reached this moment.
我们会替你目睹再创世。
We will witness the Era Nova for you.
记忆的残像沉默不语，因为这是不曾发生过的对话。
The shadow of the memory remains silent, for this conversation never truly occurred.
止步吧卑劣残缺的胎生种，回去大地那溺爱你们的摇床。
Cease your advance, vile and flawed mammals, back to the land's pampering cradle.
去嘶声用你们肮脏的肺腑詈骂，去撕咬为每一粒石砾争夺。
Go screech with your dirty lungs, go fight over every pebble.
别再上前一步，因为此处的静寂不容亵渎。
Step no closer, for this silence tolerates no sacrilege.
侵占每一束阳光，汲取每一滴雨露，直到万物干枯。永不停歇，永无休止。
Claim each ray of sun, take every raindrop, until everything dries up. Never stopping, never ending.
沉溺在骄纵、仇恨和他人的苦痛中自得其乐。永不满足，永无尽头。
Wallow in pride, hatred, and others' pain. Never satisfied, never complete.
吞食大地的蛆虫，别用你们的触足玷污天空！
Earth-eating worms, don't soil the sky with your limbs!
用洗刷天空阴翳的沸血，去交换贯穿百目的长矛和一句箴言——
Trade boiling blood that cleanses sky's shadows for a spear through hundred eyes and this truth—
救赎不过是愚不可及的空想。
Redemption is but a dream foolish beyond reach.
可鄙的土地应当降下硫磺和盐卤。我誓要如此。
The wretched land deserves sulfur and saltwater. This I swear.
背叛的骗徒应当吞下焦炭和烈火。我本当如此。
The lying traitor should eat coal and fire. This I vow.
云层游移，雨水落下，溪涧流淌，河流逝去。
The clouds drift, the rain falls, the streams flow, the rivers pass...
往复的云层之下，我们忘记一切，重新开始往复的航行。
Under the cyclical clouds, we forget everything and start our endless journey anew.
你们为何渴求，为何呵护，为何毁坏，为何生活。
Why you yearn, why you protect, why you wreck, why you live...
生生世世，世世代代，为何仍在岁月的溪流里踽踽独行。
...life after life, age after age, why still wander alone in time's river?
哪怕出发的缘由早已在口口相传中褪色？
Even when your journey's purpose has faded through countless retellings?
