艾格勒示现在启目集上的话语已经彻底扭曲了……
What Aquila said in the enlightenment has been completely distorted...
启目集里还残存着艾格勒和塞涅俄丝的意志，但愿风堇能抵抗住这股力量的扰乱……
There are remnants of Aquila and Seliose's will left in the enlightenment. I hope Hyacine can resist this power's disruption...
闪烁着星光的纹路带，仿佛夜空中的绸缎。它的源头似乎是个谜。
A band of shimmering starlit patterns, like silk draped across the night sky. Its origin remains a mystery.
你想起星际网络上很火的各种「解压视频」，不知道拿剪刀把它剪断会不会同样解压。
You recall the popular "stress-relief videos" on the Interastral Network. You wonder if cutting it with scissors would be just as satisfying.
智库上记载，数十个琥珀纪前，「柔性线路板」在旧世科技产品的部件选择中占据主要地位——而这条光带看上去很是相似。

According to records in the data bank, tens of Amber Eras ago, "flexible circuit boards" were a dominant choice in the components of the Old World technology products. This glowing ribbon looks remarkably similar.
叶片间扑面而来的热风让人联想到列车上的控温系统，亦或是狂转的电脑风扇——或许，它们的作用一致。
The rush of hot air through the leaves is reminiscent of the temperature control systems on a train or the whirring fans of an overworked computer... perhaps they serve the same function.
你盯着墙上的排风口，伸手感受着气孔处传来的微风，想起了翁法罗斯的一句民谚：「艾格勒的叹息即是凡间的风暴。」里面会是哪位泰坦在呼吸吗？

You stare at the vent on the wall, reaching out to feel the faint breeze escaping from its perforations. A saying from Amphoreus comes to mind: "Aquila's sighs are the storms of the mortal realm." Could there be a Titan breathing within?
精美雕刻的通风口，设计与实用的结合之美证明它并非出自普通工匠之手。
The finely carved vent, a perfect blend of design and functionality, proves that it was not crafted by an ordinary artisan.
这路面碎得恰到好处，有种你在做梦的错觉。
The pavement is broken in just the right way, giving you the eerie sensation that you might be dreaming.
破碎的来路悬浮在空中，似乎并不被重力束缚。
The shattered path ahead floats in midair, seemingly unbound by gravity.
Turning back suddenly, you realize, the path you came from is no longer there.
意义不明的金属元件，其上的星月纹样强调着它从属于晨昏之眼、并非凡物。
An enigmatic metal component, adorned with star-and-moon patterns that clearly signify its belonging to the Eye of Twilight. It is no ordinary object.
这些元件里面传出了嘀嗒声，该不会——虽然可能性不大，但还是希望它别炸。
A ticking sound emerges from within the components. Could it be...? Though unlikely, you still hope it doesn't explode.
艾格勒用这些装置记录着翁法罗斯的历史，可惜你不具备阅读它们的能力。
Aquila used these devices to record the history of Amphoreus, but unfortunately, you lack the ability to read them.
装满卷轴的书匣，从它散乱的现况能看出其主人逃亡时的惊慌。
A book case filled with scrolls. Its disordered state reveals the panic of its owner during their escape.
你粗略地翻看了几张卷轴。数额巨大的欠条、太过晦涩的专著，以及你本不该着眼的日记……
You skim through a few scrolls. Massive debt notes, overly obscure treatises, and a personal diary you probably shouldn't be reading...
为什么要在这种危机关头打开书匣？你知道有人会在临死前格式化电脑磁盘，或许出于同一个道理。
Why open the book case at such a critical moment? You know some people choose to format their computer disks before death, perhaps for the same reason.
昔日流淌着黄金流体的圣烛此时暗淡无光，颓然地熄灭在黄昏的暮色里。
The sacred candle, once flowing with golden fluid, now lies dim and extinguished, helplessly fading into the dusk of twilight.
或许是因为再创世在即，四溢的神性也随之开始重新凝聚。你伸手触碰它，却没有得到任何回应。
Perhaps it is because the Era Nova is imminent, and the overflowing divine energy has begun to coalesce once more. You reach out to touch it, but receive no response.
门廊顶部的巨型圆灯投射出如日光般的光辉，如此高大的门扉，你不禁猜想，这扇门原本是为谁而设？
The giant circular lamp atop the porch casts a radiance akin to sunlight. Faced with such towering doors, you can't help but wonder: For whom were these gates originally designed?
门扉顶部的巨眼闪烁着苍白的光芒，它正审视着每一位胆敢靠近的访客。
The giant eye atop the door flickers with a pale light, scrutinizing every visitor who dares to approach.
大门上方的光源发出柔和的蓝光，在黎明与黄昏的交替中，它见证了翁法罗斯的兴衰。而你的出现，只是它漫长凝视中的一个瞬间。
The light above the gate emits a soft blue glow, witnessing the rise and fall of Amphoreus between dawn and dusk. Your presence is but a fleeting moment in its long, unwavering gaze.
壁画以金线勾勒出天文仪器、星座图谱与天象变化，艾格勒对翁法罗斯的观测与掌控跃然壁上。你不禁思考，当百眼凝视星空时，它看到了什么？

The mural, outlined in gold, depicts astronomical instruments, constellation charts, and celestial phenomena. Aquila's observation and control of Amphoreus come alive on the wall. You can't help but wonder: What did the Hundred Eyes see when it gazed upon the stars?
壁画上描绘着工具、酒杯与令人费解的器具，这是泰坦的象征，亦或翁法罗斯历史的剪影？或许两者皆是。
The mural depicts tools, goblets, and perplexing implements, symbols of the Titans, or perhaps glimpses of Amphoreus' history? Perhaps both.
纹金壁画在深色背景里熠熠生辉，记录着过往的故事与荣光。千百年过去，唯有这些死物依然闪耀。
The gilded murals shimmer against the dark background, recording stories and glories of the past. Thousands of years have passed, yet only these lifeless objects continue to shine.
曾经高悬的巨物们，如今已悉数落入金池。这会不会也是彼时天空之民们的一种写照呢？
The once-suspended giants have now all fallen into the golden pool. Could this also be a reflection of the Skyfolk from that time?
滚烫的黄金血沸腾翻涌，即便站在此处，你也感到了扑面而来的热浪烘烤着你的面颊。
The boiling golden blood churns and surges. Even standing here, you feel the scorching heatwave baking against your cheeks.
黄金裔身体里流着这样的血液？你真为他们感到担心。
The descendants of Chrysos Heir have such blood flowing in their veins? You truly feel concerned for them.
沸腾的池水散发着令人窒息的热量，有时候，最闪耀的黄金并非容器中的流体，而是甘愿为世界牺牲的魂灵。
The boiling pool emits suffocating heat. Sometimes, the most radiant gold is not the fluid in the vessel, but the souls willing to sacrifice themselves for the world.
熔炉涡心发出令人畏惧的光亮，泰坦的血液在此沸腾。你小心翼翼地站在边缘，感受着它的热量拍打脸颊。也许这就是黄金裔的归宿——回归星火，再创新生。

The vortex at the heart of the furnace emits a fearsome glow, where the blood of Titans boils. You cautiously stand at the edge, feeling its heat beat against your cheeks. Perhaps this is the destiny of the Chrysos Heir, to return to the starlit flames and be reborn anew.
你低头凝视，思考着这一切的由来。你觉得有人在呼唤你的名字，但四下无人——或许只是炉心的高温令你产生的幻觉。

You lower your head and gaze, pondering the origin of all this. You feel as though someone is calling your name, but no one is around, perhaps it's just an illusion brought on by the intense heat of the furnace core.
矗立数千年的建筑仿佛突然间从这个世界抽离，只留下泛着幽蓝萤光的虚影。
The structures that have stood for thousands of years seem to have suddenly been pulled away from this world, leaving only faint, glowing blue shadows behind.
你凝神观察，虚影的末端正以缓慢却无可置疑的速度侵吞着大理石，横切面如蠕虫般涌动。
You focus intently, observing as the edges of the shadow slowly but unmistakably consume the marble, the cross-section writhing like worms.
你不知道这意味着什么，但显然不是一个好兆头。
You don't know what this means, but it's clearly not a good sign.
这是离刻法勒最近之处，你的整个视野几乎都被他遮天蔽日的神躯占据。
This is the closest point to Kephale. Your entire vision is almost entirely occupied by their towering, sky-obscuring divine form.
你可以清晰地看见岁月在泰坦身上凿磨出的痕迹，而它胸口流淌的金血，似乎比往日暗淡了些。
You can clearly see the marks left by time on the Titan's body, and the golden blood flowing from their chest seems dimmer than before.
你呼唤泰坦的名字，只得到一段漫长的沉默。你甚至没有听到回音。
You call out the Titan's name, but only receive silence as an answer. Not even an echo can be heard.
逐火的使命走到了尽头。刻法勒缄默，曾流向大地的金血也已枯竭干涸。
The Flame-Chase mission has come to an end. Kephale remains silent, and the golden blood that once flowed across the land has dried up.
你想起在这里宴饮的时光，金血沉浮，为池水镀上亮色。友人举杯，谈笑间觥筹交错。
You remember the feasts held here — the golden blood shimmering in the pool, friends raising their glasses, laughter ringing through the air.
现在这里一片寂静。满目疮痍，触目可见的只有回忆。
Now, only silence remains. Ruins stretch before you, and all that lingers are memories.
温和的水流已经冷却。冰凉的池水颤动音管，水漫琴的音色似乎比平日更加凄清悠扬。
The once-warm waters have cooled. The trembling pipes hum as the cold water passes through them, making the sound of water lyre even more wistful than usual.
你感到寒意沿着双足攀上身体，唤起一股糅杂着悲凉与落寞的复杂情绪。
A chill creeps up from your feet, wrapping around your body, and stirring a mix of sorrow and solitude.
或许不该在这里停留太久……
Maybe you shouldn't stay here for too long...
拱卫圣城步道的塔楼曾是瞭望敌情的哨站，现在仿佛被剥离，空余盘踞在石峦上的虚影。
The towers that once guarded the holy city's pathways stood as watchposts against approaching threats. Now, they seem detached from time, mere shadows lingering on the stones.
难道这就是所谓的再创世，而你脚下的奥赫玛也会变成一片虚空？
Is this what Era Nova truly means? Will the Okhema beneath your feet also fade into nothingness?
不知道其中的卫兵如何了…你有些关心，毕竟那恐怕也是你即将面临的命运。
What happened to the guards stationed here? You wonder for a moment—perhaps because their fate might soon be yours.
驾驭大地兽向世界末日的最后一个黄昏奔去，留给翁法罗斯一个背影、一段传说，是个足够浪漫的好主意。
Riding a dromas into the last sunset of the world, leaving Amphoreus with only a legend and a silhouette from behind — sounds romantic enough.
可惜大地兽已经被巡街的队伍征用，不会再回应你的呼唤。
Too bad the dromas has already been requisitioned by the patrols. It won't answer you again.
浪漫和理智真的是天生一对吗？还是说，一对注定会煎熬到双双殉情的苦主？
Are romance and reason really a perfect pair? Or are they just doomed lovers, destined to burn out together?
木马安安静静地伫立在这里。或许，你错过了「早些时候」与它的交流，以及一个「约定」。
The wooden horse stands there, silent. Maybe you missed your chance to speak to it "earlier"... and the "promise" that came with it.
呵，来的正是时候，借着你提供的记忆做指引，我从门径的尽头攫来了一批新奇玩意，全都堆在里面了，商店大更新！
Ha! Just in time. With the memories you've given me as my guide, I grabbed a fresh batch of curiosities from the end of the Passage. They're all in there and the shop's got a major restock!
——当然，如果你想得到它们，你得用更多「记忆」来拿。我猜你明白这规矩。
Of course, if you want them, you'll need to pay with more memories. You know the deal.
Will there be more items later?
没了没了，不都说是门径的尽头了嘛——除非这世界重新来过，不然我也不知道上哪去给你找更多稀奇古怪的东西。
Nope, that's it. Didn't I just say it was the end of the Passage? Unless the world resets itself, I've got nowhere else to scavenge more weird and wonderful things for you.
再说，第二批了，还没买够？你的「记忆」可真多啊。
Besides, this is already the second batch. Still not enough for you? You must have a ton of memories to spare.
I want to have a chat with you.
哼，能和神驹对话可是种荣耀。要不是背井离乡，我本该向你收取报酬的…算了，你说吧。
Hmph. Consider yourself lucky — talking to a divine foal is an honor. If I hadn't left my hometown, I'd charge you for this... Forget it. Just speak your mind.
Where do you get your stock from?
命运之初，门径之末，塔兰顿家的屋顶上，瑟西斯常去的餐馆里——
The dawn of fate, the end of Passage, the rooftops of Talanton's estate, and Cerces' favorite restaurant...
当然，以上纯属胡诌，换言之就是「保密」。别问啦，只要知道都是珍品就行。
Obviously, I made all that up. In other words — classified information. Don't ask. Just know they're all treasures.
再创世？啊，那个预言！怪不得刚刚有怪物在，原来是变天了啊。我还让一个奥赫玛人在神驹里面躲了躲呢。
Era Nova? Oh, that prophecy! No wonder the monsters were acting up, I guess we're in for a ride. I even let an Okheman hide inside the divine foal for a bit.
嗯，好事，这代表我又能见到其他神驹们了。要是遇上那几个消极怠工的，我非得把它们的脑袋漆成绿的不可。
Eh, works for me. This means I get to see the other divine foals again. And if I run into those slackers, I swear I'm painting their heads green.
去吧，记得多准备些「记忆」！
Go ahead. Just don't forget to bring more memories!
哼，超级神秘商品——法吉娜曾经摆在寝宫内的海螺！
Hmph, the ultra-mysterious goods: Phagousa's conch! Straight from their royal chambers!
它的信徒们相信，只要你够虔诚，就能听见海螺壳对你诉说自然的美好。
Their followers believed that if you were devout enough, the conch shell would whisper the beauty of nature to you.
他们听没听见我不知道，但这海螺是真的能说。戳一下那根刺，听听看吧。
I don't know if they actually hear anything, but the conch does talk. Give that little spike a poke and listen for yourself.
The sound of nature echoed forth.
有意思吧？还没完呢，这东西和神驹有点像，把独特的记忆喂给它，它能「回忆」起更多音色。至于那些记忆去哪找…我进的货里就有，你可以抽空挑挑。

Intriguing, huh? But it's not over yet. This thing is a bit like a divine foal — feed it unique memories, and it will recall more tones. As for where to find those memories... I've got some in stock. Take your time browsing.
总之，现在它是你的了，拿去玩吧。
Anyway, it's yours now. Have fun with it.
等回到列车上，就把这东西<color=#dbc291ff>摆到留声机旁边</color>好了。
Once you're back on the Express, set this thing <color=#dbc291ff>right next to the phonograph</color>.
你将其记录…愿西风为人们带去宁静。
You record it... May the west wind bring peace to all.
记忆化作音色，流淌在海螺的「言语」中——你可以聆听其中之一，或是许多。
Memories take shape as tones, flowing through the conch's "words." You may listen to one... or many.
虹光洒落的地方…你的目光是不是也落在那里？
Where the rainbow falls... is your gaze there as well?
望着涡心闪烁的群星，你想起那位正支撑着天穹的医者。
Looking at the stars shining in the center of the vortex, you think of the healer who is currently supporting the sky dome.
她用精湛的医术疗愈伤口，用温柔的微笑弥合疮痕。她形单影只，肩负起重返天空的使命…即便神谕允诺的祝福只不过是诅咒的回音。

She heals wounds with her superb medical skills and mends scars with her gentle smile. She travels alone, shouldering the mission of returning to the sky... even though the blessings promised by the prophecy are but echoes of a curse.
无论在哪个世界，总有人秉持着守护的志愿，憧憬即将到来的明天。
No matter the world, there are always those who uphold a will to protect others, dreaming of the tomorrow that's yet to come.
She always bears the burden alone...
赛飞儿…不知道她还好吗？
Cipher... I wonder if she's okay?
为保护刻法勒的火种，赛飞儿只身拖延着盗火行者。但那黑衣剑士最终还是回到了奥赫玛，这难道意味着……
To protect the Coreflame of Kephale, Cipher delayed the Flame Reaver alone. But that black-robed swordmaster eventually returned to Okhema. Does this mean...
那位步伐轻巧的盗贼有的是脱身的手段，应该不会为了这种事搭上性命吧？可是，她真的不会吗？若如预言所说，最终只有一人得以觐见奇迹……

That light-footed thief has many ways of escaping. She wouldn't risk her life over something like this, right...? Would she really? But... if the prophecy is true... then only one person will ultimately witness the miracle...
「小灰子啊，你不会真信了这唬人的玩意吧？」你仿佛听见一声熟悉的讥笑在耳边响起。但待你凝神细听，却只听见浪声交叠。

"Gray Mystery, you don't really believe in this bluff, did you?" You seem to hear a familiar mocking laugh in your ear. But when you focus and listen closely, you hear nothing but the sound of waves intertwining.
没错…即便要付出一切，也应当把命运掌握在自己手里。
That's right... even if it costs everything, we should take control of our own fate.
你回想起车厢跨过云层被长枪洞穿的那一刻，那是冒险的伊始。在那之后，你目睹了燃尽血火的抗争，涉过月色下的花海…直到如今，主宰翁法罗斯命运的星辰渐次亮起。

You recall the moment the Express Car crossed the clouds and was pierced by the long spear. That was the beginning of the adventure. After that, you witnessed the strife that burnt out humanity's blood and walked through the sea of flowers under the moonlight... until now, when the stars that govern Amphoreus' fate are slowly lighting up.
在那星光之下，涡流仿佛被一股宁静而浩大的力量牵引，沉默地吞吐着水面的波澜。它未曾回应你的目光，更从未被你的思绪打动。

Under that starlight, the vortex seems to be quietly pulled by a vast and tranquil force, silently swallowing the waves on the water's surface. It never responds to your gaze, nor is it ever moved by your thoughts.
是不是每场旅途都会始于喧嚣，归于宁静？你有预感，故事并未就此结束。而新的故事会如何开启，将由你来见证。
Is every journey destined to begin in noise and end in tranquility? You have a premonition that the story isn't over yet, and you will be the one to witness how a new story begins.
这就是无名客的使命，不是吗？
That is the mission of the Nameless, isn't it?
「岁月」泰坦的神像，没有面孔，和你在命运重渊见过的颇为相似。
A faceless statue of the Time Titan stands here, much like the one you encountered in the Abyss of Fate.
它静静地注视着村落的一切，就像一棵历经风霜的树。
It stands in silent vigil over the village, like an ancient tree that has weathered countless storms.
或许这座小村庄确实有「岁月」的庇护，不然它怎么会像是完全不受岁月侵蚀一样？
Maybe this tiny village really is under the protection of "Time." How else could it remain so perfectly preserved against the ravages of time?
一阵恍惚涌上心头，你仿佛听见了来自往昔的声音。
A sudden dizziness washes over you. For a moment, you think you hear echoes from the distant past.
你胡说，一个下午怎么可能钓到四十条鱼？
You're making that up! How could anyone catch forty fish in just one afternoon?
Then where are these fish now?
那孩子，还是嚷嚷着要去外面看看…可万一遇上什么麻烦，我们在家里又帮不上忙，真放心不下啊。
The kid is still talking about going out to see the world... but I'm really worried. What if something happens to him out there, and we're too far away to do anything?
他已经长大了，咱们做父母的也得学着放手，总不能事事都按照自己的想法来。
Hey, he's not a child anymore. We parents have to learn to let go. We can't control everything in his life.
出去闯荡一番挺好的。哪怕什么都学不到，也比在家种麦子更能涨见识。
Heading out into the world is not a bad idea. Even if you don't learn a thing, it still beats staying home growing wheat.
…说的也是，那我去往他的行囊里多塞点面包。
...Fair point. I'll toss a few extra loaves into his pack before he goes.
破碎的战旗、折断的箭矢…在久远的过去，冥河之下似乎曾发生过激烈的战斗。
Tattered war banners and broken arrows... It seems a fierce battle took place beneath the River of Souls long ago.
等披索那小子再大一点，我就把这家传的宝弓交给他，教他射箭的本领。
Once Piso's a little older, I'll pass down the family's prized bow and teach him how to shoot properly.
以后，他会成为村里的新猎户。我也能好好歇歇，每天安心钓鱼、喝茶、享清福了。
One day, he'll be the village's new hunter. And I'll finally get to kick back — fishing, tea-sipping, living the good retired life.
哈哈，我就没那么省心了。我要是退休，村里一时半会可找不出能接班的老师。
Ha! I'm not as lucky as you are. If I retired, it'd be a while before this village found another teacher who could fill my shoes.
或许等白厄他学成归来之后，我也该去外面的世界走上一圈。
Maybe once Phainon returns, trained and ready, I'll take a trip myself and see what's out there in the world.
你看到有些长矛呈现出倾斜的角度，它们似乎从遥远的地方被人投掷到此。
You notice some spears lodged at an angle, as if they had been thrown here from afar.
丹恒曾经说过「击云从不离身」——现在想来，「击云」离身的次数还是挺多的。
Dan Heng once said, "Cloud-Piercer never leaves my side" — but in hindsight, it sure has left his side plenty of times.
桌上摆着水果蛋糕、水果馅饼，还有水果…看来庭院中的那位少女有着一双巧手，以及用来装甜食的第二个胃。
There's fruit cake, fruit pie, and... more fruit on the table... Looks like that girl in the courtyard's got magic hands and a second stomach just for sweets.
丰盛的食物静静陈列，仿佛在等待一场盛宴——或许将来的某天，你能与伙伴们在此齐聚、共同分享。
A feast laid out in silence, as if waiting for the party to start. Maybe one day, you and your companions will gather here and dig in together.
地毯、靠垫、柔软的枕头、解馋的零食…毫无疑问，这是一处精心布置的冥想点。
Cushions, rugs, soft pillows, and a stash of snacks... Yep, this is someone's carefully curated meditation corner.
据说命运泰坦的祭司们会长时间闭目打坐，以求进入某种通灵状态…不排除有人会在途中睡着。
Word is, the Fate Titans' priests meditate for hours, seeking spiritual clarity... though let's be real, some probably just doze off.
通往建筑内部的木门，似乎上了锁。你试着推了一下，只能听见合页发出吱嘎的抗议声。
The wooden door leading inside the building seems locked. You give it a push, and all you get is a cranky squeak from the hinges.
面朝大海，春暖花开…旁边还摆着不知谁人的钓竿。
Facing the sea, the flowers bloom in spring... and someone's fishing rod lies waiting nearby.
都说海钓的难度很高，但也不是非得钓到鱼才算是成功。
They say sea fishing's tough, but hey, landing a catch isn't the only way to win.
有时，洋流会送来意想不到的惊喜——比如一个漂流瓶，又或是一条自己蹦上岸的鱼。
Sometimes the currents bring surprises, like a drift bottle or a fish that jumps right onto shore.
装有成袋面粉的板车，似乎在等待船只将它们运走。
A cart stacked with sacks of flour, ready to be shipped out by boat.
麦粒与面粉是哀丽秘榭的主要物产，凝结着村民们的汗水与心血。
Grain and flour are key exports from Aedes Elysiae, each sack packed with the villagers' sweat and pride.
传说在翁法罗斯的神话故事中，悬锋城的某位英雄从出生起就被母亲倒提着浸入冥河之中，冥河之水被认为具有赋予人不死之身的神奇力量。
According to the myths of Amphoreus, a certain hero of Castrum Kremnos was dipped upside down into the River of Souls at birth by his mother, believing its waters would grant him invulnerability.
然而，由于这位母亲一直捏着英雄的脚踝，导致脚踝部位没有被冥河水浸泡到，从而留下了唯一「弱点」。
However, because the mother held him by his ankle, that spot remained untouched by the river, leaving a single weak point.
这冥河水真像故事中描绘的那么神奇？实践是检验真理的唯一标准，这里没有欧洛尼斯的奇迹保护你，你决定——

Is this river truly as miraculous as the legends say? There's only one way to find out — experimentation. After all, truth is tested through practice, and here, no miracle of Oronyx will protect you. You decide to —
实践又不一定要在自己身上嘛…
Wait a second... who says the experiment has to be on yourself?
装上一大桶，带回浴场大家用！
Scoop up a whole bucket and bring it back to the baths for everyone to try!
可惜冥河水并非是真正的水，它只是一种特殊的现象，是带不走的。
Unfortunately, the River of Souls isn't actual water. It's a phenomenon, something you cannot take with you.
不过，你可以试试回浴场号召那些喜欢的泡澡的朋友跟你一起过来。
But you could try rallying your bath-loving friends to come here and test it out with you.
看我把黑潮造物给推进冥河里。
See how I shove Black Tide Creatures into the River of Souls.
这些怪物真是倒了大霉了，成天自己吓自己，终于是被你吓到了。
Those monsters are seriously unlucky — scaring themselves all day long, only to end up getting scared by you instead.
「请问你掉的是这个金色的怪物，还是这个银色的怪物？」
"Tell me, did you drop this golden monster, or this silver one?"
「不好意思，是我来的不是时候。」
"Oh, my apologies. Seems I came at the wrong time."
「不诚实的孩子，如果我能惩罚你就惩罚你了。」
"Dishonest child. If only I could punish you..."
「诚实的孩子，如果我有怪物就给你发怪物了。」
"What an honest child. If I had a monster to give, I would offer it to you."
我什么都没看到，现编是吧？
I didn't see anything. You're just making this up, aren't you?
Wow, way to kill the immersion.
总之，冥河对黑潮怪物影响不大，再说了，这下面水太深了，你懂的。
Anyways, the River of Souls doesn't really do much to those monsters. And let's be real — this water runs deep.
总之先把球棒扎进去试试？
Might as well poke it with the bat and see what happens?
恭喜你得到了「不死的球棒」，它的弱点在你握住它的地方。
Congrats! You've obtained the Undying Bat! Its weak point is wherever you're holding it.
感觉也没什么可试的了。
Welp, that about covers all the experiments.
Or... I could try it myself.
为了你的大部分身体完整，为了不要「一不小心」就彻底掉进去——你的尝试先从「泡脚」开始。
For the sake of keeping most of your body intact and avoiding "a whoops," full submersion situation — you decide to start with just your feet.
以前常被人说「没有膝盖」，现在大不了就是「没有脚踝」嘛，物理意义的那种。
People always said I had no knees and can't jump. Now, worst case? I have no ankles. Physically speaking, of course.
哼，这就跟发信息一样的，不超出一段时间就可以撤回。
It's just like sending a message — if you don't leave it in too long, you can still unsend it.
Shove your limb in! No hesitation!
要是这冥河里有鱼的话，你这样做是能钓上来点什么的。
If there were fish in this river, this might actually count as fishing.
似乎是受了谁人的眷顾，你似乎毫发无损。
Someone or something must be looking out for you. You emerge completely unharmed.
也许，你从此拥有了无敌的脚踝——{NICKNAME}之踵！
Maybe... just maybe... you now have an invincible ankle. The legendary {NICKNAME}'s Heel!
以后开战，记得提醒对面朝着你的脚踝打。
Next time you're in battle, make sure to tell your enemies to aim for the ankles.
Perhaps time to get out of here.
此地不宜久留。你看，这附近也没有圣城卫士，一不小心掉进去了，都不知道谁能来捞你。
This is definitely not the place to linger. Look around — there aren't even any Holy City Guards nearby. If you fall in, who's pulling you out?
一个属于小妖精的房间…或者说是洞穴更贴切？
A room fit for a fairy... or maybe burrow is a better word?
小妖精们住在树洞里——不是泥土做的洞，也不是那种肮脏、湿漉漉的洞。
Fairies live in tree hollows — not dirt holes, and definitely not the dank, muddy kind.
如果去小妖精家里做客的话，头肯定会撞到门框吧。
If you ever visit a fairy's house, you might want to lower your head to avoid a collision with the door frame.
你努力凑近窗户，试图窥视屋内的陈设，却只能看见一团温馨的光。
You lean in close to the window, hoping to peek inside, but all you see is a soft, cozy glow.
专门为小妖精设计的信箱，里面塞满了五花八门的邮件——看来这些小家伙的书信往来相当热络。
A mailbox made just for fairies, stuffed to the brim with colorful letters. Seems like these little folks have a friendly game of pen pal going.
很大的蘑菇，不确定能不能吃，出于食品安全着想，最好还是慎重考虑吧。
That's a big mushroom. Not sure if it's edible or not. But for food safety's sake, better think twice before you make any moves.
道理都懂，但是蘑菇为什么能长得这么大？也许，这就是魔法的力量吧。
It's not like you don't know about safety issues... but why is this mushroom that big? Maybe it's the power of magic.
这扇木门的把手只与你的膝盖平齐，你必须弯下腰才能仔细端详。
This wooden door's handle barely reaches your knee. You'll have to crouch to get a proper look.
你弯下腰，试着拽了拽门，纹丝不动……
You crouch down and tug at the door. Not even a wiggle...
你弯下腰，在门上敲了两下——另一头也传来两下敲击声，似乎是为了表达抗议。
You crouch down and knock twice. Two knocks echo back from the other side, like someone's protesting against what you do.
门的那头只有一片寂静——看来无论你做什么，它都不会有任何反应了。
Now there's only silence on the other side of the door. No matter what you do, this door's done responding.
对小孩子来说，这架里拉琴的尺寸有点大，但对妖精们来说刚刚好。
A lyre way too big for a kid... but just the right size for a fairy.
一架被施了魔法的里拉琴，永远在自顾自地奏乐，无需任何掌声和打赏。
A lyre enchanted to play on its own, forever weaving melodies. No applause or tips required.
专门为小妖精设计的信箱，你从杂乱的信件中发现了属于自己的一封——
A mailbox designed specially for fairies. As you dig through the chaotic pile of letters, you spot one addressed to you.
亡语蝶们在死地飞舞，归往冥界的路途并不孤单。
The Eulogistic Butterflies flutter through this land of death. The path to nether realm is never lonely.
在不同文化中冥界的使者有着不同的面貌，而塞纳托斯的使者是蝴蝶…也许这意味着亡者们所奔赴的冥界是一片花海。
Different cultures depict nether realm messengers in different ways. For Thanatos, they take the form of butterflies... suggesting that the place where the deceased heads is a sea of flowers.
蝴蝶翅膀上的荧光正是亡灵们的象征，犹如身披一件死亡之衣。它们痛恨着，却又用爱拥抱着。
The ethereal glow on the butterflies' wings is the very essence of the deceased, as if draped in the cloak of death itself. They despise it. Yet they embrace it with love.
简单的防御工事——在城门口或重要通道处设置障碍物，以减缓敌人的进攻速度。
A simple defensive fortification — barricades set up at gates and key passages to slow the enemy's advance.
如今这些防御工事已不必再阻挡任何军队，不过是久远战场的一处例证罢了。
These barriers don't need to stop anyone now. They're just relics of a battlefield long gone.
仍然沸腾的炭火、倾倒的铁砧，却不见打铁的工匠。据说第一次与那位铁匠对话的勇士，都学会了「欢呼」的表达方式。
Still-glowing embers. A toppled anvil. But no blacksmith in sight. Legend has it that any warrior who speaks to that smith learns how to cheer.
「武器是战友，好好锻造的话，它绝对不会背叛你。」曾有位铁匠如此叮嘱着勇士。
"Your weapon is your comrade. Forge it well, and it'll never betray you." A smith once gave this advice to a warrior.
瀑布的流水急流而下，其中好似夹杂着过去的星辰。传闻中，翁法罗斯的一切水流都是{RUBY_B#海洋之泰坦}法吉娜{RUBY_E#}的血液。它们从四面八方汇集，流入真正的大海。

Water rushes down the waterfall, as if carrying with it stars of the past. Some say all the rivers of Amphoreus are the very lifeblood of {RUBY_B#Ocean Titan}Phagousa{RUBY_E#}, flowing ever onward to the true ocean.
在{RUBY_B#海洋之泰坦}法吉娜{RUBY_E#}的信徒中流传着这样一个说法：我们每个人都不过是一条条清浊难澄的河流。只有{RUBY_B#法吉娜}大海{RUBY_E#}才能容纳每一条河流，而不至于变脏。

Among the followers of {RUBY_B#Ocean Titan}Phagousa{RUBY_E#}, there is a saying: We are all impure rivers, unable to cleanse ourselves. Only the {RUBY_B#Phagousa}great ocean{RUBY_E#} can take us in without ever growing dirty.
巨大的龙脊骨型造物横亘在一旁。表面长满了杂草与野花，它与荒垣废墟融为了一体。
A massive, dragon-spine structure stretches on the side, overgrown with weeds and wildflowers. It's fused seamlessly with the surrounding ruins.
据说将龙牙撒入土地中，便能长出龙骨士兵。这条长长的脊柱并非来自巨龙尸体，而更像是龙的血肉流向土地，滋生出的奇特造物。

They say if you plant a dragon's tooth in the earth, skeletal soldiers will rise. But this massive spine isn't from Netherwing — it's as if the land itself drank in dragon's blood and birthed something... else.
房间的一角散落着数篇卷籍——残破的「日记」、「岁月祭仪册」、「对塞纳托斯与冥岸的调查记录」、「金色未归」…「若虫食性考」？

Scattered in the corner are a collection of tattered texts: "Journals," "Chronicles of Time Rituals," "A Record on Investigations Regarding Thanatos and the Nether Shore," "The Golden Unreturned"... and, uh... "A Study on Nymph Diets"?
两柄锃光瓦亮的长矛，矛柄积尘霭霭，这个房间的主人似乎从未产生使用它的想法。
Two spears shine brightly, their shafts coated in dust. Looks like their owner never actually planned on using them.
迷！还让不让人睡觉了？我要画个圈圈诅咒你！
Mem! Can I get some sleep around here!? I'm gonna put a hex on you!
眼前的妖精抬起手，开始凝聚力量——
The fairy at hand raises a hand and starts channeling some energy—
Close your eyes in pure dread.
Seriously? Can't we just keep our eyes open for once?
你闭上眼睛，等待了好一会儿…什么都没有发生。
You shut your eyes and wait... and wait... but nothing happens.
既没有变成奇美拉，也没有变成八十岁的{F#老婆婆}{M#老爷爷}——甚至不需要重新登录游戏。
No transformation into a chimera, no instant aging into a {F#granny}{M#grandpa}. You don't even have to log back into the game.
迷…难道是我宅家太久，魔法用不出来了？怎么会这样……
Mem... maybe I've been staying at home for so long that I can't even cast anymore? How could this happen...
那、那我祝你出门掉进树洞里迷！
W—Well! I hope you trip into a tree hollow the second you leave, mem!
专门为小妖精设计的信箱，里面空荡荡的，只有一封摊开的信件——
A mailbox designed specially for fairies. It's empty, save for one open letter.
「勿要打扰妖精的安眠，否则厄运将降临汝身。」
"Disturb not the slumber of the fairy, lest misfortune befall thee."
看来，信箱的主人把它当成了告示板。
Looks like the owner's turned the mailbox into a public notice board.
你看着远方明亮的光芒，心中杂乱如麻——经历过那么多故事之后，这里已经无法让你静下心来思考。
You stare out at the dazzling light in the distance, your thoughts tangled and restless. After everything you've been through, this place just can't calm your mind anymore.
或许是时候去别处整理思绪了，比如…一座世外的村庄？
Maybe it's time to clear your head somewhere else, like... a quiet little village beyond this world?
你在码头伫立，望见孤帆摇曳于遥远海平，水波粼粼，时间仿佛在此刻温柔停驻。
You stand at the dock, watching a lone sail sway on the distant horizon, the waves shimmering under the soft, frozen flow of time.
哀丽秘榭的时间，的确过得很慢。
Indeed, time seems to pass very slowly in Aedes Elysiae.
你想起自己第一次来到哀丽秘榭，是在来古士的叙述中。而当你从再创世的光中苏醒时，便已身处这方美好的小村落。
You remember hearing about Aedes Elysiae for the first time from Lygus's tales and when you awakened from the light of Era Nova, you found yourself in this peaceful village.
所有景象都与记忆中分毫不差。你一时难以弄清自己具体的所在，只好在这海滨一隅整理思绪。
Everything looks exactly as you remembered. You can't quite tell where or even when you are, so you take a moment by the sea to gather your thoughts.
祝祭庭院后的大树下有一片神奇的迷境，里面居住着妖精一族。你想起曾与你共同冒险的「粉色小狗」，有了它的祝福，你未来的岁月一定会轻柔如毛绒。

Behind the Sacrament Courtyard stands a great tree, beneath which lies a magical maze, home to the fairies. You remember the little pink puppy who once journeyed with you. With its blessing, your future days are sure to be as soft and warm as velvet.
如果迷迷还在的话，估计会和妖精们成为朋友吧？
If Mem were still around, she would've gotten along famously with the fairies, wouldn't she?
你在码头伫立，望见孤帆摇曳于遥远海平，水波粼粼，时间仿佛在此刻温柔停驻。
You stand at the dock, watching a lone sail sway on the distant horizon, the waves shimmering under the soft, frozen flow of time.
你想起那位生长于哀丽秘榭的少女，承载「岁月」的黄金裔。她曾以牺牲自我的代价重置时间，为翁法罗斯编织永不醒觉的长梦。
You recall the Chrysos Heir girl who once lived in Aedes Elysiae, bearer of the power of "Time." She had once sacrificed herself to reset the flow of time, weaving an endless dream for Amphoreus.
于「再创世」的尽头，你们再度相见了。少女仍挂着如魔法般迷人的微笑——与她在记忆中的模样分毫不差。
At the end of Era Nova, you met her again. Her smile, like magic, was just as you remembered.
她的身世，她的过往，以及她和你那位粉色旅伴的关系…少女清澈的面容被一片疑云笼罩着。好在你还有时间去认识她，与她分享彼此的秘密。

Her origins, her past, her connection to your pink-furred companion... The girl's clear face was shrouded in a cloud of suspicion. But for now, it's lucky that you still have time to know her better and share your secrets.
在下一次踏上旅途前，和昔涟好好相处吧。
Before you set off again, spend some time with Cyrene.
你在码头伫立，望见孤帆摇曳于遥远海平，水波粼粼，时间仿佛在此刻温柔停驻。
You stand at the dock, watching a lone sail sway on the distant horizon, the waves shimmering under the soft, frozen flow of time.
The weight of bearing the world...
你想起那位被称为「救世主」的白发少年，哀丽秘榭的白厄，负世与救世之人。历经三千万次轮回，以自身承纳火种，只为扭转世界毁灭的命运。

You think of the white-haired boy once hailed as the Deliverer, Phainon of Aedes Elysiae, bearer and savior of the world. After thirty million cycles of rebirth, he carried the Coreflame within himself, all to defy the world's doom.
如今的他成功了吗？你不知道。他已奔向直面「毁灭」的战场，将救世的责任托付于你。
Did he succeed by now? You don't know. He rushed toward the final battle against Destruction, entrusting the fate of salvation to you.
很久很久以前，他或许也曾站在此处，想像村庄之外的世界，等待着踏上英雄之旅——而今，你要接过他心中英雄的旗帜。

Long, long ago, he must have stood right here, too, dreaming of the world beyond the village, waiting for the day his journey as a hero would begin. And now, it's your turn to take up the banner he once carried in his heart.
「逐火是不断失却的旅途，在那一切当中，生命也微不足惜。」
"Losses are a constant on the Flame-Chase journey, among which even life itself holds little value."
毫无疑问，你曾在故事里见过这个庞大的木制道具，瞧它那高高昂起的头颅，以及宽广到足以装进好几个人的空洞腹部——所有特征都与你的认知相符。
No doubt you recognize this massive wooden prop from stories — its proud head held high, with a belly so big it could fit several people. Every detail matches what you know.
要在平时，你保准会冒出个钻进去看看的念头——很可惜，现在的你，是只巨大的扎格列斯之手。
Normally, you'd probably want to crawl inside and take a look, but unfortunately, you're the giant Hand of Zagreus right now.
No worries, I could crawl in anyway.
巨手慢慢靠近木马，它那木质毫无生气的脸上似乎染上了一丝疑惑。在事情变得无可挽回之前，你听到了「它」的声音。
The giant hand slowly nears the wooden horse. Its lifeless face seems to show a hint of confusion. Just before things go too far, you hear "its" voice.
救命——我被关在里面出不去啦！有没有哪位好心人，用伟大的翻飞之手把木马打碎，救我出去啊！
Help! I'm trapped inside! Is there anyone who'll use the mighty Whimsy Hand to smash this wooden horse and get me out?
I am afraid that will hurt you.
Looks like you're stuck in a bit of a stable situation!
木马没有回应，感觉有些古怪。但貌似你也没有别的选择——
The wooden horse doesn't respond — it feels a bit odd. But you don't really have a choice...
来了个好心人！一下不够，再来一下！快用伟大的翻飞之手把木马打碎，救我出去啊！
Looks like a helpful person showed up to save the day! One hit's not enough, hit it again! Use the mighty Whimsy Hand to smash the wooden horse and get me out!
I am afraid that will hurt you.
Looks like you're stuck in a bit of a stable situation!
木马没有回应，感觉有些古怪。但貌似你也没有别的选择——
The wooden horse doesn't respond — it feels a bit odd. But you don't really have a choice...
（为了救人，对这个木马使用冲拳吧。）
(Give this wooden horse a solid punch to save a life.)
桀桀桀！你上当啦！根本没有人被关进去！传说，这雅努斯的神驹里锁着非凡的宝贝，老巴特鲁斯拿它无可奈何，就等着你这样的翻飞控制员来把它打碎呢！

Hehehehe! You fell for it! No one's locked in there! The legend says there's a treasure hidden inside this divine foal of Janus. Bartholos couldn't do a thing about it — he was just waiting for a Whimsy controller like you to smash it to pieces!
桀桀…桀。唉，老巴特鲁斯人不在这，这段对话是自动答录。没治，宝物归你了，就当是对你「见义勇为」的奖赏吧！桀！真不甘心！

Hehehe... heh. *sigh* Bartholos isn't here, so this message is prerecorded. No way around it — treasure's yours now. Consider it a reward for your good deed! Heh! Can't say I'm not a little bitter, though!
虽然这鬼头鬼脑的声音如此解释，但你能感受到，真的有某种被囚禁了许久的神性，在对你道谢后，安然消散了——
Though that sneaky, eerie voice explains it all, you can sense something else — a divine presence, long trapped, that thanks you before fading away in peace...
毫无疑问，你曾在故事里见过这个庞大的木制道具，瞧它那高高昂起的头颅，以及宽广到足以装进好几个人的空洞腹部——所有特征都与你的认知相符。
No doubt you recognize this massive wooden prop from stories — its proud head held high, with a belly so big it could fit several people. Every detail matches what you know.
它为何会出现在这里？木马与艾格勒之间是否存在着些许渊源？呵，要想寻见真理，只有一个方法——
So why is it here? Could there be some connection between the wooden horse and Aquila? Heh, to uncover the truth, there's only one way—
这不是无名客该干的事。
This is not something a Nameless should be doing.
的确，管它木马还是木牛，还是等下次清闲时再来吧。
Indeed. Whether it's a wooden horse or a wooden cow, I'll come back for it later when I've got the time.
咕咚一声，你滑进了木质的容槽，内部远比外侧看上去更加宽广，但却残破不堪——还带着些许啃食的痕迹。
With a thud, you slide into the wooden container. The inside is much bigger than it looked from the outside, though it's in bad shape, with scratches and gnaw marks everywhere.
寂静。似乎除虚空外别无他物。你打量四周，在唯一一块还算完整的内壁上，有着一个发着微光的按钮状凸起，其上的文字意为——
Silence. There's nothing but emptiness. As you look around, you notice a glowing button sticking out on the only part of the inner wall that's still intact. The inscription reads—
Reach out and touch the inscription.
木马随着晨昏之眼的晃动摇曳着，按钮仍然在发亮。
The wooden horse sways with the motion of Eye of Twilight, the button still glowing brightly.
木马随着晨昏之眼的晃动摇曳着，按钮仍然在发亮。
The wooden horse sways with the motion of Eye of Twilight, the button still glowing brightly.
在落幕的斯缇科西亚，海妖公主缔造的欢宴仍在延续，仿佛要将酣歌带往来世……
In the twilight of Styxia, the Princess Sea Siren's grand feast lives on, as if the song and revelry will echo into the afterlife...
人群的兴致似乎格外高昂，为了不被拽去灌蜜酿，还是不要去打扰他们了。
The crowd's in really high spirits right now. Better not disturb them, or you'll definitely get dragged off and force-fed honey brew.
酣醉的众人正围着同样酩酊的飞天坛递起舞…好怪哦，还是绕路吧。
The drunken masses are dancing around an equally besotted Flying Amphora... it's weird. Let's take the long way around.
总有些东西是刻进人们DNA里的——就比如即便世殊时异，翁法罗斯壁画的美术风格也如出一辙。
Some things must be etched into our DNA. Like how, no matter how much the world changes, the art style on the Amphoreus murals looks exactly the same.
这幅壁画记录着「海洋」之泰坦的神迹：孕育汪洋、举办盛宴、降下蜜酿…以及鲜为人知的奉献——阻拦最初的黑潮。
This mural depicts the Miracle of Ocean Titan: birthing the ocean, throwing banquets, pouring honey brew... and one lesser-known act of dedication — fending off the first black tide.
彩虹桥你不是头一回走，瀑布也不是第一次见。但不得不说，从这个角度望过去，眼前的景致倒确实值得稍稍驻足欣赏一番。
It's not your first time crossing the rainbow bridge, and you've seen this waterfall before. But you must admit that from this angle, the view does deserve a moment's pause to take it all in.
无论走上多少次，你都担心会不会掉下去。艾格勒的动线设计对膀胱不是特别友善。
No matter how many times you cross, you always worry you'll fall off. Whoever designed Aquila's walkways wasn't thinking about, uh, bladder emergencies.
你一眼就看出这些瓶瓶罐罐必定价值不菲，但也仅限于此。要是白厄或者赛飞儿也在就好了——在鉴宝这方面，两位可都是行家。
One look, and you can tell these bottles must be worth a fortune — but that's as far as your appraisal skills go. If only Phainon or Cipher were here. Those two are pros when it comes to treasure.
你的目光下意识落在那个金紫相间的瓶子上——无论强烈的撞色还是浮夸的形制，它绝对符合某人的审美。
Your eyes are instinctively drawn to a bottle of clashing gold and purple. Loud colors, an over-the-top shape... yeah, definitely someone's taste to a tee.
斯缇科西亚的蜜酿果然名不虚传——即便隔着厚重的木桶，你依旧能嗅到浓郁的甘美与醇香。
Styxia's famed honey brew does live up to its name — even through thick barrels, you can still catch the sweet, heady scent of richness and depth.
据说葡萄蜜酿的风味取决于葡萄的产地与品种。譬如斯缇科西亚的红葡萄蜜酿口感颇为干涩醇厚，而麦迪特瑞恩的白葡萄蜜酿则更加清爽酸甜。

They say the taste of grape honey brew depends on the origin and variety of the grapes. Styxia's red grapes brew up robust and dry, while Mediterrana's whites lean crisp, tangy, and refreshingly light.
除去饮品之外，葡萄蜜酿还常被斯缇科西亚人用作烹饪的佐料，用以增加食物的口感与风味…可惜你只能在幻境中品尝了。
Apart from drinking it, the people of Styxia also use grape honey brew as a seasoning in cooking to enhance both flavor and texture. Pity you can only taste it in a fantasia.
蜜酿、果品、珍馐、美馔，此处应有尽有，在斯缇科西亚要格外注意肠胃健康。
Honey brew, fruits, rare delicacies — Styxia has it all. Just be kind to your stomach while you're here.
架子顶端的神秘水果据说是来自阿玛佐恩斯的战利品——一个遥远而炎热的大陆，在此世被凯撒征服——有着黄金色泽与龙鳞般的外壳…等等，这不就是个菠萝？

That strange fruit perched high on the shelf is said to be a treasure of war from the Amazonis — a sweltering land far away, conquered by the Imperator in this life. Golden in hue, armored like dragon scales... wait. Isn't that just a pineapple?
晕乎乎——坛子晕乎乎——飞来又飞去——飞去又飞来——晕…停停停，别看了，再看你也要晕了。
Whoa, dizzy... those amphorae are flying... spinning... looping... Okay, okay, stop looking, or you'll start spinning too.
只能说不愧是斯缇科西亚，就连飞天坛递都喝大了，估计泰坦来了也得喝上两杯才能走。
Only in Styxia would even the Flying Amphora be hammered. Even Titans would probably need at least a couple of drinks before leaving.
眼前飞来飞去的坛递让你不由陷入沉思——这玩意算是醉驾吗？超速了吗？
You watch these floating amphorae wobble through the air and wonder... does that count as flying under the influence? Are they speeding?
能吞下万物的圣杯，以法吉娜的残骨所造。数千年前，海妖们便是凭借此番圣物，与「毁灭」的洋流抗争至身消玉陨。

The chalice that swallows all things, crafted from the remains of Phagousa. Thousands of years ago, the sea sirens wielded this divine object to defy the tides of Destruction until their bones were all that remained.
满溢之杯的遗物，一盏无底的骨杯，拥有调控水流的力量——不要跳进去洗澡，不然可保不准你会沉到什么地方。
A relic of the Chalice of Plenty, a bottomless bone chalice, possesses the power to command the currents. Whatever you do, don't try bathing in it... unless you fancy drowning in unknown depths.
你不是第一次置身海底，只可惜，此时此刻， 那位与海渊源颇深的挚友不在你的身边……
This isn't your first time beneath the sea. It's just this time, that old friend who shared a deep bond with the sea isn't here to see it with you...
翁法罗斯的海洋如蓝宝石般剔透，在无人知晓的旧日，美丽的「海洋」眷属就在其间起舞…这场幻境的造主也不例外。
The Amphoreus' ocean sparkles like sapphire. In forgotten days, those fair Kins of Ocean danced beneath the waves — and the one who forged this fantasia was no different.
看那遥远的废墟，曾是海洋女王的宫殿，它与她的孩子们曾在那里经历了一段短暂的美好时光…以及一段漫长的痛苦岁月。
Look there, that distant ruin, once the palace of the Ocean Queen, where she and her children knew a fleeting moment of joy... and a long, bitter eternity of sorrow.
流淌金血的英雄们，曾怀着野望启航——而他们的坟茔却只是一艘沉船，冰冷的海水冲淡一腔热血海，谎言将忠诚埋葬。
Heroes of golden blood once set sail, their hearts ablaze with ambition... only to find their graves in a sunken wreck, their passion washed away by icy seawater, their loyalty buried beneath lies.
你之前可从未想过，在深海之下，竟然也能看到星星。或许，这也是她心中渴望的景象。
You'd never imagined that deep below the sea, you might glimpse stars. Maybe that's what she always longed to see.
据说某个眼睛掉色的人，曾在繁星遍布的地底获得一捧神奇的骨灰，后来他就成了王。或许你也可以试试呢？
Legend speaks of a man with fading eyes who claimed a handful of magic bone ashes beneath a starry underworld, and became a king. Perhaps you, too, could try your luck?
在你到来之前，此处只有停滞的时光、荒芜的鲸骨、永恒的寂静，以及只属于某人的等待与孤独。
Before you arrived, there was only still time, barren whale bones, eternal silence, and someone's long, lonely wait.
她带着王的罪孽与英雄的夙愿，让这次的故事为你驻足。而你已翻开了新的一页，待到下次的故事里再来重逢。

She bore the sins of a king and the wishes of a hero, and for that, this chapter paused to welcome you in. But your story has turned to a new page. Come find her again, next time when the tale begins.
不再流动的瀑布，如琥珀封印鱼群。就好似被困于此的歌者，那被命运禁锢的一生。
The waterfall no longer flows, its fish frozen mid-leap as if in amber — just as fate has bound the singer whose life remains sealed within.
致那些为了逐火而牺牲的黄金裔们——他们的命运不为神谕所示，却不因其微渺而自惭自卑，决然地将金血挥洒于逐火的道路。

To the Chrysos Heirs who gave their lives chasing flame — Their fates were not foretold by prophecy, yet they bore no shame in their insignificance. With unwavering resolve, they shed golden blood along the Flame-Chase Journey.
「断锋爵」拉比努斯，生于光历<unbreak>3743</unbreak>年，逝于光历<unbreak>3960</unbreak>年。
"Dux Fragoris" Labienus. Born Light Calendar <unbreak>3743</unbreak>. Deceased Light Calendar <unbreak>3960</unbreak>.
「冬霖爵」塞涅卡，生于光历<unbreak>3749</unbreak>年，逝于光历<unbreak>3960</unbreak>年。
"Dux Brumalis" Seneca. Born Light Calendar <unbreak>3749</unbreak>. Deceased Light Calendar <unbreak>3960</unbreak>.
「吟风爵」维吉妮娅，生于光历<unbreak>3853</unbreak>年，逝于光历<unbreak>3960</unbreak>年。
"Dux Carminum" Verginia. Born Light Calendar <unbreak>3853</unbreak>. Deceased Light Calendar <unbreak>3960</unbreak>.
「曳石爵」阿波罗尼，生于光历<unbreak>3704</unbreak>年，逝于光历<unbreak>3960</unbreak>年。
"Dux Helkolithist" Apollonius. Born Light Calendar <unbreak>3704</unbreak>. Deceased Light Calendar <unbreak>3960</unbreak>.
At the end of the long epitaph...
「律法之半神」，「凯撒」刻律德菈…逝于光历3960年。
Cerydra the Imperator, the Demigod of Law... Deceased Light Calendar 3960.
致那些为了新世界而献身的黄金裔们——他们的命运谨如神谕所示，也许无论时空如何轮转，都会恰逢世界所需之时降世，只为行其职责、全其夙愿。

To the Chrysos Heirs who gave their lives for a new world — Their fates, as foretold by prophecy, are to be born whenever the world needs them, irrespective of how time and space may shift, all to fulfill their duty and answer their calling.
「大地之半神」荒笛，生于光历前约<unbreak>2000</unbreak>年，逝于光历<unbreak>3961</unbreak>年。
Terravox, the Demigod of Earth. Born approx. <unbreak>2000</unbreak> years before the Light Calendar system. Deceased Light Calendar <unbreak>3961</unbreak>.
「浪漫之半神」阿格莱雅，生于光历<unbreak>3860</unbreak>年，逝于光历<unbreak>4210</unbreak>年。
Aglaea, the Demigod of Romance. Born Light Calendar <unbreak>3860</unbreak>. Deceased Light Calendar <unbreak>4210</unbreak>.
「死亡之半神」遐蝶，生于光历？？？年，逝于光历<unbreak>4253</unbreak>年。
Castorice, the Demigod of Death. Born Light Calendar ???. Deceased Light Calendar <unbreak>4253</unbreak>.
「纷争之半神」迈德漠斯，生于光历<unbreak>4071</unbreak>年，逝于光历<unbreak>4284</unbreak>年。
Mydeimos, the Demigod of Strife. Born Light Calendar <unbreak>4071</unbreak>. Deceased Light Calendar <unbreak>4284</unbreak>.
「门径之半神」缇里西庇俄丝，生于光历<unbreak>3720</unbreak>年，最后一位逝于光历<unbreak>4295</unbreak>年。
Tribios, the Demigod of Passage. Born Light Calendar <unbreak>3720</unbreak>. The last piece of her deceased in Light Calendar <unbreak>4295</unbreak>.
「诡计之半神」赛法利娅，生于光历<unbreak>3942</unbreak>年，逝于光历<unbreak>4534</unbreak>年。
Cifera, the Demigod of Trickery. Born Light Calendar <unbreak>3942</unbreak>. Deceased Light Calendar <unbreak>4534</unbreak>.
「理性之半神」阿那克萨戈拉斯，生于光历<unbreak>4065</unbreak>年，逝于光历<unbreak>4534</unbreak>年。
Anaxagoras, the Demigod of Reason. Born Light Calendar <unbreak>4065</unbreak>. Deceased Light Calendar <unbreak>4534</unbreak>.
「天空之半神」雅辛忒丝，生于光历<unbreak>4297</unbreak>年，逝于光历<unbreak>4602</unbreak>年。
Hyacinthia, the Demigod of Sky. Born Light Calendar <unbreak>4297</unbreak>. Deceased Light Calendar <unbreak>4602</unbreak>.
在墓志铭的末尾，一行尚未刻完的铭文——
At the end of the epitaph, a line left unfinished...
「海洋之半神」海列屈拉，生于光历3860年，逝于光历    年。
Helektra, "Demigod of Ocean." Born Light Calendar 3860. Deceased Light Calendar .
把水中留给鱼儿，先上岸吧
Let's leave the water to the fish and get back to shore.
The Sea of Souls is endless. Swim to the shore.
你在码头伫立，望见孤帆摇曳于遥远海平，水波粼粼，时间仿佛在此刻温柔停驻。
You stand at the dock, watching a lone sail sway on the distant horizon, the waves shimmering under the soft, frozen flow of time.
是时候启程了，去做英雄该做的事。
It's time to depart — to do what heroes must.
经历了那么多故事后，你的内心已不再有彷徨。望着眼前的黄昏——亦或是朝阳，你决定迈开脚步。
After all these stories, your heart no longer wavers. Before you — whether this be twilight or dawn — you take the first step.
Have you heard about those fish beyond the sky...
But would they be better boiled... or grilled?
我看你要走上白日梦的命途了。
I see you're taking the Path of Delusion.
当不成泰坦，还可以当星神…
Can't make it as a Titan? There's always the Aeon path...
Advanced studies from beyond the sky...
...when in doubt, a quantum scientist did it?
Since when did our drillmaster start teaching dance?
Mind your footwork! The dance floor is just another battlefield!
Twelve volumes finished...? We're only getting started.
I'm writing it right now. Get off there.
The Dux Carminum asked me to do her a favor...
... and buy a copy of Tale of the Winterlands.
I've found my one true love.
Titan versus Aeon, whose side would you take?
Neither. There's always something greater beyond.
My Great Imperator, how did you end up...
...looking so much like a grape today?
I'd rather stay cozy at home.
…对，据说活得太久啊，会得一种叫「魔阴身」的病。就跟泰坦似的发疯…然后爆炸！
Yeah, they say if you live too long, you be struck by something called "mara." Makes you go crazy like a Titan, and then... BOOM!
这么吓人？咱们可都活了不少日子…别跟到了天外之后，反而活不长了。
That sounds frightening! We've all been around for quite some time... I hope we don't go to the beyond only to find our lifespans cut short.
那不用担心，是病就有得治…听说天外有一种特效药，好像叫什么「模因生命」…
No need to worry. Every illness has its remedy... I heard there's a wonder medicine beyond the sky called "memetic life" or something...
别瞎掰了，赶紧给它运走，不然这些坛子过会儿吐你身上…
Quit your nonsense and move these brew jars before they spew all over you...
What~ do~ you~ like~ to~ eat?
我~喜~欢~吃~说~话~特~别~慢~的~鱼~
I~ like~ to~ eat~ fish~ that~ talk~ slow~
看来你注意到了，应星手上的游龙臂鞲跟你手上的出自同一名工匠，是*同一对*。
So you noticed. The Roaming Dragon Bracer on Yingxing's arm and the one on yours were made by the same craftsman. They're a matching pair.
我知道，那也是你留下来的。
I know. It was also left behind by you.
我曾与应星约定，各自持有其中一只，这是作为战友的信任与默契。但在你的记忆里，星核猎手刃…也就是「后来的应星」，一直在纠缠着你。

Yingxing and I made a promise to each keep one of them, a testament to our trust and camaraderie as comrades. But in your memories, that Stellaron Hunter Blade... or I should say "what became of Yingxing," has been haunting you.
我们已经交手过很多次了，不过回想起来，他的手上…却没有佩戴这只臂鞲。
We've crossed blades countless times already, but thinking back... he never wore this bracer.
是么，放不下过去的人，却能抛舍旧物。那你呢？你既已决心与过去告别，为何还留着这只臂鞲？
Really? Someone who can't let go of the past, yet can throw away old belongings. What about you? If you're so determined to bid farewell to the past, why do you still keep this bracer?
在你看来，和过去告别是将所有的「过去」都扔掉吗？
To you, does letting go of the past mean throwing away everything that was "past"?
丹枫留下的物什，丹枫的名字，丹枫的力量…舍弃它们，就能意味着与过去告别吗？
Dan Feng's belongings, Dan Feng's name, Dan Feng's strength... Would abandoning them truly mean saying goodbye to the past?
So you're saying it's just "running away"?
不错。我认为决心与过去告别，并非「看不见」，而是「视之如常」。
Exactly. I believe that being determined to bid farewell to the past isn't about "not seeing it," but rather "seeing it as ordinary."
这只游龙臂鞲在你眼中，它是战友的信任与默契；在我看来，它只是支工巧的臂鞲，趁手，好用…陪伴我至今，又何必刻意摘下。

To you, this Roaming Dragon Bracer represents trust and camaraderie between comrades. To me, it's just a well-crafted bracer: practical and convenient... It's been with me all this time, so why bother taking it off?
在我醒来时，它和「击云」、玉佩一同伴身，我想它应该对我有过特殊的意义。
When I woke up, it was there alongside Cloud-Piercer and the jade pendant. I suppose it must have held some special meaning to me.
至于另一只的主人，如何处理他的旧物，因故遗失、决心抛舍…或彻底封藏，是他的事情……
As for the owner of the other one, how he deals with his old possessions, whether lost by accident, discarded by choice, or sealed away forever — that's his business.
接纳过去，并赋予它独属于我的意义，这便是我的做法。
I accept the past and give it meaning that belongs to me alone. That is my way.
告别过去，就意味着接纳过去。
Saying goodbye to the past means accepting it.
...Why bring up these bracers all of a sudden?
Just seeing it reminded me of someone, that's all.
与你告别过去不同，我就是过去本身，我怀念与那四人出生入死的时光。
Unlike saying goodbye to your past, I am the past itself. I miss those life-and-death moments with those four.
…所以，谢谢你，留着这只臂鞲。于你，它只是件巧匠装备；于我，它意义非凡。
...So, thank you for keeping this bracer. To you, it's just a craftsman's handiwork. But to me, it means much more than that.
不客气，我也未曾想过它还会与曾经的主人再次相遇。
It's nothing. I just never expected it to meet its former owner again.
行了，闲聊作罢，继续前进吧。
Alright, enough chit-chat. Let's keep moving.
嘻，又见面了呀，勇敢的「开拓」小灰鸟♭
Hehe, fancy meeting you again, brave Little Trailblazing Graybird ♭
The memory... is talking to me?
吓到了？哀丽秘榭的微风，可不该把你的心弦吹得如此紧绷，放轻松点。
Surprised, are you? The gentle breeze of Aedes Elysiae shouldn't have pulled your heartstrings so taut. Relax.
别忘记，我已经履行约定，退行到了无尽的长夜当中。现在我们的会面，还有我接下来要和你说的话，都是我提前留下的有关「告别」的碎片。
Don't forget, I've already fulfilled my promise and regressed into the eternal night. Our meeting now, and the words I'm about to share, are fragments of "farewell" that I left behind in advance.
记得是谁说，要以彼之道还彼之身，你们的计划不也很精彩吗？
As someone once said, fight fire with fire. Your plan was rather splendid too, wasn't it?
不留下点让人猜不透的事情，我怎么甘心就此消失呢？
How could I just vanish without leaving behind a few lingering riddles?
记忆要怎么知道我的反应？
How would a memory know my reaction?
你猜猜？「无漏净子」的无漏，说不定也是算无遗漏的无漏？
What do you think? The "Anāsrava" in "Pure Child of Anāsrava" might actually mean "without omission"?
回想一下我们不长不短的照面，你对我始终警惕，我们甚至没有为一场正式的「告别」留出足够的空间，不是吗？
Thinking back to our brief yet lingering encounters, how wary you were of me. We never even had the time for a proper "farewell," did we?
没办法，我扮演的是不太讨喜的角色。若是不打个招呼就离开，可不得被你一直记恨着？所以，最后的最后，我得唤醒一些你的「美好回忆」……

That can't be helped, the role I'm playing isn't exactly likeable. If I left without saying goodbye, wouldn't you hold a grudge against me forever? So, for one final time, I decided to stir up a few of your "pleasant memories"...
回想一下，在你离开哀丽秘榭，回到逐火的开端时——
Think back to when you left Aedes Elysiae, back to the beginning of the Flame-Chase...
你的旅程异常顺利。毕竟，逐火之旅的众人因一道<color=#dbc291ff>欧洛尼斯</color>的神谕相信了「天外的救世主」会降临在翁法罗斯……

Your journey has been exceptionally smooth. After all, the people of the Flame-Chase Journey believed in a prophecy of <color=#dbc291ff>Oronyx</color>, and were convinced a "Deliverer from beyond the sky" would descend upon Amphoreus...
那是你故意透露给他们的？
Did you deliberately leak that to them?
没错，他们可不知道你们的名字，以及<color=#dbc291ff>真正的星空</color>。
Exactly. They don't know of your names, nor the <color=#dbc291ff>true starry sky</color>.
欧洛尼斯到底是怎么知道的？
How did Oronyx find out then?
别忘了，欧洛尼斯一直在倾听着长夜密语。仅凭它自己，可不知道你们的名字，以及<color=#dbc291ff>真正的星空</color>。
Don't forget, Oronyx has been listening to the whispers of the night. By themself, they wouldn't know of your names, nor the <color=#dbc291ff>true starry sky</color>.
三月七的愿望不止是让你们突破终极协议那么简单…她希望你们旅程顺利，我所做的不过是举手之劳，至少那位「凯撒」做出了正确的判断，对吗？

March 7th's wish wasn't just about helping you break through the ultimate protocol... She hoped your journey would go smoothly. What I did was merely lend a hand. At least that Imperator made the right call, don't you think?
Even if you hadn't done all that...
就直率地接受我的好意如何呢？
Why not just accept my kindness, plain and simple?
你看，我始终记得三月七保护你的心愿……
You see, I never forgot March 7th's wish to protect you...
她知道我的底牌是她，我同样知道，她的底牌是你们。
She knows I'm holding her as my trump card, and I know just as well that you all are hers.
你，还有丹恒，你们给了三月七独一无二的回忆。假如是你们两个和她站在天平的两端充作砝码，她也会毫不犹豫地选择你们。
You and Dan Heng, you've given March 7th memories that are truly one of a kind. If she was placed on opposite sides of a scale from you two, she would choose you both without a moment's hesitation.
所以，我要留给你一个问题。<color=#dbc291ff>假如有一天，三月七走在了和你截然不同的道路上……</color>
So, I'll leave you with a question. <color=#dbc291ff>What if one day, March 7th walks down a path completely different from yours...</color>
你会选择她，还是你的道路呢？
Will you choose her, or your own path?
I can't answer that right now.
I know the answer for sure...
三月七的路就是我的路。
哈！不必急于给出答案，更不必对着你眼前的「长夜月」苦苦思考，这只是我离开前留下的一道「记忆」残影。
Ha! No need to rush for an answer, and certainly no need to rack your brain for the "Evernight" before you. This is merely a lingering shard of memory I left behind before departing.
我始终潜藏在「记忆」的黑色瀑流之后看着你们，注视着你们行进中的「开拓」。
I've always been lurking behind the dark torrents of "Remembrance," watching all of you, observing your "Trailblaze" as you progress.
把你的答案藏在心底，直到那个问题真正到来的那天。或许你心中的答案与此时此刻相比，已经发生了变化呢？
Keep your answer hidden in your heart until the day that question truly arrives. Who knows? Perhaps by then, your answer will have changed from what it is right now.
无论如何，三月七爱着你们，不要辜负她的心愿。
No matter what, March 7th loves you all, so don't let her wishes be in vain.
好啦！最后的告别已经完成，现在，迎来一次真正的「忘却」吧♭
Alright! That's the last farewell. Now, welcome a true "Oblivion," will you? ♭
「长夜月」的记忆残影彻底消退，仿佛从未在这里出现过，眼前只有哀丽秘榭的温柔海风和无尽夕阳。
The memory shard of "Evernight" fades away completely, as if it had never appeared here. All that remains is the gentle sea breeze of Aedes Elysiae and the endless sunset.
你突然感到，从未如此迫切地想念{RUBY_B#星穹列车}家{RUBY_E#}，还有三月七的声音。
Suddenly, you feel an aching longing for your {RUBY_B#Astral Express}home{RUBY_E#}, and for March 7th's voice.
感谢你，吉奥刻勒斯，是你说服了树庭的学者，让我能够来此访学。
Thank you, Geocles, for convincing the scholars of the Grove to let me study here.
就算是学术氛围包容的神悟树庭，人们也会惊讶于访问学者是一头大地兽，而非一名山之民…解释起来可是费了我不少功夫。

Even in the tolerant academic atmosphere of the Grove of Epiphany, people were surprised that the visiting scholar was a dromas rather than a Mountain Dweller... It took quite some effort to explain that one.
不过那都不重要，老友，告诉我，还有什么需要我为你做的？
But none of that matters, old friend. Tell me, what else can I do for you?
你已经做了很多了，我的老友。我来这里只是想借助学者的投影装置，再看看旧日的星空。
You've done more than enough, my old friend. I'm just here to use the scholar's projection device to gaze upon the starry skies of days past.
身为「大地」的子民，却要仰望星空？
As children of Earth, must we gaze up at the stars?
呵呵，正是因为我们是「大地」的子民，才要仰望星空。
Heh, it's precisely because we're children of Earth that we must gaze up at the stars.
曾经有学者说，所谓「星空」并非是高天之上的灯火——而是一片片遥远的「大地」。
A scholar once said that the starry sky isn't just a collection of lights up above, but rather, endless distant stretches of "earth."
老友，你能想象吗？那里也有一片高山，一片原野，无数的生灵在那里奔跑。
My old friend, can you imagine? There's mountains and plains there too, with countless creatures running free.
不，我的身躯不如你高大，没法看到那么远。
No, I'm not as tall as you. I can't see that far.
光是注视着山之民与奥赫玛之间一触即发的态势，我便无心再关注其他了。
Just watching the tension building between the Mountain Dwellers and Okhema leaves me no room to think of anything else.
算了，我只是太过紧张了，你尽可以仰望星空，事情还没有那么糟糕。
Never mind, I'm just being overly anxious. You're free to look up at the stars. Things aren't that bad yet.
老友，你关注着我们眼前那迫近的命运，这正是我们并肩走到了现在的原因……
Old friend, you've been watching that approaching destiny before us, and that's exactly why we've made it this far together...
…我也邀请你与我一同仰望星空，那里有着我们未来的命运，它将决定我们能走多远。
Let me invite you to gaze at the stars together. Therein lies our future destiny, the compass of all we may achieve.
未来的命运？在那样的命运之中，还会有你我吗？
The future destiny? In such a destiny, will you and I still exist?
…恐怕那时，无论是你，还是我都将不复存在。
...I'm afraid by then, neither you nor I will exist anymore.
但是命运不光是某个瞬间。我们的命运将交由吉奥里亚的后裔们，后裔们的命运还将交给更加遥远的未来，这才是命运的呈现方式。
But destiny isn't just a single moment. Our destiny will be passed on to the descendants of Georios, and theirs into the hands of a future even farther away. That's how destiny manifests itself.
到那时接过命运的，即便不是吉奥里亚的后裔也无妨…是刻法勒的后裔也好，是来自繁星之中的天外来客也罢，我们的命运将行于他们的道路上。
When that time comes, those who inherit our destiny, be they descendants of Georios or Kephale, or visitors from beyond the sky, our fate shall follow their path.
天外？那…吉奥里亚赠予你我的「大地」会怎样？
Beyond the sky? Then... what about the "Earth" that Georios bestowed upon us?
大地从来就不止是某处的土地。只要有生灵驻足的地方，便会有大地——大地，只取决于我们伫立于何处。
Earth was never just a piece of land somewhere. Wherever life dwells, there is Earth — Earth exists wherever we choose to stand.
不小心聊了这么久…走吧，学者恐怕已经等待我们很久了。
We've been chatting for far too long... Let's go, the scholar's been waiting for us already.
今天，我也学着仰望一下星空吧。
Today, I'll try looking up at the starry sky too.
Greetings, traveler! Welcome to the Great Tomb!
如你所见，我处在这个奇怪符号的圆心，下面还有一双手托住我尊贵的机械躯体。
Look at me, positioned right at the center of this mysterious symbol, with hands underneath supporting my prestigious mechanical body.
所以我就是这里的墓主喀！
Which makes me... the owner of this tomb, crrk!
{RUBY_B#下面这句话在向你「问好」}哦，你好，亲爱的旅人！{RUBY_E#}
{RUBY_B#意思是「如果你卡关了」}倘若你四处寻路，却只能徒劳徘徊…{RUBY_E#}
{RUBY_B#This means "if you're stuck"}If you're searching for a way but end up just going in circles...{RUBY_E#}
{RUBY_B#它在提示你怎么出去}去改换昼夜吧，你会发现，出路或许就在我的身下。{RUBY_E#}
{RUBY_B#It's telling you how to get out}Change between day and night, and you'll find your exit path right under where I stand.{RUBY_E#}
呀，都怪我的第二虫格，把我的潜台词全部说出来了喀！
Oops! My other half just spilled it all out, crrk!
当我醒来时，这是无限大！
But when I arise, it shows an infinity of greatness!
符号的真理，我已解明喀！
I have deciphered the truth of this symbol, crrk!
我感到身下的电流奔腾不息，我听到电荷在我的外壳上滋滋作响！
I feel endless currents flowing beneath me, and hear electrical charges sizzling against my outer shell!
不过…快充会不会有些伤机体呢？
Though I wonder... isn't fast charging bad for my hardware?
好高的建筑…好完美的装潢…
Such impressive height... such perfect ornamentation...
此番美景，肯定要邀你共赏喀！
A sight this stunning deserves to be shared. Please join me, crrk!
啊，电路板，你的布线就像是瑟希斯神树的维管系统一样复杂，你的电路就像是墨涅塔心脏的冠状动脉一样精微！
Ah, glorious circuit board! Your wiring flows like the vessels of the sacred tree of Cerces, your circuits pulse like the very arteries of Mnestia's heart!
真想知道你的原理，然后造一台属于我的机械喀！
I wish to know how you work, and build a mech that belongs to me, crrk!
怕怕怕怕怕——水——谢谢谢谢——你——喀喀喀喀喀——
D—D—Don't like... water... th—th—thank... thank you... C—C—C—Crrk—
为什么这片区域到处都是水？就不怕淹没电子元件吗？
Why is there water everywhere here? Shouldn't we be worried about frying the electronics?
水系当然克制电系了！不对，可能记混了…总之我们有最真实的物理引擎喀！
Of course! Water beats electric! Wait, I might've got my facts mixed up... Anyway, our physics simulation is absolutely flawless, crrk!
Have faith in Phagousa, they can control water.
事已至此，也只能相信那位迷糊姐姐了喀。
Well, now that it's come to this, we can only trust in that ditzy lady, crrk.
刚才的灯光秀可真酷炫。而且音乐也太好听了吧，简直就是天籁！
That light show was amazing. And the music was absolutely phenomenal!
美中不足之处是，没有展示我的英姿喀。
If only it had featured my spectacular presence, crrk.
我已经偷偷观察你很久了，和我这种阴暗爬行的生物比起来，你们人类真的好耀眼！
I've been your secret admirer for quite some time. Compared to shadecrawlers like us, you humans shine like stars!
请问，我以后能够变成你那样吗？
Tell me, will I ever become like you?
Stick with me, and become a human!
真的…可以吗？我好感动喀。
Really? You mean it? How nice of you, crrk!
Being a nymph isn't so bad either, you know.
这样啊，其它虫也会对我说这句话…说不定普通和理所当然也挺好的喀。
Yeah, I get that a lot... Guess there's comfort in mediocrity and the expected, crrk.
I want to be a human...
说好要把后背被交给彼此，结果兄弟本是同窝虫，大难临头各自飞——
We promised to have each other's backs, but in the end, some brother it is that turned out to just be fair-weather friends, and when trouble came, it abandoned me—
但它要跑就跑，蹬我一脚干什么！害得我摔在这里，被乱石压住了骄傲的脊梁！
That's not all! It wants to run, fine, why kick me down!? Now I'm stuck here, my pride crushed beneath these rocks!
…算了，毕竟兄弟一场。它要还活着替我带声好。
...Whatever, we were brothers after all. If it is still alive, give it my regards.
我本来就快出去了…就快出去了…
I was just about to get out... just about to get out...
明明就差一秒，我就能离开这个地方了，可它竟然不动了！
I was only a second away from leaving this place, but it suddenly stopped working!
谁能把这个风扇的充电头插回去喀！
Can someone plug this fan's power cable back in, crrk!
第一次来到这个巨大的空间，是不是很震惊喀？
First time in this massive space, huh? Quite a shock, crrk?
但这里每一个角落，都已被我细致地侦察过了！尤其是那座大炮，注意看，它已经瞄准你了——
But I have already scouted every corner of this place! Especially that cannon. Look, it is already aimed at you—
我不断诘问自身…如果虫生的尽头就是这样一片走不出的虚无，还要推着巨石向山坡上行走喀？
I keep questioning myself... If the end of a nymph's life is only this inescapable void, why keep pushing the boulder uphill, crrk?
答案是：「当然要前进了喀！」
The answer is: "Of course we must move forward, crrk!"
旅者，告诉我，我是否已经在至高的顶点？那光的来处！
Traveler, tell me, have I reached the highest summit yet? The source of the light!
No, you are still far from it.
我就知道，对若虫而言，逐光的旅程一定是漫长的。
I knew it. For a nymph, the journey of chasing light is bound to be a long one.
This is the pilgrimage of a lone nymph...
At that moment, you became a beam of light.
不要不要，机械虫变成光，那是爆炸了喀！
No, no, no, a mechanical insect turning into light... that means it's exploded! Crrk!
飞行而来的贵客，您的速度真令虫惊叹！
Esteemed guest from the skies, your speed truly leaves this nymph in awe!
我爬了大半虫生才爬到这里，而您后来者居上，马上又将飞向我难以企及的高度，这一切都印证了那句真理——
I've spent most of my nymph life crawling to get here, and you, the latecomer, are already soaring past me to heights I can't even dream of reaching. All of this just proves that old saying—
嘿，旅者，准备好成为英雄了吗？
Hey traveler, ready to become a hero?
这些火种汇聚的力量，一定能将无尽的深夜照亮，所有人与虫愿望中的黎明，也快要到来了喀！
The power of these gathered Coreflames will surely light up the endless night. The dawn wished for by both humans and nymphs is almost here, crrk!
很好！很有精神！那就启程吧——走向故事的终点喀！
Excellent! That is the spirit! Then let us set off, toward the end of the story, crrk!
再…往上…一步…就…可以…登顶…传说中…的…闪电…终极……
Just... one more... step... to reach... the... legendary... ultimate... lightning...
To become... able to... move... at extreme speed...
To become... the lightning nymph... at last!
糟了糟了回不去了喀，不知道哥怎么样了…
Oh shoot oh dang, I can't go back, crrk... I wonder how my brother is...
我们原本背靠背，是彼此最忠诚的兄弟！但那阵爆炸真的太吓虫了…我被巨风掀翻，又连摔四五个跟头，现在是彻底不知道虫在哪了……
We were once back-to-back, the most loyal of brothers! But that blast scared the shell off me... I was tossed by the great wind, rolled four or five times, and now I have no idea where I ended up...
哥啊，我真是不小心蹬了你一脚啊——
Brother, I really did not mean to kick you—
应该在下面的某个地方…
It should be somewhere down below...
You'll see it once you return.
Really, crrk? Thank you, savior, for showing me the way!
喂——那边的旅人，请救救我——
Hey! That traveler over there, please help me—
不、不仅是我，还有我的电路板们，是的是的…请全部救下来吧！
N—Not just me, but my circuit boards as well, yes, yes... please save them all!
You can only save one. The choice is yours.
我是不会放弃这些电路板的喀！我之所以会登上这里，就是因为爱它们喀！
I will never abandon these circuit boards, crrk! The only reason I came up here was because I love them, crrk!
我心甘情愿被爱判入终身囚笼！
I willingly accept being sentenced to a lifetime prison of love!
那么，我也不会离开这些电路板的喀！
Then I will not leave these circuit boards either, crrk!
就让我留在这爱的囚笼里吧！
Just let me stay in this prison of love!
Open terrain is perfect for scouting...
Move forward, even if I can't...
I really want to go there...
Oh, brother... how should I get back...?
I will strike in mechanical form.
这只若虫静立于一座圆环旁，仿佛星际航路的收费员。
The nymph stands motionless next to a circular ring, like a toll collector on an interstellar highway.
许多人都抚奏过这架弦琴，但唯有金织和那位医者指尖流出的旋律最为悦耳：前者如轻纱飞舞，后者如晨光拂面。

Many have played this harp, but only the melodies flowing from the fingers of Goldweaver and the Healer are truly the most moving: The former like silk veils dancing, the latter like morning light upon the face.
我也想为英雄们留下些什么——譬如言语，譬如故事，譬如温柔的琴音嗡……
I also wish to leave something behind for the heroes, perhaps words, maybe stories, or even the gentle pluckings of a harp, buzz...
无需多言，在若虫的字典里，没有「臣服」二字。
Enough. In a nymph's dictionary, the word "submit" does not exist.
金窝银窝，不如我的小虫窝。是谁趴在高高的金山上面？没错，就是我——
A nest of gold or silver is nothing compared to my little nymph den. Who is perched atop this golden mountain? That is right, it is I—
路过的旅者哟，你不知道我有多困扰嗡。我每天都在数这里到底有多少金币，日日数，夜夜数，根本数不完……
Oh, passing traveler, you cannot imagine how troubled I am, buzz~ I spend every day counting these gold coins, day after day, night after night, and I can never finish...
Give the money to me, I will spend it for you.
Run! The bandits are coming, buzz—
If this money isn't yours, then stop counting it.
Eek! H—How did you know, buzz!
嗯嗯，真是精妙绝伦的火筒设计…这个问题…原来是这样解决的吗？
Hmm, such an ingenious rocket design... So this is... how the problem was solved?
我懂了！我真是天才！放心把武器生产交给我吧喀，我会为翁法罗斯，炸出一个崭新的黎明！
I understand now! I am a genius! Leave weapon production to me, crrk! I will blast a brand-new dawn for Amphoreus!
对了，差点忘了火筒的发射咒语：明天见喀——
Oh right, I almost forgot the firing chant for the rocket: see you tomorrow, crrk—
原来虫生的尽头，便是在这样一片浩瀚的花海，聆听西风赠来的远方虫鸣，羽化成蝶…
So the end of a nymph's life is in a vast sea of flowers, listening to insect songs carried by the west wind, and finally emerging as a butterfly...
行至此地的旅者，与我一同展翅，拥抱新生与黎明吧嗡。
Traveler who has come this far, spread your wings with me and embrace Rebirth and Dawn, buzz.
天哪，快看，那个人好像被一束光击中了！
Oh heavens, look! That person seems to have been struck by a beam of light!
明明胸膛已经被贯穿，却始终没有倒下…真是难以想象的意志喀。
Even with their chest pierced through, they still did not fall... What unimaginable willpower, crrk.
如果我也像他那样坚韧的话，还有什么困难不能战胜呢喀？
If I had their tenacity, what hardship could I not overcome, crrk?
若我下一步这样走，你要怎么办？
If I take this step next, what will you do?
嘶——果然有点手段，但只要我这样…再这样……
Sss— you do have some tricks. But if I do this... and then this...
哈哈！此局对弈，精妙绝伦…看来我的棋艺大成，已经独步天下！
Haha! What a brilliant game... It seems my chess skills have reached the peak, a peerless step above all others!
A peerless step? Is that just your left foot tripping over your right?
你懂什么！我就一只虫在这，哪里有对手？除非你把那爱下棋的小凯撒找来……
What would you know!? I am all by my lonesome self here. Where would I find an opponent? Unless you bring that chess-loving little Imperator...
All hail the master of self-battling, left hand against right!
免礼免礼，无敌什么都好，就是太寂寞…要不你把那爱下棋的小凯撒找来？
No need for formalities. Being invincible is fine, but it is too lonely... Why not bring that chess-loving little Imperator here?
看啊，多么伟岸的一把巨剑！它已经与这古树融为一体，定是个开门的宝贝！
Look! What a majestic giant sword! It has become one with this ancient tree. It must be the key to opening this!
如果拔出来，详细看看年份出处，肯定能成为名满宇宙的至宝……
If we pull it out and examine its year and origin, it could become a treasure renowned throughout the universe...
欸，不是我拔不出来啊，我是想让它再沉淀沉淀喀！
It's not like I can't pull it out. I just want to let it settle a bit more, crrk!
说过多少遍了，那只虫的电不是我偷的，我的电还不够多吗？够我再挥霍几个轮回了！
How many times must I say it? I did not steal that nymph's electricity. Do I not already have enough? Enough to splurge on for several more cycles!
欸不对，不是来抓我的安保虫……
Wait, you're not a security nymph here to catch me...
喂、你，对，就你，能不能帮我往草垛子外挪挪？
Hey, you! Yes, you! Can you help move me out of this grass patch?
——真倒霉，我逃跑…呸，散着步呢，就被只混蛋虫撞到了路边，驱动系统还摔坏了喀！
...Such bad luck! I was fleeing... Pfft, I was strolling, when a rotten nymph knocked me to the roadside and broke my drive system, crrk!
清汤大老爷，你、你是来抓我的吗？
Honorable judge, are... are you here to arrest me?
我发誓，我绝不是故意在这条路上狂奔且肇事逃逸的，当时真有只虫在背后追杀我啊……
I swear, I was not deliberately running wild on this road or fleeing the scene. There truly was a nymph chasing me and trying to kill me...
它嚷着什么「交出」什么「电池」就冲了过来，我灵机一动往路边拐才甩开它，现在，它应该还在前头呢。
It came charging at me, yelling something about "hand over" and "battery." I had to take a sudden turn by the roadside to shake it off. It should still be up ahead right now.
I'm really stuck between a rock and a hard place here, crrk...
终于还是来了喀？能不能先请你…「电量偏低」。
So you finally showed up, crrk? Could you please... "Low Battery."
稍等我的电池老化越来越严重了，请你帮我找个充…「电量不足」。
Hold on, my battery's deteriorating more and more, could you help me find a char... "Insufficient Power."
当初…该把…它…新电池…抢到…手…喀…「已关机」。
Back then... should've... grabbed... its new battery... into my... hands... crrk... "Shut Down."
我们若虫之间流传着一条古老的传说：「当树桩飞向天空时，隐藏的秘密也将被揭晓。」
There's an ancient legend among us nymphs: "When the stump soars to the sky, hidden secrets shall be revealed."
但树桩怎样才能飞向天空呢？真是让虫费解。
But how can a tree stump fly into the sky? Truly baffling.
我还在这里，就是为了告诉你一个惊天大秘密——这条路走不通嘤！
I'm still here just to tell you one earth-shattering secret... This path leads to a total dead end, eep!
别沮丧嘤，绕个路就能到楼上去了嘤。
Don't be upset. Just take a detour, and you'll reach the upper floor, eep.
异乡的旅者，你也是为了探求真理才来到这个圣地瞻仰的吧。
Traveler from distant lands, you too have come to this sacred place in pursuit of the truth, haven't you?
在真理的殿堂，你无需沐浴焚香，磕头祷告，只需为遮蔽的真相扫却黄沙，就能找到自己的答案——
Here, in the hall of truth, you need no showers, incense, prayers or worship. Simply brush away the sands shrouding reality, and your answers will be laid bare.
可惜虫腿扫不动喀，不然解明真理的机会就轮不着你啦！
Too bad my nymph legs can't sweep a thing now, crrk. Otherwise you wouldn't even have gotten a chance to uncover the truth!
破碎如镜面的缺口，幽暗如深渊的忆海…我感受到了，我感受到了，那一定就是传说中无数强者纷纷挑战的……

Shattered like a broken mirror's edge, dark as the abyss in sea of memories... I can feel it, I can sense it... That must be the legendary place where countless mighty warriors have come to challenge...
听说要吃十二碗才能成功喀，果然是困难的挑战啊……
I heard you need to drink twelve cups to succeed, crrk. That's definitely one heck of a challenge...
哎呀，你怎么把我的狮口面具打碎了！
Oh no, how could you break my lion's mouth mask!
我连开场白都想好了——「瞧瞧是谁来拜访本蝶了？是异乡的勇士嗡！」结果现在所有惊喜都没啦……
I even had my opening line ready: "Look who's come to visit me? It's a warrior from afar, buzz!" But now all the surprise is ruined...
下次记得收好你的棒球棍，先文明问好嗡！
Next time, keep your baseball bat in check, and try a civilized greeting first, buzz!
他已经离去了吗？那这里的气息，为何……
Has he truly departed? Then why does the presence here...
小心一点，不要掉下去嘤~
这里风景很好吧。在遇见你之前，我已经独自看了好久好久…谢谢你来到这里，为这个世界带来改变。
Beautiful view, isn't it? I'd been watching it alone for such a long, long time before I met you... Thank you for coming here and bringing change to this world.
真希望，这场有你相伴的粉色幻梦，能一直一直…持续下去嘤……
I really wish this pink dream with you by my side could just go on and on... forever, eep...
你知道吗，透过世界被斫裂的创口，亡者的声音将在此间被记录…那群逐火的英雄也不例外。
Did you know? Through the fissures torn in this world, the voices of the dead will be recorded here... including those Flame-Chase heroes.
他们的声息很小，也往往将痛呼隐于人后，可那满腔的遗憾和对「再创世」的疾呼，却遗留至今——
Their breaths were faint, their cries of pain often hidden from others. Yet their regrets, their desperate calls for Era Nova still echo to this day.
一载如此，三千万世如是嗡。
As they did in this eon, and thirty million times over, buzz.
你的眼神竟染上了几分踌躇与迷茫…这与你很不相称呢。
There's a hint of hesitation and uncertainty in your eyes... That's so unlike you.
众生的命运连缀成络，而此刻，最关键的一绺已握在你手。
The fates of all beings are woven into a tapestry. And now, the most crucial thread lies in your hands.
既已行至此处，就抛弃恐惧吧。我们，终将在崭新的未来重逢喀。
Now that we've come this far, cast aside your fears. We shall meet again in a brand new future, crrk.
Can't spend it all... I'll never spend it all!
Lonely... I long for a defeat!
If I could just pull it out...
If I find out who ran into me...
Stuck between a rock and a hard place, crrk...
这只黄金般的若虫站在一尊羽毛状琥珀前，交相辉映。
The golden nymph stands before a feather-shaped amber, their radiance complementing each other.
（「沿着仪式剑的源头而下」…莫非起点位于高处？）
("Follow the source of the ceremonial blade"... Could the starting point be somewhere up high?)
（感觉不对…难道是顺序或者方向错了？从头再试试吧。）
(Something's not right... Maybe the sequence or direction is wrong? Let me try again from the start.)
（这样一看，确实是仪式剑的形状……）
(Looking at it this way, it really does have the shape of a ceremonial blade...)
（感觉不对…难道是顺序错了？从头再试试吧。）
(Something's not right... Maybe the sequence is wrong? Let me try again from the start.)
（感觉不对…难道是方向错了？从头再试试吧。）
(Something's not right... Maybe the direction is wrong? Let me try again from the start.)
英雄之旅可不能操之过急，先去寻找那只已有线索的若虫吧。
Let's not rush into the Hero's Journey. First, let's track down that nymph we've got a lead on.
从这座桥的观光点望去，二维市的守护神•雷虬的完整样貌清晰可见。
From this bridge's viewing point, you can clearly see the complete form of thundercoil, the guardian of Duomension City.
尽管身后的主干道上车辆喧闹，但你却感到怡然自得…难得有机会慢下来，你留意到平时不曾观察的江景与远方的天空，格外美丽。

Despite the noisy traffic on the main road behind you, you feel completely at peace... Taking this rare chance to slow down, you notice the river view and distant sky you've never paid attention to before. They're exceptionally beautiful.
（在这种时候，要是手边有一杯热饮该有多好呀……）
(A hot drink would be so nice right about now...)
可能是由于你在走神，不知何时你的背后来了俩人正在闲谈。
Lost in your thoughts, you didn't notice two people approaching from behind, chatting casually.
阿珍，你知道吗？你是我的「无梦咖啡」哦。
Hey Jane, you know what? You're my Dreamless Coffee.
阿强，你什么意思，你是说我是杯咖啡哦？
What do you mean, John? Are you saying I'm just a cup of coffee?
小傻瓜，这样的话，就可以将你捧在手心里了呀～
Silly goose, this way I can keep you in the palm of my hand~
(What era is this cheesy pickup line from?)
(Suddenly can't wait to get out of here...)
不过，你听说过这个寓言吗？《城里老鼠和乡下老鼠》……
But have you heard of a fable called The City Mouse and the Country Mouse?
乡下老鼠代表着安稳、平淡但可能有些简陋的生活。而城里老鼠代表着充满冒险、诱惑与精致享受，但也危机四伏的生活。

The country mouse represents a stable and peaceful life, though perhaps a bit modest. The town mouse represents a life full of adventure, temptation, and refined pleasures, but also fraught with dangers.
Why bring that up all of a sudden?
我就想知道你想选什么呢？
I just wanna know what you're gonna pick!
(Ugh, must a choice really be made?)
那我选「城里的老鼠」吧，我很喜欢现在的生活……
Then I'll pick the city mouse, because I really love my life right now...
可…你知道我其实不是城里的，我是从乡下来的。我根本就不是什么「无梦咖啡」，我只是乡下的饮料，我是「甜蜜小城」。

But... you know, I'm not actually from a big city. I'm some girl from the countryside, having nothing to do with the fancy Dreamless Coffee. You could say I'm just a backwater drink, something like Sweet Little City at best.
你也不知道小情侣之间的对话里到底哪一句里埋藏着地雷。
You never know which line in a couple's conversation is going to be a landmine.
短暂的沉默间，你不禁为男孩捏一把汗，他到底要如何回答才能平安度过？
In the brief moment of silence, you can't help but feel anxious for the boy. How on earth should he answer to get through this safely?
不，你从乡下来，但你绝不是什么乡下的饮料！
No, you may be from the countryside, but you're definitely not some backwater drink!
你知道吗？那边的大妖怪雷虬，有着极其保守的本土意识，它会严惩外来入侵的饮料品牌，你现在好好的，说明你已经得到了它的认可……

You know what? That big strangeling over there, thundercoil, is super protective of local traditions. It severely punishes any foreign beverage brands that try to invade its territory. The fact that you're still in one piece means it must have accepted you...
如果你真的要挑战它的本土意识，它将会立刻化身为防御塔，全力消灭外来入侵者，所以…我也劝你不要在这里当着它的面喝「甜蜜小城」。

If you really want to challenge its territorial awareness, it'll instantly transform into a defense tower and go all-out to eliminate any foreign invaders, so... I'd also advise against drinking Sweet Little City beverages right in front of it.
你好吓人，到底谁会信这种事情啊……
Goodness, that's creepy... who would even believe something like that...
别害怕，我每天吃饭都配愿力大补汤、我对「抽卡」和「像素小人」毫无抵抗力…我是浓度最高的二维市民，只要你躲在我的身后，雷虬绝对不会伤害你！

Don't be scared! I have Wishpower tonic soup with every meal, and I'm totally weak for capsule-pulling and pixel sprites... I'm the most hardcore Duomension citizen you'll ever meet! Just stay behind me, and that thundercoil won't lay a finger on you!
John, I like you so much...
…不知不觉，你身后的俩人已经离开。
...Before you know it, those two behind you have already left.
但是他们留下的规则系怪谈在你的心中萦绕不去——在二维市当着雷虬的面喝外来品牌的饮料，会被雷虬化身为防御塔攻击。

But the urban legend they left behind keeps haunting your mind: If you drink a foreign brand beverage in front of the thundercoil in Duomension City, it will transform into a defense tower and attack you.
这不就是排外主义吗？！你必须消除这不切实际的传言。
Isn't that just xenophobia!? You need to put an end to these baseless rumors.
不错，这的确是匹诺康尼的特产…不过鉴于它已经在全银河推广自己的品牌了，可能还不够符合标准。
Not bad, this is indeed a Penacony specialty... but considering they've been promoting this brand across the entire cosmos, it might not be enough.
你的手里不是还有令人闻风丧胆的家伙吗？
Don't you still have that terrifying weapon in your hands?
不错，这的确是贝洛伯格的特产…不过鉴于它口味大众，就算是二相乐园人也能够轻松享用，可能还不够符合标准。
Not bad, this is indeed a Belobog specialty... but since its taste is quite mainstream and even folks from Planarcadia can easily enjoy it, it might not be enough.
你的手里不是还有更具挑衅意味的家伙吗？
Don't you have something even more provocative up your sleeve?
苏打豆汁儿，多么邪恶的名字，光是看到文字就感觉地道的仙舟胃液在翻涌。若是当着雷虬的面将它一口饮下，那该是多么大的挑衅啊！
Mung bean soda, what a sinister name... Just seeing the words can make genuine Xianzhou gastric juices churn. What an affront it would be to chug it down right in front of the thundercoil!
Is it threatening me? I'm drinking this no matter what!
怀着满心好奇与忐忑，你猛地掏出背包里的苏打豆汁儿。
With a mix of curiosity and nervousness, you hastily pull out the mung bean soda from your inventory.
Raise your glass to the thundercoil!
在二维市，你因为当着雷虬的面喝苏打豆汁儿，而遭到了雷虬•防御塔的攻击。
In Duomension City, you are attacked by thundercoil defense tower for drinking mung bean soda in front of the thundercoil.
那个瞬间，世界的声音被抽离，仅余一种发自灵魂的震颤；你的意识也随之渐渐远去……
In that moment, all sound is stripped from the world, leaving only a soul-deep trembling, your consciousness slowly drifted away...
雷虬大人始终在注视着这座城市的每个角落——切记，勿要饮用那外来的亵渎之物……
Lord thundercoil watches over every corner of this city. Remember, do not drink that blasphemous foreign substance...

如今移动支付大行其道，自助取款机还没来得及退出二相乐园的历史舞台。
Mobile payments are all the rage now, and ATMs haven't even had the chance to make their exit from Planarcadia's history.
据说，愿力与信用点都能用这台机器取出来，也算是一种二相乐园独特的风景线吧。
They say you can withdraw both Wishpower and credits from this machine. I guess that's just another quirky feature of Planarcadia.
滴滴滴，您有一笔新的汇款，请及时查收！
Ding ding ding! You have received a new transfer. Please check it promptly!

Let's confirm the prize money amount first, it's <unbreak>1,000,000</unbreak> in total... Oh my goodness!
我当了一辈子自助取款机，也是第一次见到这么多钱。
I've been an ATM my whole life, but this is the first time I've seen this much money.
接下来需要您手动确认一下这串数字，没问题的话请按右下角的确认键。
Next, you'll need to manually verify these numbers. If everything looks good, press the confirm button in the bottom right.
不错，现在您离获得这笔钱又近了一步。
Nice, you're one step closer to getting that money.
欸？！您就这么走了么，这笔钱可以让您过很长一段时间的逍遥日子啊。

Warning! Make sure to sign your full legal name, {NICKNAME}, not nicknames, aliases, pen names, titles, or any other names not legally recognized.

呼~总算完成一单…啊不，我的意思是恭喜你获得奖金！
Phew~ Finally got one done... Ah, I mean, congratulations on your bonus!
越来越觉得不对劲，算了。
Something feels more and more off... Whatever.
欸？！您就这么走了么，这笔钱可以让您过很长一段时间的逍遥日子啊。

信用点像喷泉一样从自助取款机的嘴巴里涌出！
Credits are gushing out of the ATM like a fountain!
