我的服务就到此为止了，接下来就是你还贷后续了。请注意还款日期，再见！
That's all from me for now. The rest of the loan repayment is up to you. Keep an eye on those due dates, see ya!
无论你怎么呼喊，机器一声不吭，仿佛从来就没有启动过。
No matter how much you shout, the machine remains dead silent, as if it has never been turned on in the first place.
屏幕一片漆黑，回应你的只有飘荡在空气中的陈年老灰。
The screen is pitch black, with only years of floating dust responding to your presence.
它好像发出了一声闷响，然后又陷入了永久的沉默。
It made a muffled sound, then fell into permanent silence.
无论是在哪个世界，总是有不开眼的电信诈骗团伙总是想要在你这里试试身手。
No matter which world you're in, there's always some clueless fraud ring trying to test their luck on you.
这种来路不明的高利贷骗局并不受法律保护，也许前去治安局应该能很快处理……
These shady loan shark scams aren't protected by law. Maybe heading to Security Bureau could sort this out quickly...
这里先留存证据，然后上报给治安局。
Just collect the evidence here first, then report it to Security Bureau.
虽然小费了一番功夫，你和治安局交代了事情经过，并且完成了备案。
After a bit of effort, you explained the situation to Security Bureau and completed the report.
但你有如此底气，大概是因为你毕竟是首席执行官的贵客。倘若你只是个一般观光客，遇到这种低等级骗术最好就是什么都不要答应，记住了吗？

But the reason you're so confident is probably because you're CEO's esteemed guest. If you were just a regular tourist, the best thing to do when encountering such low-level scams would be to refuse everything. Got it?
事情固然暂时告一段落，但是官方处理不会总是那么及时，也许你会遇上一些讨债人……
While things may have settled down for now, official procedures aren't always this quick. You might run into some debt collectors...
对方若真的敢使手段，那就用球棒解决。
If they dare try anything funny, settle it with your baseball bat.
前面的{F#小丫头}{M#小子}，给我过来！
我们找了你好几天，你居然还敢大摇大摆地逛街，难不成把欠我们公司钱的事忘得一干二净？
We've been looking for you for days, and here you are, strutting around like you own the place. Don't tell me you've completely forgotten about the money you owe our company?
哈？我手里可有白纸黑字的合同，你睁大眼睛看看，上面是你{NICKNAME}的签名。
Huh? I've got a contract in black and white right here. Take a good look for yourself, that's your signature on it, {NICKNAME}.
整整一百万信用点。哦不对，现在算上利息是一百五十万了，你不会还想抵赖吧？
A full million credits. Oh wait, with interest it's one point five million now. You're not trying to weasel out of this, are you?
容我提醒一句，前不久你确实从一台满嘴谎言的自助取款机那里「借」走了一百万信用点。
Just a friendly reminder, you did "borrow" a million credits from that lying ATM not too long ago.
我现在倒数三个数，你不把这个月的利息交出来，可别怪我不客气了。
I'm gonna count to three, and if you don't pay up this month's interest, don't blame me for getting nasty.
报、报警？别吓唬我了，你已经拿了我们的钱了，报警？晚了！
C—Call the cops? Don't try to scare me! You've already taken our money, and it's too late for that now!
连本带息一共是一百五十万信用点，我劝你赶紧想起来，别逼我动用「大记忆恢复术」。
With principal and interest, it's <unbreak>1.5</unbreak> million credits total. You'd better start remembering, or I'll have to cast my "Ultimate Memory-Reboot Spell" on you.
我现在倒数三个数，你不把这个月的利息拿出来，可别怪我不客气了。
I'm gonna count to three, and if you don't pay up this month's interest, don't blame me for getting nasty.
I never intended to return it in the first place.
啊哈哈哈，你在说笑吧，居然有不长眼的敢不还「利滚利金融」的钱。
Hahaha, very funny. Some fool actually had the nerve to not pay back their loan.
刚好我拳头也痒了，我现在倒数三个数，你不把这个月的利息交出来，可别怪我不客气了。
My fists are just itching for some action. I'm gonna count to three, and if you don't pay up this month's interest, don't blame me for getting nasty.
区区欧克，带了几个速度词条也想追上{NICKNAME}？真是笑话。
Some puny orch with a few speed stat bonuses think they can catch up to {NICKNAME}? Don't make me laugh.
你不仅跑出了英姿，跑出了风采，还顺便叫来治安局的治安官。
Not only did you run with grace and style, you even managed to summon a Security Bureau officer.
呼呼呼~真倒霉，怎么碰上你这么个硬茬！
Ugh, just my luck! Why did I have to run into such a tough cookie like you!
人证俱在，这次还真是麻烦你了，{NICKNAME}。这几个人我就准备带回去了。
We now have both evidence and witnesses. I really owe you one, {NICKNAME}. I'll take these folks back with me now.
Wait, but what about that million...
那一百万如果是用于诈骗的话，那么你们可能要在大牢里等待下个琥珀纪了。
If that million was used for fraud, you might be waiting around in prison until the next Amber Era.
啊…那不是诈骗啊，那是奖品！我们诚信经营呀，那是送给{NICKNAME}的。
Ah... that's not a scam, it's a prize! We run an honest business here, it's a gift for {NICKNAME}.
一百万是我们送给您了，这样总行了吧！
That one million is our gift to you, surely that's acceptable!
Don't let me see you again.
欸！我这就滚，保证不出现在你的视野范围里！
Yea, yea, I'm outta here, I promise I'll stay out of your hair!
送礼物也不代表着你们就不会受到惩罚，只是处罚可能会轻一点。
Gifts won't stop you from being punished. At best, it'll lighten your punishment.
跟我回去，把你背后的团伙一五一十全部交待出来，包括那台取款机和一百万作案资金，全部一并带走。
Come with me and tell me everything about your gang, including that ATM and the million credits you used for the job.
一位打扮怪异的观众，驻足在一副抽象风格的油画前，他的表情让人捉摸不透。
A peculiarly dressed spectator stands before an abstract oil painting, his expression utterly enigmatic.
作为这幅画唯二的观众，或许你们可以交流一下彼此的的感受。
As the only two viewers of this painting, perhaps you could share your thoughts with each other.
你的脚步声打断了他的思绪，他把目光转移到了你身上。
Your footsteps interrupt his thoughts as he shifts his gaze toward you.
嚯，你也对这幅画感兴趣？那你觉得作者想通过这幅画表达什么？
Oh, so you're interested in this painting too? What do you think the artist was trying to express through it?
呵呵，你把这方寸之地称为「辽阔」？你知道被关在里面有多难受么，我想挠挠后背都做不到。
Hah, you call this cramped space "vast"? You have no idea how uncomfortable it is being locked in here. I can't even scratch my own back!
The nihility of time and space.
哼，画那边的世界，时间和空间都失去了意义，我已经不知道在里面囚禁了多少岁月。
Hmph, time and space lost all meaning in that painted world. I've been imprisoned in there for who knows how many years.
如果这幅画里有作者的家乡，那我一定要亲手将其摧毁千万遍，以报囚禁之恨。
If the artist's hometown is in this painting, I'll destroy it a thousand times over with my own hands to avenge my imprisonment.
现在我终于挣脱了牢笼，那该死的绘师早已化成了灰，二相乐园没有人可以阻挡我了。
Now that I've finally broken free from my cage, that blasted artist has already turned to ashes. No one in Planarcadia can stop me now.
而你，作为我复苏后遇见的第一个人类，我不会杀你，但你需要效忠于我。
And you, being the first human I've encountered since my resuscitation, I won't kill you, but you'll need to pledge your loyalty to me.
现在交给你第一个任务，告诉我出口在哪里，这地方跟个迷宫一样，把我头都绕晕了！
Here's your first mission: Tell me where the exit is. This place is like a maze, and it's making my head spin!
You don't look like one of the good guys.
好人？哈哈，我这辈子最恨的就是好人，其次是磨磨蹭蹭的人，不带路就去死吧。
Good guys? Hah, good guys are what I hate most in life, followed by those who dawdle around. If you're not gonna lead the way, just drop dead.
不遵从我命令的人不配活着，你现在可以去死了。
Those who disobey my commands don't deserve to live. You can die now.
等等！我想起来了，上一次就是被这样骗进了画里的，你还是死掉好一点。
Wait! I just remembered this was exactly how I got tricked into that painting last time. You're better off dead.
也对，欣赏艺术需要独处的空间，那就安静地离开吧。
True, appreciating art requires solitude. Just quietly take your leave.
不可能，绝对不可能！我怎么会输给一个人类！
Impossible, absolutely impossible! How could I lose to a mere human!
I'm not just some average human.
Go back to where you came from.
不要！我不要回去！啊啊啊啊啊啊……
No! I don't wanna go back! Aaaaaaahhh...
一阵绚丽的光芒闪过，墙上的画面出现了变化，刚才还气焰嚣张的观众已经与背景融为一体。嗯…这样看起来整幅画协调多了。

A brilliant flash of light sweeps through, and the image on the wall changes. That previously arrogant spectator has now blended into the background. Hmm... the whole painting looks much more harmonious this way.
你还注意到画的右下角出现了一行小字：「该幻造种极其危险，务必定期检查封印，避免其窜逃危害社会」。
You also notice a line of small text in the bottom right corner of the drawing: "This imagenae is extremely dangerous. Regular seal inspection is mandatory to prevent escape and harm to society."
看来在不经意间，你又一次维护了世界的和平安定。
Looks like you've safeguarded the peace and stability of this world once again, without even trying.
画中的幻造种充满怨恨地盯着你，他朝思暮想的自由梦，被你两棒子打得稀碎。
The imagenae in the painting glares at you with burning hatred, since you shattered his long-cherished dreams of freedom with just a couple of your swift bat swings.
所以，你是想了解二相乐园的历史？但咱们两个不都是历史老师吗？
So you want to learn about Planarcadia's history? Aren't we both supposed to be history teachers?
没错…但我总觉得，自己对二相乐园的历史知之甚少，很担心误人子弟。这才来请教你对的。
Yes, but I always worry I don't know enough about Planarcadia's past, and I'm afraid I might lead students astray. That's why I came to ask you.
哦哦，那简单，我稍微给你讲一下，你就全都明白了。
Oh, that's simple. I'll give you a quick rundown and you'll get it.
从历史时期划分上来讲，二相乐园主要分为火花时代、火花时代、火花时代和火花时代这四个时代。
If you divide Planarcadia's history by periods, it's basically split into four eras, the Sparxie Era, the Sparxie Era, the Sparxie Era, and the Sparxie Era.
这段时间我们三年级的教学重点，应该是火花时代的转折点「火花之乱」。也就是火花因为幻造种权力，与火花兵戎相见的事件。
For our third-year syllabus, the key topic is the turning point in the Sparxie Era, the Sparxie Upheaval. That was when Sparxie came into open conflict with Sparxie over imagenae rights.
哦，我明白了。所以当时才会出现「火花骚动」…火花一直采取那种姿态，幻造种们肯定会忍无可忍的。
Ah, got it. So that explains the Sparxie Upheaval. Sparxie kept pushing, and the imagenae finally snapped.
没错。但其实也有些历史学家认为，火花这件事背后有火花煽动，导致火花被火花蛊惑，形成了火花与火花分庭抗礼的局面，最终才彻底变成流血冲突。

Exactly. But in fact, some historians believe that behind the Sparxie incident, there was a Sparxie inciting the crowd, leading a Sparxie to be ensorcelled by a Sparxie's manipulation. This created a standoff between Sparxies, which eventually spiraled into a total bloody conflict.
原来如此。火花时代的历史，还真是复杂啊。
No kidding. The history of the Sparxie Era is messier than it looks.
他们这是…在叽里咕噜地说什么呢……
唉，最近到了毕业季，工作又开始繁忙起来了。你入职年份尚浅，恐怕还不知道吧？每次一到毕业季，就会有很多学生面临毕业。
*sigh* It's graduation season, and things are getting hectic. You're still fairly new, so you might not know: every graduation season, a lot of students are up against graduation.
…教导主任，您能稍微说点有用的吗？
...Can you say something actually helpful, dean?
哼，你还年轻，才觉得我说这些话没用。等你到了我这个年纪，工作又忙，就能理解我的苦恼了。
Hmph, you're young. You think my words are useless. Wait until you're my age and buried in work, then you'll get where I'm coming from.
在做教导主任之前，我也是一条浪漫的海龙啊！我也曾渴望一段甜美的恋爱啊！可做了教导主任以后，整整<unbreak>32</unbreak>年，我算不清自己已经独自度过了多少个情人节。

Before I became the dean, I was a romantic sea dragon. I once dreamed of a sweet romance. But after taking this job, thirty-two years have gone by. I've lost track of how many Lovers' Days I've spent alone.
年轻人不要总是顶嘴！我跟你说的都是人生道理。瓦尔特老师，你要记住，我所相信的你，就是你所相信的你自己再加上我们所有人相信的你。
Young folks, don't be cheeky. I'm telling you things that matter in life. Welt, listen: what you believe about yourself is equal to you plus all of us believing in you.
…教导主任，我实在有点头疼，能先走了吗？
...Dean, my head is killing me. Can I go now?
Why are you just standing there? Say something!
嘘…瓦尔特老师睡着了。他这段时间太累了，还是让他再睡一会儿吧。
Shh, Welt fell asleep. He's been exhausted lately. Let him rest a bit longer.
How can he be standing and sleeping?
所谓「为人师表」，就是要在学生面前确保老师良好的精神面貌。瓦尔特老师恐怕是因为不希望学生看到自己颓唐地打盹，才坚持站着睡觉的吧。
A teacher should model good spirit in front of students. Welt probably doesn't want them to see him dozing off, so he insists on sleeping standing up.
唉，我每次给别人解释自己正在研究的「宇宙际几何学」，都会导致对方进入深度睡眠……
*sigh* Every time I try to explain my research into Interstellar Geometry, people slip into a deep sleep...
虽然稍微有点伤心，但既然能让瓦尔特老师这样辛苦的人稍事休息，那就也不算是件坏事了。
It's a little sad, but if it gives someone like Welt a brief rest, then it's not all bad.
…没错，确实是我…乔伊斯，我回家了…你们还好吗……
...Yes, it's me... Joyce, I'm home... How's everyone...
咦？瓦尔特老师好像开始说梦话了。看起来睡得确实很香。
Huh? Welt's mumbling in his sleep. He seems to be sleeping safe and sound.
…使我的视线凝定…于云层漫布的天穹…并投向地球的绿色丘陵……
...Let my eyes gaze on the sky full of white clouds... and the green hills of Earth...
说梦话的时候竟然会背诗…瓦尔特老师真是个浪漫的人啊。
Reciting poetry in his sleep, of all things. Welt's surprisingly romantic.
（瓦尔特老师，可能是有点想家了吧…还是不要打扰他休息了。）
(He's probably homesick... Better not wake him.)
别打了、别打了，你们再打真要给我打死了！算我输了还不行吗！
Stop! Stop! You'll really kill me! Fine, I give up, all right!
Stop right there! Leave Skott alone!
{NICKNAME}！你来得正好！快救我离开这里！
{NICKNAME}! You came just in time! Help me out of here!
在玩啥好玩的？让我也踢一脚～
What's going on here? Looks fun. Mind if I join in?
{NICKNAME}! Don't you dare take advantage of me now!
同学，你误会了。我们并不是在欺负斯科特同学，是他一定要来和我们两个打架…这是一场公正的战斗、一次正义的二打一。
You've got it all wrong. We're not bullying Skott. He insisted on fighting us both. This is a fair fight, a righteous two‑on‑one battle.
呃，{NICKNAME}同学，这人是你的朋友吗？他一直都这么勇敢吗？要同时和学校最强的两个不良少年开战？
Uh... {NICKNAME}, is this guy your friend? Is he always this gutsy, picking a fight with the two toughest delinquents in school?
呜呜呜…我分别用对方的名义，给你们寄了一封约架信，希望你们能在这里自相残杀，我再收取渔翁之利。
Waaah... I sent each of you a fake challenge letter in the other's name, hoping you'd beat each other up so I could swoop in and reap the benefits.
谁曾想…你们两个来了以后就一起殴打我…我平时怎么没看出来你们关系那么好啊？配合还挺默契，还有空中丝滑小连招…你们不是死对头吗！
Who knew that when you both showed up, you'd just team up and beat me instead? You two are surprisingly in sync! You even pulled off an aerial combo! Weren't you supposed to be sworn enemies?
呵，「死对头」的意思是，「最强的不良少年」只能是我们两人中的某一人。
Hmph. "Sworn enemies" means there can only be one top delinquent between us.
如果有第三人想要篡位，我们当然会通力合作了。
And if a third guy tries to steal that title, of course we'll work together.
哼哼，毕竟打败唐尼的人，只能是我。
Heh, because the only one who gets to defeat Donny is me.
可恶啊…可恶啊！我最讨厌这种充满青春酸臭味的友情了！
Darn it... Darn it! I can't stand this stench of teenage friendship!
看起来斯科特同学不是很需要帮助。还是不要管他了。
Looks like Skott doesn't really need rescuing. Let's just leave him be.
你是，长大后的我？这里是哪里，我又为什么会出现在这里？难道我这是…穿越时空了？
Wait... you're me? The grown-up version of me? Where am I? Why am I here? Did I just... time-travel or something?
笨蛋，哪有时间穿越这种事？你是我的「绘艺」作业。我用自己童年的记忆创造出了一个幼年版的我自己。
Don't be stupid. There's no time travel. You're just my art project. I used my childhood memories to recreate a younger version of myself.
哇！好厉害！我长大以后能做到这么厉害的事情呀？唔…但是，这样一来，世界上不就有两个「斯科特」了吗？这不太符合我们的家训吧？
Whoa, that's awesome! So I actually become this talented when I grow up? But hang on, that means there are now two Skotts in the world. Doesn't that go against the family code?
别担心，你只能存在一小会儿。你很快就会消失的。
Relax. You'll only exist for a short while, before you fade away.
哦哦，那就好，这样我就放心了。我可不想成为自己的绊脚石呀～
Oh, that's good. I wouldn't want to be a burden to myself anyway~
机会难得，我能问你几个问题吗？长大后的林登•斯科特。
Since I've got the chance, can I ask you a few questions, future Lyndon Skott?
我成为了不起的大人物了吗？手下管着多少人？那些可悲的家伙是不是又憎恨我们，又拿我们没办法？
Did I turn into someone great? Do I have a ton of people working under me? Do those losers still hate us but can't touch us?
…可能要让你失望了，小蠢货。我现在还是个小人物；姑且有几个手下但都不算特别忠心；有很多讨厌我的人，其中好几个都能让我狠狠吃些苦头。

...Sorry to disappoint you, little fool. I'm still a small fry. I've got a few guys following me, but some of them aren't exactly loyal. Plenty of people hate me, and more than a few could have made me pay for it.
唉…这也是没办法的事嘛，竞争是很残酷的。
*sigh* I guess that's just how life goes. Competition's brutal.
但是，小蠢货，只有一件事我很骄傲。从那时到现在，这么多年过去了，我始终践行着斯科特家的家训，从未改变、从未动摇——
But listen, kid. There's one thing I'm proud of. From then till now, I've always stuck to the Skott family creed, never changed, never faltered—
「我是一匹孤狼，没有朋友、没有敌人、只有猎物！」
"I'm a lone wolf. No friends, no enemies, only prey."
哈哈哈，那就好，那我就放心了。
Hahaha, good. That's what I wanted to hear.
只要林登•斯科特仍然是一条孤狼，那么总有一天，整个世界都将被他收入囊中。
As long as Lyndon Skott stays a lone wolf, one day the whole world will be in his hands.
哇哈哈哈，那是当然了，还用你说吗？
Ha! Of course it will. You don't have to say it.
尊敬的「考神」，请赐予我智慧，让我通过绘师资格考试。
Oh, great Exam God, grant me wisdom to pass the Artist Qualification Exam.
根据历年绘师资格考试的数据，选择题中正确答案是「C」的比例约为<unbreak>25.67%</unbreak>，略高于其他三个答案。
According to past data, about <unbreak>25.67%</unbreak> of the correct answers in the multiple‑choice section are "C," slightly higher than the rest.
如果遇到答不上的选择题，就勇敢地选「C」吧！
If you get stuck, just boldly go with "C."
<unbreak>25.67%</unbreak>…那不就是刚好四分之一吗！并没有比别的选项好到哪里去吧？
<unbreak>25.67%</unbreak>? That's basically one‑quarter! That's hardly better than random?
斯科特同学，人生就是一场赌局。将人生未来押注在<unbreak>0.67%</unbreak>的胜机之上，那种向死而生的恐惧，才最让人有活着的实感。
Skott, life itself is a gamble. Betting your future on that extra <unbreak>0.67%</unbreak>, the razor‑thin edge between life and death, that's what makes living thrilling.
这都什么歪理？我才不要将未来押注在这种的概率上啊！而且你这个数学计算也有问题吧？怎么就变成<unbreak>0.67%</unbreak>的胜机了？
That's insane! I'm not staking my future on numbers that don't even add up! And your calculation is incorrect at all! How did you even come up with <unbreak>0.67%</unbreak>?
不要在意这些细节。重点是，这样的人生赌局，不会让你血脉贲张吗？
Forget the details. The point is, doesn't a life gamble like this make your blood race?
那你还不赶紧滚回教室去刷题！跑到我这里祈祷有个屁用？
Then get back to class and study! You think praying to me is going to help?
等我成了大人物，就把这破学校买下来，然后把你搬到我家厕所门口当门神！
Once I'm a big shot, I'll buy this dump of a school and move you to my house as a toilet guardian!
好小子，有志气！既然志向如此高远，那就赶紧滚回教室刷题吧。
Now that's ambition! Since you've got such lofty goals, get back to class and study hard.
不要随随便便把人生大事交给玄学啊！
Don't leave your future to mysticism!
哼，你就等着瞧吧！等我成了大人物，有你后悔的时候。
Hmph, just wait and see. You'll regret this when I'm rich and powerful.
这雕像大概也真是老江湖了。竟然这么擅长…因材施教。
That statue sure has experience. Who knew it'd be so good at "personalized teaching."
呜呜呜…这里好可怕…我也没得罪人啊，为什么会被分配到这里？
Waaah... this place is terrifying... I didn't even offend anyone. Why did I get assigned here?
Why won't you open your eyes?
火花让我负责监视这附近的学生。可是…这里的气氛实在太可怕了，我根本不敢睁眼看啊！
Sparxie told me to keep an eye on the students here, but this place is so creepy, I don't dare open them at all!
不过好在，这里那么吓人，也不会有学生来的。我闭上眼摸鱼就好了。
Still, since it's so scary, no one ever comes by. I can just nap with my eyes shut.
对哦，这里一般人都不会来，但是你来了…难道你不是一般人…而是…啊！你肯定也是很可怕的家伙！
Oh right, no one usually shows up here, but you did. That means... you're not ordinary, are you? You must be terrifying!
呜呜呜…求求你快点走开，我好害怕！我不敢睁眼看你呀！
Waaah... please go away! I'm scared! I don't even dare look at you!
我本来是火花派来监视学生们的，但今天的天气很好，我实在是无心工作。
Sparxie sent me to monitor the students, but the weather's so nice today, and I just can't focus.
你看，这里的景色多好啊，天高云淡，还有绘世的画作…此情此景，真令我忍不住想要填一首词。
Look around, such clear skies, such light clouds, and Graphia's painting before us. Makes me want to write a poem.
举头仰望鸽川涌，涛似层峦浪如峰…唔…唔…最后一句想不出来了，{NICKNAME}同学，来帮帮忙！
I raise my head and gaze upon the roaring Dovebrook rapids, with waves like peaks and ridges... Hmm... I can't think of the last line. {NICKNAME}, help me!
「举头仰望鸽川涌，涛似层峦浪如峰，身在此画中。」
"I raise my head and gaze upon the roaring Dovebrook rapids, with waves like peaks and ridges, I am within the painting."
妙笔啊！前两句是「观赏者」的视角，最后一句，却将视角转化成了「画中人」…妙啊！也许我们每个人，都曾是别人眼中的风景。
Brilliant! The first two lines are from the viewer's point of view, while the last turns inward to the person in the painting... Terrific. Maybe we've all been part of someone else's scenery.
I can feel the breeze brush past startled swans.
「举头仰望鸽川涌，涛似层峦浪如峰，清风拂惊鸿。」
"I raise my head and gaze upon the roaring Dovebrook rapids, with waves like peaks and ridges, I can feel the breeze brush past startled swans."
嗯，真是不错…词的视角随着诗人抬头「仰望」，先是层峦般的涛，再是山峰般的浪，最后则是高远的天空，清风吹拂着飞鸟…意境真是辽阔啊！
Lovely. The poem's view lifts with the poet's gaze, from the surging waves to the mountain peaks, and finally to the sky, where a breeze stirs swans mid‑flight. What a grand image!
I gaze upon the roaring Dovebrook rapids.
「举头仰望鸽川涌，涛似层峦浪如峰，仰望鸽川涌。」
"I raise my head and gaze upon the roaring Dovebrook rapids, with waves like peaks and ridges, I gaze upon the roaring Dovebrook rapids."
好！好！好！所谓「看山是山，看山不是山，看山还是山」，这首诗词就体现了此种妙趣！
Wonderful. "See the mountain as a mountain, then not, and then once more." That's exactly the subtle charm of poetry here.
第一句和最后一句，都是「举头仰望鸽川涌」。但见证这幅作品的雄伟之后，「仰望」的心境也变得截然不同…一切尽在不言中！

The first line and the last line are both "gaze upon the roaring Dovebrook rapids." Repetition makes the act of gazing change its meaning entirely after the person witnesses such grandeur. What's left unsaid speaks volumes!
I long to hold you close.
「举头仰望鸽川涌，涛似层峦浪如峰，想与你相拥。」
"I raise my head and gaze upon the roaring Dovebrook rapids, with waves like peaks and ridges, I long to hold you close."
诗人的天赋，不在于能否用些生僻的词语典故，而在于能否活用俚俗之语。这首词便是如此。
A true poet's talent doesn't lie in fancy words. The beauty lies in turning the simple into something heartfelt, which is exactly what this poem conveys.
在仰望一副伟大的作品之后，诗人并未沉湎于宏大叙事，而是退回私人的场域，呼唤一个温暖的拥抱…妙啊！
After facing grandeur, the poet does not indulge in the grand narrative, yet turns inward, craving the warmth of an embrace. Perfect!
「举头仰望鸽川涌，涛似层峦浪如峰，{F#我是大姐头。}{M#我是你老公。}」
"I raise my head and gaze upon the roaring Dovebrook rapids, with waves like peaks and ridges, {F#I'm the big lady boss.}{M#I'm your hubby.}"
…这前两句，看起来确实是诗兴大发，但加上最后一句，怎么感觉就有点像{F#野心大发}{M#兽性大发}了？
...The first two lines sound inspired, but that ending makes it feel more like {F#unbridled ambition}{M#unfettered desire} than poetry.
不管怎么说，感谢你帮我完成了这首词。今天就让我假装没看到你吧！
Anyway, thanks for helping me finish the poem. I'll pretend I didn't see you today.
我们不是说好了，「左眼站岗、右眼放哨」。现在要是连你也在放哨，我们还怎么替火花监视学生？
Hey, didn't we agree "the left eye stands guard, and the right eye keeps watch"? If you're keeping watch, how are we supposed to help Sparxie monitor the students?
凭什么每次都是我站岗，你放哨。这次也该轮到我放哨了吧？
Why do I always have to stand guard while you keep watch? It's about time we switched roles, don't you think?
你消极怠工，还和我吵架！你完了，我要上报火花，让她好好惩罚你！
You're slacking off and arguing with me! You're in trouble now. I'm reporting you to Sparxie. Let's see how she punishes you!
可是…可是我们本来就是同一双眼睛！要是惩罚我，那不也就成了惩罚你吗？
But... but we're literally the same pair of eyes! If she punishes me, you're punished as well!
唔…确实…唔…好吧！那这次我吃点亏，暂时「右眼站岗，左眼放哨」！下不为例！
Hmm... You've got a point... Ugh, fine! I'll take the loss this time. Let's say "the right eye stands guard, and the left eye keeps watch." Just this once!
请不要和我搭话，{NICKNAME}同学。我的工作是替火花监视你们，不是和你们做朋友。
Don't talk to me, {NICKNAME}. My job is to keep watch on behalf of Sparxie, not to make friends with you.
（这双眼睛冷漠地看着你。看起来，它确实是一双尽忠职守的眼睛。还是离它远点吧。）
(The eyes stare at you coldly. They seem utterly loyal to their duty. Best to keep your distance.)
嘿嘿嘿，我真是选了个好地方！只要贴在这个高台上，就能轻松替火花监视下面全部的学生！
Hehehe, what a perfect spot! From up here, I can watch every student below for Sparxie without breaking a sweat!
呜哇…好高好高好高！糟了，我忘记自己有恐高症了！
Whoa, it's so high! Way too high! Oh, no... I forgot I'm afraid of heights!
呃…实在不行，还是先监视云彩吧！还有天上的鸟！说不定有学生想利用飞鸟来做坏事呢？
Ugh... Okay, let's just keep an eye on the clouds for now! And the birds! Maybe some students are using birds to pull off shady stuff!
没错，即使不敢看向地面，天空也有很多值得监视的目标。我这不算失职。我只是找到了其他方式，迂回地监视学生们的动向。
Yeah, that's right. Even if I can't look down, there's plenty to keep watch on in the sky. I'm not slacking off. I'm just taking an alternative approach to surveillance.
最终，这双眼睛成功说服了自己。
In the end, this pair of eyes manages to convince itself.
…这家伙怎么一直盯着我看？难道我暴露了？我的伪装明明天衣无缝啊！
...Why is this person staring at me like that? Don't tell me I've been exposed! My disguise should be flawless!
你为什么贴在一张海报上？
Why are you plastered on a poster?
我…呃…我本来就是一张海报呀！我是绘世学院的社团招新海报，没什么特别的，别盯着我看了。啾咪。
I... Uh... I am a poster! Just a regular club recruitment poster in Graphia Academy. Nothing weird here. Stop staring at me! Squeak~
Did you just try to act cute?
招新海报是不会说话的。
唉…算了，我也演不下去了。
*sigh* Fine, you caught me. I can't keep up the act.
我本以为自己可以凭借天衣无缝的伪装技巧，在无人知晓的情况下监视学生们的行动……
I really thought my flawless disguise skills would let me monitor the students in secret...
谁曾想！{NICKNAME}同学竟然如此狡猾，轻而易举地就看穿了我天衣无缝的伪装！
But who would've guessed that you, {NICKNAME}, would be so sharp? You saw right through my perfect disguise in an instant!
你这伪装技术和谁学的？
Who taught you how to disguise like that?
天衣无缝在哪儿呢我请问了？
Perfect disguise? Where exactly is the "perfect" part?
哼，不要费心追问了。我绝对不会告诉你们任何事情！
Hmph, don't bother asking. I'm not telling you anything!
火花对你的防备是有道理的，你实在是太聪明了…唔…好不甘心！
Sparxie was right to be cautious about you. You're way too clever for your own good... Ugh, this is so frustrating!
这双眼睛恶狠狠地瞪着你，不再言语。
The eyes glare at you fiercely and fall silent.
共愿帮这群家伙，竟然在幻月满盈的当口整出这么大动静…阿蓝，你怎么看？
Can't believe those Synwish Syndicate folks would stir up such a commotion right when Phantasmoon is at its fullest... What's your take on this, Blue?
此时此刻，有哪个黑暗势力不在觊觎幻月游戏和阿哈的力量？
At this very moment, there's barely any dark force that isn't coveting the Phantasmoon Games and the power of Aha...
反派很多，但英雄却很少。
That means, out there are countless villains, while the heroes are few and far between.
这种级别的小喽啰，就和电影大结局铺天盖地的杂兵一样，只会「咿呀」乱叫，掀不起什么风浪。
These little thugs are like those swarms of disposable grunts in a movie's big finale. They just go "yee-yah" and make a racket, but can't stir up any real trouble.
用不着你们变身，我一个人就能把他们全揍趴下。
No need for you guys to transform. I can take care of them all by myself.
阿黄，你难道又忘了吗？破晓战队是守护二相乐园的英雄，不是打架斗殴的团伙。
Come on, Yellow, did you forget again? We Daybreak Squadron are heroes who protect Planarcadia, not some street gang picking fights!
回答我，我们是为了什么而战的？
Tell me, what are we fighting for?
为了大家的幸福和笑容！
很好，现在还不是暴露身份的时候。就让我们守望这片幻月下的土地，捍卫人们安眠的——
Good, now's not the time to expose our identity. Let us watch over this land under the Phantasmoon, protecting the peaceful slumber of...
队长，还不回去吗？导演已经等我们好久了。
Boss, aren't we heading back yet? The director's been waiting for us for ages.
而且我早说过，共愿帮真没你们想的那么坏，不会伤害大家的。
And as I said before, the Synwish Syndicate isn't as bad as you all think. You know, they won't hurt anyone.
小灰，你先撤，让我再和邪恶的反派势力对峙一会儿。
Gray, fall back. Let me face off with these evil villains for a bit longer.
没想到，幻月游戏刚开幕，那些想要危害二相乐园的恶徒就按耐不住了。
Who would've thought that the Phantasmoon Games has barely begun, and those villains plotting against Planarcadia are already getting restless.
是时候让我们破晓战队来拯救世界了。
Time for the Daybreak Squadron to save the world.
才获得新的机铠，我的微笑之拳已经跃跃欲试。
Just got the new mechatron, and my Smiling Fist is itching for action.
哼，暴力女终究就是暴力女，要战胜强大的敌人，真正重要的，是冷静与睿智的头脑。
Hmph, a violent girl will always be a violent girl. To defeat powerful enemies, what truly matters is having a cool head and a sharp mind.
在精密的分析之下，任何邪恶，都弹指可破。
Under precise analysis, any evil can be shattered with a snap of a finger.
是吗？我倒觉得，最强大的力量，应该是友情！勇气！和幸福！
Oh yeah? Well, I think the greatest power comes from friendship! Courage! And happiness!
只要我们四个人齐心协力，破晓战队就所向睥睨。
With the four of us working together, Daybreak Squadron will be unstoppable!
啊，说到齐心协力…队长，小灰刚刚发短信说，导演又在催我们回片场了，再不回去，今天的晚饭就只有方便面了。
Ah, speaking of which... Boss, Gray just messaged saying the director's pushing us to get back on set again. If we don't hurry back, it's instant noodles for dinner tonight.
你好你好，欢迎你来到音乐教室，请问你…喜欢我们的演奏吗？请提出你的意见！
Hi there! Welcome to the music classroom. So... what do you think of our performance? We'd love to hear your feedback!
这里除了我们好像也没有别人在演奏了…你以为我们是在放唱片吗？
I don't see anyone else playing around here... Did you think that was just a record?
Not bad, but you could use more practice.
非常中肯的评价，你真是一个贴心的人，我们会再接再厉的法啦啦～
That's a very fair assessment. You're so considerate! We'll keep working on it~
That was pretty bad. You should probably practice more...
你真是一个严格的人，明白了，我们还得好好努力继续练习法啦啦～
You're a tough critic! Okay, we get it. We'll just have to try harder and keep practicing~
虽然你给的是批评，但是花花好开心～
I'm still super happy, even if you're being critical~
这样吧！我们还有首曲子正在练习，也希望你能随心一听！
Alright! We're working on another song, and we'd be happy if you'd give it a listen!
让我听听吧，你们的摇滚。
Let's hear it, your rock 'n' roll.
请不要换，先把这首练好。
Don't switch songs just yet. You should master this one first.
Okay, we'll stick with this one then~
我感觉练习得差不多了，正打算换一首，你觉得怎么样呢？法啦啦～
I feel like we've gotten the hang of this one. I was thinking of switching to a new song, what do you say?
让我听听吧，你们的摇滚。
Let's hear it, your rock 'n' roll.
请不要换，先把这首练好。
Don't switch songs just yet. You should master this one first.
Okay, we'll stick with this one then~
现场的朋友们！Love & Peace！耶耶耶…啊，你觉得怎么样呢？法啦啦！
Hey everyone! Love & Peace! Yay yay yay... So, what do you think?
突然情绪来了，想听流行的。
I'm suddenly in the mood for some pop music.
...Spirit of the Sky, Spirit of the Earth...
...O Great Aha, please descend upon me!
Please give us a new company president~
有新社长了，咱们杂志社…
Once we've got a new president, and our magazine...
喜哉！小狸应在鸽川悠悠…
Oh joy! A little furbo like me should be lounging at Dovebrook...
怎么没有那个，就是那个…
Why don't we have that? You know, that...
You know, "that furbo's pretty cute. Pet it."
That's weird, there are usually so many books here...
用的时候一本也找不到…
Why can't I find any of them when I need it...
好想要浣熊大人的同款…
I really want the same one that the Great Raccoon has...
Huh!? I mean the same baseball bat!
Ugh, the submission deadline is upon me!
I haven't even written a single word yet...
侦探先生，刚刚点了外卖…
Mr. Detective just ordered some takeout...
外卖到了，可他还没醒啵…
The delivery's here, but he's still out cold...
So what now, hang it on the door?
浣熊大人爱喝哪种茶水呢？
What kind of tea does the Great Raccoon like to drink?
有没有可能，是苏乐达呶？
Stop it... Stop being such tryhards...!
你们的新工位在那边啵…
Your new workstations are over there...
原来你们会分开说话啵！
Wait, so you guys can speak separately!
一幅招贴画，突兀地出现在档案室的黑板上。你记得自己见过这位「飘飘双耳如扶风弱柳，半阖双眸似秋波欲眠」的绯英…以及那「命运般的邂逅」。

A poster, jarringly out of place, has appeared on the archive room's blackboard. You remember seeing this Evanescia, with "With ears that sway like the feeble willows in a gentle breeze, and half-lidded eyes drowsy as autumn waters, ready to slumber"... and that "fateful encounter."
你也记得她拉着你的手通向幻月秘庭，所谓「幻月游戏」的仪式中枢。你被她称作「主角」，或许主角的特权就是能够再次造访秘庭…这很合理吧？

You also remember her leading you by the hand to the Phantasmoon Courtyard, the ceremonial heart of the so-called "Phantasmoon Games." She called you the "Protagonist." Maybe being the protagonist means you get to visit the Courtyard again... Makes sense, right?
Try to enter the Phantasmoon Courtyard.
你是受邀之人，秘庭向你开放——
You are the invited guest. The Courtyard opens for you...
I just wanna check out the painting of Evanescia.
你端详着这画中的粉发女子，工笔设色，仪容清丽。她身形微侧，似有微风拂过，衣袂轻扬…你不禁代入其中，此时的她正在想什么呢？

You gaze at the pink-haired girl in the painting, rendered in meticulous brushwork with delicate colors and an ethereal beauty. Her figure turns slightly to the side, as if a gentle breeze is flowing past, her garments rippling softly... You can't help but imagine yourself in her shoes. What could she be thinking right now?
你还真别说，有点太合理了。满脑子都是漫画呢。
You know what, that actually makes way too much sense. Comics are all you ever think about.
幻月游戏不同谒者的动向？
Movements of the Supplicants in the Phantasmoon Games?
呵呵，合理的猜测，毕竟身在游戏之中——看清别的玩家，也是看清自己。
Hehe, a reasonable guess. After all, when you're in the Games, you see through yourself when you see through the other players.
哦？你是说，这位可爱的粉发女子正在想你。
Oh? You're saying this adorable pink-haired girl is thinking about you.
You also have rather grand fantasies.
她其实什么都没有在想。
She's not thinking about anything at all.
难道说，她给你留下了「脑袋空空」的印象吗？
Wait, did she come off as a total airhead to you?
还是说你也有脑袋空空的感受？说不定，那只是你睡眠不足的原因。
Or are you feeling a bit empty-headed, too? Maybe you're just sleep-deprived.
有机会找绯英求证一下吧，她应该很高兴和你聊天的。
When you get the chance, why don't you ask Evanescia about it? I'm sure she'd be thrilled to chat with you.
当然了，画总是恒常不变的，而人总是来去自由的。欢迎你随时回来。
Of course. Paintings are eternal, but people come and go as they please. You're welcome back anytime.
黑猫拍立得，二相乐园最受欢迎的大头贴自助摄影机。除了「色彩艳丽」、「美颜过度」这些既有优点之外，还有着独一无二的「妄想」功能。
Black Cat Instacam is the most popular photo sticker booth in Planarcadia. Beyond its existing perks like vibrant colors and excessive beautification, it also features a unique "delusion" function.
很高兴为您服务喵。请您走近一些，将您那可爱的面庞对准镜头，让我带您进入「妄想剧场」喵。
At your service, meow! Please come closer and point that adorable face of yours at the camera. Allow me to guide you into the Delusional Theater, meow!
妄想剧场，当然就是能满足您痴心妄想的地方喵。
The Delusional Theater is, of course, the place where all your wildest delusions come true, meow!
比如非日常的场景啦，熟悉的老演员啦，只要您愿意，我就能把它们拍成剧照喵。
Be it unusual scenes, familiar old actors, you name it, as long as you're up for it, I can turn anything into movie stills, meow!
是任何的妄想都可以吗？
Can it be any kind of delusion?
所有能够妄想出的场景和演员，必须经过严格的合规审查…妄想不是法外之地呢～
All delusional scenes and actors must go through a strict compliance review... Even delusions aren't above the law~
每台拍立得的「妄想剧场」都不一样，您在街头巷尾多找找，一定能拍到属于你的「人生照片」喵。
Each Instacam has its own Delusional Theater. So if you look around the streets and alleys, you'll definitely snap that life-defining photo of yours, meow!
您不去想，我们就没法帮您实现。只要您敢想，我们总有办法…大概，喵。
If you don't picture it, we can never make it happen for you. But if you dare to dream it, we'll always find a way... probably, meow.
I can't wait any longer, action!
