试试更简单粗暴的方法吧，直接esc！
Try something simpler and brute. Just hit Esc!
整个事务所的空气中弥漫着若有若无的消毒水气味，似乎想要掩盖罪恶的气息。
A faint scent of disinfectant permeates the air in the office, as if trying to conceal an aura of sin.
我还是要再次声明，这里发生的一切都是「妄想」，与现实世界无关哦。
I must reiterate that everything that happens here are just delusions and has nothing to do with the real world, got it?
至于剧场里的演员组合，全凭你自己选择喵。
As for the cast in the theater, it's all up to you to choose, meow.
You've spent the least amount of time with me.
You can decide for yourself, which path do you want to take?
Boss, don't worry. I won't betray you.
人心散了，队伍不好带了。
I've lost the will of the people. The team will be hard to lead.
以后你就是这里的老大了。
From now on, you'll be the boss here.
我明白了！全部交给我吧。
Got it! Leave it all to me.
Let me ask you, what's the goal of the gang?
帮派对你来说还是太沉重了。
The gang is too much of a burden for you.
I have something to ask of you.
Go ahead, what do you need me to do?
The way you speak is a little scary.
Tell me! Who bullied all of you?
鼹鼠党的怒火无人可挡！
The fury of The Moles is unstoppable!
Big Sis Natasha is looking for you.
这件事就当我没听过吧。
I'll pretend I didn't hear that.
宽敞的教室，整齐的课桌椅，青春洋溢的学生，多么刻板印象的校园生活喵。
A spacious classroom, neat desks and chairs, youthful and energetic students. What a stereotypical impression of campus life, meow.
我还是要再次声明，这里发生的一切都是「妄想」，与现实世界无关哦。
I must reiterate that everything that happens here are just delusions and has nothing to do with the real world, got it?
至于剧场里的演员组合，全凭你自己选择喵。
As for the cast in the theater, it's all up to you to choose, meow.
Both of your answer sheets are the same.
这问题有什么不懂的吗？
Do you have anything you don't understand about this question?
Teacher, March still doesn't get it.
Well then, let's hear it from March.
I understand the question, not the answer.
Teacher, do you have any suggestions?
Teacher, please don't talk about dromases.
Does that mean alchemy is very practical?
亲人会背叛，战友会背叛…
You know that family will betray you. You know comrades will betray you...
You mean to say, alchemy won't?
Alchemy is but a tool, you either know it or you don't.
Do you remember the sword moves just now?
Yunli, you need to forget them too!
Forget the form, for divine skill to find its way.
I think I taught them wrongly just now.
欢迎来到妄想剧场，这里没有什么是必须做的，随便逛随便看。
Welcome to the Delusional Theater! There's nothing you have to do here. Just kick back, wander around, and take it all in.
对了，那边的「演员」是可以手动更换的，遇到有趣的表演，记得及时抓拍喵。
Oh, and you can manually swap out the "actors" over there. When you spot an interesting performance, make sure to capture it in time, meow!
如果逛得差不多了，随时可以退出，也欢迎再回来玩喵。
If you're done browsing, feel free to leave anytime. You're always welcome back, meow!
哎，这真行得通吗…要不算了吧……
Ugh, is this really gonna work...? Maybe we should just forget it...
啊！对不起，我是不是挡到您了？抱歉抱歉，我马上——慢着，我认识你！
Ah! Sorry, am I in your way? My bad, my bad, I'll move right. Wait, I know you!
你是那个拳打绝灭大君、生吃末日兽、长着三头六臂的球棒浣熊！帮帮我！球棒浣熊大人！
You're the Baseball Raccoon who punched out a Lord Ravager, ate a Doomsday Beast alive, and has three heads and six arms! Help me! Great Baseball Raccoon!
The rumors are getting more and more ridiculous.
我一直想找个更有趣的工作，但…你也能看出来，我一没胆魄，二没实力，实在想不出还能做什么。
I've always wanted to find something more interesting to do, but... well, you can see for yourself. I lack the guts and the skills. Can't really think of what else I could do.
所以，朋友建议我换个新形象，重新做机。但我一时半会儿也想不到该怎么办。
So, my friends suggested I get a makeover and reboot my whole persona. But I don't know what to actually.
拿更强的装备武装自己！
我明白了！就把我这无能的躯体，改造成真正的战斗机器吧。
I understand! I'll remake this pathetic body of mine into a true combat machine.
Just wait for my good news!
让自己成为有用的机铠。
原来如此，生命的真谛，就是让大家的生活变得更美好——我知道该怎么改装自己了。
I see now... the true meaning of life is to make everyone's lives better. I know exactly how to modify myself now.
真、真的吗？只要改变颜色，就能焕然一新？
R—Really? Just change the color, and I look brand-new?
你来啦，在改造的时候，我和机枪先生好好聊了一下，它的霸念已深深地打动了我。
You're here! While working on the modifications, Mr. Machine Gun and I had a great chat. Its unyielding conviction has truly moved me.
在我面前，就算是曾经如日中天的共愿帮，也不过一群土鸡瓦犬。什么治安局、执行官，天下都已是我的囊中之物！
Before me, even the once mighty Synwish Syndicate is nothing but a bunch of clowns. The Security Bureau, the CEOs... the whole world is already in the palm of my hand!
再见了，朋友，我要去成立一番大事业，祝我好运吧！
See ya, friend! I'm off to build something marvelous! Wish me luck!
不久之后，治安局逮捕了一名当街抢劫噗噜的机铠，缴获赃物乐园纪念币2枚、棒棒糖一颗。
Shortly after, the Security Bureau arrested a mechatron for mugging a ploo on the street. Seized evidence: 2 Arcadian Tokens and one lollipop.
您好，很高兴再见到您，我现在十分想报答您的恩情，让新手臂发挥它应有的作用。
Hello! It's great to see you again. I'm really eager to repay your kindness and put this new arm to good use.
您家里需要疏通下水管道吗？最近有没有装修和翻新的需求？
Does your home need sewer cleaning services? Been thinking about doing any renovations or remodeling lately?
你怎么突然变了个人似的。
Why are you acting like a totally different person all of a sudden?
因为愿力，我的朋友，有一股灼热的愿力在我的体内熊熊燃烧。
Because of Wishpower, my friend. A blazing Wishpower is burning within me.
没关系，一定还有很多人需要我的帮助，我这就去为二相乐园的群众服务！
No worries, I'm sure there are plenty of people who need my help! I'm off to serve the citizens of Planarcadia!
后来，二相乐园出现了一位牙医，它所开创的电钻拔牙技术，深刻改变了乐园的牙科领域。
Later, a dentist appeared in Planarcadia, whose pioneering power drill extraction technique revolutionized the arcadia's entire dental field.
你认出眼前的机铠，正是听从了你的建议，将头发染成大人模样的那位。不得不说，它现在真的很酷，很酷……
You recognize the mechatron before you. It's the one that took your advice and dyed its hair to look like a grown-up. You gotta admit, it looks really cool now. Like, really cool...
它欲言又止，恍惚间，心理活动已写满一整页的硬汉小说。
It hesitates, words caught in its throat, and in that fleeting moment, its inner monologue could fill an entire page of a tough guy novel.
它默默地看着你，一言不发。
It stares at you in silence, without saying a word.
很酷的人，是从不说再见的。
透过玻璃墙，你的目光不自觉地被尽头那巨大的头颅吸引。
Through the glass wall, your gaze is drawn, almost instinctively, to the massive head at the far end.
你非常清楚，二相乐园不存在这么大的机铠。你的好奇心不由地被它吸引，可隔着玻璃，任何声音都变得窸窣。
You know for a fact that Planarcadia doesn't have mechatrons this massive. Your curiosity is drawn to it, but through the glass, every sound becomes a muffled whisper.
And so, you decide to unleash—
「██<unbreak>0093</unbreak>█████████」，一丝机械、不含任何感情的声音渗过墙壁。
"██<unbreak>0093</unbreak>█████████," a mechanical, emotionless voice seeps through the wall.
「██<unbreak>0093</unbreak>█████████」，在它摄像头的余光中，你瞥到一串转瞬即逝的数据。
"██<unbreak>0093</unbreak>█████████," in the corner of its camera's field of view, you catch a glimpse of a fleeting string of data.
「██<unbreak>0093</unbreak>█████████」，恍惚间，你似乎与它的机魂达成了共鸣，支离破碎的信息钻入你的脑海。
"██<unbreak>0093</unbreak>█████████," in a daze, you seem to resonate with its machine spirit, and fragmented information drills into your mind.
虽然，这个办公室透明公开，完全不像有秘密的样子。但此刻，你的超级推理非常确信，这一定是藏木于林的诡计。
Sure, the office is transparent and wide open, totally not the kind of place you'd hide secrets. But right now, your super logic is convinced that this is a trick hiding in plain sight.
你在不经意间，涉足了某个不为人知的研究，找到一串能开启装满了邪恶档案的保险柜的密码。
Before you knew it, you stepped into some unknown research and found the passcode to a vault crammed full of shady files.
我今天必查个水落石出。
I'm getting to the bottom of this today, no matter what.
你继续放大自己的超级感官，誓要揪出公司在二相乐园的把柄。
You expand your super-senses even further, determined to dig up dirt on the IPC in Planarcadia.
不愧是银河球棒侠，你的正义之心战胜了懒惰。而那头颅口中的呢喃，也终于变得清晰。
As expected of the Galactic Baseballer, your sense of justice has triumphed over laziness. And the murmurs from within that head have finally become clear.
「工号<unbreak>0093</unbreak>，监测到你已陷入睡眠，如在第3次警告后仍未回归工作模式，将记作早退，扣除本月绩效。」

"Employee ID <unbreak>0093</unbreak>, sleep mode detected. If you fail to return to work mode after the third warning, this will be logged as an early departure, and your monthly performance bonus will be deducted."
那是来自监控摄像头的，冰冷刺骨的咒语。
It was a cold, bone-chilling curse, delivered straight from the surveillance cameras.
可惜，你的好奇心仍止步于此。从此与乐园最深邃黑暗的故事（也许并不）失之交臂。
Unfortunately, your curiosity ends here. From this moment on, you've (maybe not) missed your chance at uncovering the darkest, most profound story of the arcadia.
说不定，那就只是个超大型摄像头呢？
Maybe it's just a giant camera?
办公室尽头的巨大人形监控装置，实时监测着员工的生命体征与注意力集中度，让人怀疑到底谁才是机器。
At the far end of the office looms a massive humanoid monitoring system, tracking employees' vital signs and focus levels in real time, making you wonder who the real machines are here.
透明的办公室里，员工们正在忙碌地工作，一举一动，都在游客的眼中。这大概也是一种「全透明化管理」吧。
Inside the transparent office, employees bustle about their work, every move on full display for passing tourists. Talk about "totally transparent management."
全自动AI管家，全天无死角监控，营造更好的工作环境，为员工带来家一般的温暖。
A fully automated AI butler with no blind spots <unbreak>24</unbreak>/7, creating a better work environment and bringing employees the warmth of home.
各位请看，这便是我司最新出品的星核猎手萨姆雕像，按照高清录像一比一还原，保证比萨姆本人还邪恶一百倍。

Ladies and gentlemen, feast your eyes on our company's latest masterpiece: the Stellaron Hunter's SAM statue! Faithfully recreated at 1:1 scale from HD footage, it's guaranteed to be a hundred times more sinister than SAM themself.
那很邪恶了——不过，为什么是战损涂装的？
Okay, cool... but why does it have a battle-worn finish?
当然是因为，星核猎手在战略投资部正义的铁拳面前，永远都是被打得落花流水的那方。
Obviously, it's because the Stellaron Hunters stand no chance against the crushing might of the Strategic Investment Department's righteous iron fist.
通缉犯的模型你们也卖？
You guys sell wanted criminal models too?
在上季度的新品投票中，我们发现，星核猎手在寰宇间有着不菲的人气。
In last quarter's new product poll, we found that the Stellaron Hunters enjoy quite the popularity across the cosmos.
既然市场呼声如此，我们当然要「存护」消费者的集体诉求。
Given such vocal demand from the market, we naturally have to "preserve" the collective will of our consumers.
Why did you include your opinion in the explanation?
我以人格担保，方才的讲解完全参照星际和平网络新闻资料库，绝无半点虚构。
I swear on my own name that my entire explanation is drawn directly from the Interastral Peace Network news archives. Not a single word of fiction in there.
你大概能想象，在公司的战报中，他们是怎么一次次挫败星核猎手的邪恶阴谋的。
You can well imagine how the IPC's reports spin it: time and again, they heroically thwart the Stellaron Hunters' sinister schemes.
Isn't that a violation of their right of publicity?
这位客人，你的指控中有两个错误。首先，这位萨姆并非现实中的萨姆，而是《破晓战队VS萨姆》中的登场角色。
To clarify, there are two points to address. Firstly, this is not a depiction of the actual Stellaron Hunter, but a fictional character from Daybreak Squadron vs. SAM.
其次，倘若萨姆先生认为我司产品涉嫌侵犯其肖像权，他完全可以亲自出庭，在庇尔波因特的法院向我们发起诉讼。

Secondly, if the individual in question takes issue with the alleged infringement, they are perfectly at liberty to lodge a complaint against us in the halls of Pier Point's judiciary, in person, of course.
For your people to arrest them?
我只是作为一位合法公民，给出了应有的建议。不愿意，那就是萨姆先生的问题了。
I'm simply doing my civic duty by offering some sound advice. Should SAM decline to act on it, the matter rests with them.
非常感谢你的夸奖，我们会继续保持的。
We aim to please. Your recognition fuels our dedication.
我作为亲友可以替她告你！
As their friend, I can sue you on her behalf!
很抱歉，按照星际和平公司的法律，肖像权纠纷需要本人亲自发起才能受理。
My apologies, but according to IPC regulations, the right of publicity disputes can only be filed by the individual in question personally.
至于这台机甲，我们已聘请了著名原型师「觉布•跳票」制作等比例模型玩具，现已进入预售阶段。
As for this mech, we've commissioned the renowned prototype artist, Naemhor Postpone, to produce a scale model collectible. It is now available for pre-order.
现在订购，在下个琥珀纪前就能拿到了。
Order now, and you'll have it before the next Amber Era.
浑身烧焦的格拉默铁骑…这是你不曾见过，又或者遗忘了的，她的某一刻吗？
A charred Glamoth's Iron Cavalry... Is this a facet of her you never saw, or perhaps one you've forgotten?
据统计，在星际机甲爱好者的集体论坛中，每3个系统时，就会有2人因战损和原装模型谁更帅而引发一场网络战争。

Statistics show that across interstellar mech fan communities, a flame war breaks out about every 3 system hours, ignited by a pair of enthusiasts debating whether the battle-worn or stock models look cooler.
不得不承认，把敌人做成模型，非常符合公司的做派。只要有钱可赚，他们能把路易斯•弗莱明都做成盲盒公仔。
Gotta admit, turning enemies into collectible figures is totally on-brand for the IPC. Were there profit in it, even Louis Fleming would be packaged into blind box plushies.
古早的海报，宣扬着机铠与人类的和谐共处，以消除居民对这一新兴种族的恐惧。
A vintage poster promoting harmony between mechatrons and humans, meant to ease residents' fears about this emergent species.
时至今日，机铠已成为乐园生活不可或缺的一份子，游客们争先恐后地体验着「人机一体」，旧时海报的含义，也早已被淡忘。

In arcadia today, mechatrons have become an indispensable part of life. As visitors flock to embody the vision of "man and mechatron in perfect harmony," the original meaning behind those old posters has long since faded into obscurity.
以破晓战士为首批示范，无自我意识的可着装机铠已进入开发阶段，预计将对老年人、残障群体生活带来较大提升。

With the Daybreak Warrior as the leading model, development is now underway on non-autonomous wearable mechatrons, which are projected to substantially improve the quality of life for elderly and disabled people.
但也有不少人担心，该技术的滥用，将导致人与幻造种的界线进一步模糊。
But a lot of people are worried that the abuse of this technology will blur the line between humans and imagenae even further.
从「不要怕，机铠都是我们的好朋友」到「爸爸爸爸，长大了，我也要做大机器人的驾驶员。」
From "Don't be scared, mechatrons are all our friends" to "Dad, I'm going to pilot a giant robot when I grow up."
充分说明了，什么叫——质疑机铠、理解机铠、成为机铠。总有一天，每个人都会控大机器人的。
This transformation is a perfect example of what they call: question the mechatron, understand the mechatron, become the mechatron. One day, everyone's gonna pilot giant robots.
时至今日，二相乐园的愿力已无法供给这样的巨人行走，赋予它智慧。
To this day, Planarcadia's Wishpower can no longer keep such a giant moving, let alone grant it intelligence.
这并非是量的问题，而是更本质的——人们不愿再相信，他们能创造出一个远比自己还宏大的个体。
It's not a matter of scale, but something more fundamental: people have ceased to believe they can create something far greater than themselves.
冰冷的金属伫立在此处，看不见未来，只能冰冷地凝望着现在。
This cold metal stands here, blind to the future, staring down the moment with indifference.
但若你不曾忘记抬头仰望星空，总有一天，就连更庞大的存在，也会因你的选择而迈出脚步吧。
But if you never forget to lift your eyes to the cosmos, then a day will come when even grander beings take their steps forward in answer to the choices you make.
哪怕仍是死物，来到此处的人依然会被眼前的庞然大物震撼，进而感知到个体的渺小。
Even devoid of life, this leviathan leaves visitors awestruck, making them acutely aware of just how small they truly are.
他们往往会遗忘，创造它们的，也是这些渺小的人类。早在数万年前，筑城者就已制造过，比这更庞大的造物。
People forget that these colossal titans were first shaped by such small hands. These were the same hands of the Architects, who millennia ago had already built creations far beyond this.
想要飞得更远、跑得更快、跳得更高，于是制造出四肢的延伸，爬上山顶，飞入云间，最终置身于群星之中。

Driven by the urges to fly farther, run faster, and leap higher, humanity forged extensions of its own form, then conquered peaks, soared into the clouds, and ultimately carried its will into the stars.
如是这样思考，人类文明，就是他们所崇拜的巨人本身。
Seen in this light, the giant they revere is none other than human civilization itself.
Ω型泛用电钻，多位顶尖设计师联合打造，完美符合机体工学曲线，灵活适应工地作业、建筑维修、日常家居等多种情境，您！值得拥有！

The All-Purpose Omega-Type Drill, a masterpiece from our top designers! Ergonomically contoured for perfect handling, it's engineered for construction sites, building maintenance, home repairs, and beyond. Go ahead, you've earned it!
警告：禁止在机铠模特工作时，对其进行捉弄、涂鸦、辱骂等攻击性行为，我司将依照《灵物保护法》，依法保护员工尊严与权益。

Warning: Harassing, vandalizing, or verbally abusing mechatron models during their operational hours is strictly prohibited. We will protect the dignity and legal rights of all employees in accordance with the Faekind Protection Act.
珠星大厦最著名的机铠模特之一，得益于他手中巨大的刺针型钻头，小朋友们都亲切地叫它——「大马蜂」。
This is one of Pearluxe Tower's most famous mechatron models. The huge needle-shaped drill it carries has earned it a cool nickname among kids: "The Hornet."
沉重的机铠躯体，驱动它的，正是封装了「纯净能源与高浓度愿宝」的第三代愿力转化电池，俗称「能愿宝」。
This hefty mechatron is powered by a third-generation Wishpower Conversion Battery, a unit that encapsulates "Pure Energy and High-Density Wishbae," commonly called the "Wishbaenk."
经典的奥克斯型机铠，其原型机因在《形变钢筋》中饰演主角奥克斯一角，成为了闻名二相乐园的电影巨星。
A classic Ox-series mechatron. Its prototype rose to fame as a movie star across Planarcadia for playing the lead role of Ox in Transrebars.
珠星大厦最著名的机铠模特之一，因其极为健硕的身躯，粉丝们为它取了一个贴切的绰号——「超级铁牛」。
This is one of Pearluxe Tower's most famous mechatron models. Noted for its incredibly brawny build, fans aptly nicknamed it the "Super Iron Bull."
宇宙空间中，再渺小的推进器也能发挥难以想象的作用。可惜，没有一台机铠能够逃离乐园的引力圈，翅膀再漂亮，也只是装饰而已。

In the vastness of space, even the tiniest thruster can work wonders beyond imagination. Yet, not a single mechatron can break free from the arcadia's gravitational pull. Their wings, however splendid, are nothing more than extraneous decorations.
第九代推进器（红色限定款），三倍速贴地飞行，安全有保障，以后再也不用挤早高峰了。
The 9th Generation Thruster (Limited Red Edition) delivers triple-speed, low-altitude ground flight with assured safety. Say goodbye to rush hour traffic jams forever!
珠星大厦最著名的机铠模特之一，赤红的色彩与鬼魅的身影为它换来强而有力的别称——「红蝙蝠」。
This is one of Pearluxe Tower's most famous mechatron models. Its crimson finish and ghostly silhouette have earned it a striking nickname: the "Red Bat."
曾有位治安官，在使用机枪和朋友打闹时，忘了将模式从镇压切换回水枪模式。后来，珠星财团就推出了这款打水仗专用款。

Thanks to a security officer who once forgot to switch their machine gun from suppression back to water gun mode while horsing around with friends, Pearluxe Corp was inspired to create this Water Fight Special Edition.
每台机铠在诞生后，都要花上相当长的时间，才能付清与公司签订的「诞生贷款」，这或许能解释，为何处处都能看到机铠打工人的身影。

A significant period following a mechatron's assembly is dedicated to servicing the "Birth Loan" signed with the IPC. This debt cycle perhaps accounts for the pervasive presence of mechatron workers in the general labor force.
珠星大厦最著名的机铠模特之一，由于在摆造型时耍帅，不得不僵持在这个相当累人（机）的姿势，发出嘎吱的摩擦声，故而得名——「累地嘎嘎」。

This is one of Pearluxe Tower's most famous mechatron models. After an attempt to strike an overly cool pose, it is now stuck in a physically (and mechanically) punishing position. The constant, agonizing creaks emanating from its frame earned it a fitting stage name: Rustin' Tinkerlate.
等比例还原的玩具模型，注入微量的愿力后，甚至能够进行小规模的移动。但在看见亲戚家小孩后，会立刻因恐惧陷入僵直状态。
This meticulously scaled model toy is even capable of limited motion when infused with trace amounts of Wishpower. However, it will immediately freeze up in terror upon spotting a relative's kid.
据说，阿哈喜爱在人们拼装模型的时候使用祂的神力，制造出上色手抖、零件失踪、关节断裂、说明书错误等一系列混沌问题。

Legend has it that Aha delights in using THEIR divine power to wreak havoc when people are assembling models, causing smudged paint from shaking hands, vanished parts, snapped joints, misprinted manuals, and a whole host of other chaotic catastrophes.
响应时下风靡乐园的英雄热潮，变身机甲巨人的破晓战队，几乎占据了货架的各个角落。
Riding the wave of the superhero craze sweeping through Arcadia, the Daybreak Squadron has stormed onto shelves to capture nearly every inch of space with its giant transformation mech form.
各位《形变钢筋》的粉丝，你们没有看错，站在台上的正是两位电影主角——的替身演员，请为它们献上热烈的掌声！
Calling all Transrebars fans! Your eyes aren't playing tricks! Taking the stage are the two film lead actors'... stunt doubles! Put your hands together for them!
曾掀起一代机甲热的电影作品，由于星际和平娱乐的竭泽而渔，主角奥克斯已经在数个平行宇宙里数次死亡并数次复活。

A film that sparked a mech craze for an entire generation. Yet, with Interastral Peace Entertainment milking the franchise dry, the protagonist Oks has died and been resurrected multiple times across countless parallel worlds.
每位银河战力党玩家都应该去看一遍《形变钢筋》，因为它有世上最简洁的战力体系——大就是强。
Every member of the Cosmicon Collective should check out Transrebars at least once, because it has the most straightforward power system in the universe: bigger is stronger.
冷知识：协助制造机铠的组装员中，有<unbreak>98%</unbreak>的员工，自己也是机铠。你很难想象它们在工作时的场景。
Fun fact: <unbreak>98%</unbreak> of the workforce assembling mechatrons are themselves mechatrons. It's pretty hard to imagine what the workshop floor must look like.
直到这一步为止，机铠的制造都更接近于玩具，而非机械。至于如何批量地为玩具赋予「灵魂」，那就是商业机密了。
Up to this point, mechatron manufacturing veers closer to toy-making than anything mechanical. As for how to inject an entire line with "souls," well, that's a trade secret.
当这些塑料零件被注入愿力，成为生命的刹那，将在瞬间获得堪比金属的性能。有人曾想出了一个致富秘诀，但后来他就不想了。

The moment these plastic components are infused with Wishpower and come to life, they instantly gain performance rivaling metal. A curious mind once glimpsed a fortune in this, and just as swiftly, ceased such thoughts.
列车已经有一个帕姆了，用不着买第二个。可如果我说，能买一个回去替帕姆分担家务，是不是就心动了？
The Express already has one Pom-Pom, so there's no need to get a second one. But what if I told you that you could buy one to help Pom-Pom with the chores? Now you're interested, aren't you?
看着它滑稽而重复的舞蹈，你不由地遐想，帕姆做出相同动作的样子。
Watching its goofy, looping dance, you can't help but picture about Pom-Pom busting out the exact same steps.
「哪怕是在幻想里，这么对待列车长也太失礼了帕！」
"Even in a fantasy, that's no way to treat the conductor!"
如果说帕姆打扫后的干净程度是<unbreak>100%</unbreak>，那合金帕姆王打扫后的干净程度，就是<unbreak>112%</unbreak>，至于多出来的那些是从哪儿来的，建议你别问。

If Pom-Pom's cleaning sets the standard at <unbreak>100%</unbreak>, then the Alloy King Pom-Pom pushes the metric to <unbreak>112%</unbreak>. As for where that extra <unbreak>12%</unbreak> comes from... best not to ask.
《苍天航路绒绒号》作者，模糊二维马亲自授权的家务机器人，目前正火热抢购中，豪华版还附赠镭射眼杀菌模块哦。

The household robot personally authorized by Blurry_QR_Colt, author of Fluffy Across the Blue, is currently flying off the shelves! The deluxe edition even comes with a laser-eye sterilization module.
你还是不明白，到底什么家务需要用上一套完整的重火力装备。
Seriously, what kind of housework could possibly require a full heavy-artillery loadout?
一千个人心中，就有一千种帕姆，但你确信，无论是哪种帕姆，都不该长这模样。
There are a thousand Pom-Poms in a thousand people's eyes. Yet you're certain that not a single one of them ought to look anything like this.
做推销员，最重要的就是热情，哪怕你是一台身高八尺、肩比冰箱的机器人。
When you're in sales, enthusiasm is everything, even if you're an eight-foot-tall robot with shoulders as wide as a refrigerator.
魁梧的身体里，居住着一个青春洋溢的少女灵魂。
Inside that hulking frame lives the soul of a spirited young girl.
「这些机铠好可怜啊，刚出生就得给公司打工。」；「我好羡慕这些机铠啊，一出生就能找到工作。」
"These poor mechatrons... Fresh off the assembly line and already working for the IPC." "Man, I'm so jealous of these mechatrons. They come out of the factory with a job already lined up."
两台正在努力锻炼的机铠，希冀能像同僚们那般，拥有健硕的身体。但它们不知道，赋予机铠强壮的并非肌肉，而是愿宝买来的新身体。
Two mechatrons pump iron furiously, dreaming of getting as buff as their peers. Little do they know, a mechatron's strength comes not from muscle, but from the shiny new chassis bought with Wishbae.
羸弱的人类站在羸弱的金属后，入神地模仿它们的一举一动，他的每一个细胞都在呐喊着无数肉体凡胎的梦想，「机械飞升！」
A frail human stands behind the frail metal, mesmerized as they mimic its every move. Every cell in their body cries out the dream of countless mortal beings: "Mechanical Ascension!"
看呐，在遥远的珠星大厦，有两只幼年机铠。哦～它们正在和人类学习狩猎的本领，可千万别打扰到它们。
Look, over there at the distant Pearluxe Tower, two baby mechatrons! Aww, they're learning the art of the hunt from humans. Shh! Let's not startle them.
在汲取了一旁同事健身不练腿的教训后，该机铠励精图治，终于练出了四条精壮有力的大腿。不过，似乎有更重要的事物被遗忘了。

After learning from a colleague's mishap of not doing leg day at the gym, this mechatron doubled down on its training regimen and finally forged itself four powerful, muscular thighs. However, it seems something more important was forgotten along the way.
真正的强者总是孤芳自赏，正如把装备全叠到速度属性上的它。「帅是一时的，强才是一辈子。」
A true powerhouse walks a solitary path of glory, much like the one who dumped every last upgrade into speed. "Coolness is fleeting, but being unbreakable is forever."
一切都始于恋人无心的话语，它喜欢四足机甲、喜欢粉色的涂装、喜欢漂亮的翅膀…直到对方离开，才发现自己已变作畸形的模样。
It all began with the careless words of its lover, for quad mechs, for pink hulls, for graceful wings... Only when its lover left did it realize it had twisted itself into something grotesque.
说了多少次，健身一定要练腿！这就是反面教材。
How many times do I have to say it: never skip leg day! This is what happens when you don't.
机铠改造大赛的人气冠军，充分向同行证明了，别管实用性高不高，帅永远是第一位。
The crowd favorite of the Mechatron Modification Championship has made one thing perfectly clear to everyone in the business: practical or not, nothing beats looking cool.
据说，它与某位同事有过一场轰轰烈烈的办公室恋情，于是在分手后用钢甲遮住了流泪的面庞，从此再不相见。
Rumor has it that it once had a passionate office romance with a certain colleague. After the split, it hid its weeping behind a steel mask and swore never to meet again.
珠星大厦年度优秀导游，高赞评论：我家孩子说，只有和它说话的时候，不用抬着头。
Pearluxe Tower's Tour Guide of the Year. Top-rated review: My kid says it's the only one they can talk to without craning their neck.
著名治安官分队「机铠霸王」的队长，负责在合体过程中组成头部，但几乎没人听它说起过从前的故事。
Leader of the famed security officer squad "Mechatron Overlords," it's responsible for forming the head during combination, but almost no one's ever heard it talk about its past.
在某次战斗中失去了力量，仅剩的头部被移植到狭小的身体上。每当鸟儿在清晨鸣唱，那个残酷的黄昏就会再度浮现眼前。
Robbed of power in battle, only its head remained, grafted onto a cramped body. Now, every dawn brings the birds' chorus, summoning back that brutal dusk.
还在为自动化幻造缺乏个性化而烦恼吗？还在因你的外形不够出众而深感自卑吗？本界面附带装备自定义功能，你的身体由你决定！

Tired of mass-produced imagenesis lacking that personal touch? Feeling down because your chassis doesn't quite stand out from the crowd? Well, this interface comes with full equipment customization. Your body, your choice!
不建议任何用户在机体上安装数量超过9个的钻头，无论你有多喜欢钻头。
It is not recommended for any user to install more than 9 drill bits on the chassis, no matter how much you love drill bits.
请购买新设备的机铠在点单完成后，自觉前往改造室入口排队等候，避免造成拥挤。
Mechatrons who have purchased new equipment, please proceed to the entrance of the modification room after placing your order and queue up orderly to avoid congestion.
欢迎选购机铠美容套餐，7天内无理由褪色，<unbreak>72</unbreak>款经典涂装任你选择，专属设计师对接，还你一个靓丽机生。

Welcome to our Mechatron Beauty Package. Enjoy a hassle-free 7-day color change guarantee, select from <unbreak>72</unbreak> classic finishes, work with a dedicated designer, and reclaim the glow-up you deserve.
乐园<unbreak>1999</unbreak>年度配色，真珠白即将售罄，欲购从速。
Color of the Year of Arcadian Year <unbreak>1999</unbreak>, True Pearl, is selling out fast. Grab yours while you can.
"Pearluxe Paint, I've been using it since I was a kid."
应广大消费者需求，现已推出「丢人现眼配色警告」功能，在检测到用户选择黄紫、红绿等高危配色时，将需要二次确认。
By popular demand, the "Fashion Disaster Alert" is now live. Selecting risky combos like yellow-purple or red-green will now require secondary approval before finalizing.
经过数次迭代，机铠改造室已升级为覆盖改装、打磨、喷涂、美容美发等一条龙服务的流水线作业。
After several iterations, the Mechatron Modification Room has leveled up into a full-service assembly line covering everything from refitting and polishing to paint jobs and even grooming services.
改造有风险，医美需谨慎。任何因顾客自定义改造引发的情感、社交、工作问题，公司概不负责。

Modification and aesthetic procedures involve inherent risks, please proceed with caution. We assume no liability for personal, social, or professional consequences resulting from customer-specified alterations.
过来机的提醒，不要把自己改装成暗恋对象的初恋情机，代餐是吃不饱的。
A reminder from someone who's been there: Don't go remodeling yourself into your crush's first love. You can't fill one's heart on a substitute.
如此狂拽酷炫的机甲，哪怕是阿基维利和阿哈本尊来了，也一定会为了抢夺它的驾驶权又哭又闹吧。
Even Akivili and Aha THEMSELVES would probably throw a tantrum fighting over who gets to pilot a mech this ridiculously awesome.
瞧这奢侈的黑金配色，瞧这古典的花纹配饰，简直和星穹列车…不对，公司的版权部门真是越来越猖狂了！
Look at that premium black-and-gold livery, the intricate classic trim. It's practically a dead ringer for the Astral Express... Hold on. The IPC legal team's audacity is really off the chain now!
放空大脑，让你的意识与机甲同步，对，就这样，慢慢地呼吸，聆听机魂的声音——好吧，这应该是个害羞的机魂。

Clear your mind, let your consciousness sync with the mech. Yes, just like that. Breathe slowly... and listen to the voice of the soul within the machine... Well, looks like we have a shy machine spirit here.
被器材固定的特技演员，永久静止在剧情高潮一幕，宛如时代的眼泪。
Locked in place by equipment and frozen forever at the scene's climax, the stunt actor stands like a relic of a bygone era.
「今天，就要你好好见识见识，机器人的脚，可不只是装饰而已！」
"Today, I'll show you that a robot's legs aren't just for show!"
得益于曜青的武术指导设计的动作，与两位演员扎实的基本功，这出惊人的南拳北腿之战足以印刻进每位观众的记忆。

Thanks to the action choreography designed by the Yaoqing's martial arts director and the solid fundamentals of both actors, this breathtaking clash of southern fists versus northern kicks is sure to be etched into every audience's memory.
用于还原电影场景的微缩模型，但比起英雄的战斗，游客们似乎更热衷于体验怪兽破坏城市的快感。
This miniature model is designed for reenacting movie scenes. While it can stage the heroes' battles, visitors seem more into experiencing the thrill of monsters wrecking rampage.
摄影艺术就像一些人的生活，只有对比，才能显示出高大。
The art of photography is like some people's lives in that it only looks impressive when you have something to compare it to.
多部机器人电影的取景地，每天都会有数不清的游客来到这里，齐声复读经典台词。
A filming location for multiple robot movies, this site draws daily crowds of tourists who gather to chant iconic lines in unison.
机铠施工队的绩效冠军，其使用的古法拆迁技巧，已正式列入拆迁作业员培训教程。
Top performer of the mechatron construction crew, whose time-honored demolition techniques have been officially incorporated into the demolition operator training curriculum.
请值班员工不要在下班后，用大厦模型打枕头大战！至少先确认场馆里还有没有人类。
Attention staff on duty: No pillow fights using the building models for after hours! At least make sure there aren't any actual human in the venue first.
为了和建筑物一起摆出这个刁钻的姿势，它每天都要花上两个系统时来化妆和准备，所以——记得给好评，亲。
To strike this tricky pose alongside the building, it spends two whole system hours every day on makeup and prep work. Pretty please, show some love with your review!
与其让旁白说出口，还是你们自己来接吧，我来组成——
Rather than have the narrator say it, why don't you guys finish it yourselves? I'll form—
只要被伊摩吉遮住脑袋，哪怕是真珠来了，也看不出它有没有偷懒睡觉。它不由地为这天才的想法感到自豪。
Once an emoti's head is covered, even Pearl herself couldn't tell if it's slacking off or napping. It couldn't help but feel proud of such a stroke of genius.
它骄傲地叉起腰，摆弄出健美的姿态，丝毫不在意旁人的目光。戴上了面具的同时，也摘下了面具。
Arms akimbo, it flexed into a showy pose, bathing in pride and oblivious to all eyes. In putting on a mask, its true self was freed.
电影《鸭之继承者》的宣传海报，作为系列的最终作，再度使用了十五年前开山之作《哀伤的鸭战士》的经典构图。

A promotional poster for the movie Heir to the Duck. As the final installment of the series, it once again employs the iconic composition from Sorrowful Duck Warrior, the franchise's groundbreaking first film from fifteen years ago.
矮小的噗噜驾驶着不合常理的巨大机器人，在废墟上同反物质军团交战，数百年过去了，乐园的血脉里，对界外天魔的恐惧也仍未断绝。

Petite Ploos pilot impossibly colossal mechs, holding the line against the Antimatter Legion in the ruins. Centuries have passed, yet the dread of the Demons From Beyond still runs deep in the veins of arcadia.
与噗噜可爱的形象相反，电影毫不避讳地展现着战争的残酷面，成为了无数小孩的童年阴影。
In stark contrast to the ploos' adorable image, the movie doesn't hesitate to deliver a raw portrayal of war, searing a childhood nightmare into the minds of a generation.
官方出品的「星穹列车长☆帕姆☆合金玩偶」——做工精良、细节考究，选用优质环保材料，造型高度还原。

The official "Astral Express Conductor ☆ Pom-Pom ☆ Alloy Doll" features exquisite craftsmanship and meticulous attention to detail. Made with premium eco-friendly materials, its design is highly faithful to the original.
另有多款样式替换套装可供选购，包括：常服、小礼服、厨师服、睡衣、泳装、蓬蓬裙、女仆装…什么？你问后面那些什么时候实装？嗐，别问这么伤感情的问题。

There are also plenty of alternate outfit sets available for purchase, including: casual wear, dinner jackets, chef uniforms, pajamas, swimsuits, frilly skirts, maid outfits... What? You're asking when the last few will be released? Ah, don't bring up such a sore subject.
虽然但是，比起这种量产的金属塑像，果然还是自家圆滚滚、暖乎乎的列车长撸起来手感更好。
That said, compared to these mass-produced metal statues, our own chubby, warm and fuzzy conductor is way better to pet.
鉴于官方邀请了模糊二维马老师到场签售，场馆中增设了许多摊位，专门出售《苍天航路绒绒号》典藏版漫画。

Since the organizers officially invited the legendary Blurry_QR_Colt for a live autograph session, they've set up tons of booths all over the venue selling collector's edition copies of Fluffy Across the Blue.
等等，那是什么——怎么还有你的写真集？！哎呀，这可真是…让人怪不好意思的，诶嘿~
Wait, what's that? Is that a photo book of you!? Oh my, this is... kinda embarrassing, ehe~
你状似不经意地瞥了眼写真集封面，然后又瞥了一眼，心中不由暗自感慨：天下怎么会有这样的妙人儿！
You do a casual double-take at the photo book cover, and another. You can't help but wonder: How is there someone this impossibly perfect?
钟表小子，但并不是金碧辉煌的版本。
Clockie, but not the golden, glitzy version.
比起经典的钟表小子形象，你还是更喜欢「黄金的时刻」广场上那个金灿灿的版本——但那个应该是非卖品，可惜。
You prefer the glitzy golden version at the Golden Hour Plaza over the classic Clockie look. Shame that one's not for sale, though.
说起来，流梦礁那个钟表小子雕像还挺独特的。如果商品化，也许能打通一条差异化赛道？
Speaking of which, that Clockie Statue at Dreamflux Reef is pretty unique. If we commercialize it, maybe we can carve out a niche market?
「小青龙」手办白模。手办造型明显是鳞渊境雕像的复刻，你严重怀疑，建模师根本就是在旅游取材时顺手抄了一下。

Unpainted "Dragon Young" figurine. The figurine's design is clearly a replica of the statue from Scalegorge Waterscape. You strongly suspect the modeler just straight-up copied it while on a research trip there.
不过这尊雕像的模特并不是丹恒。诶，是谁来着？好像是…丹恒的兄弟？（开玩笑的，是龙尊雨别。）
But the model for that statue isn't Dan Heng. Huh, then who is it? It seems like... Dan Heng's brother? (Just kidding, it's the high elder Yubie.)
无论如何，此物当与丹恒老师共赏。如果把这个当礼物送给他，他的表情一定会很害羞吧。
At any rate, this treasure is meant to be enjoyed alongside Mr. Dan Heng. Were I to present this to him as a gift, I'm certain he would be quite flustered.
不得不说，这些毛茸茸的小动物看起来就是超级无敌可爱——难怪《绒绒号》漫画能够如此火爆。
Gotta say, these fluffy little critters are absolutely, ridiculously adorable. No wonder The Fluffy comics are such a huge hit.
不愧是球棒浣熊！你稍微有那么一点自豪——即便是在海报中，也要站C位。
As expected of the Baseball Raccoon! You can't help but feel a swell of pride seeing it command the spotlight, even on a poster.
海报上的帕姆看起来很小。但这其实是近大远小的原理，它的体型和列车一致。（骗你的。）
The Pom-Pom on this poster looks tiny, but that's just forced perspective. Pom-Pom is actually the same size as the Express itself. (Just kidding.)
飞驰的列车、斑斓的银河…即使在宇宙时代，对于的大部分人来说，开拓之旅也像个无比新奇的天外之梦。
A speeding Express, a dazzling cosmos... Even in the cosmic age, the trailblazing expedition still feels to most like an impossibly wondrous dream.
看着眼前的海报，饶是早已经历了无数大风大浪，你依旧有些心潮澎湃。
Looking at the poster before you, despite all you've seen and done, you still feel your heart stirring with excitement.
你突然发现自己已经无法想象，如果当初没有选择登上列车，余下的人生该是何等无聊寡淡。无论如何，列车都是你永远的家。

It suddenly hits you that you can't even imagine how dull and empty your life would've been if you hadn't chosen to board the Express that day. No matter what happens, the Express will always be your home.
没人能拒绝列车长的可爱眼神攻击，就连你也不行。
No one can resist the conductor's adorable puppy-dog eyes, not even you.
「列车长天下第一可爱！反对意见不予接受！」
"The conductor is the cutest in the entire universe! All objections overruled!"
看着画面中的小可爱，你突然发现：明明下车才没多久，你就已经开始怀念起列车长柔软毛绒的手感了。
Looking at the cuties in the picture, you suddenly realize: Even though you only just left the Express, you're already missing the feel of the conductor's soft, fluffy fur.
脱线的球棒浣熊，寡言的汪汪丹，活泼可爱的三月兔、知性优雅的姬奇猫、沉稳可靠杨叔…还有无敌可爱的列车长帕姆，共同组成了温馨的列车大家庭！

Together, the whimsical Baseball Raccoon, the quiet Woof Woof Dan, the bubbly March Bunny, the intelligent and elegant Himekat, the ever-dependable Mr. Yang, and... the utterly adorable conductor Pom-Pom form one big happy Express family!
也许只要列车继续行驶，《绒绒号》就不得不继续更新吧。加油呀！模糊二维马老师！
Maybe as long as the Express keeps running, The Fluffy will have to keep getting updates too. You got this, Blurry_QR_Colt!
你突然想起车上还有个「闭嘴」，但转念一想，如果加上了这个家伙，《绒绒号》怕不是要变成冷笑话大全。
You suddenly remember there's still "Shush" on the express, but then again, if that guy were added to the mix, The Fluffy would probably turn into a bad joke anthology.
贝洛伯格「银鬃尉官」兵人模型。
A figurine of Belobogian Silvermane Lieutenant.
时至今日，你还清晰地记得来自他们的正义群殴，以及那让人很难不产生心理阴影的「盾反」。
To this day, you still vividly remember their righteous punches and that traumatizing "Shield Reflect"... Truly the stuff of nightmares.
这些持盾哥只是存护命途的战士？不，那简直是克里珀本珀！
These shield-wielding dudes are just warriors of the Preservation? Nah, they're basically Qlipoth in the flesh!
贝洛伯格「银鬃近卫」兵人模型。
A figurine of Belobogian Silvermane Soldier.
负责冲锋陷阵近卫战士，造型上没什么辨识度，但销量意外地非常不错。
The vanguard warrior figurine, while not particularly distinctive in design, has unexpectedly flown off the shelves.
稍微有些遗憾：这个系列竟然没有「贝洛伯格琥珀王」——呃，好吧，你是说「自动机兵•甲虫」 。
The only slight letdown is that this series doesn't even have a "Belobogian Amber Lord." Uh, well, you mean the "Automaton Beetle."
列车组团扇、盲盒、玩偶、列车模型…总之就是官方出品的基础款。场馆中有很多这样的摊位，但据说总体上还是供不应求。

You've got all the basic set of official merchandise here: Express Crew fans, blind boxes, plushies, Express model kits... Stalls like this are everywhere at the venue, but word is they still can't keep up with demand.
毛茸茸之活力四射三人组——相较对面两位而言。
The Fluffy and Energetic Trio... compared to those two, anyway.
毛茸茸之沉稳寡言二人组——相较对面三位而言。
The Fluffy and Stoic Duo... at least, compared to those three.
园区接驳车，又名「帕姆的小火车」。名字是帕姆、造型是帕姆、广播音源也是帕姆。他们好爱，真的。
Park Shuttle, also known as the "Pom-Pom's Tiny Express." Named after Pom-Pom, designed like Pom-Pom, with broadcast announcements voiced by Pom-Pom. They really love Pom-Pom. Like, really.
某种意义上，列车长这下真的与列车合体了。
In a sense, the conductor has truly become one with the Express now.
据说有不少粉丝的梦想，是被宇宙无敌可爱的「列车长」撞进二次元、转生绒绒号的世界……
Rumor has it that countless fans dream of being blasted straight into the world of The Fluffy by the universe's most adorable conductor...
「应援棒自取，免费的…」「啊？手办？手办不可以，自己去摊位上买啦！」
"Help yourself to fan lightsticks, they're free..." "Huh? A figure? No way, you gotta buy those at the booth yourself!"
介于官方邀请了模糊二维马老师到场签售，场馆中增设了许多摊位，专门出售《绒绒号》漫画。
Since the organizers officially invited the legendary Blurry_QR_Colt for a live autograph session, they've set up tons of booths all over the venue selling The Fluffy comics.
看着这些漫画与写真集的封面，你不由再次感慨：啊，我真是天生丽质难自弃！
Looking at the covers of these comics and photo books, you can't help but sigh once more: Ah, such natural beauty is impossible to hide!
说起来…既然是仙舟会场，难道不该有些仙舟话本吗？
Speaking of which... since this is a Xianzhou venue, shouldn't there be some Xianzhou storybooks around?
这舞台布景有点东西…就连「绝灭大君」都能包装得如此可爱又无害。
This stage design is sure something else... Even a Lord Ravager gets packaged up to look so cute and harmless.
看到这个「幻胧胧」，你不由对绒绒号中「三月兔血战幻胧胧」的剧情产生了强烈的好奇——模糊老师的瞎编能力到底有多强啊？
Seeing this Phanty, you can't help but burn with curiosity about the plot of "March Bunny's Bloody Battle with Phanty" in The Fluffy. Just how much yarn can Blurry_QR_Colt spin?
不知为何，你脑中突然响起个既熟悉又陌生的BGM：「幻胧胧呀吱悠悠地转，这里的风景真好看~」
For some reason, a familiar yet strange BGM suddenly starts playing in your head: "Phanty goes round and round~ Round and round, round and round~"
虽然要对战的《云五战队》变成了《破晓战队》，但回过头来再看，观众的反响似乎意外地不错？
Even though the opponent switched from the High-Cloud Squadron to the Daybreak Squadron, looking back now, the audience's reaction seems surprisingly positive, isn't it?
值得庆幸的是，虽然景元变成了景元元，但神君至少还不是神君君……
On the bright side, while Jing Yuan became Jing Yuanyuan, at least the Lightning-Lord has yet to become Lightning-Lordy...
你暗暗计划：如果有机会，一定要邀请景元来观赏舞台剧《血战鳞渊境！云五战队集结！》
You decide then and there: If the chance comes up, you absolutely have to invite Jing Yuan to watch the stage play Bloodbath at Scalegorge Waterscape! High-Cloud Squadron Assembles!
仙舟人开的仙舟特色风味小吃摊——别说，味道还挺正宗。
A Xianzhou food stall run by actual Xianzhou natives. And hey, the flavors are pretty authentic.
你突然有点怀念高阿姨家新鲜出锅的大包子…看来是时候回一趟金人巷了。
A sudden craving for Tall Auntie's fresh-steamed buns hits you... Looks like it's time for a trip back to Aurum Alley.
你现在想吃： 貘馍卷、鸣藕糕、琼实鸟串、热浮羊奶、仙人快乐茶…可惜这里都没有卖！
Your stomach has decided: It wants tuskpir wrap, songlotus cake, berrypheasant skewers, steamed puffergoat milk, Immortal's Delight... Too bad none of it's sold here!
正所谓「包子大、饺子小，几个包子就吃饱」——这脸盘大的包子，一般人确实也吃不了几个。虽然真的很好吃就是了。

As the saying goes: "Buns are large, dumplings are slight. A few good buns will do just right." When the bun's as wide as your face, no wonder most people can only manage a couple. That's the thing, though: They're unbelievably delicious.
《苍天航路绒绒号》官方授权合作书店，绝赞火热贩售中。
Books are flying off the shelves at the officially licensed Fluffy Across the Blue bookstore!
你翻开面前的《如我所书》，看着里面熟悉的故事，一些自豪、怀旧与悲伤的情绪涌上心头。真怀念啊……
The pages of As I've Written fall open to stories you know by heart. A tide of pride, nostalgia, and melancholy wells up inside you. Ah, those were the days...
你兴冲冲地翻开面前的《悬锋大辞典》，却遗憾地发现是本手账。不过也有好消息：买手账赠迷迷贴纸。

You eagerly flip open the Grand Kremnos Dictionary in front of you, only to discover with disappointment that it's actually a journal. Fortunately, the silver lining is that it comes with a free Mem sticker!
鉴于「翁法罗斯区」尚在建中，这个书店或许是目前整个园区里，翁星浓度最高的地方了。
Given that the Amphoreus Zone is still under construction, this bookshop is probably the most Amphorean spot here.
你又想起「开拓」的承诺：逐火的故事将传唱群星。人们会记得，翁法罗斯是一个辉煌、壮丽的世界。
You recall the promise of Trailblaze: The story of Flame-Chase will echo across the stars. People will remember that Amphoreus was a brilliant, magnificent world.
你以为是饮料瓶？其实是大引擎哒！
You thought it was a drink bottle, didn't you? Actually, it's a giant engine!
看到这玩意，你突然想起绒绒号某段剧情：列车组为了唤醒匹诺康尼的其他动物，占领了苏乐达汽水工厂…用苏乐达给列车补充燃料。

Seeing this thing suddenly reminds you of a certain plot from The Fluffy: To wake up the other animals in Penacony, the Express Crew seized a SoulGlad soda factory... and used SoulGlad to refuel the Express.
虽然严重怀疑虚照收了不少广告费，但考虑到在匹诺康尼，苏乐达确实也可以当做燃料使用，你又释然了。
You seriously suspect Nihilux pocketed a hefty advertising fee for this, but considering that in Penacony, SoulGlad can indeed be used as fuel, you let it slide.
改良款自助苏乐达机，可惜只有原味。
An improved self-serve SoulGlad machine, though sadly it only has the original flavor.
神主日超大立牌，很酷很还原，并且阐述了一个重要的道理：行车不规范，亲人两行泪。
The Great Septimus mega standee, super cool and totally accurate! It also teaches people an important lesson: Reckless driving leads to your loved ones in tears.
不知道星期日看到这东西会怎么想…或许有机会可以把人骗过来玩玩？
Wonder what Sunday would think if he saw this thing... Perhaps he could be tricked into coming over to try it out sometime?
某种意义而言，在这辆「帕姆接驳车」上的你们，又何尝不是一种击破队……
In a sense, aren't you guys on this Pom-Pom Shuttle a Break team yourselves...
这些气球或许是本场Fes中，于你而言最有诱惑力的东西了。唯一美中不足的是——如果是十连该多好。
These balloons are probably the most tempting thing at this festival for you. The only thing that's missing is... if only you could do a ten-pull.
此处乃「众神嗤笑之地」，不录于图册、不载于典籍，仅潜匿于某些秘不可宣的旧梦里……
This is the "Land of Sneering Gods," a place absent from maps, unrecorded in any tome, hidden away only in certain unspeakable dreams of old...
或许你有幸来到了「画中世界」破碎的一角。透过支离的颓垣、扭曲的空间，某些古老的存在，正悄无声息地向你揭开面纱的一角。

Perhaps you've stumbled upon a fractured corner of the "World in Canvas." Through the shattered ruins and distorted space, certain ancient presences are quietly lifting a corner of their veil before you.
行至此处者，尚可归去吗？归于神之怀抱者，理当融于那永恒的幸福之中……
Can those who have come this far still turn back? Those who return to the embrace of the gods should merge into that eternal joy...
自那深深处，流动的异彩卷作涡旋；那是泥泞的星云、剧毒的花蜜、腥甜的融泥，是某个庞然之物沉眠萎败的一角——
From the depths below, swirling colors twist into a vortex. A murky nebula, venomous nectar, sickeningly sweet sludge... a glimpse of something colossal lying dormant and decay...
你的感官难以抑制地为之所吸引，灵魂亦然；就像污水浸透棉帛，你感受到无孔不入的泥泞，正势不可挡地向着「你」这个存在攀爬而来，呼唤着你——
Your senses are drawn to it irresistibly, as is your soul. Like sewage soaking through cotton, you feel the all-pervasive mud crawling toward the very essence of "you," unstoppable, beckoning...
前来这里，与「我」融为一体，回归宇宙万物起初的模样——始亦是终，一即是万、万亦是一，这里万物永恒流溢、永恒静寂……

Come here, become one with "me," and return to the primordial state of all things in the universe, where the beginning is also the end, the one is the all, and the all is the one. Here, everything flows eternally in everlasting silence...
新一届机铠对战大赛即将开幕，现正火热报名中。
The next Mechatron Battle Tournament is almost here! Sign up now to join the action.
武道宗师，格斗之王，用你的实力赢取百万奖金，改变人生吧！
Martial arts masters, kings of fighters... Use your skills to win a million-credit prize and change your life!
由于观众对机器人大战的热情，机铠对战一度成为了演艺圈的跳板，数十位著名的机铠武打演员都曾在对战赛中取得耀眼的成绩。
With everyone so hyped for robot fights, mechatron combat has become a massive stepping stone for showbiz. Tons of famous mechatron action stars actually started their careers in these matches.
大批量生产的低规格机铠玩具，因其简单的拼装方式与亲民的价格饱受欢迎。
These mass-produced, entry-level mechatron toys are a huge hit thanks to how easy they are to build and their affordable prices.
有时候，量产机的人气，或许会超乎你的想象。
You'd be surprised how much people love these mass-produced models!
从头到脚，为每位机铠提供最精致的改造选择，现在购买，还增异色替换件一盒。
Get the most stylish mods for your mechatron from head to toe. Buy now and we'll even throw in a set of alternate color parts!
零件请认准珠星财团，质量有口碑，售后有保障。
Stick with Pearluxe Corp for all your parts. Their quality is top-notch, and the after-sales support is second to none.
珠星牌喷漆，限定变色龙款，五彩斑斓的黑与五光十色的白，和我们一起，成为最靓的机铠。
Pearluxe Spray Paint, Limited Chameleon Edition! Featuring "iridescent black" and "prismatic white." Join the club and be the trendiest mechatron around.
珠星牌喷漆，无毒无味无污染，一秒上色，三秒固着，使用前记得摇一摇哦。
Pearluxe Spray Paint: non-toxic, odorless, and eco-friendly! Applies in a second and sets in three. Just remember to give it a good shake before use!
（先问问列车长发生了什么事吧……）
Where is the strange thing you were talking about?
列车长有难，岂能坐视不管。
The conductor is in trouble, we can't just stand around and do nothing.
不知道，但就在列车里帕！没有人比帕姆更熟悉阿基维利的列车了，车里有奇怪的东西，帕姆就是能感觉到！
Pom-Pom doesn't know, but it's in the Express! No one knows Akivili's Express better than Pom-Pom. There is something strange in here, Pom-Pom can feel it!
你也一起来找吧，一定要找出来。
Help Pom-Pom look for it. We have to find it.
你也被叫回来了？看来帕姆这次是认真的……
Did they send for you as well? Looks like Pom-Pom is quite serious this time...
瓦尔特先生有察觉到异样吗？
Mr. Yang, did you notice anything unusual?
没有。我对危险和敌意还算敏锐，但列车里没有这种感觉。
No. I have a heightened sense of hostility and danger, but I don't sense anything on the Express.
银河这么大，或许有某种能够隐形的生物来到了我们的列车……
The galaxy is huge. Maybe there's some kind of organism that can become invisible visiting us...
列车长说的怪东西是什么啊？
What is this strange thing the conductor is referring to?
不清楚，帕姆也说不上来，它只是有种直觉。
Not sure, Pom-Pom couldn't put it into words. It's like a gut feeling.
但关于列车的事，我倾向于相信帕姆的直觉。
I lean towards trusting Pom-Pom's instinct when it has to do with the Express.
Where are March 7th and Dan Heng?
姬子让他们去别的车厢了，这里有我们就足够啦。
Himeko had them go to a different coach. We can take care of what's going on here.
呀，你也回来啦…辛苦你了，{NICKNAME}。
Himeko, did you notice anything unusual?
没有呢，但既然帕姆这么担心，就一定有什么东西在列车里吧。
Nope, but there must be something on the Express if Pom-Pom is getting so worked up.
不要紧的，如果大家找不到，我还有别的办法…虽说花费在这种事上有点遗憾，但总不能让列车长一直烦恼下去啊。

Don't worry, I have another way to deal with this if no one can find anything... It's just a little wasteful to use it on something like this. But we can't let it continue to stress the conductor either.
嗯，它对星穹列车有很深的感情，会危害这辆列车的事情总是让列车长特别焦虑呢。
Yep, Pom-Pom has a deep connection with the Astral Express. Anything that could harm the Express always stresses out the conductor.
…所以你们也帮忙教育教育阿七，让她不要随便鼓捣列车上的设备喔。
So... help me educate March about not messing with the equipment on the Express.
检查一下车厢，看看有没有什么奇怪的地方吧。
Check the coach and see if there is anything out of the ordinary.
咖啡机似乎没什么异样。你试着做了杯咖啡，味道不错，至少比姬子请你喝的要好……
There doesn't seem to be anything wrong with the coffee machine. You make a cup of coffee, and it tastes good, at least better than Himeko's.
你仔仔细细检查了每一片叶子，每一条根茎，甚至翻开了每一块泥土，并没有发现躲藏着的神秘间谍。
You scrutinize every leaf and rhizome, turn over every piece of dirt, and do not find anything suspicious.
灯泡散发着柔和的光线，你狠狠地瞪着它。
The light bulb emits a soft glow, and you stare hard at it.
一面镜子吸引了你的注意…你感到疑惑——
A mirror catches your eye... You're confused.
确实。你不记得列车上曾经有这么一面镜子。
You don't remember there being such a mirror on the Express.
The mirror is broken. Why isn't it repaired?
镜子对你的善意表示感谢，但问题是，它是什么时候出现的？你不记得列车上曾经有这么一面镜子。
The mirror is grateful for your kindness. But the question is... when did it appear? You don't remember there being such a mirror on the Express.
这是个非常棒的问题，可惜镜子无法回答你，你甚至不记得列车上曾经有这么一面镜子。
That's a great question, but the mirror can't answer it. You don't even remember there being such a mirror on the Express.
更奇怪的是：列车上的其他人似乎都对这突然出现的镜子视若无睹…也许你应该再检查下它，或者问问别人有什么看法。要节约时间的话，就选择前者。

What's even stranger is that everyone else on the train seems to turn a blind eye to the sudden appearance of the mirror... Maybe you should re-check the mirror or ask the others about it. If you want to save time, you should check it yourself.
你也被叫回来了？看来帕姆这次是认真的……
Did they send for you as well? Looks like Pom-Pom is quite serious this time...
What's the deal with that mirror?
（瓦尔特先生好像真的看不见它……）
(Looks like Mr. Yang really can't see it...)
看不见的镜子？我好像听说过……
An invisible mirror? I think I've heard something about that...
呀，你也回来啦…辛苦你了，{NICKNAME}。
What's the deal with that mirror?
What are you talking about? What mirror?
(Seems like I'm the only one who can see it...)
呜哇！帕帕帕姆就知道一定定定有什么古怪！
Wahh! P—P—Pom-Pom knew something strange was going on!
Wahh! Even you didn't find anything...?
你靠近镜子，看见镜中一道身影慢慢显现——却一点也不像你。镜子里是一个戴着兜帽的女孩，脸部被古怪的面罩遮挡，看不清她的样子。

You approach the mirror and see a figure slowly emerging in it — but it doesn't look like you at all. In the mirror is a girl in a hood, her face hidden by a strange mask, making it impossible to make out her appearance.
还没等你反应过来，女孩就跨出了镜子。
Before you can react, the girl steps out of the mirror.
哇喔，这就是「星穹列车」吗？
Wow, so this is the Astral Express?
Oh, I haven't introduced myself yet...
话音未落，你就抡起棒球棍砸向女孩。球棒穿过她的身体，又穿过镜子，仿佛她们根本不存在。
Before any words are spoken, you swing your baseball bat at the girl. The bat goes through her body and through the mirror as if they don't even exist.
Wait a minute! I'm not one of the bad guys!
我是「流光忆庭」的信使，接下来的日子要借宿贵列车，请多指教！
I'm a messenger from the Garden of Recollection. I will be staying on the Express from now on. It's very nice to meet you!
Err, it's nice to meet you too.
谢谢！你真友善～不过，还是让我解释一下吧——
Thank you! You're a friendly one! However, I should still explain—
Do you have the approval of the train's owner?
呃，所以我主动来见你了呀，让我解释一下——
Erm, that's why I'm here. Let me explain—
Garden of Recollection? What is that?
「流光忆庭」是追随星神浮黎的组织，作为「记忆」的信使，我们放弃了肉身，以模因的形式穿梭于宇宙，为浮黎搜寻星海间最珍贵的记忆。

Garden of Recollection is an organization that worships the Aeon Fuli. As a messenger for the Remembrance, we surrendered our worldly bodies and traverse the universe in the form of memes to search the stars on behalf of Fuli for the most precious memories.
我能够来到这里，就说明你一定认知过「记忆」和「流光忆庭」的概念。你所持有的记忆为忆庭开启了复制的信道，将我植入到你的脑海里……

Seeing that I'm able to be here, you must have already come to understand the concept of Remembrance and the Garden of Recollection. The memories that you possess have activated a pathway for the Garden of Recollection to make copies and implant me into your thoughts...
其实我们可以悄悄地跟随你，没有人会发现。不过，忆庭认为你是特别的：你拥有的是极其稀有的宝贵记忆，并且未来还会得到更多……

We can actually just follow you without being noticed. However, the Garden of Recollection believes that you're special: The memories that you possess are extremely rare and precious, and it's very likely there'll be even more in the future...
所以我想还是和你打声招呼比较好！我注意到你还接受过「窃忆者」的概念——忆庭可不希望你把我们当成小偷或窃贼！我们所做的一切，都是为了崇高的目的。

That's why I thought it'd be best if I introduced myself to you! I noticed that you've also received the concept of Memosnatchers... The Garden of Recollection wouldn't want you to mistake us for thieves or crooks! Everything we do is for a higher purpose.
I believe we've become acquainted now.
我什么时候认知过那些概念…
When did I come across those things before...
关键词是「黑塔」和「光锥」——你在与上述概念接触时，植入了「记忆」、「流光忆庭」与「窃忆者」。
Some keywords and hints to your question: Herta and Light Cone — when you came in contact with them, the concept of Remembrance, Garden of Recollection, and Memosnatcher were implanted in you.
黑塔女士对我们有点成见。因此忆庭认为，还是由我给予你正确的概念比较好。
Madam Herta has a slight prejudice against us, so the Garden of Recollection believes that it'll be best if I provide you with a proper understanding of these concepts.
你们有什么崇高的目的？
我们要让宇宙不会因「毁灭」而遭到忘却。
We want to prevent the universe from being forgotten because of the Destruction.
即使物质泯灭了，只要它还存在于记忆中，就将一直活下去。
Even if all matter is annihilated, it can continue to live on in the form of memories.
你这样上车跟小偷有啥区别？
So you're just smuggling yourself on board the express?
那当然不一样啦，我没有肉体，因此算不上偷渡。
There's a big difference, of course. I don't have a material body, so it doesn't count as smuggling.
嗯，就把我当成招贴画上的人好了。你总不能指责海报里的卡通角色偷渡吧？
Yup, just imagine me as someone from the posters. It would be strange if you were to scold someone from the cartoons for smuggling, right?
So, you're a... burglar of physical bodies?
我都自愿放弃了，还偷它干嘛！
Why would I want to steal a material body? I gave up my own willingly!
和你说这些，我也不是毫无所求～别怪我说话直白哦，{NICKNAME}，忆庭想要保存你的记忆。
There is actually something that I need. So I'll get right to it. {NICKNAME}, the Garden of Recollection wants to preserve your memories.
但是别担心，我们不会「夺走」它，只想从你那里复制珍贵的片段。你可以把它看作一笔交易……
But don't worry, we won't take it from you. We just want to make a copy of the precious moments. You can see it as a trade between us...
这是专为保存你的记忆而创造的「忘却之庭」。我们希望你能够定期来到这里，重新唤起失落的回忆。忆庭将从中取走想要的，然后给予你回报——以物质和光锥的形式。

This is the Forgotten Hall created specially to store your memories. We hope that you can visit this place regularly to rekindle your lost memories. The Garden of Recollection will extract the memories they want and give you something in return — in the form of matter and Light Cones.
来吧，我以旧身的记忆发誓：你不会有任何损失。
Come, I swear on the memories of my past self that you won't be at a loss for anything.
What is it? Are you not feeling well?
I don't think I'm used to this...
That's how it is the first time.
啊，那就好，我还怕你生气了呢。
Ah, that's good. I was afraid you'd be angry.
Why do we still have to fight inside?
强烈的刺激会让你放松对潜意识的防守，只有这样，我们才能复制你的记忆呀。
A strong stimulus will lower your guard against your subconscious. Only then will we be able to copy your memories.
以后，你只需要定期进入「忘却之庭」就可以了。我们会给予你丰富的回报。
From now on, all you have to do is enter the Forgotten Hall periodically, and we'll give you an abundant amount of rewards.
呃，对了——我停留在星穹列车上的事情，最好只有你和我知道。我不会在你的伙伴们面前现身，所以你也不要说，好吗？
Erm, about me being on the Astral Express... It'd be best if you kept it between the two of us. I won't reveal myself to your companions, so make sure you don't tell them about me, okay?
No, I have to tell them.
那样的话，忆庭只好屏蔽他们的记忆了…别逼我这么做呀，我也是有苦衷的！
If that's the case, the Garden of Recollection will have to block out their memories... I really don't have a choice, please don't make me do that!
太好了，谢谢你{NICKNAME}，很高兴你是个通情达理的人。
Perfect! Thank you, {NICKNAME}. I'm glad you're so pleasant to work with.
Then what should I tell everyone?
呃，你可以说是一株相位灵火，或者异问魔。它们出现消失都很常见，应该能糊弄过去……
Erm, you can say that it's just a Phase Flame or an Inquisition Spirit. They often suddenly appear and then vanish. You should be able to get past them with that...
好啦，想再见到我，你就靠近镜子吧。
Alrighty then, just step close to the mirror if you ever want to find me.
「流光忆庭」的人在这里？在列车上……
Someone from the Garden of Recollection is here? On the Express...?
看来传闻是真的，「记忆」的令使们没有实体，只允许想被看见的人找到他们。
Seems like the rumors are true. The Emanators of the Remembrance don't have a physical body and only those they allow can see them.
列车才不是随随便便让他们待着玩的地方帕！一定要把她赶走！
The Express is not a place they can just come and go as they wish! We have to kick them out!
嗯，我也这么认为，和忆庭打交道太危险了。关于「记忆」的交易也…十分蹊跷。
Yes, I agree. Dealing with the Garden of Recollection is dangerous, and the trade of memories is... a shady business.
我们去研究对策，列车长，放心吧。
We'll come up with something. Don't worry, conductor.
An Inquisition Spirit...? On the Express?
嗯，这种生物确实会突然出现，向遇到的第一个人提问…{NICKNAME}，它问了你什么？
Yeah, these creatures do suddenly pop up sometimes and start questioning the first person they see... {NICKNAME}, what did it ask you?
It asked... Why does one plus one equal two?
这倒证明了我一直以来的猜想：看来异问魔应该是「智识」的造物。
This actually confirms a theory that I've always had: It seems like Inquisition Spirits are a creation of the Erudition.
It asked... What it should ask me?
这倒证明了我一直以来的猜想：看来异问魔应该是「神秘」的造物。
This actually confirms a theory that I've always had: It seems like Inquisition Spirits are a creation of the Enigmata.
它问…最近有什么高兴的事？
It asked... if anything joyous happened recently.
这倒证明了我一直以来的猜想：看来异问魔应该是「欢愉」的造物。
This actually confirms a theory that I've always had: It seems like Inquisition Spirits are a creation of the Elation.
谁的造物都不行帕！一定要把它赶走！
Pom-Pom doesn't care whose creation it is! It has to go!
是的，瓦尔特，你知道怎么做吗？
Indeed. Welt, do you know what to do?
别担心，它应该已经走了——异问魔一次只问一个问题，得到答案后，它就会去另一个地方。
Don't worry, it should be gone by now — Inquisition Spirits only ask one question at a time. It will go elsewhere once it gets an answer.
我都那样拜托你了，你还是告诉他们了啊。
I asked you so candidly yet you still told them.
哼，那我就只好封锁了他们的这段记忆——抱歉，但我没得选。
Hmph, then I'll have to seal this portion of their memories — I'm sorry, but I don't have a choice.
我的事情除了你以外，谁也不能知道。一旦发现他们记忆里出现了我的关键词，就只能修改掉了…你为什么不相信我？我不会伤害他们的。
You and only you can know about me. If a keyword related to me shows up in their memories, then we'll have no choice but to get rid of it... Why don't you trust me? I won't hurt them.
但是忆庭…我们有自己的法则。
*sigh* We have our rules at the Garden of Recollection.
谢谢你，{NICKNAME}。很抱歉让你说了谎，请理解，流光忆庭…我们有自己的法则。
Thank you, {NICKNAME}. I'm sorry you had to lie, but please do understand... We have our own rules at the Garden of Recollection.
Do you want to enter the Forgotten Hall?
About Fuli and the Garden of Recollection...
I'll try to answer to the best of my abilities!
Tell me about Fuli the Remembrance.
我可以给你关于浮黎大人的记忆……
I can give you the memories related to the Aeon, Fuli...
少女挥了挥手，仿佛掷出一枚小石子，水面不断荡开涟漪。你突然想起——
The girl waved her hand, as if tossing a small pebble that caused the water surface to keep rippling. You suddenly remember—
浮黎，行于「记忆」命途的星神。祂为行将毁灭的宇宙保留下珍贵的回忆，以待他日重生之时所需…记忆就在这里戛然而止。
Fuli, the Aeon on the Path of Remembrance, preserves the precious memories of a dying universe for its eventual rebirth... Here, the memories abruptly come to an end.
只有这些啦。我可没有荣幸保留亲睹那位大人的体验。
That's all I have. I don't have the honor of keeping the experience of seeing the Aeon, Fuli with my own eyes.
Tell me about the Garden of Recollection.
哎？我记得我向你解释过的吧？你还真健忘耶。
Huh? I thought I already told you about that. You really are forgetful.
你突然想起少女曾说过的话，言犹在耳——
You suddenly remember what the girl had said, and the words begin ringing in your ears—
「流光忆庭」是追随星神浮黎的组织，作为「记忆」的信使，我们放弃了肉身，以模因的形式穿梭于宇宙，为浮黎搜寻星海间最珍贵的记忆。

Garden of Recollection is an organization that worships the Aeon Fuli. As a messenger for the Remembrance, we surrendered our worldly bodies and traverse the universe in the form of memes to search the stars on behalf of Fuli for the most precious memories.
What is the purpose of collecting memories?
「有形之物的消逝，必然带来无形之物的湮灭。」
"The disappearance of those with form will inevitably bring about the obliteration of those without."
你瞧这片宇宙，反物质军团的风暴扫过，文明的星火就像风中残烛。即便没有纳努克，许多世界也摇摇欲坠，步入黄昏。任由文明的记忆消逝是不可饶恕的破灭。

Look at the galaxy. After the incident with the Antimatter Legion, civilizations are like dying embers in the wind. Many worlds wither and crumble even without Nanook's influence. It is unacceptable to allow the memories of civilizations to simply vanish.
所以忆庭决定收集并保管他们的记忆。灾难结束后，这些记忆的碎片将为消逝的一切拼出重生的蓝图。

That is why Garden of Recollection has decided to collect and safe keep their memories. Once the crisis ends, the fragments of these memories will shape a blueprint of rebirth for everything that has disappeared.
I'd like to ask about something else...
What does it feel like to lose your physical body?
随着女孩的一字一句，你感到肉体沉重、滞缓、疲惫，它是水泥浇成的外壳，举手投足慢如背壳的蜗牛，慢如一个纪元的缓缓流逝……
With each of the girl's words, you feel heavier, sluggish, and tired. Your body is a shell caste from concrete and its movements are as slow as a snail, as slow as an era gradually passing by...
现在的我不用再担心极寒和高热、痛痒饥渴、不必担心刀枪和太阳磁暴——我不再是人啦。
I don't have to worry about the cold, heat, pain, hunger, flesh wounds, or solar storms — I'm not human anymore.
没有肉身，没有肾上腺素、后叶催产素、多巴胺和其他让人喜怒哀乐的东西。这也给了我一种更中立的角度去审视人类的思想和欲求。可以说，我离自由意志更近一步了。

Without a material body, I don't have adrenaline, oxytocin, dopamine, or anything that causes different emotions in people. This allows me to judge human thought and desire with an even more neutral position. You can say that I'm another step closer to having free will.
当然，这么方便也不是没有代价的——代价是我得凭借人们的记忆才能四处活动。唔…所以这种存在形式究竟算不算自由呢？
Of course, there is a price for the convenience — the price is that I rely on the memories of others to move around. Erm... And would you consider this kind of existence to be free?
The girl suddenly enters a state of deep contemplation.
Are you able to read other people's memories?
是啊。我只能借着人们的记忆活动。我的每一次出现，移动，消失，都是在读取某人的记忆啊。
Yes. I'm only able to move around due to the memories of others. Every time I appear, move, or disappear, it means I'm reading someone's memories.
…如果是担心我会偷看、窃取、操作你的记忆，那你就多虑了。忆者接受过严格的训练，任何违背律令的记忆操作会立刻终止我的存续。

But you don't have to worry about me peeping, stealing, or controlling your memories. Memokeepers have undergone rigorous training. Anything we do that goes against the rules will result in the immediate termination of our existence.
虽说有些「窃忆者」能绕开禁令…但我不是那种人！
Although some Memosnatchers can bypass the restrictions... Um, I'm not one of them!
What do you actually look like?
好奇我面具之下的长相吗？哼…那就拿足够份量的回忆来和我交换吧！
Are you curious about what I look like under this mask? Hmph... Then bring me enough memories to exchange for it!
I'd like to ask about something else...
能恢复我失去的记忆吗？
Are you able to restore my lost memories?
不行，这是被禁止的。我可是守法忆者，我拒绝！
No, that's forbidden. I'm a rule-abiding Memokeeper. I refuse!
为什么我的记忆很宝贵？
你可是{RUBY_B#万界之癌}星核 {RUBY_E#}的载体耶！能在那样一股力量进入身体后还好好活着，甚至使用它的力量……
You're a receptacle for a {RUBY_B#Cancer of All Worlds}Stellaron{RUBY_E#}! You're able to survive and even wield its power...
这样的人会拥有怎样的过去和未来，又将为宇宙留下怎样的忆质？流光忆庭对此很有兴趣。
The Garden of Recollection is very interested in what kind of a past, future, and influence on the universe someone like this will have.
为什么只有我能记得你？
Why am I the only one who remembers you?
很抱歉，我限制了别人对我的回忆。
I'm sorry, but I've restricted others from having memories of me.
每个人对自我、对外物的记忆都是独一无二的，为了保持它的独立性和纯粹，就让咱们的交易成为仅限于你我之间的小秘密吧？
Everyone has a unique memory of themselves and everything around them. In order to keep that uniqueness and pureness unspoiled, let's keep our dealings a secret.
I'd like to ask about something else...
I don't have any more questions.
你看着镜子旁的女孩：该怎么向同伴交代呢？她像是读出了你的心声，轻轻一笑。
You look at the girl in the mirror. How will you explain this to your companions? She laughs softly, as if she saw through your concerns.
谢谢你，仙舟之行的回忆，已经保存下来了～
Thank you. I've already kept this journey aboard the Xianzhou in my memories.
啊，原来你是来赴这个约的，太好了，我就知道能指望你。
Ah, so you're keeping this appointment, then. That's great. I knew I could count on you.
我已经把禁区里的年轻铁卫都动员起来了，他们听说能跟你这个传奇人物交手，都兴奋得不得了。
I've mobilized all the young Silvermane Guards in the restricted zone, and they're all beyond pumped to be fighting against a legend like yourself.
相信我，这次你想穿过铁卫的防线，难度绝对要大上好几倍！
Trust me, you'll find it several times tougher this time if you want to break through the defensive line!
等你准备好了就跟我的副官聊聊吧——演习随时可以开始，我们只需要把禁区的场地快速布置一下就行。
Speak with my aide when you're ready — we can start the drill any time. It just takes a moment to set everything up in the restricted zone.
Hats off to you too, my guy.
银鬃铁卫后勤安保部第三支队副队长，「副官」，向您报道。哔——啵。
Aide, deputy head of division 3 of the Silvermane Guards' logistics and security department, reporting for duty. Beep — boop.
随时可以开始铁卫军事演练。一切听您部署，教官。
Silvermane drills are ready to go. Everything is waiting on your command, drillmaster.
下一场演练什么时候开始？
只要本「副官」一声令下，随时可以开始。
As long as I give the order, it can start at any time.
你想立刻开始第二轮禁区演练吗，{NICKNAME}教官？
Would you like to start round two now, Drillmaster {NICKNAME}?
明白。立即开始布置禁区演练的场地。
Got it. Setting up the venue for restricted zone drills.
给我介绍下这轮演练的目标。
Fill me in on my target for this round.
这一次的演练目标是——击败「少校」。
The goal of this drill is to defeat the Major.
另外，你还需要再次调度禁区里的齿轮栈桥。
You'll also need to configure the gear bridge in the restricted zone once again.
既要脑子，也要肌肉。哔——啵。
It takes not just brains but also brawn. Beep-boop.
明白。一切服从你的安排，{NICKNAME}教官。
Got it. Everything's been done as per your order, Drillmaster {NICKNAME}.
你好啊，{F#小妹妹}{M#小哥}，在「画中世界」各处穿行的时候还习惯吗？
Hey there, {F#young lady.}{M#buddy!} You getting the hang of traversing the World in Canvas yet?
需要的话可以在我这儿练习一番？
Need some practice? You can always try your luck with me.
想要练习的话，可以随时来找我。
If you ever want to practice, come find me anytime.
先来点简单的练练手吧。
Let's start with something easy to warm up.
居然要挑战高级难度？很难的哦！你确定吗？
You're going for the hard difficulty? It's really tough! You sure about this?
Do you even need to ask?
Whoa, hold on a sec. You got me there.
下一场演练什么时候开始？
只要本「副官」一声令下，随时可以开始。
As long as I give the order, it can start at any time.
你想立刻开始第三轮禁区演练吗，{NICKNAME}教官？
Would you like to start round three now, Drillmaster {NICKNAME}?
明白。立即开始布置禁区演练的场地。
Got it. Setting up the venue for restricted zone drills.
给我介绍下这轮演练的规则。
Fill me in on the rules for this round.
没错。最后一轮演练的内容就是「人海战术」。
Correct. This final drill stage tests out your human-wave attack strategy.
明白。一切服从你的安排，{NICKNAME}教官。
Got it. Everything's been done as per your order, Drillmaster {NICKNAME}.
哦，我听说了！你的表现之精彩，让参加了演练的铁卫都心服口服。
Oh, I heard that! Your performance has been so wonderful that all the Silvermane Guards you faced off against have been won over.
你的名声已经传遍铁卫禁区了，{NICKNAME}。大家都盼着能和你再多交流交流呢。
Your reputation has spread like wildfire throughout the restricted zone, {NICKNAME}. We're all looking forward to engaging frequently with you.
——不过，我猜你们手头上还有更要紧的事，对吧？那就祝你们万事顺利。
...But I guess you have more pressing matters to attend to, yes? Then I wish you all the best.
打的漂亮，{NICKNAME}教官。真希望我也能跟你一样强。
Well done, Drillmaster {NICKNAME}. I hope I can one day be as strong as you.
我要去找少校制定训练计划了。我的下一个目标是当上队长。
I'm off to make a training plan with the major. My next goal is to make it to captain.
谢谢你给了我启发，{NICKNAME}教官。哔——啵。
Thank you for enlightening me, Drillmaster {NICKNAME}. Beep-boop.
还能再组织一次禁区演练吗？
Can we put together another round of restricted zone drills?
当然可以。不过军费有限，重复演练可就没有配发的奖励了。
Sure. However, we have a limited military budget, so no rewards will be given for repeating drills.
你确定要再参与一次演练吗，{NICKNAME}教官？
Are you sure you want to do another round of drills, Drillmaster {NICKNAME}?
哔——啵。收到指示。立刻开始布置演练场地。
Beep-boop. Instructions received. Setting up the drill venue...
不得不说，能认识你是我莫大的荣幸。我要把见证你作战英姿的数据多备份几次！
I have to say, meeting you has been my greatest honor. I'd love to capture lots more data about your heroic combat moves!
那帮不敬业的工程师，稍微遇到点小故障就要把我的系统格式化——我才不会让他们得逞，哈！哈！哈！
Those cursed engineers are always formatting my hard disk whenever having the slightest glitch — but I won't let them get away with it. Bwahaha!
Hey, {NICKNAME}! I can't believe you are here!
我本来都不指望了——毕竟你之前已经帮了我们那么多，再提要求就有点蛮不讲理的意思了。
I didn't expect you would come. After all, you have offered us a lot of help. I'll be imposing on you if I ask anything more from you.
唷，血气方刚！有我年轻时的派头，哈哈哈！
Wow, I admire your fighting spirit! You remind me of myself when I was young, hahaha!

那是当然，这怎么可能让你白出力呢？于情于理都说不过去啊。

您、您如果准备好上前线了，就请跟我说一声。我、我带您去找奥列格兵长。

又、又见面了，贝洛伯格的英雄，{NICKNAME}！
{NICKNAME}! We m—meet again, Hero of Belobog.

行动的目标和上次一样…扫、扫荡残响回廊，击败所有徘徊的敌人。

{NICKNAME}, it's so great to see you again! Captain O—Oleg is full of praise for you, saying that you're incredibly brave with brains to match...
大家都说谦虚是种美、美德，但如果有您的实力，应该也用不着谦虚了吧？

残响回廊后来怎么样了？

噢，你还惦记着这事呢？真是个热心肠啊，哈哈哈。
Oh, you're still thinking about that? What a kindhearted person, hahaha.

但我们不会放弃。只要还有明天，我们就会坚持战斗下去。
But we cannot give up. As long as there's a tomorrow, we will continue with our fight.
「明天」——它是你帮我们争取来的宝贝，{NICKNAME}。我们不会挥霍它的。
"Tomorrow" — now that's a luxury that you've won for us, {NICKNAME}. We certainly won't squander it.
还能说什么呢？简直精神焕发。
What can I say? Simply splendid.
而且，不知道您注意到了没——我说话不利索的毛病已经彻底改正了！

您发现了？太好了！我正想告诉您，我说话不利索的毛病已经彻底改正了！

我接下来的梦想就是追上您的步伐，有朝一日能和您并肩作战！
My next dream is to follow in your steps so that one day we can fight together alongside each other!
你的梦想一定会实现的。
Your dreams will surely come true.
感谢您鼓励的话！不过话说回来……
Thanks for the words of encouragement! But then again...
北边前线传来消息，残响回廊里的怪物似乎又卷土重来了。

那些家伙真是没完没了，怎么烧也烧不完。前线缺少了您的战斗力，只靠铁卫兄弟们也很难再进一步了。

真的吗？可是我们没有什么东西能作为回报…即使这样您也愿意出手相助吗？

…感激不尽！我们这就出发，目标：残响回廊！

好的，随时欢迎你参观那里的工程。

You hear a faint electronic voice: The Synesthesia Beacon has been activated.
(Stop being stupid. Peppy is talking to you!)
在激活信标后，你意识到，这或许就是艾丝妲所说的「惊喜」。

You whip out a baseball bat and start flailing at the metal door with reckless abandon. The rebounding reverberations cause your whole body to go numb, but the door does not budge.
We can't get in. What now?
佩佩歪着头沉思了起来，你努力克制着抚摸它毛茸茸的头顶的欲望。
Peppy tilts its head in contemplation. You resist the desire to ruffle its fluffy head.
（这个高度…好像可以钻过去汪？）
(This height... I think we can get through, woof?)
（但{NICKNAME}长这么高，蹲下来会被卡住吧？还是得靠佩佩我啊！）
(But {NICKNAME} is so tall. Won't you get stuck if you crouch? Better leave it to Peppy!)
（{NICKNAME}，现在，伸手摸我——不是让你摸我的头，你找下我背上的装置，看到那个按钮了嘛？）
(Now, {NICKNAME}, reach out and touch me. No, not my head! Look for a button on my back — do you see it?)
在佩佩的指导下，你找到了它所说的按钮并按了下去。
With Peppy's instructions, you find the button it is talking about and press down on it.
你听到了一阵冰冷的电子音：「是否开启同步模式？」
You hear an emotionless electronic voice: "Activate sync mode?"
（同步模式就是让你连接我的思维信号，我们通过信标交流，快试试。）
(You can connect to my thought signal with sync mode. We can communicate via the beacon. Give it a try.)
一种强烈的眩晕感朝你袭来，你扶额，低头望向自己的鞋尖——
An intense wave of dizziness hits you. You clutch your temple, lowering your head, and stare at the toes of your shoes...
你感到异样，那毛茸茸的一团，似乎是你的…脚？
You feel strange. That fluffy pile, it appears to be your... feet?
Help, I've turned into a dog!
(Do you think I'd be in your dream?)
（这是小姐特意给我定制的信标功能，很神奇吧！）
(This is the custom beacon that Missy gave me. It's awesome!)
（还要去追踪失窃的奇物呢，走吧。）
(We still have to track down the missing curio. C'mon.)

(These origami cranes serve as the dynamic security for the Curio. They will change their location in real-time based on the Curio's position...)
（跟着这些千纸鹤走，「分装快乐」肯定就在前面！）

(Oh no... I can't beat these giant baddies...)

（{NICKNAME}，接下来由你来指挥，带我从这里穿过去——一定要保证我不被怪物发现噢。）
