（好了，没你什么事了，这里不太安全，你还是别待着这儿。）
(All right, you're in the clear now. It's not safe here, so you'd better not linger.)
你们…别走…我有个朋友被困在这里了嘤…它不敢出来…你们能帮帮忙吗？
Don't... Don't go... A friend of mine is stuck inside here... It dares not come out... Eeep, can you help?
是不是刚才遇到的那个？
Is it the one we just met?
嘤…你身上好像有它的味道…还真是，谢谢嘤……
Eeep... you do have its smell on you... You're right, thank you...
Sure, let's go look for it.
Let's go back and report in first.
Okay... I'll stop bothering you eeep...
小狗用它毛茸茸的头拱了拱你的手，你熟练地按下了它背上的信标按钮。
The puppy nudges your hand with its fluffed head. You instinctively press the beacon button on its back.
（原来丢失的「分装快乐」不止一套，另外一套的下落嘛…我找到线索了。）
(There is more than one Joy Filtration Set lost. As for the other set's whereabouts... I've found a clue.)
（佩佩和{NICKNAME}是天下第一好的搭档，你会帮佩佩的对吧？）
(Peppy and {NICKNAME} are the world's best detective duo! You'll help Peppy, right?)
小狗湿漉漉的舌头舔了舔你的手，见你不为所动，又咬着你的手套不肯松口。
The puppy's sloppy tongue licks your hand, but seeing that you are unmoved, bites down on your glove and refuses to let go.
佩佩朝你露出了个灿烂的笑容。
Peppy flashes a splendid smile at you.
Of course, we're the world's best!
佩佩朝你笑了笑，尾巴摇动得比之前还要欢快。
Peppy smiles at you, its tail wagging more profusely than before with happiness.
拿走的东西该还回来了。
What was taken should be returned now.
你是说，那个奇怪的罐头吗？
拿你偷走的奇物报答吧。
Hand over the Curio you stole as compensation.
噢，你们是说我那个灰扑扑的罐头吗？
Oh, you guys are talking about that dusty gray can of mine?
这东西我见过，但不是我偷的，我连碰的资格都没有呢。
I've seen it before, but I didn't steal it. I don't even have the right to touch it.
不是你偷的，那是谁偷的？
If it wasn't you, then who stole it?
我看到过它拿那个「罐头」把玩，它很凶，连看都不让我看。
I saw it playing with that "can." It was fiercely protective with it too, and it wouldn't let me even glance at it.
这家伙就是个大骗子，它说自己是阮•梅女士的助手，阮•梅女士派它来管理大家。
That guy is a big fat liar. It said it was Ruan Mei's assistant, and that Ruan Mei dispatched it here to manage everyone.
我和我的小伙伴就是因为质疑它，才被赶到这里来…可惜，其他人都相信它那套说辞。
My buddies and I were banished here because we doubted it... Such a shame that everyone else believed its lies.
(We have to find the butler and retrieve the Curio...)
你们要找它？恐怕有点麻烦，它把控着房间的出入权，恐怕不会让你进去。
You're looking for it? That's gonna be hard, I'm afraid. It controls access to and from the room, and it won't let you in.
关于管家，你还知道什么？
What do you know about the butler?
我知道的只有这些了。不过，我的伙伴们也跟它打过交道。
That's all I know. But, my buddies have also interacted with it.
可惜我们走散了，或许…你可以去找找看，或许它们会知道点什么。
It's a pity we all got scattered, or... You could go look for them — they might know something.
(The access control system is completely done for, woof!)
（这门卡住了汪！别乱动，这门很重，会砸伤你的！还是同步到我身上来吧！）
(The door's stuck, woof! Don't move unnecessarily! The door might fall on you! Better sync up with me!)
(Don't worry! This device set is super stable!)
关于管家，你还知道什么？
What do you know about the butler?
「管家」啊，它总是自吹自擂， 说自己<color=#dbc291ff>「通过终端和阮•梅女士保持联系」</color>。
The butler's always tooting its own horn, saying that it <color=#dbc291ff>keeps in touch with Ruan Mei via the terminal</color>.
它还说，自己是阮•梅女士独一无二的创造，和我们不一样，它是一种更高级的生命，没有生理需求，所以<color=#dbc291ff>不需要进食</color>。
It also said that it was a unique creation from Madam Ruan Mei's, unlike us, and that it's a higher lifeform without biological needs, so it <color=#dbc291ff>doesn't need food</color>.
(Let's go take a look somewhere else.)
（前面危险，千万要躲开，别被它们发现了！）
(Danger up ahead. Avoid at all costs. Don't get spotted by them!)
（好险啊，可别再被它们逮到了。）
(That was close. Don't get caught by them again.)
（这里有陌生的气息，咱们过去看看吧。）
(There's a strange air about here. We should take a look.)
(Were you the one calling out just now?)
Anyone there? I'm so cold... So lonely...
Do you know about the butler?
对方别有深意地看了你一眼，沉吟了片刻。
It gazes at you profoundly and mutters to itself for a moment.
这家伙信众很多，你得<color=#dbc291ff>当面揭穿它的谎言</color>才行。
This fellow has many believers, so you'll have to <color=#dbc291ff>expose its lies</color>.
最好还是<color=#dbc291ff>去它身边调查</color>看看吧，或许会有收获。
It'd be better to <color=#dbc291ff>investigate by its side</color> — we may have some luck.
I know you... You shouldn't get too close.
关于管家，你还知道什么？
What do you know about the butler?
我和大家…都是被它赶出来的，它不让我们回去。
Everyone and I... were driven out by it. It wouldn't let us return.
说什么<color=#dbc291ff>「怪物破坏了大门的锁，门开不了。」</color>
It said something about <color=#dbc291ff>monsters destroying the door's lock and causing it to get stuck.</color>
至于其他的，我就不清楚了。
I'm not too sure about the rest.
对了，我有个朋友，它也知道一些内情，不过它性格孤僻，不愿意和我们过多来往，我也不知道它现在在哪儿。
By the way, I have a friend who knows some stuff behind-the-scenes, but it's a lone wolf and doesn't mingle with us often, so I don't know where it is.
你要是有机会，可以去找找它，说不定它今天心情好，愿意跟你聊两句。
If you have a chance, go look for it. If it's in a good mood, it might exchange a word or two.
（这个舱段还藏着别的造物？{NICKNAME}，我们该怎么办？）
(There are other creations hidden in this zone? {NICKNAME}, what shall we do?)
不了，我们还得回去复命。
Nah, we need to report back.
（{NICKNAME}，「管家」的事，我要回去问问小姐，等查什么了，我再喊你。）
({NICKNAME}, I'll have to ask Missy about the butler. I'll let you know when I've found something.)
（我知道那家伙在哪儿了，就躲在禁闭舱段里！）
(I know where it is — it's hiding in the seclusion zone!)
（{NICKNAME}，佩佩知道你最厉害了，能不能陪我去……）
({NICKNAME}, Peppy knows you're the strongest. Can you come with me...)
小狗满怀期待看着你，它歪着头，眼睛闪闪发光。
The puppy gazes at you expectantly, tilting its head, its eyes shimmering.
佩佩朝你摇了摇它的小尾巴。
Peppy wags its little tail at you.
It has to be me, of course!
佩佩瞪大了双眼，被你的自信所震慑。
Peppy widens its eyes, awed by your confidence.
(Time is of the essence. Let's go!)
（我闻到房间里有几丝「分装快乐」的味道，进去看看吧。）
(I caught a few whiffs of the Joy Filtration Set in the room. Let's go in and take a look.)
（味道很淡，可能不超过<unbreak>20</unbreak>个黑塔系统时。）
(The scent is faint, probably no more than <unbreak>20</unbreak> Herta system hours.)
（这里是监控室，可能只是拿在身上路过的…也可能是在这里暂存过？）
(This is the monitoring room. It could be carried by someone who was passing by... or it could have been stored here?)
（…哎我的狗脑子转不过来了，还是去找「管家」吧。）
(...Brr, my puppy brain just can't seem to understand. Let's go and find the butler instead.)
你和佩佩转身准备离去，自动门升起，却尴尬地停滞在半空中。
As you and Peppy turn to leave, the automatic door rises, yet suspends awkwardly in midair.
（这套门禁系统还能不能好了。）
(Is this access control system going to be any good?)
（我记得安保系统后台可以控制门的开关，我钻出去瞧瞧？）
(I remember that the backend of the security system controls the opening of doors. Let me go in and take a look?)
（等等，先别急着进去，它们好像看到我们了，都在盯着你呢。）
(Wait, don't rush in. I think they've seen us — they are all staring at you.)
（别说怪话了，小点声，别打草惊蛇。）
(Don't say weird things. Just lower your volume. Don't act rashly.)
Ah, that's... that's hard for me to say.
造物向你使了个眼色，暗示你「管家」不让它多说。
The creation gives you a look that indicates the "butler" did not permit it to say too much.
不知道诶，这种事你还是问别人去吧。
I don't know. It's better if you ask someone else about it.
造物拒绝和你沟通，这似乎是「管家」下的命令。
The creation refuses to communicate with you. This seems to be an order from the "butler."
与其他终端不一样的是，这台终端与外界联系——基于数据保密原则，其他终端仅限在内网使用。
Unlike other terminals, this terminal can contact the outside world — due to data protection, other terminals are limited within the intranet.
你调取了终端的使用记录，但最近的对外通讯记录却是空白一片。
You pull the terminal's usage logs, but the most recent extra-communication logs are empty.
Forget it. Better not touch it.
一个平平无奇的冲水马桶，你决定——
An ordinary-looking toilet. You decide to...
Let Peppy go into the toilet bowl.
你决定让佩佩钻到马桶里，但很可惜，以它的小短腿，努力过却并未成功。
You decide to let Peppy burrow into the toilet. Sadly, with its short little legs, the effort is in vain.
你想起那个名为「新世界大门」的奇物，你说服了佩佩。
You remember the "Door to A New World" Curio and convince Peppy.
但很可惜，它连冲水按钮都够不着。
What a pity! It can't even reach the flush.
你决定回头跟艾丝妲说一下，找个机会给佩佩洗个澡。
You decide to tell Asta later on to give Peppy a bath.
一碟散发着淡淡香气的糕点，看上去没有被吃过的痕迹，放在桌子上太浪费了。
A plate of delectable pastries. It looks like it hasn't been eaten. It is too wasteful to leave on the table.
佩佩将它揣进了背包中，多节俭的狗狗啊，不知道它会不会把平时散落的每一颗狗粮都捡起吃掉。
Peppy tucks it into the backpack. What a thrifty puppy! I wonder if it'll usually pick and eat all the scattered dog food?
I don't understand what you're saying.
我的肚肚很饿，你要是能搞来美味的点心投喂我，那我就能听懂了。
My tummy is growling. If you can get me a tasty treat, then I might be able to understand.
吃起来有种被爱的感觉，让我想起了伟大的阮•梅女士……
It tastes like the feeling of being loved — this reminds me of the great Miss Ruan Mei...
这家伙根本不是它所吹嘘的那样，<color=#dbc291ff>什么不用进食，它特别喜欢吃炒饭</color>，我亲眼看到过好几次。
This guy is full of hot air, <color=#dbc291ff>claiming to not need food. It loves to eat fried rice</color> — I have seen it with my own eyes.
它把炒饭藏起来，背着我们偷吃！
It hides the fried rice, and eats it behind our backs!
哼哼，<color=#dbc291ff>炒饭被它标记过</color>，那味道…你随便找个人闻闻就知道是它，绝对抵赖不掉！
Hmph, <color=#dbc291ff>the fried rice is marked by it</color>, and that scent... Anyone who smells it can identify it. There is no denying it!
贪吃的「阮•梅」造物为你指明了某处。
This gourmand creation points you somewhere.
这附近的植株叶片与土壤上有可疑的油光——
There is a suspiciously greasy sheen on the leaves and soil in the surrounding area...
在你的指挥下，佩佩伸出短短的狗爪子，熟练地在种植区的土壤里刨了起来。
At your command, Peppy extends its short dog paws and skillfully digs into the planting area.
一个盒子散发着古怪的香味——
A box is emitting an odd aroma...
Shoo shoo shoo, where did this dog come from?
（和这家伙讲不通，还是等你来给它点教训吧。）
(Can't get through to this guy. Better wait for you to lecture him.)
新面孔？你是…空间站的科员？
New face? Are you... a space station researcher?
Enough of that. Hand over the Curio.
什么奇物？我根本就不知道你在说什么。
What Curio? I have no idea what you are talking about.
反倒是你们二位，怪物屡次袭击下，我们可是一直锁着门的，你们是怎么溜进来的，不解释一下吗？
The two of you, on the other hand — there are monsters rampaging outside, and we've kept the door locked up all this time. How'd the two of you get in? Care to explain?
You are the one who broke the access control!
压根就没有怪物袭击一事！
There never was a monster attack!
嘘，稍安勿躁。我是阮•梅女士的助手， 我身负管理大家的重责，我怎么可能欺骗大家呢？
Shh, hold your horses. I am Miss Ruan Mei's assistant, and I am responsible for managing everyone. How can I possibly lie to everyone?
阮•梅女士教导过我，真理越辩越明，真相亦如是。既然今天大家都在，那咱们就来辩个清楚——
Miss Ruan Mei taught me. The more you debate, the clearer the truth becomes. Since we are all here today, let's have a debate!
（你这家伙撒谎成性，我们今天就要来会会你！）
(Lying is second nature to this guy. Today we're going to show him who's boss!)
本来…基于阮•梅女士教导我的社交礼仪，我应该与新来的客人简单寒暄几句的。
Actually, based on the social etiquette that Miss Ruan Mei taught me, I should have exchanged pleasantries with the new guests.
你知道吗，阮•梅女士在制造我时使用了珍稀材料，这使我先天拥有极高的道德！我的人品，毋庸置疑！
Did you know, Miss Ruan Mei created me using rare materials. This makes me innately highly ethical! My character is unquestionable!
你说我有不道德行为，说我故意锁门把大家关在这儿，真是可笑——门禁开关安得这么高，我够都够不着！
Your claim of me behaving immorally, deliberately locking the door to trap everyone here is laughable. The access control switch is installed so high that I can't even reach it!
对未知时刻报以无穷的好奇，这就是推动科技发展的源动力。如果说好奇也有罪，那我认罪。
The thirst towards the unknown is what advances technology. If curiosity is a sin, then I plead guilty.
你注意到围观的「阮•梅」造物似乎并没有动摇。
You notice that the onlooking creations of Ruan Mei do not seem to be wavering.
阮•梅女士真的教过你这个吗？
Miss Ruan Mei really taught you this?
这不是文明生物的正常礼仪吗？你连这个都不知道？
Is this not normal etiquette for civilized beings? You don't even know this?
我不清楚你们究竟看不惯我哪一点，但是我从阮•梅女士身上学到了待人的耐心，有什么质疑，尽管放马过来，咱们一条条辩清楚！
I am unsure what is it about me that you dislike, but I've learned patience from Miss Ruan Mei. If you have a problem, then let it be known. Let's hash it out one by one!
极高的道德？我还获得过崇高道德的赞许呢，你有吗？连这东西都没有，你根本不配说自己有道德！
Extremely high morals? I've even received Praise of High Morals! Have you had them? If you don't even have that, then you are not fit to say you have morals!
我生而高贵，有阮•梅女士对我的赞赏就够了！
I am high-born, and it is enough that I receive praise from Miss Ruan Mei!
（好像不对，先天的一切都需要后天的培养，它跳过了它的自主行为没说，这里面肯定有问题！）
(Something is not right. Everything innate still needs to be nurtured. It didn't mention anything about its motivation. There must be something wrong here!)
够不着就不能锁门吗？万一你跳起来了呢？又或者是谁托举你呢？
Who says that you can't lock the door when it is out of your reach? What if you can jump? Or with someone lifting you up?
你干脆说我能膨胀变大，瞬间长成五米高算了，反正都是污蔑，没差。
You might as well say I can expand and grow 5 meters tall instantly? It's all slander anyway. Who cares?
（不对，门禁是自动感应的，由安保机器人管理！{NICKNAME}，它是在故意带偏话题，<color=#dbc291ff>我们有什么证据可以打它脸吗？</color>）

(That's not right. The access control system is auto-sensing and managed by security robots! {NICKNAME}, it is purposely diverting the topic. <color=#dbc291ff>What evidence do we have as rebuttal?</color>)
我们有证据！这是安保机器人提供的监控画面！
We have evidence! Here is the surveillance footage provided by the security robot!
对着门禁系统鬼鬼祟祟的人就是你！
The one that's acting suspiciously toward the access control system is you!
门禁系统？我之前没见过这东西，路过的时候有些好奇，就摸了摸。
Access controls? I have never seen this. It piqued my interest when I walked past it, so I touched it.
（那是人类社会的事，你又不是人类……）
(That's something for human society, and you're not human...)
…你要不要看看你是什么物种？
...Do you even see what kind of species you are?
Present evidence. (For when evidence is used incorrectly)
哼，我们手里可是有证据的，你看看这个！
Hmph, we have the evidence. Look at this!
呃？这和我说的话有什么相干吗？
Huh? What does this have to do with what I said?
你和我们不是一个物种，我们内里的「馅」决定了我们的性格与品德，阮•梅女士不断探索着生命的进阶形态，所以才创造出了独一无二的我。

You and I, we are not the same species. The "stuffing" inside us determines our character and integrity. Miss Ruan Mei's endless pursuit in advancing lifeforms has led to the creation of the unique being that is me.
同为「阮•梅」造物，我有多独特呢？比如说——阮•梅女士不希望我被低级的生理需求所困，所以我连进食都不需要！
How unique am I as a fellow Ruan Mei's creation? For example, Miss Ruan Mei does not wish for me to be affected by lowly physical needs, so I do not even need to eat!
围观的「阮•梅」造物们发出阵阵惊叹，你隐隐听到它们在讨论着人品与食物的议题。
Ruan Mei's creations huddle around and discuss something in astonishment. You can faintly hear them discussing character traits and food.
我感觉你也没多独特…还不如佩佩呢。
You're not that special... You can't even compare to Peppy.
（不需要进食就算高级？那小机器人岂不是比佩佩还高级？呸呸呸！）
(Not needing food means it's advanced? Then the little robot is more advanced than Peppy? Phooey!)
我很抱歉，从物种的复杂程度上说，的确如此……
I'm sorry, from the complexity of the species, it should be...
（这些「阮•梅」造物明明也会吃东西的，它肯定在撒谎！<color=#dbc291ff>我们有什么证据可以打它脸吗？</color>）
(These creations of Ruan Mei clearly eat. It's definitely lying!<color=#dbc291ff> What evidence do we have as rebuttal?</color>)
「不需要进食」？那这是什么？跟大家解释解释呗！
Not needing food? What is this? Explain yourself!
（上面有你的信息素，你的同族都闻得到，这可抵赖不掉！）
(It has your scent on it, and your kin can all smell it. There is no denying it!)
我…只是想尝尝空间站科员们吃的食物，有些好奇…好奇心的事嘛，是这样的。
I... only wanted to try what the space station researchers would eat. I am curious... And when you're curious, it's like that.
哼，我们手里可是有证据的，你看看这个！
Hmph, we have the evidence. Look at this!
呃？这和我说的话有什么相干吗？
Huh? What does this have to do with what I said?
这是由阮•梅女士决定的，评判标准不在于你。
This is decided by Madam Ruan Mei. You are not the judge of that.
咳咳，或许我在私德上有亏，但阮•梅女士委派给我的事务，我尽力做到了最好，从未欺骗过大家一丝一毫。
Ahem, maybe there is something wrong with my ethics, but whatever Ruan Mei assigns me, I will do my best. I have never lied to anyone.
她和我一直通过终端保持联系，她委托我代她管理大家，我向她汇报了大家的表现，她说对我非常满意。
She and I have always communicated through the terminal. She entrusts me to manage everyone. I've reported everyone's performance to her, and she is very pleased with me.
围观的「阮•梅」造物们大为震撼，这才发现自己被骗多时，怒不可遏。
The onlooking creations of Ruan Mei are extremely shocked — they are enraged at being lied to for so long.
你都承认自己私德有亏了，还好意思说没欺骗过大家？
You already admitted that you have poor ethics, and you still have the cheek to say that you did not lie to everyone?
一码归一码，好奇害死猫这种事很常见，我并没有否认过我在为人处世上偶有失误。但这并不是「欺骗」，我也从来没骗过大家。
That's a separate issue. Curiosity kills the cat. These things are common, and I've never denied that I make mistakes dealing with people. But this is not a lie, I have never lied to everyone.
我要是那种人，阮•梅女士怎么可能放心让我当「管家」呢？
If I were like that, why would Ruan Mei even let me be the butler?
汇报大家的表现？阮•梅又没给你们下达命令，需要汇报什么？一眼假！
Report everyone's performance? Ruan Mei never gave anyone orders. What is there to report? Lies!
不，你不了解她，她其实很关心我们，这里的一切，事无巨细，我都会向她汇报。
No, you don't understand her. She actually cares a lot about us. Everything that has happened, even the most trivial details, will be reported to her.
其实，她很关心大家，她说在离开之后，一直很想我们。
Actually, she cares a lot. Since she left, she's been missing everyone.
至于汇报的内容，最近吃了什么，做了什么，有什么烦恼，事无巨细，我都会整理好，再汇报给她。
I will tidy up the details of the report: Recent food intake, activities, or troubles. Matters big or small, I will report them back to her.
(就凭它那小短手，用什么汇报？终端的键盘按得过来吗？）
(What is it going to report with those short hands? Can it even reach the terminal keyboard?)

(It tries to divert the conversation. <color=#dbc291ff>What evidence do we have to present as rebuttal?</color>)
噢，你用终端和她联系。可是使用记录里压根没有你！
Oh, you used the terminal to communicate with her. But the communication history clearly does not reflect it!
…我是通过别的设备和她沟通的。
...I used other equipment to communicate with her.
这，这，我是通过别的设备和她沟通的。
I... I... I used other equipment to communicate with her.
（你撒谎，能联络外界的终端就这一台！其他终端只能在内网使用！）
(You're lying. This is the only terminal that can communicate with the outside world! All the other terminals can only be used on the intranet!)
哼，我们手里可是有证据的，你看看这个！

呃？这和我说的话有什么相干吗？

「管家」的谎言被你和佩佩一一戳穿，它呆立在原地，不知所措地望向你。
Peppy and you exposed the lies of the butler. It stands rooted to the ground, looking at you, distraught.
...I know. It's my fault, and I'm sorry.

东西就在后面里间，你们去拿吧…那里有个怪物游荡，我不敢靠近。
The thing is in the back. You can go get it... There are monsters roaming back there, so I dare not go near.
它沉默着，盯着地板上不存在的缝隙，恨不得想钻进去。
It keeps its silence, staring at the non-existent gaps in the floor, wishing it can hide within.
佩佩试图与它继续沟通，但它不再予以回应。
Peppy attempts to communicate with it, but it refuses to respond.
（算了，别管它了。我们还是去拿回奇物吧，我先解除同步，你可以先放松下筋骨。）

(This guy's attitude is pretty stubborn. I'm not good at communicating. Can you do the talking instead!)
(Have Peppy give it a sliding tackle)

佩佩低头看了看自己的爪子，又抬头看了看悬浮在空中的小机器人。

(Show the name card to the little robot)
（这是我的工牌，我要求打开自动门！）

识别成功，确认为空间站工作人员。
Identity confirmed. Space Station Staff confirmed.
很抱歉，你属于非人生物，无法为您开启大门。
Sorry, you are non-human. Not authorized to open the door.
(Have Peppy threaten it with the shutdown button)
（再不开门，我就狠狠戳你的关机按钮，让你强制关机！）
(If you refuse to open the door, I will hit your shutdown button and force you to turn off!)
威胁有用的话，还要安保机器人做什么。

我就算倒下了，门禁系统也不会让你过的。
Even if I am down, the access control system will still not let you pass.
（我告诉你，你知道你把谁关在里面了吗？那可是 {NICKNAME}！）
(Do you know who you have trapped inside? That is {NICKNAME}!)
（{NICKNAME}你该知道吧，那可是单手可取末日兽头颅的大能！）
(You should know {NICKNAME} — the one who has the power to single-handedly take on the Doomsday Beast!)
（你要是不开门，我就让{NICKNAME}{F#大姐头}{M#大哥}破门而出，然后一球棒击穿你的外壳，打爆你的芯片，让火花在你的线路里乱窜！）
(If you don't open the door, I will get {F#Miss}{M#Mister} {NICKNAME} to break down this door, shatter your shell with a bat and smash your chip. That will send sparks down your wiring!)
小机器人发出嘎吱声，像是害怕，它在空中抖动了片刻，这才开口应答。
The little robot creaks as if afraid. It vibrates for an instant in midair before acquiescing.
门禁系统激活中，请稍等片刻。
Access control activation is in progress. Please hold.
门禁权限已转移，监控预警提示：最近三个月捕捉到异常人像记录，请留意！
Access control rights have been transferred. System alert: Warning! Signs of intruders have been detected across the past three months.
（这是什么？上面这个身影是「管家」？还是它们一伙的？）
(What is this? Is that figure the butler? They are working together?)
（它<color=#dbc291ff>在对门禁系统做什么？等等，难道这是它做的手脚</color>？！）

(The door is open! I'm going to desync now. {NICKNAME}, hurry up and get out!)

(The sensory system is not working, and the door is locked.<color=#dbc291ff> There is no way in from here</color>.)
（<color=#dbc291ff>我们还是绕去另一边</color>吧，那边的感应门是正常的。）

Do you want to go on?

What are you going to do?
（你是人还是我是人？你问我？我还等着听你的命令呢！）

（…这样啊，还是回去问问小姐汪？）

听你这意思，是说我偷了你的东西？你知道我是谁吗，我怎么会干这种事！

Get out! You are not welcome here!

佩佩朝你伸出毛茸茸的爪子，示意你握住它的爪子。
Peppy extends a furry paw towards you, hinting you to grab it.
佩佩难以置信地望着你。
Peppy stares at you in bewilderment.

Peppy smiles at you, wagging its tail, and signaling you to leave this place together.
（我们已经收集到足够的证据了，这下可以狠狠打「管家」的脸了。）

（{NICKNAME}，我们回去再和他聊聊吧，看看他还有什么话要说，走！）

I—I... No... Don't come closer... Urk...

The "butler" said that everyone from the outside... are bad... You... Don't come any closer!
目睹了这一切的「阮•梅」造物们对「管家」感到极为不满，它们不愿再和它做朋友。
The Ruan Mei creations that have witnessed this are very upset at the "butler." They no longer want to be friends with it.
Hey, lighten up! What's got you so serious?
How did you end up turning into paper?
不知道！人家正呼呼呢，一睁眼就到这儿来了。既然你也在，难道说……
No clue! I was deep in sleep, and the next thing I knew, I woke up here. Since you're here too, does that mean...
完全不知道！人家正呼呼呢，一睁眼就到这儿来了。既然你也在，难道说……
I have no clue! I was deep in sleep, and the next thing I knew, I woke up here. Since you're here too, does that mean...
纸片？哪有，这不还是毛茸茸的嘛！你摸摸看？

发生了什么？人家正呼呼呢，一睁眼就到这儿来了。既然你也在，难道说……
What in the world? I was deep in sleep, and the next thing I knew, I woke up here. Since you're here too, does that mean...
是我们心有灵犀，在梦里相见了？

不知道！反正弄不清，先当成心有灵犀吧！

啊？为什么！说这种话，就算人家不可能讨厌你，但也是会伤心的哦！

虽然完全没有头绪，但人家好喜欢这个故事。人们说，梦是欧洛尼斯垂下的帷幕，这有没有可能是它送出的礼物？毕竟那位泰坦和我一样，特别喜欢你呢。
Although I'm completely in the dark, I adore this story. They say dreams are veils cast by Oronyx. Could this be a gift from them? It appears that Titan cherishes you just as much as I do.
I get it. A bedtime story.

睡前故事，喜欢！念给人家听！
I love bedtime stories! Please, read one to me!
{NICKNAME}，变灰了！别怕，人家会夸夸你，施展粉红色的魔法哦！
{NICKNAME}, you've turned gray! Don't worry, I'll cheer you up and sprinkle a little pink magic!
当然，不仅有奖励，还有许多人家的鼓励哦！夸夸你！

人家有种预感，刚才那颗漂亮的星星，也许就是带来故事的宝物。在今后的旅途中，我们还会遇见好多好多。
I've got a hunch that the beautiful star we just saw is a treasure that brings stories. In our travels ahead, we're sure to encounter many more.
所以睁大眼睛，一起来读书吧！我们要收集好多好多睡前故事，然后——{NICKNAME}，你来念给人家听！
So, let's keep our eyes peeled and dive into reading together! We need to collect tons of bedtime stories — then, {NICKNAME}, you can read them to me!

有些事不是我能决定的。

这样啊。那看来，翁法罗斯的忙碌日子也要暂时告一段落了。有空就在浴宫泡泡澡吧！香喷喷的！
It seems like Amphoreus' hectic days are winding down. Why not take a moment to unwind in the bath chamber? It's really relaxing!
好有活力！但人家总觉得，翁法罗斯的忙碌日子似乎要暂时告一段落了。这样也好，步调慢下来，生活才更放松。
Such energy! But it seems like Amphoreus' hectic days are winding down. That's a good thing. Slowing down helps to relax and enjoy life.
好深奥的发言呢。人家总觉得，翁法罗斯的忙碌日子似乎要暂时告一段落了。这样也好，生活就是既有命中注定，也有许多突然的奇遇。
Such a profound statement. I feel like Amphoreus' hectic days are winding down. That's fine, life is about destined paths and unexpected adventures.
接下来，可能会一段时间没有新的故事了。
There might not be new stories for a while.

They'll be in the next update.
为了这些特别的故事，人家会耐心等待哦，就在梦里…你也会回来的，对不对？
I'll wait patiently for these enchanting tales, right here in dreamland... You're coming back, aren't you?
人家也好急！但现在能做的，似乎也只有耐心等待了，就在梦里…你也会回来的，对不对？
I'm so eager, too! But for now, waiting patiently in dreamland is all I can do... You will return, won't you?
什么本？也是书吗？{NICKNAME}又开始说人家听不懂的话了！
What book? Is this another book? {NICKNAME}, you've lost me again with your words!
但为了这些特别的故事，人家会耐心等待哦，就在梦里…你也会回来的，对不对？
But for these enchanting tales, I'll wait right here in dreamland... You'll come back, won't you?
谢谢你呀，听着{NICKNAME}讲故事，人家就会开心起来。即便这件事不是每天都会发生，但人家会一直期待下去。再会，{NICKNAME}！
Thank you! Listening to {NICKNAME} tell stories always brightens my day even if it's not a daily treat. I'll always look forward to it. Until next time, {NICKNAME}!
人家注意你好久了，一动不动地，是在发呆吗？睡着了吗？还是说，有什么心事？
I've noticed you've been still for a while now. Are you lost in thought? Asleep, or maybe something's bothering you?
怎么又在发呆？还是说，是想和我聊聊天？

呀，超级主动的发言！人家都怦怦心跳了呢。
Wow, such a bold statement! It makes my heart skip a beat.
嗯哼，那你继续思考吧，我不问，嘻嘻。
Hmph, keep pondering then. I won't ask.
看来{NICKNAME}也和人家一样，是个内心细腻，又想象力丰富的孩子呢。

那我们一起来胡思乱想吧！放空、放空…让思绪飘向远方……
Let's get lost in thought together! Let's clear our minds and let our thoughts wander far and wide...
呀！眼睫毛动了一下，被我发现了！你明明没在睡觉！！

真是的，累了的话，就去休息呀。快去快去，我会来浴宫检查的哦。

偷看？怎么会呢，人家是在注视着你！睁大眼睛，注视！

因为这里太不可思议了，万一你遇见了什么危险，人家可怎么办呀……

这么晚了，还不睡呀？人家是该为深夜偶遇感到高兴，还是担心你作息不健康？

这个作息对我来说很正常。

小看我，我可是熬夜冠军。

来一场不眠之夜，做结尾~

光说我，你不也没睡觉嘛。

这是哪个地区的正常作息呀…这可不行。虽然你长得好看，但也要注意保养。

哎呀，怎么还自豪起来了，人家可没在夸你呢。

不可以不眠！皮肤会变差的，还会水肿！水肿哦！！

哎呀——是新的故事？{NICKNAME}，怎么自己悄悄看呢？人家也要一起。
Ooh — new stories? {NICKNAME}, why are you off reading them by yourself? I want in, too!
有故事的地方就有迷迷，难道人家是「记忆精灵」吗？可这个称呼不够可爱……

真的吗？那等下讲故事的时候，人家可是会听得很认真的！
Really? Then when it's time for the story, I'll listen super seriously!
Just so I can spoil it for you.
不！可！以！敲你的小脑袋哦！用粉红色的魔杖敲！
No! Way! I'll bonk you on the head — with my pink wand!
你知道吗？奥赫玛到处都是迈德漠斯的传闻，这个人身上充满了故事…「王子」都是这样的吗？
Did you know that Okhema is full of stories about Mydeimos? He's just bursting with tales... are all "princes" like that?
据说很久以前，他们俩打过一场，花了十天十夜，结果是不分胜负。
I heard that long ago, they fought each other for ten days and ten nights, and it ended in a draw.
要人家说，一定是因为两人各有所长。力量、体质、军略，是迈德漠斯更胜一筹，但白厄更全面均衡，更重视技巧，而且——运气也很好！

If you ask me, it must be because they have different strengths. Power, endurance, strategy — that's where Mydeimos excels. But Phainon is more balanced and well-rounded, more focused on technique, and — he's also really lucky!
难分伯仲呢…此外，坊间似乎还流传着「万敌是王座级强者」的说法。虽然不明白是什么意思，但某种程度上，也说明他的实力深不可测吧。
It's really too close to call... oh, and there's another rumor that "Mydei is a throne-tier warrior." I don't quite know what that means, but it sure sounds like he's a force to be reckoned with.
I'm really curious about the curse of immortality.
人家也很好奇！不死之身实在是很难解释呢，要是他的手臂不小心掉了下来…难道会变成「不死的手臂」吗？

哎呀，对不起，对不起嘛！肯定是假的啦！
Ah, sorry, I'm sorry! I made that up, it's not true!
Sounds like it'd make a great weapon...

This Luminflux Pyxis can not only be used as a weapon on the Cloud Knights' aurumatons, it can also assist the defense system and propulsion system. It is a wonderful invention~
小娃儿你别光盯着我呀，你去调整下这「匣里流光」的武器系统，测试还没结束嘞。

这岁阳武器经过多次折射，能量也没有衰减，要是用在斗舰编队上，肯定能大展神～威～嚯嚯哈哈哈哈！

这没有什么不好意思的，劳动创造价值嘛，这是你应得的。

Besides, the experimental data that I can process every day is limited, so let's stop here. I'll bring you something better next time.
老夫就知道你对「匣里流光」感兴趣，哈哈哈哈。正好，老夫刚刚想到了突破容量限制的办法，你刚好可以来试试。
Hahaha, I knew you would be interested in Luminflux Pyxis. Coincidentally, I just thought of a way to break through its capacity limit. Let's give it a try.

老夫得把这个点子记下来……
I need to get this idea down...
嚯，你这小娃儿不简单啊！已经足够称得上是我公输梁的助手了。

来来来，老夫就很欣赏你这样有动力的年轻人。

Recently, I have improved the craft of the receiver, and it has become movable. In this way, the Cloud Knights can use brain waves to launch wireless unmanned remote attacks on the battlefield in the future.
…说太多你肯定也听不懂吧。没事，你亲自上手试试就知道了。

要是我那些蠢货徒弟能有你这样的干劲儿就好了。

If we add a force field to bind the particles and twist the inescapable heliobus energy into one strand, it will make the Luminflux Pyxis able to cut anything.

I will write down this idea. If aurumatons can wield such a heliobus weapon, they will be unstoppable~

坏了，灵感跑了…哎，我们还是继续「匣里流光」的武器测试吧。
Oh no, it's gone... *sigh* Let's continue the weapon test for the Luminflux Pyxis.

You may not know, but the craftsmen in the Artisanship Commission are all obsessive in that way. For example, I have to use my right foot to take the first step in the Artisanship Commission. If I use my left foot, I will feel really uncomfortable.

Compared with the inside of the delve, the combat environment outside the ship must be very complicated. So, heliobus energy weapons may lose shooting accuracy and damage due to environmental factors...
要是这套「匣里流光」能够搭配精神感应系统，根据飞行士直觉自动变换排列排布方式，那样就能将能量收束于一处、增大出力了…真是妙～啊……

If this set of Luminflux Pyxis can be used with a psychosensory system to automatically change the arrangement according to the pilot's intuition, then the energy can be concentrated in one place and the output can be increased... It's wonderful~
哈哈哈，真是不错。老夫看到你麻溜地就解决了，真是越来越喜欢你了。
Hahaha, great. The problem is solved once I saw you. Now I just like you more.
哎，可惜我那些蠢徒弟，整天就知道空谈。上次他们居然问我「师傅，你说这金人如果装上岁阳能量的推进器，能把彗星给推回去吗？」
*sigh* My foolish apprentices only make empty talk. Last time they actually asked me, "Master, do you think this aurumaton can push the comet back if it is equipped with heliobus energy thrusters?"

I still feel that the aurumaton's design is a bit backward. As the near-ground levitation technology of the Artisanship Commission matures, why do aurumatons, which are heavy, have to have two feet? Isn't that cumbersome!
依我看，直接装推进器就好了呀！脚只是装饰而已，那帮蠢货怎么就不懂呢……
In my opinion, we can replace their feet with thrusters directly! The feet are just for decoration. Why don't those fools understand...

Not bad. The data collection for this experiment went well... Can I digress? What do you think of the shape of the aurumatons in our Artisanship Commission?
是吗？有徒弟说，这玩意儿要是能缩放比例做成机巧玩偶，可以赚一大笔经费。

可是我深表怀疑——毕竟它实在是太丑了。
But I doubt it. After all, they are too ugly.
我也觉得。这不就是个有门楼的机械偃偶吗？肯定没人买账的。
I feel so too. Isn't it just a mechanical puppet with a gate? I don't think anyone would buy it.
这次测试结束之后，老夫我应该会回格物院改改设计了，武器测试能进行得这么顺利真是多亏了你啊。要准备现在开始吗？
After this test is over, I should go back to the Sapientia Academe to modify the designs. It is thanks to you that the weapon test can go so smoothly. Ready to get started now?

哎，工匠总是要重复相同的错误……

虽说老夫身边也带着「浓云金蟾」、「灯昼龙鱼」机巧护卫，但在这里做武器测试还是不太安全…事实上，云骑军已经警告过我好几次了。
I do have the Golden Cloud Toad and Illumination Dragonfish with me, but it is still not safe to do a weapon test here... In fact, the Cloud Knights have warned me several times before.
看来我之前都错怪我的徒弟们了，不是他们不想来，而是他们不够聪明，不知道怎么躲过云骑军到工造司里来。
It seems that I was wrong about my apprentices before. It's not that they didn't want to come, they just were not smart enough to evade the Cloud Knights and come to the Artisanship Commission.
哈哈哈，还是小娃儿你靠谱。老夫我准备回去了，你也注意安全啊。
You're more reliable than them. I am going back now, you take care.
I want to do more tests...

"Who can develop the best heliobus weapon? Gongshu Liang from the Artisanship Commission!"
哎，可惜了，这里就你我两个人……
It's a pity that it's just you and me here...
哈哈，到时候就得叫他们「金人驾驶员」了。
Haha. We have to call them "aurumaton drivers" by then.
你说彗星才多大质量？要是用这「匣里流光」作推进器，随随便便就能给它推回去。
Comets are not that heavy. If we use the Luminflux Pyxis as a thruster, we can push a comet to wherever we want.
太卜大人吩咐我在此维护穷观阵，工作的其中一项便是例行占算。
The master diviner assigned me here to maintain the Matrix of Prescience, one task of which is routine divinations.
所谓「流水不腐，户枢不蠹」，大衍穷观阵是需要经常运行，以备需要时能随时投入卜筮的。
But just like sharpening a blade, the Matrix of Prescience Ultima needs frequent operation so that it can be ready for divination at any time.
绘星突然想到什么，向你投来的目光转了几转。
A thought suddenly pops into Huixing's head, and she looks you up and down.
对了，眼下负责穷观阵检修的匠人不在，能不能拜托{NICKNAME}配合我一同例行占算？
By the way, the craftsman responsible for the maintenance of the Matrix of Prescience isn't here at the moment. Could I trouble you to help me with some routine divinations please, {NICKNAME}?
Okay, but I don't just work for free.
那再好不过了，我还怕你不肯收报酬呢。
That's wonderful. I was afraid you'd turn down any payment.
This isn't my forte, are you sure about this...
就是外人才合适啊。您只需负责启动阵基就好。
Yes, in fact only outsiders like you are suitable. You just need to start up the base terminal, and that's all.
放心吧，绝不会让你白干。
Don't worry about it. I'd never let you do it for nothing.
听说你曾经为符玄大人启动过阵基，如何操作应该不需要我多费唇舌了吧。
I heard you once started up a base terminal for Master Fu Xuan, so I shouldn't have to waste my breath telling you how to operate things.
例行占算并不复杂，让阵法的星纹与昭示图案一致即可。
Routine divinations are not complicated at all. Just match up the star pattern on the matrix with the prompt.
辛苦了，这是我准备好的报酬。
Good job. Here's the reward for you, then.
另外，例行占算还会继续…如果{NICKNAME}方便，也请务必拨冗协助。
Also, I need to keep making more routine divinations... If you don't mind, {NICKNAME}, perhaps you could find the time to help out some more.
I'll come back next time then.
有了你的帮助便足够了。
Your help is more than sufficient.
何况举手之劳的活计，却有报酬可拿，想来您也不会拒绝吧？
The job is a piece of cake, but it's paid. I don't think you'd want to miss out on that, right?
占算用的方案已准备好了，这就开始？
The divination plan is ready. Shall we begin?
Just a moment. I have something else to do.
无妨，等您方便了之后再来找我吧。
It's no bother. Come back and see me when it's convenient for you.
今天占算的对象是什么呢？
What's the divination target for today?
一道上下波动的曲线罢了，不足为谈。
It's just a fluctuating curve. Nothing worth mentioning.
What exactly is this curve you're talking about?
没想到{NICKNAME}是个好奇心这么重的人呀，呵呵。
I never thought you'd be such a curious soul, {NICKNAME}. Heehee.
那我就直说了吧，我受某个不愿意透露姓名的老板委托，想预测星际和平公司期货贸易市场的价格波动。
Then I'll put it bluntly: I was commissioned by a manager who wishes to remain anonymous to predict price fluctuations in the IPC futures trading market.
Do you need to run predictions for that kind of thing?
大环境确实…不怎么样。但总有人不死心啊。这不，就有人求上门来了？
The macro-environment is... really not the best. But there's always someone unwilling to give up. As a matter of fact, it appears we have someone now?
大衍穷观阵就算个这玩意儿？
The Matrix of Prescience Ultima can make predictions about that, too?
风云变幻的行情，不正适合拿来演练穷观阵吗？
Don't you think ever-changing market conditions are good for training the Matrix of Prescience?
很好，接下来还有一个阵法要布设，走吧。
Great. There's another matrix to set up. Let's get moving.
Just a moment. I have something else to do.
了解了，如果你还想接着占算，我会在授事厅等着你。
Understood. If you want to run some more divinations again, I'll be in the Conclave Hall.
占算结果已经拿到，辛苦了{NICKNAME}啦。
Results obtained. Thanks for your hard work, {NICKNAME}.
你来得正好，我正打算去做例行占算，一起来吧。
You're just in time. I'm planning to run another routine divination. Let's do it together.
Just a moment. I have something else to do.
没事，等你方便了之后再来找我吧。
All good. Just come find me when it's convenient for you.
这次占算对象是什么呢？
What's the divination target this time?
不过是几个数字的组合罢了。
It's just a string of numbers.
I've got to ask: What's that!
哎，不知道你是否听说过「亚伯南安星系大乐透」？
Ah, have you by any chance heard of the Abelane Galaxy Lottery?
他们受常乐天君的神启，每八个标准月随机抽选出某位星系居民的注册编号，开奖的当天让那人变成大富翁。
Inspired by the Joyseeker, they pick out a random social security number from an Abelane resident once every 8 standardized months, and the jackpot is enough to make you a millionaire.
某位不愿意透露姓名的老板告诉我，他们会根据那组号码提前找到「天选之子」，和那人签订协议、平分奖金，顺便隐去身份，避免被他人盯上。

One of my managers who wish to remain anonymous told me that they would find the Chosen One of the day before their social security number is drawn out, and sign a contract with them to split the winnings — while helping hide their identity and all the personal targeting that comes with that.
大乐透早就定好了谁会中奖吧。
They've already picked out the next lottery winner, right?
据说那组数字是靠侦测引力波变化来敲定的绝对真随机。不然人家也不会求上门来了。
Rumor has it that the number set is determined by fluctuations in gravity waves, meaning it is truly a random number. Otherwise, people wouldn't be coming to look for me, would they?
不过对穷观阵来说，真随机也好，有人弄虚作假也罢，只要老板提供的信息足够，结果必然准确。
It doesn't matter to the Matrix of Prescience though whether a number is random or manipulated by someone. So long as I get enough data from this manager, the result is guaranteed to be accurate.
将穷人的钱聚集起来赌运气？
So it's pooling together money from the poor to gamble?
人类嘛，「损不足而奉有余嘛」。
Humans. We mitigate our losses and share our surplus.
往好了想吧，在短生种短到不可思议的生命里，能有机会翻身过几天暴富的日子，哪怕就几天，这盼头也足够他们去奔命了。

那是一种融合了竞速与对抗的运动比赛，运动员佩戴着护甲与武器在复杂的立体赛道上争夺比分，还有自己的性命。

某位不愿意透露姓名的老板告诉我，只要能帮他预测出比赛结果，他就能够赚得一笔可观的收入…而我们也能从中分得一杯羹。
One owner, who wishes to remain anonymous, told me he could make a considerable fortune if I could help him predict match results... And we'd take a cut of that.

而「无罪大乐透」则是同一个星系的监狱里举办的盛事。他们会抽选一个犯人暂获一日自由，其他的犯人得在那一天替他把苦役干了。

Well, there's also an Innocence Lottery over in the same star system — in their prisons. The prize draw offers one prisoner one day of freedom, and all the other prisoners have to pick up their hard labor for the day.
某位不愿意透露姓名的老板要我帮他预测出这个「天选之子」。
